Exodus8:23 Ninkore ogwatananeka egati y’abanto baane na abao. Ankio egekone eke nagekoreke.”

Exodus9:4 Korende Omonene nakore ogwatananeka egati ye chitugo chi’Abaisraeli na echi’Abamisiri. Ase echi’Abaisraeli ende tegokwa nonya neyemo.”

Exodus12:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni aria ase ense ya Misiri
Exodus12:2 “Omotienyi oyo nobe oyo bwe ritang’ani asemore

Exodus12:4 Korende onye abanto b’enyomba eyemo bare abake
Exodus12:5 Mochore emanwa y’omwaka oyomo etari na kemocho ase omobere oye
Exodus12:6 Mochigache goika rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi oyio. Agwo omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli bachinyenye mogoroba.
Exodus12:7 Barabwo goika baimokie amanyinga aria
Exodus12:8 Ase obotuko obwo barie chinyama chiria chisambire nomorero
Exodus12:9 Timoria chinde imbese gose chiyekire ase amache
Exodus12:10 Timotigaria gento kende goika mambia; onye kende kegotigara goika mambia mogesambe nomorero gesire.
Exodus12:11 Enchera morayerie nero eye: Mweboyie chinkini chiaino
Exodus12:12 “Naki ase obotuko obwo ninche ng’ete ense ya Misiri
Exodus12:13 Amanyinga ayio abe ekemanyererio ase chinyomba chiria morabe momenyete. Ekero ndarore amanyinga aria ning’ete mbatige inwe
Exodus12:14 Rituko eri inaribe asemore rituko rikoinyorwa
Exodus12:15 “Ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere goika morie emegati etabekiri memera. Rituko rie ritang’ani morusie ememera korwa chinyomba chiaino kegima
Exodus12:16 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani inamobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima
Exodus12:17 Goika mobe mokorenda rituko eri rinene ri’Emegati etabekiri memera
Exodus12:18 “Goika morie emegati etabekiri memera
Exodus12:19 Ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere ememera terorekana ase chinyomba chiaino nonya ng’ake; naki onde bwensi orarie egento kebekire ememera naatananwe korwa ase omoganda bw’Abaisraeli
Exodus12:20 Timoria gento kende gionsi kebekire ememera; mobe mokoria emegati etabekiri memera aande onsi morabe momenyete.”
Exodus12:21 Musa akarangeria abagaaka bonsi b’Abaisraeli
Exodus12:22 Erio moimokie chinsagia chia hisopo
Exodus12:23 Na ki Omonene nache aete ense ya Misiri aite Abamisiri

Exodus12:25 Ekero moraike ase ense eria Omonene arabae
Exodus12:26 Na agwo ekero abana baino barache kobaboria: Engencho y’amang’ana aya ninki?
Exodus12:27 Inamobairanerie: Eke nekeng’wanso ki’Epasaka y’Omonene
Exodus12:28 Abaisraeli bakagenda
Exodus12:29 Bogachia koba botuko gati
Exodus12:30 Farao akaimoka botuko

Exodus12:32 Ira ching’ondi chiaino ne chiombe chiaino buna mwaboririe
Exodus12:33 Abamisiri bagasorora abanto abwo
Exodus12:34 Abanto abwo bakaimokia amabomba abo ay’obosie ritang’ani atarabekwa memera
Exodus12:35 Abaisraeli konya bakorire buna Musa abatebetie; konya basabire korwa ase Abamisiri ebinto bie chifeta na ebie chitahabu amo ne chianga.
Exodus12:36 Omonene konya oeire abanto abwo ogwancherwa ase Abamisiri
Exodus12:37 Abaisraeli bakamanora korwa Ramesesi
Exodus12:38 Na omoganda omonene mono bw’abanto b’ebisaku ao ao bakagenda komo
Exodus12:39 Ase amabomba aria barentanete korwa Misiri bakaroisia emegati etabekiri memera. Ememera tiyarengeo
Exodus12:40 Abaisraeli konya bamenyire ase ense ya Misiri ase engaki y’emiaka amagana ane
Exodus12:41 Emiaka eyio amagana ane
Exodus12:42 Obotuko obwo nigo bwarenge obotuko bw’okorenda
Exodus12:43 Omonene agatebia Musa na Haroni
Exodus12:44 korende omosomba onde bwensi omogorwa chibesa ere ayerie gokwamwarokirie.
Exodus12:45 Omogeni omenyete asemore
Exodus12:46 Goika erierwe nyomba ime
Exodus12:47 Omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli goika bakore omoyega oyio.
Exodus12:48 Onye omomenyi omenyete bwoo bwanchete koria Epasaka y’Omonene
Exodus12:49 Ogochika nokomo ase omobiare bw’Abaisraeli na omomenyi oyomenyete ase egati yaino.”
Exodus12:50 Abaisraeli bonsi bagakora buna Omonene achigete Musa na Haroni.
Exodus12:51 Ase rituko erio erio Omonene akang’anyia emeganda yonsi y’Abaisraeli korwa ase ense ya Misiri.

Exodus25:30 Ase emesa eyio obeke emegati erabe ekoruegwa asende

Exodus25:34 Ritina rinyene ri’ekebekerero keria ribe nemegwekano ene y’ebisicha binga buna ebi’omolozi
Exodus25:35 Rimumu erimo ribe inse ya kera chinsagia ibere chigosoka korwa ase ritina. Ase ayio amamumu abe inse ye chinsagia echio isano nemo
Exodus25:36 Amamumu ayio amo ne chinsagia biroisigwe bibe egento ekemo ne ritina

Exodus27:1 “Oagache egesasimero gie chibao chi’emekonge. Obotambe bwaye bobe obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano
Exodus27:2 Ase chikoona inye chi’egesasimero oroisie emegwekano ye chingunchara inye. Chingunchara echio nigo chirabe egento ekemo negesasimero; oome gionsi netaai.
Exodus27:3 Okore chindogio chi’okobuucha ribu korwa ase egesasimero. Naende okore ebichiko
Exodus27:4 Okore boigo egechungi gi’etaai na obeke chibonyi inye chie chitaai ase chikoona chiaye inye.
Exodus27:5 Obeke egechungi eke korwa inse y’orosingo geike gochia gati‐gati y’egesasimero.
Exodus27:6 Obaache emiaro y’emekonge ase egesasimero ekio
Exodus27:7 Oyesoyie ase chibonyi echio chie chinsemo ibere chi’egesasimero
Exodus27:8 Egesasimero keagachwe ne chibao
Exodus27:9 “Oroisie eraaro y’Obomenyo. Ase ensemo ya irianyi oroisie ebitambaa bie chiusi chindabu chi’egatani chisisire
Exodus27:10 Chisiiro chikobibwata chibe emerongo ebere chie chitaai
Exodus27:11 Naboigo ase ensemo ya sugusu oroisie ebitambaa bire nobotambe bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko rigana erimo
Exodus27:12 Ase obogare bw’eraaro ensemo ya bosongo oroisie ebitambaa bi’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo etano
Exodus27:13 Obogare bw’ensemo ya bosio
Exodus27:14 Ase ensemo eyemo y’egesoero bibe ebitambaa bi’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi na atano
Exodus27:15 Naboigo nensemo ende y’egesoero bibekwe ebitambaa bi’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi na atano
Exodus27:16 Na ase egesoero oroisie egetambaa gi’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo ebere
Exodus27:17 Chisiiro chionsi echietanaine eraaro nigo chirabe ne chinuga na ebigobanio bie chifeta
Exodus27:18 Obotambe bw’eraaro eyio bobe obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko rigana erimo
Exodus27:19 Ebikorero bi’Obomenyo ebirabe bigokorerwa ase emeremo ende yonsi
Exodus27:20 “Ochike Abaisraeli barente amaguta amaya
Exodus27:21 Ime y’Eema y’Omosangererekano

Exodus28:2 Oroiserie Haroni
Exodus28:3 Otebie abaroisia abang’aini
Exodus28:4 Ne chianga baramoroiserie nachio echi: Egesembe ki’obokuani
Exodus28:5 Nabwo abaroisia bachiroisie korwa ase chiusi chie chitahabu
Exodus28:6 “Bakore egesibao ki’obokuani korwa ase chiusi chie chitahabu na echi’amarionya chire buru
Exodus28:7 Egesibao ekio ki’obokuani kebe nebitwanga bibere bi’amareko
Exodus28:8 Orokini rw’okobwataneria egesibao ekio amo robe rw’egetambaa keria ki’egesibao
Exodus28:9 Orente amagena abere a oiniki
Exodus28:10 amarieta atano na rimo ase rigena erimo
Exodus28:11 Ase chisemi chi’omoroisia omanyete buya gotura na komang’a ekemanyererio
Exodus28:12 Oyabeke ase ebitwang’a bi’amareko bi’egesibao keria ki’obokuani
Exodus28:13 Oture ebikonde bibere bi’etahabu
Exodus28:14 na okore ebichanga bibere bie chitahabu chichenire
Exodus28:15 “Oroisie egesembe gi’ekina ase omokuani. Omoroisia omong’aini akeroisie ase egetambaa kere buna eki’egesibao ki’obokuani
Exodus28:16 Egesembe keria kebe keringire rimo. Obotambe bwaye bobe chisentimita emerongo ebere
Exodus28:17 Obeke emeng’ororia ene y’amagena e rigori rinene ase egesembe keria. Ase omong’ororia bwe ritang’ani obeke saridio
Exodus28:18 na ase oyo o kabere alimasi
Exodus28:19 na ase oyo o gatato hiakinto
Exodus28:20 na ase oyo o kane kurusolito
Exodus28:21 Amagena ayio nigo arabe ikomi na abere
Exodus28:22 Okore ebichanga bie chitahabu chichenire bisisire
Exodus28:23 Okore boigo chibonyi ibere chi’etahabu
Exodus28:24 Osiberanie ebichanga ebi bibere bie chitahabu ase chibonyi chi’emego ya igoro y’egesembe keria.
Exodus28:25 Chinsinyo chinde chi’ebichanga biria bibere ochisiberanie nebikonde biria bibere
Exodus28:26 Okore chibonyi chinde ibere chie chitahabu
Exodus28:27 Naende okore chibonyi chinde ibere chie chitahabu
Exodus28:28 Chibonyi chiria chibekire ase egesembe chibwateranigwe ne chibonyi chi’egesibao neusi eburu; erio egesembe keria kebeere orokini igoro
Exodus28:29 Naboigo Haroni arabogorie amarieta ’abamura ba Israeli ase egesembe keria gi’ekina igoro y’enkoro yaye ekero agosoa ime y’Aase Aachenu
Exodus28:30 “Obeke Urimu na Tumimu (engencho yaye omobaso na oboikeranu) ime y’egesembe gi’ekina bibe igoro y’enkoro ya Haroni
Exodus28:31 “Okore eganchwa korwa ase egetambaa keroisirie ne chiusi chire buru chioka.
Exodus28:32 Obochore engoro gati gati
Exodus28:33 Okore emegwekano y’amatunda e rikomomanga korwa ase chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru
Exodus28:34 Naboigo ebe emegwekano ye rikomomanga bwateranie ne chindege chie chitahabu bietanane omoringero o inse bw’eganchwa.
Exodus28:35 Haroni goika ayebeke ekero agokora emeremo y’obokuani
Exodus28:36 “Okore ebao y’etahabu echenire
Exodus28:37 Oyesiberanie bosio bw’ekegogwa ne chiusi chire buru.
Exodus28:38 Haroni ayebogorie ase obosio bwaye igoro. Ase igo abogoreranie na korusia amamocho are nebiegwa ebiraatananwe
Exodus28:39 “Oroisie eganchwa entambe amo nekegogwa korwa ase chiusi chi’egatani engiya
Exodus28:40 “Erio oroiserie abamura ba Haroni chiganchwa
Exodus28:41 Obekere Haroni
Exodus28:42 Obaroiserie chisirwari chi’egatani
Exodus28:43 Haroni na abamura baye goika bachibeke botambe ekero bagosoa Eema y’Omosangererekano
Exodus29:1 “Aya naro orakore ase Haroni na abamura baye ase okobaatanana
Exodus29:2 Orusie boigo emegati etabekiri memera na amaandasi atabekiri memera
Exodus29:3 Oyebeke ase egetonga
Exodus29:4 “Erio orente Haroni amo nabamura baye ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano
Exodus29:5 Oimokie chianga chiria
Exodus29:6 Omobekere na ekegogwa omotwe oye
Exodus29:7 Erio oimokie amaguta akweakwa
Exodus29:8 “Orente na abamura baye
Exodus29:9 Obaboerie chinkini ebinema biabo
Exodus29:10 “Orente eeri bosio bw’Eema y’Omosangererekano; Haroni na abamura baye babeke amaboko abo ase omotwe bw’eeri eyio.
Exodus29:11 Erio oyenyenyere ase obosio bw’Omonene ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano.
Exodus29:12 Oimokie amanyinga make
Exodus29:13 Orusie ebitinya biria bitubete chinyama chi’enda; naboigo nebi’eriini
Exodus29:14 Korende chinyama chi’eeri eyio
Exodus29:15 “Orente emingichi eyemo ase echio ibere
Exodus29:16 Erio oyenyenye na oitorore amanyinga aye ase egesasimero chinsemo chionsi.
Exodus29:17 Onache chinyama chi’emingichi eria chibe ebing’ese; osibie chinyama chi’enda eria amo nebirenge
Exodus29:18 Osambere chinyama echi chionsi chi’emingichi ase egesasimero igoro. Eke nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ase Omonene
Exodus29:19 “Erio orente emingichi eria ende
Exodus29:20 Nyuma y’ayio oyenyenye
Exodus29:21 Orusie amanyinga make ayare ase egesasimero
Exodus29:22 “Orusie ebitinya bi’emingichi eyio
Exodus29:23 Orusie omogati oyomo
Exodus29:24 Ebi bionsi obibeke ase amaboko a Haroni amo nay’abamura baye
Exodus29:25 Erio obirusie ase amaboko abo
Exodus29:26 “Obogorie ritaana ri’emingichi eyio yarurwe ase ogwatanana Haroni
Exodus29:27 “Naboigo oraatanane ritaana ri’emingichi eyio yarurwe ekeng’wanso amo nekenama kiaye
Exodus29:28 Ebi nigo birabe bitungetie Haroni amo nabamura baye kogenderera botambe korwa ase Abaisraeli
Exodus29:29 “Chianga chiria chinchenu chia Haroni nigo chiraegwe ab’ororeria rwaye nyuma gakure
Exodus29:30 Omomura o Haroni
Exodus29:31 “Oire emingichi eria yarurwe ase ogwatanana abakuani ase emeremo emechenu
Exodus29:32 Agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano
Exodus29:33 Barabwo barie ebinto ebi biarurwe ase ogokora okobwatanigwa ekero baatananetwe ase emeremo emechenu. Monto onde omoao takoba ne ribaga ri’okobiria
Exodus29:34 Onye chinyama gose emegati bigotigara goika mambia
Exodus29:35 “Naboigo orakorere Haroni amo nabamura baye koreng’ana buna nagochikire. Ogwatananwa kwabo kobe gokogenderera ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere.
Exodus29:36 Kera rituko orue eeri ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe ase ogokora okobwatanigwa. Ase okorua ekeng’wanso ase okobwatanigwa nigo orabe kogochena egesasimero. Erio ogeake amaguta na kogiatanana ase emeremo emechenu.
Exodus29:37 Ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere obe gokogenderera gokora okobwatanigwa ase egesasimero na kogechena mono; na kera egento kerabe gekogekuna
Exodus29:38 “Na ebing’wanso orabe gokorua igoro ase egesasimero nabio ebi: Kera rituko botambe
Exodus29:39 Emanwa eyemo y’echio oyerue mambia na eria ende mogoroba.
Exodus29:40 Amo nemanwa eria entang’ani orue ebimunu bibere bi’obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta amaya
Exodus29:41 Emanwa eria ende oyerue mogoroba; oyerue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera na ogw’ekenyugwa
Exodus29:42 Ekeng’wanso eke ki’ogosambwa kebe gekoruegwa ebiaare ase ebiaare botambe agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano
Exodus29:43 Agwo ning’umerane n’Abaisraeli
Exodus29:44 Ninchene Eema y’Omosangererekano amo negesasimero; naboigo ninchene Haroni amo nabamura baye babe bagonkorera ase emeremo y’obokuani.
Exodus29:45 Inche nimenye ase egati y’Abaisraeli
Exodus29:46 Barabwo nabamanye ng’a inche ninche Nyasae obo; ninche nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri
Exodus30:1 “Oroisie egesasimero gie chibao chi’emekonge ase ubani egosamberwa.
Exodus30:2 Obotambe bwaye bobe obw’ekerengo gi’okoboko okomo
Exodus30:3 Oyeoome netahabu echenire
Exodus30:4 Okore chibonyi ibere chie chitahabu ochibeke inse y’omong’ororia chinsemo ibere
Exodus30:5 Obaache emiaro eria korwa ase emekonge
Exodus30:6 Obeke egesasimero ekio bosio bw’etoto eria ekengete aase aria esanduku egachire
Exodus30:7 Kera emambia ekero Haroni akoroisia chitaya nabe ogosambera agwo ubani egotioka buya
Exodus30:8 naende ekero arabe ogwokia chitaya engaki ya mogoroba. Ogosambwa okwo kwa ubani nigo koragenderere botambe ase obosio bw’Omonene
Exodus30:9 Timobaisa gosamba ubani eye etachikiri
Exodus30:10 Ara rimo kera omwaka Haroni akore okobwatanigwa ase emegwekano ye chingunchara ere ase chikoona chi’egesasimero. Naboigo ara rimo kera omwaka nakorere egesasimero okobwatanigwa namanyinga ’ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ayio nigo arakorerwe ebiaare ase ebiaare. Egesasimero ekio nagiatananwe kebe egechenu mono ase Omonene.”
Exodus30:11 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Exodus30:12 “Ekero orabe gokobara Abaisraeli ase okorikwa kwabo
Exodus30:13 Ase igo
Exodus30:14 Kera omonto oyorarikwe
Exodus30:15 Oyore omonda takorua goetania ekeng’ese gi’esekeli
Exodus30:16 Koranyore chibesa echi Abaisraeli bararue chibe embooria
Exodus30:17 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Exodus30:18 “Oroisie egetuba gi’etaai amo nenterekerero yaye y’etaai. Okebeke egati y’Eema y’Omosangererekano na egesasimero
Exodus30:19 Haroni na abamura baye bagwesibia amaboko na amagoro ase amache ayio.
Exodus30:20 Ekero bagosoa ase Eema y’Omosangererekano goika besibie ase amache ayio
Exodus30:21 Barabwo babe bagoisaba amaboko
Exodus30:22 Naende Omonene agakwana na Musa
Exodus30:23 “Oimokie ebinto bigotioka buya: Amaguta a manemane chikiro ikomi
Exodus30:24 na kasia chikiro ikomi. (Bionsi bibe bi’ekerengo kegokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu). Oimokie na amaguta ’emezeutini ebituba bine.
Exodus30:25 Ase ebinto ebio oroisie amaguta akweakwa ase chisemi chi’omoroisia omong’aini
Exodus30:26 Oake Eema y’Omosangererekano
Exodus30:27 na emesa amo nebinto bireo
Exodus30:28 na egesasimero ase ebing’wanso bigosamberwa amo nebikorero biaye
Exodus30:29 Naboigo oraatanane ebinto ebi
Exodus30:30 Haroni na abamura baye obaake amaguta na kobaatanana babe bagonkorera ase emeremo y’obokuani.
Exodus30:31 Kwana n’Abaisraeli
Exodus30:32 Tabaisa goakwa ase emebere ya mwanyabanto. Timoroisia amaguta ande anga buna ayio. Ayio namachenu
Exodus30:33 Monto onde bwensi aise koroisia amaguta buna ayio gose koyaaka omonto omoao
Exodus30:34 Omonene agatebia Musa
Exodus30:35 Korwa ase ebinto ebio oroisie amanukato oyaroisie ase chisemi chi’omoroisia omong’aini ebekwe omonyo
Exodus30:36 Orusie bike
Exodus30:37 Timweroiseria amanukato ande onsi y’ogosambwa anga buna ayio. Abe asemore amachenu ase obosio bw’Omonene.
Exodus30:38 Monto onde bwensi aise koroisia amanukato anga buna ayio ase okwegokeria rimisu riaye nigo araatananwe korwa ase egesaku ki’abanto b’Omonene.”

Exodus35:1 Musa akarangeria omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli amo
Exodus35:2 Mokore emeremo ase amatuko atano na rimo
Exodus35:3 Timobaisa gouta omorero ase rituko ri’Esabato
Exodus35:4 Musa agatebia omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli
Exodus35:5 Moruere Omonene ebiegwa. Kera omonto oyore nomoyo bw’ogwancha aruere Omonene ebinto ebi: Etahabu
Exodus35:6 chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru
Exodus35:7 amasankwa e chimingichi aakire etaago
Exodus35:8 amaguta e chitaya
Exodus35:9 amagena e rigori rinene buna oiniki na ayande akobekwa ase egesibao na egesembe ki’obokuani.”
Exodus35:10 “Abaroisia bonsi abang’aini abare ase egati yaino
Exodus35:11 nabio ebi: Obomenyo na eema yaye
Exodus35:12 Esanduku na emiaro yaye
Exodus35:13 emesa na emiaro yaye
Exodus35:14 ekebekerero gie chitaya na ebikorero biaye
Exodus35:15 na egesasimero ase ubani egosamberwa amo nemiaro yaye
Exodus35:16 na egesasimero aase ebing’wanso bigosamberwa amo negechungi kiaye gi’etaai
Exodus35:17 ebitambaa ebirakenge eraaro
Exodus35:18 na ebirochi bi’Obomenyo na ebi’eraaro amo ne chingori chiabo
Exodus35:19 ne chianga chiria chinseera chigokorerwa ime y’Aase Aachenu
Exodus35:20 Erio omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli okaruao agwo ase obosio bwa Musa.
Exodus35:21 Naende bakairana kera oyomo buna enkoro yaye yamosugetie
Exodus35:22 Barabwo bagacha
Exodus35:23 Naende kera omonto oyo obwate chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru
Exodus35:24 Bonsi abaare konyara korua chifeta ne chitaai bakabirenta bibe ebiegwa ase Omonene
Exodus35:25 Na abakungu abaroisia abang’aini bagasisa namaboko abo chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru
Exodus35:26 Na abakungu bonsi
Exodus35:27 Abatang’ani babo bakarenta amagena e rigori rinene buna oiniki na ayande arabekwe ase egesibao na egesembe ki’obokuani
Exodus35:28 naende ebinto bie rimisu rigiya amo namaguta e chitaya
Exodus35:29 Abaisraeli bonsi
Exodus35:30 Musa agatebia Abaisraeli

Exodus35:32 abe oyomanyete koroberia na koroisia ebinto bie chitahabu
Exodus35:33 abe okobaacha amagena e rigori rinene na koyabeka ase ebikonde

Exodus35:35 Obaichoirie obong’aini ase chinkoro chiabo
Exodus36:1 “Besaleli na Oholiabu amo nabaroisia bande bonsi
Exodus36:2 Erio Musa akarangeria Besaleli amo na Oholiabu na abaroisia bande bonsi
Exodus36:3 Barabwo bakaegwa korwa ase Musa ebiegwa ebi bionsi Abaisraeli konya barentire ase okoroisia Obomenyo boria Obochenu. Na Abaisraeli bakagenderera korenta ebiegwa biabo kera emambia.
Exodus36:4 Erio abaroisia baria abang’aini
Exodus36:5 bakamotebia
Exodus36:6 Ase ayio Musa akarareria abanto bonsi b’egetwori
Exodus36:7 Ebi konya barentire nigo biabete ebinge
Exodus36:8 Abaroisia bonsi abang’aini b’abakori emeremo bakaroisia eema y’Obomenyo. Bakayeroisia nebitambaa ikomi
Exodus36:9 Obotambe bwa kera egetambaa nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo ebere
Exodus36:10 Bakabwatania ebitambaa bitano amo
Exodus36:11 Bagakora ebioro bie chiusi chiburu
Exodus36:12 Bagakora ebioro emerongo etano
Exodus36:13 Bagatura ebigobanio bie chitahabu emerongo etano
Exodus36:14 Erio bakaroisia amarondia ikomi na rimo ay’amanya e chigoree
Exodus36:15 Obotambe bwa kera rirondia nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo etato
Exodus36:16 Bakabwatania amarondia atano amo
Exodus36:17 Bagakora ebioro emerongo etano
Exodus36:18 Naende bagakora ebigobanio emerongo etano bie chitaai ase okobwaterania amarondia ayio abere
Exodus36:19 Bagakora rirondia ri’amasankwa e chimingichi aakire etaago
Exodus36:20 Naende bakaroisia chibao chi’emekonge ase Obomenyo
Exodus36:21 Obotambe bwa kera ebao nigo bware obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi
Exodus36:22 Bagakora chintamang’o ibere ase kera ebao
Exodus36:23 Bakaroisia chibao emerongo ebere ase ensemo ya irianyi.
Exodus36:24 Bagakora ne chinterekerero chie chifeta emerongo ene
Exodus36:25 Nase ensemo ya kabere
Exodus36:26 ne chinterekerero chiaye chie chifeta emerongo ene
Exodus36:27 Korende ase ensemo ya nyuma y’Obomenyo
Exodus36:28 Naende bakaroisia chibao ibere chikaba chikoona chi’Obomenyo ensemo ya nyuma.
Exodus36:29 Kera ebao ase echio ibere ekabwatanigwa ne chibao chie chinsinyo
Exodus36:30 Chibao chionsi nigo chiabete isano na isato
Exodus36:31 Bakabaacha emeriibo etano y’emekonge
Exodus36:32 na etano ase rikere rinde
Exodus36:33 Bakabaacha omoriibo o gati‐gati omogima
Exodus36:34 Erio bakaooma chibao echio netahabu
Exodus36:35 Bakaroisia etoto ye chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru
Exodus36:36 Naende bakabaacha chisiiro inye chi’emekonge
Exodus36:37 Na ase egesoero ki’Eema bakaroisia egetambaa korwa ase chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru
Exodus36:38 Bakabaacha chisiiro isano amo nebigobanio biabo
Exodus37:1 Erio Besaleli akaroisia Esanduku ye chibao chi’emekonge. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko abere na ekeng’ese
Exodus37:2 Akayeooma netahabu echenire
Exodus37:3 Agakora chibonyi inye korwa ase etahabu enyititoire
Exodus37:4 Akabaacha emiaro y’emekonge
Exodus37:5 Agasoyia emiaro eyio ase chibonyi ime ase okobogoreria esanduku eria.
Exodus37:6 Akaroisia ekemumeko gi’etahabu echenire ebe Oboikaranso bw’Amabera. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko abere na ekeng’ese
Exodus37:7 Erio agakora emegwekano y’abakerubi babere ey’etahabu esunyuntire
Exodus37:8 oyomo ase kera ensinyo
Exodus37:9 Abakerubi abwo bakarambora chimbaba chiabo igoro y’Oboikaranso bw’Amabera
Exodus37:10 Akaroisia emesa ye chibao chi’emekonge. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko abere
Exodus37:11 Akayeoma netahabu echenire
Exodus37:12 Erio agakora orosingo rore nobogare bong’ana egesanyi gi’okoboko
Exodus37:13 Naende agakora chibonyi inye korwa ase chitahabu
Exodus37:14 Chibonyi chiria chikabekwa ang’e norosingo
Exodus37:15 Akabaacha emiaro eria korwa ase emekonge
Exodus37:16 Agakora ebikorero biare kobekwa ase emesa igoro: chinteru na ebitaabo ase ubani
Exodus37:17 Akaroisia ekebekerero gie chitaya gi’etahabu echenire esunyuntire. Akayeroisia nenterekerero amo ne ritina
Exodus37:18 Nigo kiare ne chinsagia isano nemo
Exodus37:19 Orosagia rwe ritang’ani rokaba nemegwekano etato y’ebisicha binga buna ebi’omolozi
Exodus37:20 Ritina rinyene ri’ekebekerero keria rikaba nemegwekano ene y’ebisicha binga buna ebi’omolozi.
Exodus37:21 Rimumu erimo rikaba inse ya kera chinsagia ibere chigosoka korwa ase ritina. Ase ayio rikaba rimumu erimo inse ya kera orosagia rw’echio isano nemo chiroisirie chikaba egento ekemo ne ritina.
Exodus37:22 Bionsi bikaroisigwa korwa ase ribomba erimo ri’etahabu echenire esunyuntire.
Exodus37:23 Naende akaroisia chitaya chiaye isano na ibere
Exodus37:24 Ekebekerero keria gie chitaya amo nebikorero biaye bionsi bikaroisigwa korwa ase chitahabu chichenire chi’ekerengo gie chikiro emerongo etano.
Exodus37:25 Akaroisia egesasimero gie chibao chi’emekonge ase ubani erasamberwe. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo gi’okoboko okomo
Exodus37:26 Agakeooma netahabu echenire
Exodus37:27 Agakora chibonyi ibere chie chitahabu
Exodus37:28 Na emiaro eria akabaacha korwa ase emekonge
Exodus37:29 Naende akaroisia amaguta amachenu akweakwa
Exodus38:1 Erio akaagacha egesasimero gie chibao chi’emekonge ase ebing’wanso birasamberwe. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano
Exodus38:2 Ase chikoona inye chi’egesasimero akaroisia emegwekano ene ye chingunchara
Exodus38:3 Akaroisia ebikorero bionsi bi’egesasimero nabio ebi: Chindogio chi’okobuucha riibu
Exodus38:4 Agakora egechungi gi’etaai
Exodus38:5 Agakora chibonyi inye
Exodus38:6 Akabaacha emiaro eria korwa ase emekonge
Exodus38:7 Agasoyia emiaro eria ase chibonyi chire chinsemo chi’egesasimero
Exodus38:8 Akaroisia egetuba amo nenterekerero yaye korwa ase ebirore bie chitaai bi’abakungu baare gokorera ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano.
Exodus38:9 Ase ensemo ya irianyi akaroisia ebitambaa bie chiusi chindabu chi’egatani chisisire. Obotambe bwabo nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko rigana erimo.
Exodus38:10 Chisiiro chiaye emerongo ebere echiare kobibwata nigo chiarenge ne chinterekerero chiabo emerongo ebere chie chitaai
Exodus38:11 Naboigo ase ensemo ya sugusu akaroisia ebitambaa bire nobotambe bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko rigana erimo. Chisiiro emerongo ebere echiare kobibwata nigo chiarenge ne chinterekerero chiabo emerongo ebere chie chitaai
Exodus38:12 Ase ensemo ya bosongo bakaroisia ebitambaa bire nobotambe bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo etano
Exodus38:13 Obogare bw’ensemo ya bosio
Exodus38:14 Ase ensemo eyemo y’egesoero bakaroisia ebitambaa bi’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi na atano
Exodus38:15 Naboigo ase ensemo ende bakaroisia ebitambaa bi’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi na atano
Exodus38:16 Ebitambaa bionsi ebieetanaine eraaro eria bikaroisigwa ne chiusi chi’egatani engiya chisisire.
Exodus38:17 Chinterekerero chie chisiiro chiaye nigo chiarenge chie chitaai
Exodus38:18 Egetambaa ki’egesoero bakaroisia korwa ase chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru
Exodus38:19 Chisiiro inye
Exodus38:20 Ebirochi bionsi bi’eema y’Obomenyo na ebi’ebitambaa bi’eraaro nigo biarenge bie chitaai.
Exodus38:21 Oyo noro omobaro bw’ebinto ebiakoreretwe ase okoroisia Obomenyo
Exodus38:22 Besaleli
Exodus38:23 Amo nere nigo arenge Oholiabu
Exodus38:24 Etahabu yonsi eyakoreretwe ase emeremo y’okoroisia Obomenyo Obochenu
Exodus38:25 Efeta eyaruetwe nomoganda bw’abwo barigetwe nigo yarenge chikiro chilifu isano
Exodus38:26 Kera omonto oyorigetwe
Exodus38:27 Chikiro chilifu isano chie chifeta chiria nigo chiakoretwe ase okoroisia chinterekerero chi’Obomenyo Obochenu ne chi’etoto eria; chikiro chilifu isano ase chinterekerero rigana erimo
Exodus38:28 Ase chifeta chikiro emerongo etato na isano chiatigarete chiakoreretwe ase okoroisia ebigobanio bie chisiiro na ase okooma ebisure biabo
Exodus38:29 Chitaai chiatananetwe chibe ekerugwa
Exodus38:30 Ase chitaai chiria akaroisia chinterekerero chi’egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano
Exodus38:31 ne chinterekerero chie chisiiro chi’eraaro chibe chinsemo chionsi
Exodus39:1 Korwa ase chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru
Exodus39:2 Bagakora egesibao ki’obokuani korwa ase chiusi chi’etahabu
Exodus39:3 Bagasunyunta etahabu ekaba eng’oo
Exodus39:4 Bakaroisia ebitwanga bi’amareko bi’egesibao keria
Exodus39:5 Orokini rw’okobwataneria egesibao rokaroisigwa rw’egetambaa keria ki’egesibao keroisirie korwa ase chiusi chi’etahabu
Exodus39:6 Bakabaacha amagena e rigori rinene akorokwa oiniki
Exodus39:7 Bakayabeka ase ebitwanga bi’amareko ase egesibao ki’obokuani
Exodus39:8 Egesembe ki’obokuani bagakeroisia
Exodus39:9 Bakaroisia egesembe keria keringire rimo; obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge chisentimita emerongo ebere
Exodus39:10 Bagakebekera emeng’ororia ene y’amagena e rigori. Ase omong’ororia bwe ritang’ani bakabeka saridio
Exodus39:11 na ase oyo o kabere alimasi
Exodus39:12 na ase oyo o gatato hiakinto
Exodus39:13 na ase oyo o kane kurusolito
Exodus39:14 Na amagena ayio nigo arenge ikomi na abere
Exodus39:15 Bagakora ebichanga bie chitahabu chichenire bisisire
Exodus39:16 Bagakora na ebikonde bibere bie chitahabu
Exodus39:17 Bagasiberania ebichanga ebi bibere bie chitahabu ase chibonyi echi ibere ase emego y’egesembe keria.
Exodus39:18 Naende bakabwaterania chinsinyo chinde ibere chi’ebichanga ase ebikonde biria bibere
Exodus39:19 Bagakora chibonyi ibere chie chitahabu bagachibeka ase egesembe keria
Exodus39:20 Naende bagakora chibonyi chinde chie chitahabu
Exodus39:21 Bagachibwaterania chibonyi chi’egesembe amo nechi’egesibao ki’obokuani neusi eburu; erio egesembe gekabeera orokini igoro
Exodus39:22 Bagakora eganchwa korwa ase egetambaa keroisirie ne chiusi chiburu chioka.
Exodus39:23 Ase eganchwa eria bakabochora engoro ase omotwe ogosoera
Exodus39:24 Bagakora emegwekano y’amatunda e rikomomanga korwa ase chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru
Exodus39:25 Naende bagakora chindege chie chitahabu chichenire
Exodus39:26 Ase igo omong’ororia bw’emegwekano ye rikomomanga bwateranirie ne chindege orenge ase omoringero o inse ase eganchwa eria ekobekwa ase obokoreri bw’obokuani. Naboigo buna Omonene konya achikire Musa.
Exodus39:27 Bakaroiseria Haroni amo nabamura baye chiganchwa chi’egatani engiya
Exodus39:28 na egetinti amo nebigogwa emechoro bi’oboseera bi’egatani engiya
Exodus39:29 na orokini rwe chiusi chi’egatani engiya chisisire
Exodus39:30 Bagatura ebao y’etahabu echenire
Exodus39:31 Bakayesiberania bosio bw’ekegogwa ne chiusi chiburu
Exodus39:32 Naboigo emeremo y’Obomenyo bw’Eema y’Omosangererekano egaikeranigwa n’Abaisraeli; bagakora onsi buna Omonene konya achikire Musa.
Exodus39:33 Barabwo bakarentera Musa Obomenyo boria
Exodus39:34 na egietubo ki’amasankwa e chimingichi
Exodus39:35 na Esanduku eria ere ne chibao chirikire oborori
Exodus39:36 na emesa amo nebikorero biaye bionsi
Exodus39:37 na ekebekerero gie chitaya gi’etahabu echenire
Exodus39:38 na egesasimero gi’etahabu
Exodus39:39 na egesasimero gi’etaai amo negechungi gi’etaai
Exodus39:40 na ebitambaa bi’eraaro
Exodus39:41 ne chianga chiria chinseera chi’abakuani ase obokoreri bwabo ime y’Aase Aachenu
Exodus39:42 Abaisraeli konya bakorire emeremo yonsi boronge kegima buna Omonene konya achikire Musa.
Exodus39:43 Musa akariga‐rigereria ebinto bionsi ebiakoretwe
Exodus40:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Exodus40:2 “Ase rituko rie ritang’ani
Exodus40:3 Obeke Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire oborori imeo
Exodus40:4 Osoyie emesa
Exodus40:5 Erio obeke egesasimero gi’etahabu ase ubani erasamberwe bosio bw’Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire oborori
Exodus40:6 Obeke egesasimero ase ebing’wanso birasamberwe bosio bw’egesoero ki’Obomenyo
Exodus40:7 Obeke egetuba egati y’Eema y’Omosangererekano na egesasimero
Exodus40:8 Otenenie orosenge rw’egetambaa roetanane eraaro
Exodus40:9 “Oimokie amaguta akweakwa
Exodus40:10 Naende oake amaguta ase egesasimero ase ebing’wanso birasamberwe
Exodus40:11 Oake egetuba amaguta amo nenterekerero yaye
Exodus40:12 “Orente Haroni amo nabamura baye ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano
Exodus40:13 Erio obekere Haroni chianga chiria chinchenu
Exodus40:14 Orente na abamura baye
Exodus40:15 obaake amaguta buna oraake ise
Exodus40:16 Musa agakora onsi buna Omonene konya amochikire.
Exodus40:17 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani
Exodus40:18 Musa agatenenia Obomenyo boria
Exodus40:19 Akaara eema igoro y’Obomenyo boria
Exodus40:20 Akaimokia chibao chirikire oborori
Exodus40:21 Akabeka Esanduku eria ime y’Obomenyo
Exodus40:22 Akabeka emesa ase Eema y’Omosangererekano ime
Exodus40:23 na akaroberia emegati igoro yaye ase obosio bw’Omonene
Exodus40:24 Akabeka ekebekerero gie chitaya ase Obomenyo ime
Exodus40:25 Naende akabeka chitaya igoro y’ekebekerero ase obosio bw’Omonene
Exodus40:26 Akabeka na egesasimero gi’etahabu ase Eema y’Omosangererekano ime
Exodus40:27 na igoro yaye agasambera ubani ekorua rimisu rigiya
Exodus40:28 Agasunga egetambaa ki’egesoero ki’Obomenyo.
Exodus40:29 Na egesasimero ase ebing’wanso birasamberwe akabeka ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano. Igoro yaye akarua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa
Exodus40:30 Akabeka egetuba ase egati y’Eema y’Omosangererekano na egesasimero
Exodus40:31 Musa na Haroni bakaba bagoisaba amaboko na gosibia amagoro ase amache ayio.
Exodus40:32 Ekero baare gosoa Eema y’Omosangererekano
Exodus40:33 Agatenenia orosenge rw’eraaro roetanane Obomenyo na egesasimero
Exodus40:34 Erio riire rigatuba Eema y’Omosangererekano
Exodus40:35 Musa tanyara gosoa Eema y’Omosangererekano
Exodus40:36 Na ekero kende gionsi riire riare koimokerera igoro korwa ase Obomenyo obwo
Exodus40:37 Korende onye riire tiriare koimokerera igoro
Exodus40:38 Naki riire ri’Omonene nigo riare kobeera ase Obomenyo ekero kia mobaso
Leviticus1:1 Omonene akarangeria Musa
Leviticus1:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli
Leviticus1:3 Onye nigo akorua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa korwa ase amaicho e chiombe
Leviticus1:4 Omonto oria goika abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’eng’iti eria ekoruegwa ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa
Leviticus1:5 Erio omonto oria anyenyere eeri eria ensae agwo ase obosio bwane inche Omonene
Leviticus1:6 Naende arusie riiyo ri’eng’iti eria ekoruegwa ekeng’wanso
Leviticus1:7 na abamura ba Haroni omokuani baute omorero ase egesasimero
Leviticus1:8 Naende abakuani
Leviticus1:9 Korende chinyama chi’enda
Leviticus1:10 “Onye omonto okorua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa korwa ase amaicho e ching’ondi
Leviticus1:11 Erio ayenyenyere ase ensemo ya sugusu y’egesasimero
Leviticus1:12 Naende anachane eng’iti eria ebitari
Leviticus1:13 korende chinyama chi’enda na ebirenge bisibigwe namache. Erio omokuani arue bionsi na kobisambera ase egesasimero. Ekio nekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero
Leviticus1:14 “Onye ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa akonduera inche Omonene gekorusigwa ase chinyoni
Leviticus1:15 Omokuani arente enyoni eyio ase egesasimero
Leviticus1:16 korende embochero yaye
Leviticus1:17 Erio atandorane egekuba
Leviticus2:1 “Ekero omonto akondetera inche Omonene okoruegwa kw’endagera
Leviticus2:2 Erio arente okoruegwa okwo ase abakuani
Leviticus2:3 Ekeratigare korwa ase okoruegwa kw’endagera okwo nakobe okwa Haroni na abamura baye. Ekio negechenu mono
Leviticus2:4 “Ekero okorenta okoruegwa kw’endagera esambeire riko nebe emegati etabekiri memera eroisirie korwa ase obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta
Leviticus2:5 “Onye okoruegwa kwao kw’endagera nemegati esambeire orogio
Leviticus2:6 Oyesamunyorane
Leviticus2:7 “Onye okoruegwa kwao kw’endagera nemegati ekarangeire esuguria
Leviticus2:8 Ondetere inche Omonene okoruegwa kw’endagera eroisirie ase enchera eyemo y’echio
Leviticus2:9 Omokuani arusie ensemo y’okoruegwa okwo kw’endagera ebe ekemanyererio ng’a okoruegwa okwo nokwane inche Omonene
Leviticus2:10 Ekeratigare korwa ase okoruegwa okwo kw’endagera nakebe ekia Haroni na abamura baye. Ekio negechenu mono
Leviticus2:11 “Okoruegwa konde gwonsi kw’endagera bakonduera inche Omonene tigokoroiseranigwa nememera. Timobaisa gosamba ememera
Leviticus2:12 Monyare kondetera ebinto ebio buna ogotongora kw’endagera
Leviticus2:13 Goika obeke omonyo ase okoruegwa kwao gwonsi kw’endagera. Ase okoruegwa okwo tibweba kobeka omonyo bw’okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania. Omonyo tomocha kobekwa ase kera okoruegwa kwao.
Leviticus2:14 “Aye gokorenta ogotongora kw’endagera asende inche Omonene
Leviticus2:15 Oumore amaguta ase okoruegwa okwo
Leviticus2:16 Omokuani asambe ebigara bike bie biria bisenyentire
Leviticus3:1 “Omonto kararue ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe ase obosio bwane inche Omonene
Leviticus3:2 Omonto oyio goika abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’eng’iti eyio ekoruegwa ekeng’wanso
Leviticus3:3 Korwa ase eng’iti y’ekeng’wanso ekio ki’omorembe arusie ebitinya bitubete chinyama chi’enda
Leviticus3:4 
Leviticus3:5 Erio abamura ba Haroni babisambere ase egesasimero
Leviticus3:6 “Omonto kararue ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe asende inche Omonene korwa ase riicho rie ching’ondi
Leviticus3:7 Onye okorua eng’ondi ebe ekeng’wanso kiaye
Leviticus3:8 Ere goika abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’eng’ondi eyio akorua ebe ekeng’wanso
Leviticus3:9 Korwa ase ekeng’wanso ekio ki’omorembe arue ebitinya
Leviticus3:10 
Leviticus3:11 Omokuani otenenerete asambe ebinto ebio bionsi ase egesasimero bibe endagera ekoruegwa ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero asende inche Omonene.
Leviticus3:12 “Onye ekeng’wanso kiaye nembori
Leviticus3:13 na omonto oyio goika abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’embori eyio
Leviticus3:14 Erio korwa ase ekeng’wanso ekio arue ebitinya bionsi ebire ase enda ime
Leviticus3:15 
Leviticus3:16 Omokuani abisambere ase egesasimero bibe endagera ekoruegwa egosambwa nomorero
Leviticus3:17 Oyo nigo orabe omoroberio ochikire oragenderere botambe ebiaare ase ebiaare
Leviticus4:1 Naende Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus4:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli
Leviticus4:3 “Onye omokuani oyoakire amaguta ogokora ebibe
Leviticus4:4 Arente eeri eria ase obosio bwane agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano. Erio goika abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’eeri eria
Leviticus4:5 Omokuani oyoakire amaguta aimokie amanyinga make ay’eeri eria
Leviticus4:6 Naende atobeke ekiara kiaye ase amanyinga ayio
Leviticus4:7 Nyuma y’ayio omokuani oria agindie amanyinga make ase emegwekano ye chingunchara ere ase chikoona chi’egesasimero ase ubani egosamberwa
Leviticus4:8 Erio arusie ebitinya bionsi bi’eeri eria y’ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Leviticus4:9 amo ne chinyigo chionsi ibere
Leviticus4:10 koreng’ana buna akobirusia korwa ase eng’ombe eria ekonyenywa ebe ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe. Erio abisambere ase egesasimero gi’ekeng’wanso.
Leviticus4:11 Korende riiyo ri’eeri eyio amo ne chinyama chionsi
Leviticus4:12 ebinto ebio bionsi bi’eeri eyio abisokie isiko y’ebitwori
Leviticus4:13 “Onye omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli okorire ebibe mosiabano otancheti
Leviticus4:14 agwo ekero ebibe biria birabe biamanyekanire
Leviticus4:15 Agwo ase obosio bwane abagaaka b’omoganda oria goika babeke amaboko abo igoro ase omotwe bw’eeri eyio
Leviticus4:16 Omokuani oyio oakire amaguta
Leviticus4:17 Erio atobeke ekiara kiaye ime ase amanyinga na anyororokererie ara gatano na kabere ase obosio bwane agwo bosio bw’etoto eria y’egetambaa
Leviticus4:18 agindie amanyinga make ase emegwekano ye chingunchara chi’egesasimero kere ime y’Eema y’Omosangererekano
Leviticus4:19 Naende ebitinya bionsi bi’eeri eyio abirusie na kobisambera ase egesasimero.
Leviticus4:20 Naboigo arakore eeri eyio buna akorete eeri eria ye ritang’ani y’ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa asebare
Leviticus4:21 Erio aire eeri eyio isiko y’egetwori
Leviticus4:22 “Omogambi karakore ebibe mosiabano atancheti
Leviticus4:23 agwo ekero ebibe biria akorete birabe biamanyekanire asare
Leviticus4:24 Ere goika abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’egoree eyio
Leviticus4:25 Omokuani atobeke ekiara kiaye ime ase amanyinga ayagindie ase emegwekano ye chingunchara chi’egesasimero gi’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa
Leviticus4:26 Ebitinya biaye bionsi abisambere ase egesasimero buna ebi’ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe bigosambwa. Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omogambi oria ase engencho y’ebibe biaye
Leviticus4:27 “Onye omonto onde bwensi ogokora ebibe mosiabano atancheti
Leviticus4:28 agwo ekero ebibe bi’omonto oria birabe biamanyekanire asare arente embori eaberi etari na kemocho ase omobere oye
Leviticus4:29 Erio abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’embori eria ekoruegwa ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Leviticus4:30 Omokuani aimokie amanyinga make
Leviticus4:31 Erio arusie ebitinya bionsi bi’embori eyio buna ebitinya bi’eng’iti y’ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe bikorusigwa
Leviticus4:32 “Omonto oria kararue emanwa y’eng’ondi ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Leviticus4:33 Ere abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’emanwa eria
Leviticus4:34 Omokuani aimokie amanyinga make ay’emanwa eyio
Leviticus4:35 Erio arusie ebitinya bionsi bi’eng’ondi eyio
Leviticus5:1 “Onye omonto okorangerigwa abe kirori na gotiana
Leviticus5:2 “Onye omonto ogokuna kende gionsi getachenegeti
Leviticus5:3 “Omonto aise gokuna egento kende gionsi kia mwanyabanto getachenegeti
Leviticus5:4 “Omonto karabe omwango gotiana ase ogokora amabe gose amaya
Leviticus5:5 “Ekero omonto arabe nokomocha ase amang’ana goika aorokie ebibe ebio akorire.
Leviticus5:6 Naende andetere inche Omonene ekeng’wanso gi’okorongeyia okomocha kwaye ase engencho y’ebibe ebio akorire; arente eng’iti eaberi
Leviticus5:7 “Korende onye omonto oria takonyara konyora eng’ondi
Leviticus5:8 Arente amaruma ayio ase omokuani
Leviticus5:9 Erio anyororokerie amanyinga make ay’ekeng’wanso ekio ki’ebibe ase egesasimero ensemo. Amanyinga agotigara ayanyititorere agwo inse ase egesasimero. Ekio nekeng’wanso ki’ebibe.
Leviticus5:10 Naende arue riruma ria kabere ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa
Leviticus5:11 “Korende onye omonto oria takonyara konyora amaruma abere
Leviticus5:12 Arente obosie obwo ase omokuani
Leviticus5:13 Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria ase engencho y’ebibe akorire ase ring’ana rinde rionsi ri’ayio
Leviticus5:14 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus5:15 “Monto onde bwensi karasarie na akore ebibe mosiabano atancheti ase ogotarua ebinto biatananirwe na gochenwa asende
Leviticus5:16 Omonto oria naakane egento keria egechenu ataruete
Leviticus5:17 “Monto onde bwensi aise gokora gento ase amang’ana ayio inche Omonene nakanete ng’a takorwa
Leviticus5:18 Ase ayio arente korwa ase riicho riaye emingichi etari na kemocho ase omobere oye ebe ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha. Naye oyekorere rigori. Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria ase engencho y’okomocha koria akorire mosiabano atancheti
Leviticus5:19 Ekio nekeng’wanso gi’okomocha. Omonto oria nigo arenge nokomocha ase obosio bw’Omonene.”
Leviticus6:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus6:2 “Omonto aise gokora ebibe na gosaria asende inche Omonene ase okong’ainereria omogisangio oye ase okwanga koirania ebinto aetwe ase amaboko aye abirende
Leviticus6:3 gose onyorire egento giasirete
Leviticus6:4 ekero omonto akorire ebibe buna ebio na obeire nokomocha
Leviticus6:5 gose egento kende gionsi keria atianete ase okong’ainereria; goika akeiranie gionsi
Leviticus6:6 Erio andetere inche Omonene emingichi etari na kemocho ase omobere oye; ayerusie korwa ase riicho riaye rie ching’ondi
Leviticus6:7 Omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oyio ase obosio bwane
Leviticus6:8 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus6:9 “Moe Haroni amo nabamura baye ogochika oko igoro y’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa; Ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa kebeere igoro ase egesasimero obotuko bwonsi goika mambia
Leviticus6:10 Omokuani abeke eganchwa yaye y’egatani
Leviticus6:11 Nyuma y’ayio arusie chianga chiaye
Leviticus6:12 Omorero ore ase egesasimero orendwe ogenderere gwoka
Leviticus6:13 Omorero oyio orendwe ogenderere gwoka botambe
Leviticus6:14 “Oko nakwo ogochika gw’okoruegwa kw’endagera: Abamura ba Haroni babe bakorua okoruegwa kw’endagera ase obosio bw’Omonene
Leviticus6:15 Erio omokuani otenenerete aimokie obosie obonuke boichire roe korwa ase okoruegwa okwo kw’endagera
Leviticus6:16 Haroni na abamura baye goika barie eyegotigara ase okoruegwa okwo etabekiri memera
Leviticus6:17 Tebaisa koroiseranigwa nememera. Inche nabaeire endagera eyio ebe egetari kiabo gi’okoruegwa kwane kogosambwa nomorero. Ekio negechenu mono koreng’ana buna ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe na egi’okomocha bire.
Leviticus6:18 Kera omonto omosacha ase ororeria rwa Haroni nanyare koria endagera eyio. Ekio nkebe egetari kiabo kia botambe gi’okoruegwa kogosambwa nomorero asende inche Omonene
Leviticus6:19 Naende Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus6:20 “Oko nakwo okoruegwa Haroni na abamura baye bararue asende inche Omonene ase rituko riria onde obo araakwe amaguta na gwatananwa: Ebimunu bibere bi’obosie obonuke
Leviticus6:21 Okoruegwa okwo gokarangwe namaguta ase orogio
Leviticus6:22 Omokuani
Leviticus6:23 Kera okoruegwa kw’endagera omokuani akorua goika gosambwe gwonsi
Leviticus6:24 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus6:25 “Moe Haroni amo nabamura baye ogochika oko igoro y’ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe: Agwo ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gekonyenyerwa nao agwo eki’ebibe keranyenyerwe
Leviticus6:26 Omokuani oyio okorua ekeng’wanso ekio nakeriere aase achenire
Leviticus6:27 Onde bwensi orakune enyama y’ekeng’wanso ekio nabe omochenu; naboigo na kende gionsi kerayekune
Leviticus6:28 Enyongo chinyama echio chiraiyekerwe goika yaatwe
Leviticus6:29 Kera omonto omosacha ore ase chinka chi’abakuani arie chinyama echio echire chinchenu mono.
Leviticus6:30 Korende ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Leviticus7:1 “Oko nakwo ogochika gw’okorua ekeng’wanso gi’okorongeyia okomocha. Ekio nekeng’wanso egechenu mono.
Leviticus7:2 Aase agwo eng’iti y’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ekonyenyerwa nao eng’iti y’ekeng’wanso gi’okorongeyia okomocha eranyenyerwe. Amanyinga aye asiarerwe ase egesasimero chinsemo chionsi.
Leviticus7:3 Ebitinya biaye bionsi birusigwe na koruegwa; omokera na ebitinya bitubetechinyama chi’enda
Leviticus7:4 ne chinyigo chionsi ibere amo nebitinya bichitubete bire ang’e nomogongo
Leviticus7:5 Omokuani abisambere ase egesasimero
Leviticus7:6 Kera omonto omosacha bw’enka y’omokuani nakeriere agwo aase achenire. Ekio negechenu mono.
Leviticus7:7 “Ogochika gw’okorua ekeng’wanso gi’okorongeyia okomocha nigo kore okomo nogw’ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Omokuani oria ogokora okobwatanigwa nakerokio aire chinyama chi’ekeng’wanso eke chibe echiaye.
Leviticus7:8 Omokuani okorua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosamwa ase engencho y’omonto onde
Leviticus7:9 Kera okoruegwa kw’endagera okoroiseirie riko
Leviticus7:10 Kera okoruegwa kw’endagera gwochoganirie namaguta
Leviticus7:11 “Oko nakwo ogochika gw’okorua ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe
Leviticus7:12 Onye omonto okorua ekeng’wanso ekio ase ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono
Leviticus7:13 Amo nekeng’wanso kiaye ki’omorembe ki’ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono
Leviticus7:14 Korwa ase okoruegwa okwo arue omogati oyomo bwa kera egesaku
Leviticus7:15 Chinyama chi’ekeng’wanso kiaye ki’omorembe ki ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono chiriegwe ase rituko riria gekoruegwa; tichibaisa gotigara nonya ne chinsinini goika rituko ria kabere.
Leviticus7:16 “Korende onye omonto okorua ekeng’wanso ase engencho y’eira ariete
Leviticus7:17 Chinyama chi’ekeng’wanso ekio chigotigara ase rituko ria gatato goika chisambwe nomorero chiyie chiere.
Leviticus7:18 Onye enyama ende yonsi y’ekeng’wanso kiaye ki’omorembe ekoriegwa ase rituko ria gatato
Leviticus7:19 Enyama eyio kerakune gento kende gionsi getachenegeti esambwe nomorero
Leviticus7:20 korende oyotachenegeti takoria enyama y’ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe gekoruegwa ase Omonene. Aise gokora igo
Leviticus7:21 “Naende omonto karakune egento getachenegeti
Leviticus7:22 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus7:23 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli
Leviticus7:24 Ebitinya bi’eng’iti egokwa yoka enyene
Leviticus7:25 Monto onde bwensi orarie ebitinya bi’eng’iti yarurwe ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero asende inche Omonene
Leviticus7:26 Naende timoria amanyinga e chinyoni
Leviticus7:27 Monto onde bwensi orarie amanyinga ande onsi
Leviticus7:28 Naende Omonene agatebia Musa
Leviticus7:29 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli
Leviticus7:30 Arente namaboko aye omonyene ekeng’wanso kiaye kegosambwa nomorero asende inche Omonene; arente ebitinya amo ne ritaana
Leviticus7:31 Omokuani asambere ebitinya ase egesasimero
Leviticus7:32 Ekenama kia borio okee omokuani buna ekeegwa korwa ase ebing’wanso biaino bi’omorembe.
Leviticus7:33 Omokuani
Leviticus7:34 Korwa ase ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe gekoruegwa n’Abaisraeli narusirie ritaana rigosungusigwa amo nekenama kia borio
Leviticus7:35 “Ekio negetari kemotungetie Haroni na abamura baye korwa ase ebing’wanso bigosambwa nomorero asende; nigo kiabete ekiabo korwa rituko riria baatananetwe bakaba abakuani bagonkorera inche Omonene.
Leviticus7:36 Rituko riria baagetwe amaguta inche ngachika ng’a egetari ekio korwa ase Abaisraeli kebe ekiabo kogenderera botambe
Leviticus7:37 Oko nakwo ogochika igoro y’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa
Leviticus7:38 Ogochika okwo nakwo Omonene aete Musa ase egetunwa gia Sinai
Leviticus8:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus8:2 “Ira Haroni na abamura baye amo ne chianga chiabo chi’obokuani
Leviticus8:3 Naende orangerie omoganda bwonsi osangererekane ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano.”
Leviticus8:4 Musa agakora buna Omonene amochigete
Leviticus8:5 Musa akayotebia. “Aya naro Omonene achikire akorwe.”
Leviticus8:6 Musa akarenta Haroni na abamura baye
Leviticus8:7 Akabekera Haroni eganchwa erobekanire eigete inse
Leviticus8:8 Erio akamobekera egesembe
Leviticus8:9 Akamobekera ekegogwa ase omotwe oye
Leviticus8:10 Musa akaimokia amaguta akweakwa
Leviticus8:11 Akanyororokeria egesasimero namaguta akweakwa ara gatano na kabere
Leviticus8:12 Akaumora amaguta akweakwa igoro ase omotwe o Haroni
Leviticus8:13 Naende Musa akarenta abamura ba Haroni
Leviticus8:14 Musa akarenta eeri ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Leviticus8:15 Eeri eyio ekanyenywa
Leviticus8:16 Akaimokia ebitinya bionsi biarenge ase chinyama chi’enda
Leviticus8:17 Korende ebiatigarete korwa ase eeri eria
Leviticus8:18 Erio akarenta emingichi ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa
Leviticus8:19 Emingichi eyio ekanyenywa
Leviticus8:20 Akanachana chinyama chi’emingichi eyio chikaba ebitari
Leviticus8:21 
Leviticus8:22 Musa akarenta emingichi ya kabere
Leviticus8:23 Emingichi eyio ekanyenywa
Leviticus8:24 Boigo abamura ba Haroni bakarentwa na Musa akagindia amanyinga mesia y’amato abo a borio
Leviticus8:25 Akaimokia ebitinya
Leviticus8:26 Naende korwa ase egetonga keria kiarenge agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene akarusia omogati oyomo otabekiri memera
Leviticus8:27 Akabeka ebinto ebio bionsi ase amaboko a Haroni

Leviticus8:29 Erio Musa akaimokia ritaana
Leviticus8:30 Musa akaimokia amaguta akweakwa amo namanyinga arenge igoro ase egesasimero
Leviticus8:31 Erio Musa agatebia Haroni na abamura baye
Leviticus8:32 Korende enyama amo nemegati biratigare mobisambe nomorero.
Leviticus8:33 Inwe timobaisa gosoka isiko goetania egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano
Leviticus8:34 Buna akorirwe ase rituko ria rero
Leviticus8:35 Inwe nigo morabeere agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano
Leviticus8:36 Ase igo Haroni na abamura baye bagakora onsi aya Omonene achigete goetera ase Musa.

Leviticus9:4 na eng’ombe amo nemingichi chibe ebing’wanso bi’omorembe ase obosio bw’Omonene. Naboigo barue okoruegwa kw’endagera gwochoganirie namaguta
Leviticus9:5 Abanto bakarenta ebinto ebio bionsi Musa abachigete
Leviticus9:6 Erio Musa agateba
Leviticus9:7 Erio Musa agatebia Haroni
Leviticus9:8 Ase ayio Haroni agasuka gochia ang’e ase egesasimero
Leviticus9:9 na abamura baye bakamorentera amanyinga ekeng’wanso ekio
Leviticus9:10 Ebitinya ne chinyigo
Leviticus9:11 Korende chinyama ne riiyo akabisamba nomorero isiko y’egetwori.

Leviticus10:13 Mokoriere agwo aase gete are aachenu. Ekio negetari kiao

Leviticus10:15 Ekenama gekoruegwa
