Leviticus11:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni
Leviticus11:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli
Leviticus11:3 Eng’iti ende yonsi ebwate ebitaago biatananegete kegima
Leviticus11:4 Korende ase ching’iti chikoria eng’ang’ura gose chibwate ebitaago biatananegete timoria engamia
Leviticus11:5 Timoria egesengi
Leviticus11:6 Timoria egesusu
Leviticus11:7 Naende timoria embeche
Leviticus11:8 Timoria chinyama chie ching’iti echio
Leviticus11:9 “Monyare koria chinswe chire ase chinyancha ne chindooche ime
Leviticus11:10 Korende ebitongwa binde bionsi bire moyo ime ase chinyancha
Leviticus11:11 Ebio nabigenderere koba okogechia asemore
Leviticus11:12 Kera egento kere ime ase chinyancha ne chindooche getabwati chingondo chinga buna chimbaba
Leviticus11:13 “Nase chinyoni chirabe okogechia asemore motarie nachio echi: Ekeongo
Leviticus11:14 amakoru na ebisaku biamwabo;
Leviticus11:15 ebigonkoru na ebisaku biamwabo bionsi;
Leviticus11:16 esagero
Leviticus11:17 enyakweumia
Leviticus11:18 etibibi
Leviticus11:19 riagonga
Leviticus11:20 “Ebitongwa ebisinini bionsi bire moyo bire ne chimbaba na amagoro ane
Leviticus11:21 Korende ebitongwa ebio ebisinini bibwate chimbaba na amagoro ane inamorie ebio bigotaroka nebirenge.
Leviticus11:22 Ebisaku bionsi bie chingige
Leviticus11:23 Korende ebinde bionsi ase ebitongwa ebio ebisinini bibwate chimbaba na amagoro ane
Leviticus11:24 “Ase ebitongwa ebio nigo moresoyie ase ogotacheneka. Monto onde bwensi orakune ebikwete ase ebio nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio
Leviticus11:25 na onde bwensi oraimokie egekwete korwa ase ebio nigo arasibie chianga chiaye
Leviticus11:26 Kera eng’iti ebwate ebitaago
Leviticus11:27 Ching’iti chiria chikogendera ebisonsogoro ase echio chibwate amagoro ane tichichenegeti asemore. Monto onde bwensi orakune echikwete ase echio nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio.
Leviticus11:28 Na monto onde bwensi oraimokie eyekwete ase echio nasibie chianga chiaye
Leviticus11:29 “Ase ching’iti chinke chigoetanana ase ense
Leviticus11:30 ekiigo egeke
Leviticus11:31 Ase ching’iti echio chinke echio nchibe chitachenegeti asemore. Monto onde bwensi orachikune ekero chiakure nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio.
Leviticus11:32 Ching’iti echio chiise kogwera egento kende gionsi ekero chiakure
Leviticus11:33 Onye eyemo ye ching’iti echio ekogwera enyongo
Leviticus11:34 Endagera ende yonsi ekoriegwa nebe eyetachenegeti onye amache akoumorwa korwa ase enyongo buna eyio akoyekuna
Leviticus11:35 Gento kende gionsi keragwerwe neyemo ye ching’iti echio ekwete inakebe getachenegeti; onye ne riko rikoroisia emegati
Leviticus11:36 Ensoko gose aase amache akogachwa nabigenderere koba ebichenegete
Leviticus11:37 Onye eng’iti eyemo y’echio ekwete keragwere embusuro egosimekwa
Leviticus11:38 Korende onye embusuro eyio yainekirwe ase amache ime
Leviticus11:39 “Eng’iti ende yonsi yancheire koriegwa kerakwe
Leviticus11:40 Monto onde bwensi orarie enyama y’eng’iti eyio ekwete nasibie chianga chiaye
Leviticus11:41 “Ebitongwa ebike bionsi bigoetanana ase ense nigo bire okogechia
Leviticus11:42 Egetongwa kende gionsi egeke kegwekururera enda
Leviticus11:43 Timobaisa gwekora okogechia ase engencho y’ebitongwa ebio bigoetanana
Leviticus11:44 Inche ninche Omonene
Leviticus11:45 Inche ninche Omonene
Leviticus11:46 Oko nakwo ogochika gotenenerete ching’iti ne chinyoni
Leviticus11:47 na igo momanye gwatanana ebichenegete korwa ase ebitachenegeti
Leviticus12:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus12:2 “Otebie Abaisraeli ng’a omokungu karabe morito na aibore omwana omoisia nabe oyotachenegeti ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere
Leviticus12:3 Omwana oria omoisia asarwe ase rituko ria gatano na gatato.
Leviticus12:4 Erio omokungu oria aganye ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo etato na atato
Leviticus12:5 Korende karaibore omwana egesagane
Leviticus12:6 “Ekero amatuko ’omokungu oyio ay’ogochenwa aerire
Leviticus12:7 Omokuani oria arue eng’ondi eyio
Leviticus12:8 “Onye omokungu oria takonyara konyora eng’ondi
Leviticus13:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni
Leviticus13:2 “Ekero omonto abeire negesambo
Leviticus13:3 Omokuani oyio arenge oborwaire obwo buya. Kararore ng’a amarionya are ase egesambo keria aonchokire abeire amarabu
Leviticus13:4 Onye egesambo keria kere ekerabu
Leviticus13:5 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere omokuani amorenge naende
Leviticus13:6 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere amorenge naende
Leviticus13:7 Korende egesambo keria gokerabe giesiareire ase risankwa nyuma omokuani karorire ng’a ochenekire
Leviticus13:8 na ere kararore ng’a egesambo keria giesiareire ase risankwa
Leviticus13:9 “Ekero omonto abwate oborwaire bwa ukoma ararentwe ase omokuani
Leviticus13:10 na ere amorenge buya. Kararore egesambo ekerabu ase risankwa
Leviticus13:11 obwo noborwaire bwa ukoma obokoro bogendererete ase engaki entambe ase risankwa ri’omobere bw’omonto oria. Omokuani atebe ng’a omonto oyio tachenegeti; bono tamobeka ase egesomo
Leviticus13:12 Onye oborwaire obwo bwa ukoma bwasokire ase risankwa isiko
Leviticus13:13 erio omokuani amorenge naende
Leviticus13:14 Korende onye enyama embariri yachakire gokina imeo
Leviticus13:15 Ekero omokuani ararore ng’a enyama eria embariri yasokire
Leviticus13:16 Korende onye enyama eria embariri ekoonchoka ebe endabu
Leviticus13:17 na ere amorenge buya
Leviticus13:18 “Omonto onye orenge ne rigumba ase risankwa riaye
Leviticus13:19 na aase agwe ase risankwa riarenge obobimbu oborabu bororekane
Leviticus13:20 Ere amorenge buya
Leviticus13:21 Korende omokuani karamorenge na arore ng’a amarionya ’egesambo keria tari amarabu
Leviticus13:22 Onye oborwaire obwo bwesiareire ase risankwa
Leviticus13:23 Korende onye egesambo keria tikeonchogeti na gwesiarera
Leviticus13:24 “Onye omonto ore ne risambo ri’omorero ayiete ase risankwa ri’omobere oye
Leviticus13:25 omokuani arenge egesambo ekio. Onye amarionya egesambo ekio aonchokire na koraba
Leviticus13:26 Korende omokuani kararenge egesambo keria
Leviticus13:27 Rituko ria gatano na kabere omokuani amorenge naende. Kararore ng’a egesambo keria giesiareire ase risankwa
Leviticus13:28 Korende onye egesambo keria tikeonchogeti gose giesiarere ase risankwa
Leviticus13:29 “Onye omonto
Leviticus13:30 omokuani arenge egesambo ekio. Onye gekorete engoro gochia ime goetania risankwa
Leviticus13:31 Omokuani kararenge richoncho riria na arore ng’a tirikoreti engoro gochia ime goetania risankwa
Leviticus13:32 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere omokuani arenge naende oborwaire boria
Leviticus13:33 omonto oyio akigite etukia
Leviticus13:34 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere omokuani amorenge naende
Leviticus13:35 Korende onye richoncho riria riesiareire ase risankwa nyuma gachenekire
Leviticus13:36 omokuani amorenge naende
Leviticus13:37 Omokuani kararore ng’a richoncho riria tirionchogeti
Leviticus13:38 “Onye omosacha gose omokungu obwate ebisambo ebirabu ase risankwa ri’omobere
Leviticus13:39 omokuani amorenge. Nere kararore ng’a ebisambo bie risankwa ri’omobere nigo bire ebirabu ake
Leviticus13:40 “Onye omonto osunyokire etukia
Leviticus13:41 na onye osunyokire etukia y’omotwe bosio
Leviticus13:42 Korende onye ase risio ri’omotwe oye
Leviticus13:43 Ase ayio
Leviticus13:44 omonto oyio nabwate oborwaire bwa ukoma
Leviticus13:45 “Omonto obwate oborwaire bwa ukoma abeke chianga amachanchabe
Leviticus13:46 Ere agenderere koba oyotachenegeti ekero are noborwaire boria
Leviticus13:47 “Onye ukoma bore ase eanga eroisirie korwa ase amarionya gose egatani
Leviticus13:48 gose bore ase egetambaa keroisirie ase chingencho ao ao korwa ase egatani
Leviticus13:49 na onye ekemoa gekororekana kere nekieni buna obonyansi
Leviticus13:50 Omokuani arenge egento kere na ukoma
Leviticus13:51 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere omokuani akerenge naende. Kararore ng’a ogosareka koria gwesiareire ase eanga
Leviticus13:52 Ase igo egento ekio gesambwe nomorero
Leviticus13:53 “Omokuani kararenge na arore ng’a ekemoa keria tigieserarereti ase eanga eria
Leviticus13:54 rirorio achike ng’a egento ekio giasarekire
Leviticus13:55 Omokuani arenge ekemoa ase egento keria nyuma kogiasibigwe. Kararore ng’a ekemoa keria tikeraonchoka
Leviticus13:56 Korende onye omokuani okorenga egento ekio nyuma kogiasibigwe
Leviticus13:57 Onye ekemoa gekororekana naende ase eanga eria
Leviticus13:58 Ekemoa gokeranyorekane ng’a giasirire ekero eanga
Leviticus13:59 Oko nakwo ogochika igoro ase ebinto bire na ukoma
Leviticus14:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus14:2 “Oko nakwo ogochika ase omonto obwate oborwaire bwa ukoma. Ase rituko riria arabe agochenwa arentwe ase omokuani
Leviticus14:3 na omokuani agende isiko y’egetwori amorenge. Kararore ng’a omonto oria ogwenire korwa ase oborwaire bwa ukoma bwamoriete
Leviticus14:4 omokuani achike abanto barente chinyoni ibere chichenegete chire moyo
Leviticus14:5 Erio omokuani achike abanto banyenyere enyoni eyemo igoro ase egetega ki’amaroba kere namache amaya a rooche.
Leviticus14:6 Naende aimokie enyoni eria ere moyo amo noroko rw’omocharake
Leviticus14:7 Anyororokerie amanyinga aria ara gatano na kabere igoro ase omonto oyio ogochia gochenwa ase oborwaire bwa ukoma
Leviticus14:8 Omonto oria ogochia gochenwa goika asibie chianga chiaye
Leviticus14:9 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere naende akigite etukia yaye yonsi y’omotwe
Leviticus14:10 “Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato arente chimanwa ibere chimingichi chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo
Leviticus14:11 Omokuani otenenerete arente omonto oria ogochia gochenwa amo nokoruegwa okwo ase obosio bwane inche Omonene
Leviticus14:12 Erio omokuani oria aimokie emanwa eyemo
Leviticus14:13 Anyenyere emanwa eria agwo aase achenire
Leviticus14:14 Omokuani aimokie amanyinga make ay’ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha
Leviticus14:15 Naende omokuani aimokie amaguta aria ataaere oroe rw’okoboko kwaye gw’okobee
Leviticus14:16 atobeke ekiara kiaye gi’okoraga gi’okoboko kwaye kwa borio ime ase amaguta aria are roe rw’okoboko kwaye gw’okobee
Leviticus14:17 Amaguta make ase ayio agotigara ase oroe rwaye ayagindie mesia y’ogoto kwa borio kw’omonto oria ogochia gochenwa
Leviticus14:18 Naende maguta ayagotigara ase oroe rwaye ayaumore igoro ase omotwe bw’omonto oria ogochia gochenwa. Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria agwo ase obosio bwane.
Leviticus14:19 “Erio omokuani arue ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Leviticus14:20 akerue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera ase egesasimero. Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria
Leviticus14:21 “Korende onye omonto oria ore omotaka na takonyara konyora ebinge akorua
Leviticus14:22 Boigo arente amaruma abere
Leviticus14:23 Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato arente ebinto ebio bi’ogochenwa kwaye ase omokuani
Leviticus14:24 Omokuani aimokie emanwa y’eng’ondi eria y’ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha
Leviticus14:25 Erio anyenye emanwa eria ebe ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha
Leviticus14:26 Omokuani ataaere amaguta ase oroe rw’okoboko kwaye gw’okobee.
Leviticus14:27 Make ay’amaguta aria are roe rw’okoboko kwaye gw’okobee ayanyororokerie ara gatano na kabere nekiara gi’okoraga gi’okoboko kwaye kwa borio
Leviticus14:28 Naende make ay’amaguta ayio are roe rwaye agindie igoro ase amanyinga ’ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha agindire: Mesia y’ogoto kwa borio kw’omonto oria ogochia gochenwa
Leviticus14:29 Amaguta agotigara ase oroe rwaye ayaumore ase omotwe bw’omonto oria ogochia gochenwa. Ase enchera eyio akore okobwatanigwa asare
Leviticus14:30 Erio omonto oria arue riruma gose riige rie riruma
Leviticus14:31 Erimo ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Leviticus14:32 Oko nakwo ogochika ase omonto obwate oborwaire bwa ukoma
Leviticus14:33 Erio Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni
Leviticus14:34 “Ekero moraike ase ense ya Kanani
Leviticus14:35 omonto omonyene enyomba eria agende atebie omokuani: Yarorekanire ase enyomba yane ng’a ukoma mboreo.
Leviticus14:36 Omokuani achike ng’a ebinto bionsi bire ase enyomba eyio birusigweo ritang’ani atarasoao koborenga. Onye tibagokora bo rirorio ebinto bionsi bire nyomba ime nabibe bitachenegeti. Nyuma y’ayio omokuani asoe ase enyomba eyio koyerenga.
Leviticus14:37 Karayerenge na arore ng’a egetamase nkere ase enyasi y’enyomba eyio kere nekieni buna obonyansi
Leviticus14:38 erio omokuani asoke korwa ase enyomba eyio
Leviticus14:39 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere omokuani airaneo
Leviticus14:40 achike ng’a amagena aria asoirwe na ukoma atagorwe
Leviticus14:41 Nyuma y’ayio chinyasi chionsi chia ime chiomorwe
Leviticus14:42 Amagena ande arentwe
Leviticus14:43 “Ukoma boria koboratuboke naende ase enyomba eria nyuma amagena aria karusigweo
Leviticus14:44 omokuani agende ayerenge naende. Onye egetamase keria giesiareire ase enyomba eria
Leviticus14:45 Enyomba eria etagorwe
Leviticus14:46 Monto onde bwensi orasoe ase enyomba eyio
Leviticus14:47 Monto onde bwensi aise korara ime ase enyomba eyio
Leviticus14:48 “Korende omokuani karachiche ayerenge arore ng’a ukoma boria tibwesiarereti nyuma koyaoomirwe
Leviticus14:49 Omokuani arente chinyoni ibere amo noroko rw’omocharake
Leviticus14:50 Erio anyenyere enyoni eyemo igoro ase egetega keroiseirie amaroba kere namache amaya a rooche.
Leviticus14:51 Naende aimokie oroko orwo rw’omocharake
Leviticus14:52 Ase enchera eyio omokuani nachene enyomba eyio namanyinga ’enyoni eria
Leviticus14:53 Erio omokuani atige enyoni eria ere moyo eiruruke
Leviticus14:54 Oko nakwo ogochika igoro y’oborwaire bwa ukoma
Leviticus14:55 na ukoma bore ase chianga
Leviticus14:56 naende obobimbu bwe risankwa
Leviticus14:57 Ogochika okwo nigo gokworokia onye ebinto tibichenegeti gose mbichenegete. Okwo nogochika gwa ukoma.
Leviticus15:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni
Leviticus15:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli
Leviticus15:3 Aya naro achikire ase amang’ana ayio: Amache ayio karagenderere korua
Leviticus15:4 Ebirarero bionsi arararere
Leviticus15:5 Monto onde bwensi aise gokuna ebirarero bi’omonto oyio goika asibie chianga chiaye
Leviticus15:6 Na onde bwensi oraikaransere egento omonto oria omorwaire aikaranserete
Leviticus15:7 Na onde bwensi orakune omonto oyio omorwaire goika asibie chianga chiaye
Leviticus15:8 Omonto oyio omorwaire karatwere omonto ochenegete amate
Leviticus15:9 Egeikaransero gekobekerwa eng’iti ekoriinwa
Leviticus15:10 Omonto aise gokuna egento kende gionsi kiarenge inse y’omonto oria omorwaire nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio; na onde bwensi oraimokie egento buna ekio nigo arasibie chianga chiaye
Leviticus15:11 Onye omonto oria omorwaire ogokuna omonto onde ataraisaba amaboko
Leviticus15:12 Enyongo ende yonsi omonto oria omorwaire arakune goika yaatwe
Leviticus15:13 “Omonto oria gachenekire korwa ase okorua kw’amache aria anga buna chimengere goika abare amatuko atano na abere ay’ogocheneka kwaye. Erio asibie chianga chiaye
Leviticus15:14 Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato aire amaruma abere
Leviticus15:15 Omokuani arue erimo ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Leviticus15:16 “Onye omonto omosacha ogosokia embusuro yaye y’oroiboro
Leviticus15:17 Eanga ende yonsi
Leviticus15:18 Omonto onye orarire nomokungu
Leviticus15:19 “Ekero omokungu are nomotienyi nigo arabe oyotachenegeti ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere. Onde bwensi oramokune nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio.
Leviticus15:20 Gento kende gionsi arabe okorarera ekero are nomotienyi
Leviticus15:21 Onde bwensi orakune ebirarero bi’omokungu oyio goika asibie chianga chiaye
Leviticus15:22 Na onde bwensi orakune egento omokungu oyio aikaranserete
Leviticus15:23 Ase igo kobirabe ebirarero
Leviticus15:24 Omosacha kararare nomokungu ore nomotienyi
Leviticus15:25 “Omokungu karagenderere goiteka amanyinga ase amatuko amange atari ay’omotienyi oye
Leviticus15:26 Ebirarero bionsi are korarera ekero agoiteka amanyinga
Leviticus15:27 Na onde bwensi orakune ebinto ebio nabe oyotachenegeti; ere asibie chianga chiaye
Leviticus15:28 Ekero ogoiteka kwaye kw’amanyinga gwakamire
Leviticus15:29 Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato aire amaruma abere gose amage ’amaruma abere ase omokuani agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano.
Leviticus15:30 Omokuani arue erimo ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Leviticus15:31 “Ase enchera eyio okurere Abaisraeli igoro y’ogotacheneka kwabo
Leviticus15:32 Aya naro amachiko ase omonto okorua amache anga buna chimengere
Leviticus15:33 naboigo nase omokungu ore nomotienyi
Leviticus16:1 Nyuma y’ogokwa kw’abamura baria babere ba Haroni baitetwe n’Omonene
Leviticus16:2 akamotebia
Leviticus16:3 Igo arasoe ime y’Aase Aachenu Mono nyuma karentire eeri ensae ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Leviticus16:4 “Ritang’ani Haroni atarasoa Aase Aachenu Mono
Leviticus16:5 “Erio Haroni aegwe korwa ase omoganda bw’Abaisraeli chigoree ibere chibe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Leviticus16:6 Ritang’ani arue eeri ebe ekeng’wanso ase ogokora okobwatanigwa asere omonyene
Leviticus16:7 Naende arente chigoree chiria ibere ase obosio bwane inche Omonene agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano.
Leviticus16:8 Agwo Haroni aake obomera igoro ye chigoree chiria ibere
Leviticus16:9 Egoree eria erabe yagwereirwe nobomera asende
Leviticus16:10 Na egoree eria erabe yagwereirwe nobomera ase Asaseli ayerente ere moyo ase obosio bwane inche Omonene
Leviticus16:11 “Naboigo Haroni arente eeri eria ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe biaye
Leviticus16:12 Erio aimokie orogio roichire omorero bw’amakara korwa ase egesasimero kere ase obosio bwane
Leviticus16:13 ayebeke ase omorero igoro
Leviticus16:14 Aimokie amanyinga make ay’eeri eyio
Leviticus16:15 “Nyuma y’ayio anyenye embori eria ebe ekeng’wanso ase engencho y’ebibe bi’abanto
Leviticus16:16 Naboigo akore okobwatanigwa ase Aase Aachenu Mono ase engencho y’ogotacheneka kw’Abaisraeli amo nogosaria kwabo
Leviticus16:17 Monto onde tatigara ime ase Eema y’Omosangererekano korwa ekero Haroni agosoa ime y’Aase Aachenu Mono akore okobwatanigwa goika arueo
Leviticus16:18 Erio asoke agende ase egesasimero kere agwo ase obosio bwane
Leviticus16:19 naende anyororokerie egesasimero namanyinga ayio nekiara kiaye ara gatano na kabere. Ase enchera eyio agesibie na kogechena korwa ase ogotacheneka kore ase Abaisraeli.
Leviticus16:20 “Ekero Haroni akoorire gokora okobwatanigwa ase Aase Aachenu Mono
Leviticus16:21 Erio goika abeke amaboko aye abere ase omotwe bw’embori eria ere moyo
Leviticus16:22 Naboigo embori eria ebogorie ebibe biabo bionsi
Leviticus16:23 “Nyuma y’ayio Haroni asoe Eema y’Omosangererekano
Leviticus16:24 Erio esibie omobere oye namache agwo aase gete are aachenu
Leviticus16:25 Naende asambere ebitinya bi’ekeng’wanso keria ki’ebibe ase egesasimero.
Leviticus16:26 Omonto oyio oirete embori eria ase erooro ase Asaseli
Leviticus16:27 Eeri eria amo nembori eria chiaruetwe chibe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Leviticus16:28 Omonto oria orasambe ebinto ebio nigo arasibie chianga chiaye
Leviticus16:29 “Oyo noro omoroberio ochikire asemore moragenderere korenda botambe. Rituko ria ikomi
Leviticus16:30 Ase rituko erio okobwatanigwa ngokorwe asemore ase okobasibia korwa ase ebibe biaino bionsi
Leviticus16:31 Rituko erio naribe richenu mono asemore
Leviticus16:32 Omokuani oakirwe amaguta na gwatananwa abe omokuani ribaga ria ise
Leviticus16:33 na akore okobwatanigwa ase Aase Aachenu Mono
Leviticus16:34 Omoroberio oyio ochikirwe asemore oragenderere botambe
Leviticus17:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus17:2 “Tebia Haroni na abamura baye amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi ng’a inche Omonene nachikire iga:
Leviticus17:3 Onye omonto onde bwensi okonyenyera eng’ombe
Leviticus17:4 atayerenteti agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano ebe ekeng’wanso asende
Leviticus17:5 Bono Abaisraeli tibakonyara gokora buna barenge gokora agwo ritang’ani
Leviticus17:6 Na omokuani asiarere amanyinga ase egesasimero kiane agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano
Leviticus17:7 Abaisraeli tibabaisa konyenyera ebing’wanso biabo isiko aande na kobirua ase ebirecha
Leviticus17:8 “Ase igo obatebie ng’a monto onde bwensi ase Abaisraeli
Leviticus17:9 na omonto oyio atakerenteti ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano na gokerua asende
Leviticus17:10 “Onde bwensi ase Abaisraeli
Leviticus17:11 Obomoyo bwa kera omobere nigo bore ime ase amanyinga; nabaeire amanyinga moyanyororokererie ase egesasimero akore okobwatanigwa ase obomoyo bwaino; amanyinga naro agokora okobwatanigwa
Leviticus17:12 Ase ayio natebirie Abaisraeli ng’a monto onde bwensi obo
Leviticus17:13 “Omonto onde bwensi ase Abaisraeli
Leviticus17:14 Obomoyo bwa kera omobere nigo bore ase amanyinga. Ase engencho eyio natebirie Abaisraeli ng’a tibaria amanyinga ’eng’iti ende yonsi
Leviticus17:15 “Omonto onde bwensi
Leviticus17:16 Korende onye tagosibia chianga chiaye na gwesibia omobere
Leviticus18:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus18:2 “Tebia Abaisraeli ng’a natebire iga: Inche ninche Omonene
Leviticus18:3 Timobaisa gokora buna abanto ba Misiri bagokora
Leviticus18:4 Moigwere amachiko aane
Leviticus18:5 Ee
Leviticus18:6 “Monto onde bwensi tabaisa korara nomokungu ore omoamate omwabo. Okwo nokorentera omoamate omwabo obosooku. Inche ninche Omonene.
Leviticus18:7 Tobaisa korara na nyoko. Okwo nokomorentera iso obosooku. Torentera nyoko obosooku.
Leviticus18:8 Tobaisa korara na nyoko moke
Leviticus18:9 Tobaisa korara na moiseke omino
Leviticus18:10 Tobaisa korara nomochokoro oo
Leviticus18:11 Tobaisa korara nomoiseke o nyoko moke
Leviticus18:12 Tobaisa korara nomoiseke omwabo iso; oyio nyoko moke
Leviticus18:13 Tobaisa korara nomoiseke omwabo nyoko; oyio nyoko moke
Leviticus18:14 Tobaisa korara na moga iso moke omwabo iso; okwo nokorentera iso moke obosooku
Leviticus18:15 Tobaisa korara na moka momura oo; obwo nobosooku
Leviticus18:16 Tobaisa korara na moka momura omino; okwo nokomorentera momura omino obosooku.
Leviticus18:17 Tobaisa korara nomoiseke bw’omokungu kwabeire nere
Leviticus18:18 Tobaisa koira mokoyoo
Leviticus18:19 “Tobaisa korara nomokungu ekero abwate omotienyi
Leviticus18:20 Tobaisa korara nomokungu bw’omosacha onde na gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka nere.
Leviticus18:21 Tobaisa korua omwana onde oo abe ekeng’wanso ase enyasae Moleki
Leviticus18:22 Tobaisa korara nomonto omosacha buna okorara nomokungu; obwo nobonyaka obobe bw’okogechia.
Leviticus18:23 Tobaisa korara neng’iti ende yonsi na gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka nero. Na omokungu tabaisa kwerua korara neng’iti ende yonsi. Obwo nobonyaka obobe kegima bw’okogechia.
Leviticus18:24 “Inwe timobaisa gwekora abatachenegeti ase ogokora buna okwo. Ase enchera eyio abanto b’ebisaku mbesoetie ase ogotacheneka
Leviticus18:25 Ogokora kwabo gokarentera enseeria ogotacheneka
Leviticus18:26 Ase igo inwe mwensi
Leviticus18:27 Abanto bamenyete ase ense eria ritang’ani riaino nigo bakorete okogechia okwo gwonsi
Leviticus18:28 Moise gokora ayio
Leviticus18:29 ekiagera monto onde bwensi orakore okogechia konde gwonsi buna okwo
Leviticus18:30 “Ase ayio
Leviticus19:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus19:2 “Tebia omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli: Mobe abachenu
Leviticus19:3 Kera oyomo oino asike ng’ina na ise
Leviticus19:4 “Timontiga na koonchokera emegwekano y’ogosasimwa
Leviticus19:5 “Onye moganetie korua ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe asende inche Omonene
Leviticus19:6 Chinyama chi’ekengw’anso ekio chiriegwe ase rituko erio erio eng’iti yanyenywa
Leviticus19:7 Chiise koriegwa ase rituko ria gatato
Leviticus19:8 Monto onde bwensi orakerie ekero ekio nabarerwe obobe bwaye
Leviticus19:9 “Ekero mokogesa emegondo yaino
Leviticus19:10 Timobaisa gochora amasabibu atigarete
Leviticus19:11 “Timoiba
Leviticus19:12 Timobaisa gotiana ogotiana kw’oborimo ase erieta riane. Moise gokora igo
Leviticus19:13 “Tobaisa korianania omogisangio oo
Leviticus19:14 Tobaisa koragereria omonto omotino
Leviticus19:15 “Timokora ayatari boronge ekero ebina bikogambwa; timobaisa gwanchereria omotaka
Leviticus19:16 Tobaisa goeta‐eta ase egati y’abanto bamino gokwana obogenki; tobaisa kogera oyomino aitwe ase okoba kirori bw’oborimo. Inche ninche Omonene.
Leviticus19:17 “Tobaisa kogecha oyomino ime ase enkoro yao
Leviticus19:18 Tobaisa kweruseria egesiomba
Leviticus19:19 “Mobwate amachiko aane. Timobaisa gotiga chitugo chiaino chieenane amarieme ne chitari egesaku ekemo. Timobaisa kobusura chimbusuro chi’ebisaku bibere ase omogondo oyomo
Leviticus19:20 “Omonto aise korara nomoiseke ore omosomba na oriereirwe boko nomonto omoao
Leviticus19:21 Omonto oyio arente emingichi eyemo asende inche Omonene
Leviticus19:22 Ase okorua emingichi eria y’ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha
Leviticus19:23 “Ekero moraike ase ense ya Kanani na mosimeke emete y’ebisaku ao ao ekwama amatunda
Leviticus19:24 Ase omwaka o kane amatunda ’emete eyio aatananwe abe amachenu asende inche Omonene
Leviticus19:25 Korende ase omwaka o gatano inamorie amatunda ’emete eyio. Komorakore igo
Leviticus19:26 “Timobaisa koria enyama ende yonsi ebwate amanyinga ime yaye. Timobaisa gwancha oboragori
Leviticus19:27 Timobaisa konacha chitukia chiaino
Leviticus19:28 Timobaisa gwesaraga emebere yaino ase okoreera abakure
Leviticus19:29 “Tobaisa korentera omoiseke oo obosooku ase okomoira abe omotayayi ase chihekalu
Leviticus19:30 Morende Chisabato chiane
Leviticus19:31 “Timorigia ogosemigwa korwa ase abanto abakoboria amang’ana korwa ase emeika y’abanto bakwete
Leviticus19:32 “Otenene ase omonto omogotu ore ne chimbuche
Leviticus19:33 “Timobaisa kobakorera bobe abamenyi bamenyete ase ense yaino.
Leviticus19:34 Mokorere abamenyi bamenyete ase egati yaino buna mogokorera ababiare
Leviticus19:35 “Timokorerana oborianania ase ebirengo binde bionsi
Leviticus19:36 Mokorere ekerengo kia boronge; motware amagena ay’okorenga a boronge
Leviticus19:37 Mobwate amachiko aane onsi aya nabachikire. Inche ninche Omonene.”
Leviticus20:1 Omonene agatebia Musa
Leviticus20:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli
Leviticus20:3 Inche omonyene nimbe nendamwamu ase omonto oyio
Leviticus20:4 Onye abanto b’ense yaino bakoombia
Leviticus20:5 erio inche omonyene nimbe nendamwamu ase omonto oyio na eamate yaye. Nimwatanane amo nabanto bonsi bamobwatirie
Leviticus20:6 “Onye omonto okorigia ogosemigwa korwa ase abanto bakoboria amang’ana korwa ase emeika y’abanto bakwete
Leviticus20:7 Eatanane
Leviticus20:8 Mobwate amachiko aane na koyakora; inche ninche Omonene
Leviticus20:9 “Kera omonto okoragereria ise gose ng’ina
Leviticus20:10 “Onye omonto ogotomana nomokungu bw’omonto onde
Leviticus20:11 Onye omonto okorara nomokungu ore moga ise
Leviticus20:12 Onye omonto okorara na moka momura oye
Leviticus20:13 Onye omosacha okorara nomosacha onde buna akorara nomokungu
Leviticus20:14 Onye omonto okonyuoma omokungu aire na ng’ina biara abasang’ananie
Leviticus20:15 Onye omonto okorara neng’iti
Leviticus20:16 Onye omokungu ogoika eng’iti ende yonsi ang’e
Leviticus20:17 “Onye omonto okoira omoiseke omwabo
Leviticus20:18 Onye omonto omosacha okorara nomokungu ekero abwate omotienyi
Leviticus20:19 “Tobaisa korara nomoiseke omwabo nyoko
Leviticus20:20 Onye omonto okorara na moga ise moke
Leviticus20:21 Onye omonto okoira moka momura omwabo
Leviticus20:22 “Ase ayio mobwate amachiko aane na emeroberio yonsi nabachikire
Leviticus20:23 Timochia kobwatia chingencho chi’abanto b’egesaku keria ngochia goseria kerue ase amasio aino; barabwo nigo bakorete amang’ana ayio onsi
Leviticus20:24 Korende inabarierete inwe eira ng’a nimbae ense yabo ebe omwando oino
Leviticus20:25 Inwe goika momanye gwatanana ching’iti chichenegete korwa ase echitachenegeti
Leviticus20:26 Inwe mobe abachenu baane
Leviticus20:27 “Omosacha
Leviticus21:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus21:2 Nare ne ribaga gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase abanto aba: Ng’ina na ise
Leviticus21:3 boigo na omoiseke omwabo ore omwekungi
Leviticus21:4 Ekiagera omokuani are omotang’ani ase abanto baye
Leviticus21:5 “Omokuani tabaisa kogingira ensemo ende y’etukia y’omotwe oye
Leviticus21:6 Abakuani mbabe abachenu asende inche Nyasae obo
Leviticus21:7 Omokuani tabaisa konyuoma omokungu omotayayi
Leviticus21:8 Goika omobare ng’a nomochenu
Leviticus21:9 Onye omwana omoiseke bw’omokuani ogwesaria ase okoba omotayayi
Leviticus21:10 “Oyore omokuani omonene ase abamwabo
Leviticus21:11 Tabaisa gosoa enyomba ase abanto babekire omobere bw’omonto okure
Leviticus21:12 Tasoka korwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu
Leviticus21:13 Ere anyuome omoiseke ore omwekungi.
Leviticus21:14 Tabaisa konyuoma omokungu omoboraka
Leviticus21:15 Erio nario abana baye barabe abachenu
Leviticus21:16 Omonene agakwana na Musa naende
Leviticus21:17 “Kwana na Haroni
Leviticus21:18 Omonto ore na kemocho ase omobere oye tabaisa goika ang’e
Leviticus21:19 gose omonto ore na kemocho ase okoboko gose ase okogoro
Leviticus21:20 gose omonto ore nesukubi ase omogongo oye
Leviticus21:21 Omonto onde bwensi ase ororeria rwa Haroni omokuani ore na kemocho ase omobere oye tabaisa goika ang’e kondetera inche Omonene okoruegwa kw’endagera kogosambwa nomorero
Leviticus21:22 Ere nabe ne ribaga ri’okoria okoruegwa kw’endagera gokoruegwa asende inche Nyasae oye
Leviticus21:23 Korende ekiagera are na kemocho ase omobere oye
Leviticus21:24 Amang’ana ayio naro Musa atebetie Haroni
Leviticus22:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus22:2 “Kwana na Haroni na abamura baye
Leviticus22:3 Obatebie ng’a onye omonto onde bwensi ase ororeria rwabo
Leviticus22:4 “Omonto onde bwensi ase ororeria rwa Haroni obwate oborwaire bwa ukoma
Leviticus22:5 na onde bwensi orakune eng’iti ekwagura
Leviticus22:6 Omokuani onde bwensi orakune egento buna ekio nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio; ere takoria ebinto ebichenu goika ekero arabe bwesibirie omobere oye namache.
Leviticus22:7 Ekero erioba riagure
Leviticus22:8 Taria enyama y’eng’iti ekwete yoka enyene
Leviticus22:9 “Abakuani bonsi goika barende amang’ana aya nachikire. Batayabwateti
Leviticus22:10 “Omonto otari bw’eamate y’omokuani tabaisa koria ebinto ebichenu. Omomenyi omenyete amo nomokuani
Leviticus22:11 Omosomba onde bwensi omokuani agorete ne chibesa chiaye omonyene
Leviticus22:12 Omoiseke bw’omokuani karanyuomwe nomonto otari omokuani tabaisa koria ebinto ebichenu bikoruegwa bibe ebing’wanso.
Leviticus22:13 Korende omosubati bw’omokuani osogete otigirwe ore omoboraka
Leviticus22:14 “Omonto onde bwensi otari bw’eamate y’omokuani orarie ebinto biria ebichenu ase ogotamanya
Leviticus22:15 Abakuani tibabaisa gokora ebinto ebi ebichenu Abaisraeli bagwatanana na kobirua ase Omonene bibe ebitachenegeti
Leviticus22:16 na igo bakogera abanto babogorie ebibe biabo
Leviticus22:17 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus22:18 “Tebia Haroni na abamura baye
Leviticus22:19 goika arue eeri
Leviticus22:20 Timobaisa korua eng’iti ende yonsi ere na kemocho ase omobere oye
Leviticus22:21 Ekero omonto onde bwensi akorua ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe asende
Leviticus22:22 Timobaisa konduera ching’iti chiukorete
Leviticus22:23 Eeri gose emanwa y’eng’ondi ebwate ekiimo egetambe goetania ekende
Leviticus22:24 Eng’iti ende yonsi chingetia chiaye chisaregete ase ogosunyuntwa
Leviticus22:25 “Eng’iti ende yonsi ere buna echio moranyore korwa ase omomenyi
Leviticus22:26 Naende Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus22:27 “Ekero emori
Leviticus22:28 Timobaisa konyenya eng’ombe amo nemori yaye ase rituko erimo
Leviticus22:29 Ekero moganetie konduera inche Omonene ekeng’wanso ki’ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono
Leviticus22:30 Ekeng’wanso ekio keriegwe keere ase rituko erio erio
Leviticus22:31 “Ase ayio mobwate amachiko aane na koyakora. Inche ninche Omonene
Leviticus22:32 Timobaisa korentera erieta riane obosooku
Leviticus22:33 Ninche nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri
Leviticus23:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus23:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli
Leviticus23:3 Ase amatuko atano na rimo mokore emeremo yaino
Leviticus23:4 “Naende nareo Amatuko ande Amanene ay’Omonene
Leviticus23:5 “Rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani
Leviticus23:6 Na ase rituko ria ikomi na gatano ri’omotienyi oyio ne Rituko Rinene ri’Omonene
Leviticus23:7 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima
Leviticus23:8 korende namorue okoruegwa kw’endagera kogosambwa nomorero ase Omonene ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere. Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere namobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima. Timokora emeremo ya kera rituko.”
Leviticus23:9 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus23:10 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli
Leviticus23:11 Ase rituko rigotunyana eri’Esabato ere asungusie riboa erio ase obosio bwane
Leviticus23:12 Ase rituko riria riboa erio rigosungusigwa inamorue boigo emanwa emingichi yakoorire omwaka oyomo
Leviticus23:13 Amo nekeng’wanso ekio morue obosie ebimunu bine bwochoganirie namaguta
Leviticus23:14 Timobaisa koria okwama okwo okoyia: Ebigara ebibese
Leviticus23:15 “Mobare chichuma isano na ibere korwa ase rituko rigotunyana eri’Esabato
Leviticus23:16 Rituko ri’emerongo etano
Leviticus23:17 Korwa ase kera enka morente emegati ebere eroisirie korwa ase obosie obonuke ebimunu bine amo nememera erabe okoruegwa kw’endagera entang’ani y’okwama
Leviticus23:18 Amo nokoruegwa okwo morente ching’ondi isano na ibere echiakoorire omwaka oyomo
Leviticus23:19 Naboigo morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Leviticus23:20 Erio omokuani asungusie omogati bw’ogotongora amo ne chimanwa chie ching’ondi echio ibere ase obosio bw’Omonene. Ebinto ebio biatananwe bibe ebichenu ase Omonene
Leviticus23:21 Rituko erio goika morarie na mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima; timokora emeremo yaino ya kera rituko. Okwo nogochika koragenderere asemore ebiaare ase ebiaare
Leviticus23:22 “Ekero mokogesa emegondo yaino
Leviticus23:23 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus23:24 “Batebie Abaisraeli ng’a rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere batimoke
Leviticus23:25 Tibakora emeremo yabo ya kera rituko
Leviticus23:26 Naende Omonene agakwana na Musa
Leviticus23:27 “Rituko ria ikomi ri’omotienyi oyio o gatano na kabere
Leviticus23:28 Ase rituko erio timokora emeremo ende yonsi; rituko erio nario Rituko ri’Okobwatanigwa ekero okobwatanigwa kogokorwa asemore
Leviticus23:29 Omonto onde bwensi oteng’ate na gweitia ase rituko erio naatananwe korwa ase abanto baye.
Leviticus23:30 Na monto onde bwensi orakore emeremo ende yonsi ase rituko erio
Leviticus23:31 Timokora emeremo ende yonsi. Okwo nogochika koragenderere asemore
Leviticus23:32 Rituko erio naribe asemore rituko ri’Esabato
Leviticus23:33 Naende Omonene agatebia Musa
Leviticus23:34 “Batebie Abaisraeli: Rituko ria ikomi na gatano ri’omotienyi oyio o gatano na kabere nario Rituko Rinene ri’ogochaka Amatuko Amanene ase Omonene. Amatuko ’Ebigutu agenderere ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere.
Leviticus23:35 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani timogokora emeremo ende yonsi ya kera rituko
Leviticus23:36 Kera rituko ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere namobe mokoruera Omonene ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero. Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima moruere Omonene ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero. Oyio nomosangererekano bw’engencho enene bwatananire ase ogosasima; timokora emeremo yaino ya kera rituko.
Leviticus23:37 “Aya naro Amatuko Amanene ase Omonene; moyararie
Leviticus23:38 Amatuko aya Amanene nigo amentirwe ase Chisabato chiane chia botambe
Leviticus23:39 “Ase rituko ria ikomi na gatano ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere
Leviticus23:40 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani namoimokie amatunda amaya korwa ase emete yaino emiya
Leviticus23:41 Amatuko atano na abere ase kera omwaka morende Amatuko ayio Amanene ase Omonene. Okwo nogochika koragenderere botambe asemore
Leviticus23:42 Abanto bonsi abare ababiare b’Abaisraeli nabamenye ase ebigutu ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere.
Leviticus23:43 Erio chinderia chiaino inachimanye ng’a Omonene nabamenyetie inwe Abaisraeli ase ebigutu ekero nabang’anyetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri. Inche ninche Omonene
Leviticus23:44 Naboigo Musa akaba ogokwana n’Abaisraeli igoro y’Amatuko amanene ay’Omonene.
Leviticus24:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa akamotebia
Leviticus24:2 “Chika Abaisraeli ng’a barente amaguta amaya amitire korwa ase amazeituni akobekwa ase chitaya
Leviticus24:3 Agwo isiko y’etoto eye ekengete chibao chirikire oborori chibekire ime y’Eema y’Omosangererekano
Leviticus24:4 Haroni arende chitaya echio chire ase ekebekerero gi’etahabu echenire
Leviticus24:5 “Aye goika oimokie obosie obonuke
Leviticus24:6 Oroberie emegati eyio ase chindwaro ibere
Leviticus24:7 Obeke ubani echenire ase kera orwaro ebe ekemanyererio
Leviticus24:8 Kera rituko ri’Esabato botambe emegati eroberigwe ase emesa igoro
Leviticus24:9 Emegati eyio nigo erabe eya Haroni amo nabamura baye
Leviticus24:10 Narenge omonto oyomo
Leviticus24:11 Omonto oria ng’ina arenge Omoisraeli akarama erieta ri’Omonene na koriragereria. Abanto bakamobwata
Leviticus24:12 Abanto bakamobeka echela
Leviticus24:13 Na Omonene agatebia Musa
Leviticus24:14 “Mosokie isiko y’egetwori omonto oyio oragereretie Omonene
Leviticus24:15 Erio otebie Abaisraeli: Monto onde bwensi oraragererie Nyasae oye nabogorie ebibe biaye na anyore egesusuro.
Leviticus24:16 Omonto orarame erieta ri’Omonene goika aitwe akwe; omoganda bwonsi omoake amagena. Karabe omomenyi gose omobiare
Leviticus24:17 “Omonto oraite omonto onde
Leviticus24:18 Omonto oraite engi’ti etugire goika nayeakane. Obogima boakanwe nobogima.
Leviticus24:19 “Omonto karaake omonto onde asarie omobere oye
Leviticus24:20 Oyokobuna riuga ri’omonto onde
Leviticus24:21 Omonto oraite etugo goika nayeakane
Leviticus24:22 Mobe ne richiko erimo rikogambera abanto bonsi

Leviticus25:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa ase egetunwa gia Sinai
Leviticus25:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli
Leviticus25:3 Namosimeke emegondo yaino na gochera emesabibu yaino
Leviticus25:4 Korende omwaka o gatano na kabere obe omwaka bw’ogotimoka; ense etimokigwe kegima ase Esabato y’Omonene. Ase omwaka oyio timosimeka kende ase emegondo yaino
Leviticus25:5 Timobaisa kogesa echikwemeria korwa ase chimbusuro chiagwete
Leviticus25:6 Echio chiremerie ase omwaka bw’ogotimoka gw’ense eria
Leviticus25:7 Boigo ching’iti chitugire
Leviticus25:8 “Mobare chichuma isano na ibere ara gatano na kabere. (Kera echuma eyemo ebe ey’engaki y’omwaka omogima.) Naboigo engaki eyio ebe ey’emiaka emerongo ene
Leviticus25:9 Erio ase rituko ria ikomi ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere
Leviticus25:10 Mwatanane omwaka oyio bw’emerongo etano
Leviticus25:11 Omwaka oyo bw’emerongo etano nobe oyio bw’Omochengo asemore. Ase omwaka oyio timobusura kende
Leviticus25:12 Omwaka oyio noyo bw’Omochengo. Nobe omochenu asemore. Inamorie chindagera chiemeretie chinyene korwa ase riroba.
Leviticus25:13 “Ase Omwaka oyio bw’Omochengo kera omonto airanigwe ase omwando oye.
Leviticus25:14 Ase igo onye gokooneria omonto onde gento kende gionsi
Leviticus25:15 Koragore omogondo korwa ase omonto onde oakane omonto oria koreng’ana nemiaka eyio etigarete aragese ekero Omwaka bw’Omochengo otaraika.
Leviticus25:16 Onye emiaka ere emenge
Leviticus25:17 Timobaisa gokorerana oborianania
Leviticus25:18 “Ase ayio
Leviticus25:19 Ense eria iyame okwama kwaye
Leviticus25:20 Namoisa koboria: Ninki torarie ase omwaka o gatano na kabere
Leviticus25:21 Momanye ng’a ninche Omonene ndasesenie ense yaino ase omwaka o gatano na rimo
Leviticus25:22 Ekero morabusure chindagera ase emegondo yaino ase omwaka o gatano na gatato mogenderere koria endagera eria enkoro
Leviticus25:23 “Ense tekoonigwa ebe egenderere koba ey’oyio oyegora
Leviticus25:24 “Ase ense eyio yonsi moranyore ebe eyaino
Leviticus25:25 Onye oyomino obeire omotaka na aoonie ensemo y’omwando oye
Leviticus25:26 Omonto oria otabwati omonto omwabo oranyare komobooreria eria aoonetie
Leviticus25:27 rirorio omonyene oyio aboorie omwando oye
Leviticus25:28 Korende onye omonyene oria tabwati enibo eisaine akobooria omwando oye
Leviticus25:29 “Onye omonto okoonia enyomba ere ime ase omochie ogiteire orwaki
Leviticus25:30 Onye enyomba eria tekoboorigwa ase engaki eria y’omwaka omogima
Leviticus25:31 Korende chinyomba chire ase ebichie bitagiteiri chindwaki
Leviticus25:32 Korende nonya naboigo
Leviticus25:33 Onye omonto Omolawi takobooria enyomba aoonetie ere ime ase omochie ore omwando oye
Leviticus25:34 Korende ebitii bi’oborisia bietanaine emechie yabo tibikoonigwa
Leviticus25:35 “Onye oyomino obeire omotaka ere takonyara gwetenenera ere omonyene
Leviticus25:36 Tobaisa kwenyorera ebitoki
Leviticus25:37 Ekero oramoe chibesa chia singo
Leviticus25:38 Inche ninche Omonene
Leviticus25:39 “Onye oyomino omenyete bwoo obeire omotaka
Leviticus25:40 Nabeere asore buna omonto orikire
Leviticus25:41 Erio arue bwoo
Leviticus25:42 Abwo nabanto bagonkorera
Leviticus25:43 Tobaisa kobagambera nobotindi
Leviticus25:44 Onye koganetie abasomba
Leviticus25:45 Nabo oranyare kogora abana b’abamenyi baria bamenyete asemore
Leviticus25:46 Monyare gotiga abasomba abwo ase abana baino barache nyuma yaino
Leviticus25:47 “Onye omomenyi
Leviticus25:48 nyuma yaye omonto oyio nabo aranyare koboorigwa. Omonto omwabo nabo aramoboorie
Leviticus25:49 gose ise moke
Leviticus25:50 Ere amo noria omogorete babare emiaka gochakera korwa ekero eoonetie goika ekero ki’Omwaka bw’Omochengo oraike
Leviticus25:51 Onye emiaka emenge etigarete goika Omwaka bw’Omochengo oike
Leviticus25:52 Korende onye emiaka etigarete nemeke
Leviticus25:53 Omonene oye amokorere buna akomokorera omonto orikire ase okomokorera emeremo omwaka ase omwaka. Aye goika origererie orore ng’a onde tari okomogambera ase obotindi.
Leviticus25:54 Onye takoboorigwa ase enchera eyemo y’echio
Leviticus25:55 Abaisraeli nabasomba baane
Leviticus26:1 Naende Omonene agakwana
Leviticus26:2 Morende Chisabato chiane na mosike Obomenyo bwane Obochenu. Inche ninche Omonene.
Leviticus26:3 “Komorabwatie aya nachikire
Leviticus26:4 erio nimbatwerie embura ase engaki egwenerete
Leviticus26:5 Okwama kwaino nakobe okonene
Leviticus26:6 “Nindete omorembe ase ense yaino
Leviticus26:7 Namoserie ababisa baino
Leviticus26:8 Abanto baino batano nababue abanto rigana erimo
Leviticus26:9 Nimbasesenie moibore abana abange
Leviticus26:10 Namogenderere koria endagera enkoro ere enyinge ase ebiage
Leviticus26:11 Nimenye ase egati yaino ase Obomenyo bwane Obochenu; tinkobatiga nonya ng’ake.
Leviticus26:12 Nintaare amo nainwe; inche nimbe Nyasae oino
Leviticus26:13 Inche ninche Omonene
Leviticus26:14 “Korende onye timokonyigwera gose kobwata amachiko aya onsi
Leviticus26:15 na onye timokobwatia aya nachikire
Leviticus26:16 rirorio nainche nimbakorere amang’ana aya: Nimbarentere omoondoko mobosokano
Leviticus26:17 Nimbe mamincha yaino
Leviticus26:18 “Amang’ana aya onsi karabe abanyorire
Leviticus26:19 Ninsarie chinguru chi’oboenenu
Leviticus26:20 Emeremo yaino emekong’u morabe mogokora
Leviticus26:21 “Onye naende mokogenderera koba mamincha yane na kwanga konyigwera
Leviticus26:22 Nimbatomere ching’iti chintindi chi’orosana chiite abana baino
Leviticus26:23 “Komorabe mwanyorire egesusuro ekio gionsi timong’iranera
Leviticus26:24 rirorio boigo nimbe mamincha yaino
Leviticus26:25 Nindete esegi asemore
Leviticus26:26 Ninkeyie chindagera chiaino chibe chinke; abakungu ikomi barugere eriko erimo
Leviticus26:27 “Komorabe mwanyorire emechando eye yonsi
Leviticus26:28 erio nario naende ndabae egususuro ara gatano na kabere ase engencho y’ebibe biaino.
Leviticus26:29 Enchara nebe enene mono goika morie emebere y’abana baino
Leviticus26:30 Ninsarie obotunwa bwaino ase mogosasimera
Leviticus26:31 Nintagore emechie yaino ebe amatombe
Leviticus26:32 Ninsarie nsarie ense yaino kegima goika ababisa baino bache komenya imeo bakumie buna esaregete.
Leviticus26:33 Nimbaserebanie mogende komenya ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku
Leviticus26:34 Ekero mokare ase ense y’ababisa baino
Leviticus26:35 Ekero ense eria egendererete koba amatongo netimoke ogotimoka okwo motayeete ekero mwamenyeteo.
Leviticus26:36 “Nimbatige inwe
Leviticus26:37 Namogochane buna abanto bagotama korwa ase esegi
Leviticus26:38 Namokwe mosirere ase ense y’ababisa baino
Leviticus26:39 Baria bare abake asemore baratigare bare moyo agwo ase ense y’ababisa baino nabasirere aroro ase engencho y’ebibe biabo
Leviticus26:40 “Erio abwo baratigare goika baorokie ebibe biabo
Leviticus26:41 bakagera nkaba nendamwamu asebare goika nkabaira ase ense y’ababisa babo. Onye chinkoro chiabo echio chire chinkong’u chigwekeyia
Leviticus26:42 erio nario ndainyore okobwatana kwane k’wogotianania okwo nakorete na Yakobo
Leviticus26:43 Ense eria netigwe nabarabwo
Leviticus26:44 Korende nonya nabo ase engaki eyio ekero bagendererete komenya ase ense eria y’ababisa babo
Leviticus26:45 Ase engencho yabo ning’inyore okobwatana kw’ogotianania nakorete ne chisokoro chiabo
Leviticus26:46 Eyio nero emeroberio echikire amo namachiko Omonene aruete goetera ase omonwa o Musa
Leviticus27:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa akamotebia
Leviticus27:2 “Otebie Abaisraeli: Onye eira yarietwe ng’a omonto aruegwe ase ogokorera Omonene
Leviticus27:3 Rigori ri’omonto omosacha bw’emiaka emerongo ebere goika emerongo etano nomo
Leviticus27:4 Onye nomokungu nigo rirabe chisekeli emerongo etato.
Leviticus27:5 Onye nomonto omoke bw’emiaka etano goika emerongo ebere
Leviticus27:6 Onye nomwana bw’omotienyi oyomo goika emiaka etano
Leviticus27:7 Onye nomonto omogotu bw’emiaka emerongo etano nomo na goetania
Leviticus27:8 “Onye omonto oria orieretwe eira nigo are omotaka mono otanyare goakana rigori riria riabekirwe
Leviticus27:9 “Onye eira y’omonto oria ariete nigoro y’eng’iti yancheire nainche Omonene ebe ekeng’wanso
Leviticus27:10 Omonto oria takoba ne ribaga koonchoreria eng’iti eria arente eng’iti eng’ao
Leviticus27:11 Kerabe eng’iti etachenegeti ebe ekeng’wanso ase Omonene
Leviticus27:12 na ere akore rigori ri’eng’iti eria koreng’ana buna ere engiya gose embe. Rigori omokuani arakore
Leviticus27:13 Korende onye omonto omonyene oganetie kobooria eng’iti eria
Leviticus27:14 “Ekero omonto agwatanana enyomba yaye ebe enchenu ase Omonene
Leviticus27:15 Onye omonto oria bwatananete enyomba eria aganetie koyebooria ebe eyaye naende
Leviticus27:16 “Onye omonto ogwatanana ensemo y’oboremo bw’omwando oye
Leviticus27:17 Omonto karaatanane oboremo bwaye korwa ase engaki y’Omwaka bw’Omochengo
Leviticus27:18 Korende omonto karaatanane omogondo oye nyuma y’Omwaka bw’Omochengo
Leviticus27:19 Omonto oria oraatanane oboremo bwaye asende
Leviticus27:20 Onye omonto oria taganeti kobooria oboremo boria
Leviticus27:21 Korende ekero oboremo boria bogochia gotigwa ase engaki y’Omwaka bw’Omochengo
Leviticus27:22 “Omonto karaatanane ase Omonene oboremo agorete
Leviticus27:23 omokuani akore rigori ri’oboremo boria koreng’ana nemiaka etigarete goika Omwaka bw’Omochengo. Ase rituko riria kegima omonto oria aakane rigori riria ribekire
Leviticus27:24 Ase Omwaka oria bw’Omochengo oboremo boria boiranerigwe omonyene oria oboonetie
Leviticus27:25 “Kera rigori rikobekwa nigo rirareng’anigwe nekerengo gi’esekeli eyio egokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. (Esekeli eyemo nechigera emerongo ebere.)
Leviticus27:26 “Korende chitugo chintangi nechiane
Leviticus27:27 Korende onye eng’iti eria entangi techenegeti
Leviticus27:28 “Korende gento kende gionsi omonto aatananire ase Omonene ase enchera gete kebe ekiaye kegima
Leviticus27:29 Omonto onde bwensi bwatananirwe ase ogosirigwa takonyara koboorigwa; omonto oyio goika aitwe akwe.
Leviticus27:30 “Ensemo ya ikomi y’okwama kwa mogondo
Leviticus27:31 Onye omonto oganetie kobooria ensemo yaye ya ikomi
Leviticus27:32 Boigo eyemo ya ikomi y’amaicho e chiombe
Leviticus27:33 Omonyene eng’iti eria takoriga‐rigereria
Leviticus27:34 Aya naro amachiko Omonene achigete Abaisraeli goetera ase Musa agwo ase egetunwa gia Sinai.
Numbers1:1 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o kabere bw’omwaka o kabere nyuma Abaisraeli kobarure ase ense ya Misiri
Numbers1:2 “Kora omobaro bw’omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli
Numbers1:3 Aye amo na Haroni mobare abanto abakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania
Numbers1:4 Naende mochore korwa ase kera egesaku omonto oyomo ore omoteneneri obo. Barabwo babe amo nainwe ase okobakonya.
Numbers1:5 Amarieta ’abanto abwo naro aya: Korwa ase egesaku kia Reuben
Numbers1:6 Korwa ase egesaku gia Simeoni
Numbers1:7 Korwa ase egesaku kia Yuda
Numbers1:8 Korwa ase egesaku gia Isakaru
Numbers1:9 Korwa ase egesaku gia Sabuloni
Numbers1:10 Korwa ase basinto ba Yusufu: ase egesaku gi’Efraimu
Numbers1:11 Korwa ase egesaku kia Benjamin
Numbers1:12 Korwa ase egesaku kia Dani
Numbers1:13 Korwa ase egesaku gi’Aseri
Numbers1:14 Korwa ase egesaku kia Gadi
Numbers1:15 Korwa ase egesaku kia Nafutali
Numbers1:16 Abanto aba nabwo barenge abateneneri ase ebisaku ebio biabo
Numbers1:17 Musa na Haroni bakaira abanto abwo baatoretwe ase amarieta abo
Numbers1:18 na ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o kabere bagasangereria omoganda bwonsi bw’abanto amo. Bakarika amarieta ’abanto abwo konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania
Numbers1:19 Musa akabara abanto abwo na kobarika
Numbers1:20 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Reuben
Numbers1:21 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ene na isano nemo
Numbers1:22 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Simeoni bakarikwa
Numbers1:23 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano na kianda
Numbers1:24 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Gadi bakarikwa
Numbers1:25 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ene na isano
Numbers1:26 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Yuda bakarikwa
Numbers1:27 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano na ebere na inye
Numbers1:28 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Isakaru bakarikwa
Numbers1:29 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano na inye
Numbers1:30 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Sabuloni bakarikwa
Numbers1:31 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano na isano na ibere
Numbers1:32 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Yusufu
Numbers1:33 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ene
Numbers1:34 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Manase bakarikwa
Numbers1:35 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etato na ibere
Numbers1:36 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Benjamin bakarikwa
Numbers1:37 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etato na isano
Numbers1:38 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Dani bakarikwa
Numbers1:39 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano nomo na ibere
Numbers1:40 Abanto b’ororeria rw’Aseri bakarikwa
Numbers1:41 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ene na eyemo
Numbers1:42 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Nafutali bakarikwa
Numbers1:43 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano na isato
Numbers1:44 Aba nabwo barigetwe na Musa
Numbers1:45 Abaisraeli bonsi abarigetwe
Numbers1:46 nigo barenge chilifu amagana atano na rimo na isato
Numbers1:47 Korende abanto b’ororeria rwa Lawi
Numbers1:48 ekiagera Omonene nigo atebetie Musa
Numbers1:49 “Abanto b’egesaku kia Lawi tobabara amo n’Abaisraeli bande.
Numbers1:50 Obeke Abalawi babe bakorenda Obomenyo Obochenu obwo bore noborori
Numbers1:51 Ekero Obomenyo obwo borabe bokong’anyigwa
Numbers1:52 Abaisraeli bande nabatenenie chiema chiabo
Numbers1:53 Korende Abalawi nigo baratenenie chiema chiabo chietanane Obomenyo obwo bore noborori
Numbers1:54 Abaisraeli bagakora onsi buna Omonene abachigete goetera ase Musa.

Numbers3:1 Aba nabwo abanto b’ororeria rwa Haroni
Numbers3:2 Aya naro amarieta ’abamura ba Haroni: Nadabu
Numbers3:3 Abamura aba ba Haroni nabwo baagetwe amaguta na gwatananwa ase emeremo y’obokuani.
Numbers3:4 Korende Nadabu na Abihu
Numbers3:5 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Numbers3:6 “Renta abanto b’egesaku kia Lawi
Numbers3:7 Abalawi abwo mbakorere Haroni emeremo
Numbers3:8 Barabwo mbatenenere ebinto bionsi bire ase Eema y’Omosangererekano. Ase ogokora emeremo yonsi ase Obomenyo Obochenu nigo barabe bagokorera Abaisraeli bonsi.
Numbers3:9 Haroni amo nabamura baye baegwe Abalawi buna ekeegwa korwa ase Abaisraeli.
Numbers3:10 Obeke Haroni amo nabamura baye bakore emeremo y’obokuani
Numbers3:11 Naende Omonene agatebia Musa
Numbers3:12 “Rora
Numbers3:13 ekiagera abana abatangi bonsi nabaane. Ase rituko riria naitete abana abatangi
Numbers3:14 Ekero Musa arenge agwo ase erooro ya Sinai
Numbers3:15 “Bara Abalawi enyomba ase enyomba
Numbers3:16 Erio Musa akababara
Numbers3:17 Lawi nigo abwate abamura batato: Gerisoni
Numbers3:18 Abamura ba Gerisoni nabwo Libini na Simei.
Numbers3:19 Abana ba Kohati nabwo aba: Amuramu
Numbers3:20 Abana ba Merari nabwo Mali na Musi. Abanto abwo nigo barenge chisokoro chie chiamate chi’Abalawi
Numbers3:21 Abanto b’eamate ya Libini na eya Simei
Numbers3:22 Abanto abasacha
Numbers3:23 Abanto be chiamate chi’Abagerisoni nigo barabe bagotoora ensemo ya bosongo nyuma y’Obomenyo Obochenu.
Numbers3:24 Eliasafu
Numbers3:25 Ase Eema y’Omosangererekano Abagerisoni nabwo barabe bakorenda Obomenyo obonyene
Numbers3:26 Naende babe bakorenda ebitambaa bigosungwa ase ogokenga eraaro
Numbers3:27 Abanto b’eamate y’Amuramu
Numbers3:28 Abanto abasacha
Numbers3:29 Barabwo nigo barabe bagotoora ensemo ya irianyi y’Obomenyo boria.
Numbers3:30 Elisafani
Numbers3:31 Barabwo nabwo barabe bakorenda ebinto ebi: Esanduku eria ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana
Numbers3:32 Eleazari
Numbers3:33 Abanto b’eamate ya Mali
Numbers3:34 Abanto abasacha
Numbers3:35 Barabwo nigo barabe bagotoora ensemo ya sugusu y’Obomenyo boria. Surieli
Numbers3:36 Abamerari nabwo barabe bakorenda ebinto ebi: chibao chi’Obomenyo Obochenu
Numbers3:37 Nabwo naende babegetwe korenda chisiiro chi’eraaro amo ne chinterekerero chiabo na ebirochi
Numbers3:38 Musa na Haroni amo nabamura baye mbabe bagotoora kororia Obomenyo Obochenu ensemo ya moocha
Numbers3:39 Abanto abasacha b’Abalawi
Numbers3:40 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Numbers3:41 Inche ninche Omonene. Ase ayio Abalawi babe abaane. Obanyatananere ribaga ri’abatangi bonsi b’Abaisraeli. Naboigo ne ribaga rie ching’iti chintangi chi’Abaisraeli onyatananere ching’iti chi’Abalawi.”
Numbers3:42 Musa akabara na korika abatangi bonsi b’Abaisraeli
Numbers3:43 Abanto bonsi abasacha abatangi aba konya bakoorire omotienyi oyomo na goetania nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ebere na ibere
Numbers3:44 Naende Omonene agatebia Musa
Numbers3:45 “Ira Abalawi babe abaane ribaga ri’abanto abasacha abatangi b’Abaisraeli
Numbers3:46 Abanto abasacha abatangi b’Abaisraeli nabange bare
Numbers3:47 
Numbers3:48 Omoe Haroni amo nabamura baye chibesa echio chi’okobooria abatangi abwo baetanetie Abalawi.”
Numbers3:49 Ase ayio Musa agasangereria chibesa chiria chiabooretie abanto baria barenge abange goetania baria babooretigwe ekiagera Abalawi babete ribaga riabo.
Numbers3:50 Ase engencho y’abanto baria abatangi b’Abaisraeli
Numbers3:51 Musa akaa Haroni amo nabamura baye chibesa chiria chi’okobooria
Numbers4:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni
Numbers4:2 “Kora omobaro bw’Abalawi baria bare be chiamate chia Kohati
Numbers4:3 abwo bare egati y’emiaka emerongo etato na emerongo etano
Numbers4:4 Emeremo Abakohati barakore agwo ase Eema eria nokorenda ebinto bire ebichenu mono.
Numbers4:5 “Ekero abanto barabe bakomanora na koimoka korwa ase ebitwori
Numbers4:6 Naende batube egetambaa ekio ne risankwa ri’eng’iti ya rooche
Numbers4:7 “Igoro ase emesa y’emegati ekoruegwa ase Omonene baare egetambaa kere buru kegima
Numbers4:8 Baare egetambaa ekebariri igoro ase ebinto ebio
Numbers4:9 “Erio baimokie egetambaa kere buru kegima
Numbers4:10 Nababeke ekebekerero ekio amo nebikorero biaye ase omobuko bwe risankwa ri’eng’iti ya rooche
Numbers4:11 “Naende baare egetambaa kere buru kegima igoro ase egesasimero keroisirie korwa ase etahabu
Numbers4:12 Nabaimokie ebinto bionsi bigokorerwa ase emeremo agwo ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Babibeke ime ase egetambaa kere buru kegima; erio babitube ne risankwa ri’eng’iti ya rooche na kobibeka ase ekebogorerio.
Numbers4:13 Barabwo babuuche ribu
Numbers4:14 Igoro ase egesasimero ekio babeke ebikorero bionsi ebio bigokorerwa ase ogosasima: chindogio chi’okorenta omorero
Numbers4:15 Ekero engaki eraike
Numbers4:16 “Eleazari
Numbers4:17 Omonene agatebia Musa na Haroni
Numbers4:18 “Timotiga abanto be chiamate chia Kohati basirigwe korwa ase Abalawi.
Numbers4:19 Ase ayio
Numbers4:20 Korende Abakohati baise gosoa na korora ebinto biria ebichenu
Numbers4:21 Omonene agatebia Musa
Numbers4:22 “Kora omobaro bw’Abalawi baria bare b’ororeria rwa Gerisoni
Numbers4:23 Orike abasacha bonsi abare egati y’emiaka emerongo etato na emerongo etano
Numbers4:24 Eye nero emeremo abanto be chiamate chia Gerisoni barakore naende buna barabe bakobogoria ebinto ebi:
Numbers4:25 Barabwo mbabogorie ebitambaa bi’Obomenyo Obochenu amo nebitubo bi’Eema eria
Numbers4:26 na ebitambaa bi’eraaro eetanaine Obomenyo boria na egesasimero
Numbers4:27 Haroni na abamura baye nabwo barachike Abagerisoni ebinto bionsi barabe bakobogoria
Numbers4:28 Itamari
Numbers4:29 Omonene agatebia Musa
Numbers4:30 Orike abasacha bonsi abare egati y’emiaka emerongo etato na emerongo etano
Numbers4:31 Emeremo yabo ase Eema eria ebe ey’okobogoria ebinto ebi: Chibao chi’Obomenyo Obochenu
Numbers4:32 ne chisiiro chi’eraaro amo ne chinterekerero chiabo
Numbers4:33 Eye nero emeremo y’abanto be chiamate chia Merari barabe bagokora agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano
Numbers4:34 Musa
Numbers4:35 Bakarika abasacha bonsi abaare egati y’emiaka emerongo etato na emerongo etano
Numbers4:36 Abanto abwo barigetwe ase chiamate chiabo nigo barenge chilifu ibere
Numbers4:37 Oyio noro omobaro bwe chiamate chi’Abakohati abwo baare konyara gokora emeremo agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano
Numbers4:38 Oyo noro omobaro bw’ororeria rwa Gerisoni
Numbers4:39 Abanto abwo baare egati y’emiaka emerongo etato na emerongo etano
Numbers4:40 Abwo nigo barenge abanto chilifu ibere
Numbers4:41 Oyo noro omobaro bwe chiamate chi’Abagerisoni
Numbers4:42 Oyo noro omobaro bw’ororeria rwa Merari
Numbers4:43 Abasacha abwo baare egati y’emiaka emerongo etato na emerongo etano
Numbers4:44 Abwo nigo barenge abanto chilifu isato
Numbers4:45 Oyo noro omobaro bwe chiamate chi’Abamerari
Numbers4:46 Musa
Numbers4:47 Abwo abaare egati y’emiaka emerongo etato na emerongo etano
Numbers4:48 nigo barenge abanto chilifu isano na isato
Numbers4:49 Abwo bonsi nigo babaretwe buna Omonene achigete goetera ase Musa. Kera omonto agatebigwa emeremo arakore na ebinto arabogorie buna Omonene achigete Musa.
Numbers5:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Numbers5:2 “Bachike Abaisraeli barusie korwa ase ebitwori biabo kera omonto obwate oborwaire bwa ukoma
Numbers5:3 Goika morusie korwa ase ebitwori abasacha na abakungu abwo babeire abatachenegeti babeere isiko
Numbers5:4 Abaisraeli bagakora buna Omonene atebetie Musa. Bakarusia korwa ase ebitwori abanto abwo.
Numbers5:5 Naende Omonene agakwana na Musa
Numbers5:6 “Tebia Abaisraeli ng’a
Numbers5:7 omonto oyio goika aorokie ebibe biria. Boigo airanie ase omonto oria aurete rigori ri’enibo eyio amourete
Numbers5:8 Korende onye omonto oria okure
Numbers5:9 Kera okoruegwa kw’ebinto ebichenu Abaisraeli bararente ase omokuani
Numbers5:10 Ebinto bionsi omonto araatanane koba ebichenu nigo birabe ebi’omokuani oyio okobiegwa.”
Numbers5:11 Naende Omonene agakwana na Musa
Numbers5:12 “Tebia Abaisraeli: Ebaise koba ng’a omokungu bw’omonto obeire otari omwegenwa’ asare.
Numbers5:13 Omonto omoao kararare nere ase obotomani
Numbers5:14 Omosacha oye karabe nomoika bwe risemi akagere mokaye ng’a bwekorire omosaria
Numbers5:15 omosacha oye amoire ase omokuani. Boigo arue obosie bw’esairi ebimunu bibere
Numbers5:16 “Omokuani arente omokungu oria amobeke ase obosio bw’Omonene
Numbers5:17 aumore amache amachenu ase egetaabo ki’amaroba
Numbers5:18 Omokuani abeke omokungu oria ase obosio bw’Omonene
Numbers5:19 Erio omokuani abeke omokungu oyio inse y’okoragererigwa
Numbers5:20 Korende onye gwatomanire nomonto omoao ase ogotaba omwegenwa ase omosacha oo
Numbers5:21 (agwo omokuani abeke omokungu oyio inse y’okoragererigwa gw’okomotiania) rirorio Omonene nagere abanto bao bakoragererie na kogochaya
Numbers5:22 Tiga amache aya akorenta okoragereria kagosoa enda yao
Numbers5:23 “Erio omokuani arike amang’ana ayio ay’okoragereria okwo ime ase ebuku
Numbers5:24 Erio ae omokungu oria amache ayio anywe
Numbers5:25 Omokuani arusie korwa ase okoboko kw’omokungu oria okoruegwa kwe risemi
Numbers5:26 Naende korwa ase okoruegwa okwo aimokie goke
Numbers5:27 Onye omokungu oria tabete omwegenwa ase omosacha oye
Numbers5:28 Onye omokungu oria takorete obotomani korende nigo are omoikeranu
Numbers5:29 “Oko nogochika ase amang’ana e risemi
Numbers5:30 Naboigo ekero omosacha arabe nomoika bwe risemi na gokagera mokaye ng’a nomotomani
Numbers5:31 Omosacha oria takoba nokomocha
Numbers6:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Numbers6:2 “Batebie Abaisraeli ng’a ekero omonto
Numbers6:3 goika eatanane korwa ase edivai amo nebinyugwa bigotindia. Tabaisa konywa ebinyugwa binde bionsi bikoroisigwa korwa ase amasabibu
Numbers6:4 Ase amatuko aye onsi eatananete koba Omwerwa taria gento kende gionsi gekoroisigwa korwa ase emesabibu. Taria nonya ne chimbusururo gose amasabo ’amasabibu.
Numbers6:5 “Tabaisa konacha etukia yaye gose gwekigita goika okoorire amatuko aye onsi ariete eira gweatanana koba Omwerwa bw’Omonene. Ere nabe oyo bweatananire
Numbers6:6 Tagenda aike ang’e negetondo ase amatuko ayio onsi eatananete koba Omwerwa bw’Omonene.
Numbers6:7 Ise nakwa
Numbers6:8 Ere nigo arabe omochenu ase Omonene ase amatuko aye onsi eatananete.
Numbers6:9 “Korende omonto karakwe mobosokano ang’e nere
Numbers6:10 Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato

Numbers6:15 Boigo arente egetonga kere nemegati etabekiri memera
Numbers6:16 “Omokuani arente ebinto ebio ase obosio bw’Omonene na arue ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe na eki’ogosambwa ase engencho y’omonto oria.

Numbers8:8 Naende barente eeri ensae amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera kw’obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta. Naye oire eeri ende ensae ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe.
Numbers8:9 Osangererie omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli na orente Abalawi agwo bosio bw’Eema y’Omosangererekano.

Numbers8:20 Naboigo Musa

Numbers9:23 Buna Omonene arenge gochika nigo barenge gotoora

Numbers28:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa
Numbers28:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli obachike ng’a ase ekero keria kerageire goika banduere ebing’wanso na okoruegwa kw’endagera kogosambwa nomorero kore ne rimisu rigiya rikongwenera.
Numbers28:3 “Obatebie: Eke nakio ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero moramoruere Omonene: Kera rituko botambe morue chimanwa chimingichi ibere
Numbers28:4 Eyemo y’echio oyerue mambia
Numbers28:5 Kera eyemo oyerue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera
Numbers28:6 Ekio nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko
Numbers28:7 Orue okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa egetuba ekemo
Numbers28:8 Emingichi eria ya kabere oyerue mogoroba amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera
Numbers28:9 Ase rituko ri’Esabato morue chimanwa chimingichi ibere
Numbers28:10 Eke nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera Esabato gekoruegwa amo nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko
Numbers28:11 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ria kera omotienyi mobe mokorua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ase Omonene. Morue chieri chinsae ibere
Numbers28:12 Morue okoruegwa kw’endagera
Numbers28:13 na amo na kera emanwa emingichi
Numbers28:14 Ekenyugwa gekoruegwa amo na kera eeri nigo kerabe edivai ebituba bibere
Numbers28:15 Amo nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko na okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa
Numbers28:16 Rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani nerituko ri’Epasaka y’Omonene.
Numbers28:17 Ase rituko ria ikomi na gatano ri’omotienyi oyio nario Rituko Rinene. Ase amatuko atano na abere morie emegati etabekiri memera.
Numbers28:18 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima. Timokora emeremo ya kera rituko ase rituko erio.
Numbers28:19 Morue ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa kegosambwa nomorero ase Omonene
Numbers28:20 Naende morue okoruegwa kw’endagera obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta: Amo na kera eeri ensae morue obosie ebimunu bitano na ekemo
Numbers28:21 na amo na kera eyemo ye chimanwa chimingichi chiria isano na ibere obosie ebimunu bibere.
Numbers28:22 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe ase ogokora okobwatanigwa asemore.
Numbers28:23 Igo morarue ebinto ebi amo nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko botambe.
Numbers28:24 Ase enchera eyio kera rituko
Numbers28:25 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima. Timokora emeremo ya kera rituko ase rituko erio.
Numbers28:26 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani rie rigesa
Numbers28:27 Morue chieri chinsae ibere
Numbers28:28 Amo nekeng’wanso ekio morue okoruegwa kw’endagera
Numbers28:29 na amo na kera eyemo ye chimanwa chimingichi chiria isano na ibere obosie ebimunu bibere.
Numbers28:30 Naende morue egoree eyemo ase ogokora okobwatanigwa asemore.
Numbers28:31 Morue ekeng’wanso ekio amo nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gwa kera rituko

Numbers29:2 Morue eeri ensae eyemo
Numbers29:3 Amo nekeng’wanso ekio morue okoruegwa kw’endagera
Numbers29:4 na amo na kera eyemo ye chimanwa chimingichi chiria isano na ibere obosie ebimunu bibere.
Numbers29:5 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekengwanso ki’ebibe ase ogokora okobwatanigwa asemore.
Numbers29:6 Ebing’wanso ebio bimentwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ki’Omotienyi Omoyia
Numbers29:7 Ase rituko ria ikomi ri’omotienyi oyio o gatano na kabere

Numbers29:10 na amo na kera eyemo ye chimanwa chimingichi
Numbers29:11 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Numbers29:12 Ase rituko ria ikomi na gatano ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima. Timokora emeremo ende yonsi
Numbers29:13 Morue chieri ikomi na isato
Numbers29:14 Amo nechio morue okoruegwa kw’endagera
Numbers29:15 na amo na kera eyemo ye chimanwa chimingichi chiria ikomi na inye obosie ebimunu bibere.
Numbers29:16 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ebing’wanso ebio bimentwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko

Numbers29:22 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ebing’wanso ebio bimentwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko
Numbers29:23 Rituko ria kane morue chieri ikomi

Numbers29:25 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ebing’wanso ebio bimentwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gwa kera rituko

Numbers29:27 Mochirue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera

Numbers29:30 Mochirue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire koruegwa amo ne chieri chiria

Numbers29:38 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ebing’wanso ebio bimentwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gwa kera rituko

Numbers30:1 Musa agakwana nabatang’ani b’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli
Numbers30:2 Ekero omonto akoria eira ase Omonene
Numbers30:3 “Ekero omoiseke otarasoka korwa ase omochie o ise akoria eira ase Omonene
Numbers30:4 na ise karaigwe igoro y’eira eria y’omoiseke oye
Numbers30:5 Korende onye ise ase rituko riria araigwe ring’ana igoro y’eira eria na tayianchera
Numbers30:6 “Omoiseke oria onye onyuomirwe nomosacha ritang’ani ataraikerania eira ariete
Numbers30:7 goika aikeranie onsi. Aya nigo arakoreke onye omosacha oye ase rituko riria aigwete amang’ana ’eira eria agakira
Numbers30:8 Korende onye omosacha oye ase rituko riria araigwe amang’ana ’eira eria tayianchera
Numbers30:9 “Korende eira ende yonsi
Numbers30:10 “Onye omokungu ore bwoye ase omosacha oye oriete eira
Numbers30:11 na omosacha oye oyaigure

Numbers30:16 Eye nero emeroberio echikire

Numbers31:39 Chitigere baetwe nigo chiarenge chilifu emerongo etato

Numbers35:2 “Chika Abaisraeli ng’a korwa ase emiando eyio baranyore baatananere Abalawi emechie baramenye
Numbers35:3 Emechie eyio ebe eyabo baramenye
Numbers35:4 Ebitii bi’oborisia morae Abalawi bichakere korwa ase chindwaki chi’omochie
Numbers35:5 Naende mobare isiko y’omochie
Numbers35:6 Moe Abalawi emechie etano nomo ey’obotamero
Numbers35:7 Emechie yonsi morabae nigo erabe emerongo ene
Numbers35:8 Emechie eyio morae Abalawi nigo morayerusie korwa ase eria Abaisraeli babwate. Morusie emechie emenge korwa ase egesaku keria kere ekenene kebwate emechie emenge
Numbers35:9 Omonene agatebia Musa
Numbers35:10 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli
Numbers35:11 mochore emechie erabe obotamero asemore
Numbers35:12 Emechie eyio nebe obotamero bwaino
Numbers35:13 Emechie eyio morachore ebe ey’obotamero nigo erabe etano nomo.
Numbers35:14 Etato ebe moocha ya Yorodan
Numbers35:15 Emechie eyio etano nomo ebe ey’obotamero ase Abaisraeli
Numbers35:16 “Korende onye omonto oakire omonto onde negento buna ekioma
Numbers35:17 Boigo onye omonto obwate rigena ase okoboko kwaye oakire omonto onde
Numbers35:18 Gose onye omonto oakire omonto onde nomote abwate ase okoboko kwaye
Numbers35:19 Omonto oria okorigia korusia egesiomba ki’oyomwabo oitetwe
Numbers35:20 “Onye omonto ogechete oyonde na komoita ase okomotwoma
Numbers35:21 gose ase engencho y’obobisa bwarengeo agaaka oyonde nokoboko kwaye na komoita
Numbers35:22 “Eise koba ng’a omonto igo atwomete oyonde atamogechete agwo ritang’ani
Numbers35:23 gose omonto oria nigo arutete rigena
Numbers35:24 Onye ekoba bo
Numbers35:25 Omosangererekano bw’abanto notoorie omoiti oria korwa ase oria oganetie korusia egesiomba. Bamotige airane abeere ase omochie oria bw’obotamero atamerete
Numbers35:26 Korende onye omoiti oria o mosiabano ase engaki ende yonsi ogosoka korwa ase omochie bw’obotamero
Numbers35:27 na omonto oria okorusia egesiomba ki’oyomwabo amonyore ore isiko y’omochie oria karamoite
Numbers35:28 Omonto oria oitete oyonde moeneno goika agenderere kobeera ase omochie oria bw’obotamero goika omokuani bw’engaki eyio akwe. Korende omokuani oria omonene gakure
Numbers35:29 Okwo nogochika kwa boronge korabe asemore ebiaare ase ebiaare
Numbers35:30 “Omonto onde bwensi karaite omonto onde moeneno
Numbers35:31 Omonto oitire omonto onde moeneno takoegerwa aruerwe embooria. Omoiti oria onyorekanire nokomocha kw’ogoita
Numbers35:32 Boigo omonto oria omoiti o mosiabano otamire gochia ase oyomo bw’emechie y’obotamero takoboorigwa ng’a erio airane ase ense yaye ekero omokuani bw’engaki eyio atarakwa.

Deuteronomy34:6 Omonene akamotindeka agwo ase rikura ri’ense ya Moabu kororia Beti‐Peori; korende goika rero iga monto onde tari omanyete embeera yaye.
Deuteronomy34:7 Musa ekero akwete konya okoorire emiaka rigana erimo
Deuteronomy34:8 Abaisraeli bakamoreera ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo etato agwo ase emieya ya Moabu
Deuteronomy34:9 Yoshua
Deuteronomy34:10 Korwa engaki eyio mobani onde tana gotoka ase Abaisraeli onga buna Musa
Deuteronomy34:11 Onde tana gotoka okorete ebikone buna ebi Omonene atomete Musa kobikora ase ense ya Misiri
Deuteronomy34:12 Mobani onde tari okorete ogokora gwe chinguru chinene
Joshua1:1 Ekero Musa
Joshua1:2 akamotebia
Joshua1:3 Nabaeire aase onsi morataare namagoro aino

Joshua1:6 Obe omokong’u na omoremu

Joshua1:8 Amang’ana ’ebuku eye y’amachiko oyakwane botambe nomonwa oo
Joshua1:9 Inee! Tari inche nagochikire ng’a otenene bokung’u
Joshua1:10 Erio Yoshua agachika abatang’ani b’abanto
Joshua1:11 ng’a baete egati y’ebitwori batebie abanto ng’a beroiserie endagera
Joshua1:12 Yoshua agatebia abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben

Joshua2:1 Yoshua

Joshua2:4 Omokungu oria konya oirire abanto abwo babere

Joshua2:9 akabatebia

Joshua2:15 Rahabu nigo amenyete ase enyomba yaagachetwe ekabwateranigwa norwaki rw’omochie. Ere akabaikeria nengori goetera ase ekebao

Joshua3:1 Rituko ria kabere
Joshua3:2 Nyuma y’amatuko atato kaerire abateneneri bagaeta ase ebitwori
Joshua3:3 bagatebia abanto
Joshua3:4 Timoyeika ang’e; mobeere nyuma ase oboare bw’ekiromita eyemo. Erio namomanye ase mogoeta
Joshua3:5 Yoshua agatebia abanto
Joshua3:6 Nyuma y’ayio agatebia abakuani
Joshua3:7 Omonene agatebia Yoshua
Joshua3:8 Aye chika abakuani abwo babogoretie Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana ng’a ekero baraike engegu y’orocche rwa Yorodan goika bateneneo.”
Joshua3:9 Erio Yoshua agatebia Abaisraeli
Joshua3:10 Naende akabora
Joshua3:11 Rora
Joshua3:12 Gaki bono chora abanto ikomi na babere korwa ase ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli

Joshua3:14 Ekero abanto baimogete korwa ase chiema chiabo erinde bamboke Yorodan
Joshua3:15 Bono nigo yarenge engaki ye rigesa

Joshua4:5 akabatebia
Joshua4:6 Amagena aya abe ekeinyorio asemore. Ekero abana baino barache kobaboria: Ninki engencho y’amagena aya?
Joshua4:7 Mobatebie: Engencho yaye neye: Ekero Esanduku y’Okobwatana kw’Omonene yambogetigwe Yorodan
Joshua4:8 Abaisraeli bagakora buna Yoshua abachigete. Bakaimokia amagena ikomi na abere korwa Yorodan
Joshua4:9 Yoshua akabeka amo amagena ande ikomi na abere gati‐gati ya Yorodan
Joshua4:10 Abakuani abwo babogoretie Esanduku eria bakaba bateneine gati‐gati ya Yorodan

Joshua4:15 Erio Omonene agatebia Yoshua

Joshua4:17 Erio Yoshua agachika abakuani

Joshua4:19 Abanto abwo bakaamboka Yorodan rituko ria ikomi ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani
Joshua4:20 Agwo Giligali Yoshua akabeka amo amagena aria ikomi na abere arusetigwe Yorodan.

Joshua5:1 Abaruoti bonsi b’Abaamori
Joshua5:2 Ase engaki eyio Omonene agatebia Yoshua
Joshua5:3 Erio Yoshua akaroisia emeyio y’amagena na agasara Abaisraeli agwo ase Egetunwa gekorokwa Gibeati‐Haraloti.
Joshua5:4 Aya naro agerete Yoshua akabasara: Abasacha bonsi b’esegi
Joshua5:5 Abanto baria baruete Misiri konya barokigwe bonsi
Joshua5:6 Abaisraeli konya bataarire ase erooro ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene
Joshua5:7 Abana baiboretwe korwa nyuma yabo konya batararokigwa kobare orogendo ase erooro
Joshua5:8 Ekero abanto bonsi bakoorire gosarwa
Joshua5:9 Omonene agatebia Yoshua
Joshua5:10 Ekero Abaisraeli batoorete Giligali ase ebirubo ebiomo bia Yeriko bakaba bakorenda rituko rinene ri’Epasaka chinsa chia mogoroba
Joshua5:11 Ase rituko ria kabere nyuma kobariire Epasaka
Joshua5:12 Nyuma y’ayio mana ekaera
Joshua5:13 Ekero Yoshua aigete ang’e na Yeriko akarigereria akarora omonto oteneine obwate omoyio o birende koboko kwaye. Yoshua akamoika ang’e
Joshua5:14 Omonto oria akairaneria
Joshua5:15 Omotang’ani oria bw’omoganda okorwana esegi y’Omonene agatebia Yoshua
Joshua6:1 Ebiita bia Yeriko nigo biasiekire bokong’u ng’a Abaisraeli tibabaisa gosoa aroro. Onde tarenge gosoka gose gosoa imeo.
Joshua6:2 Omonene agatebia Yoshua
Joshua6:3 Aye amo nabarwani bao goika motaare moetanane omochie oyio ara rimo kera rituko ase engaki y’amatuko atano na rimo.
Joshua6:4 Abakuani batano na babere babogorie ebitureri bi’omochengo na bagende bosio bw’Esanduku eria. Rituko ria gatano na kabere motaare
Joshua6:5 Ekero egetureri kerabugigwe eriogi ri’ekerondereria
Joshua6:6 Nabo Yoshua
Joshua6:7 Erio agatebia abanto
Joshua6:8 Erio
Joshua6:9 Abarwani abarenge nebirwanero bagatang’ana abakuani abarenge kobugia ebitureri biria
Joshua6:10 Yoshua agachika abanto baria
Joshua6:11 Esanduku eria ekabogorigwa goetanana omochie ara rimo. Erio bonsi bakairana ase batoorete
Joshua6:12 Rituko ria kabere Yoshua akaimoka mambia chuni
Joshua6:13 Abakuani baria batano na babere ababwate ebitureri bi’omochengo bitano na bibere
Joshua6:14 Nabo rituko erio ria kabere bagataara na goetanana omochie ara rimo
Joshua6:15 Rituko ria gatano na kabere bakaimoka mambia chuni
Joshua6:16 Engaki ya gatano na kabere
Joshua6:17 Omochie oyo oragererigwe
Joshua6:18 Nainwe mwerende mono timoba nokogania koimokia gento kende kiaragererigwe na konyora emechando. Moise gokora bo
Joshua6:19 Korende ebinto bionsi bie chifeta
Joshua6:20 Abakuani bakabugia ebitureri
Joshua6:21 Bagaita abanto bonsi b’omochie

Joshua6:23 Erio abamura baria chirooti bakagenda
Joshua6:24 Erio bagasamba omochie nomorero
Joshua6:25 Yoshua agatooria obogima bwa Rahabu
Joshua6:26 Erio agwo Yoshua akaragereria omochie o Yeriko
Joshua6:27 Omonene nigo abete amo na Yoshua
Joshua7:1 Korende Abaisraeli tibabete abegenwa; bakaira ebinto biria biatananetwe ase ogosirigwa. Akani
Joshua7:2 Yoshua agatoma abanto korwa Yeriko gochia Ai
Joshua7:3 Barabwo bakairana ase Yoshua
Joshua7:4 Ase igo abanto koreng’ana chilifu isato bagatiira kogendao
Joshua7:5 Abanto ba Ai bagaita Abaisraeli emerongo etato
Joshua7:6 Yoshua amo nabagaaka b’Abaisraeli bagatandora chianga chiabo
Joshua7:7 Na Yoshua agasaba
Joshua7:8 Omonene
Joshua7:9 Abakanani na abanto bande bonsi b’ense eye baise koigwa ring’ana eri nigo barache gotoetanana na korusia amarieta aito korwa ase ense
Joshua7:10 Omonene agatebia Yoshua
Joshua7:11 Abaisraeli bakorire ebibe. Basaririe okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania okwo nabachigete ng’a babwate. Barusirie ebinto biragereirie. Baibire
Joshua7:12 Nakio kiagerire Abaisraeli babuirwe nababisa babo. Batamire
Joshua7:13 Imoka
Joshua7:14 Ankio mambia goika mwerente aa bosio
Joshua7:15 Omonto oria oranyorwe obwate ebinto biria biragereirie
Joshua7:16 Rituko ria kabere
Joshua7:17 Akarangeria egesaku kia Yuda
Joshua7:18 Akarangeria enyomba ya Sabidi
Joshua7:19 Erio Yoshua agatebia Akani
Joshua7:20 Akani akairaneria Yoshua
Joshua7:21 Ase ebinto biria biasakoretwe nkarora egetambaa gi’okwambara kiarwete Babeli
Joshua7:22 Erio Yoshua agatoma abanto
Joshua7:23 Bakarusia ebinto biria korwa ase eema
Joshua7:24 Yoshua na Abaisraeli bonsi bakaira Akani
Joshua7:25 Agwo Yoshua akamotebia
Joshua7:26 Abaisraeli bakaruta amagena igoro y’Akani goika amagena ayio akaba etui eyere aroro goika rero iga. Erio Omonene agatiga ekeririanda kiaye kegakenda. Ase ayio aase aria akarokwa Ebate y’Akori buna akorokwa nonya ngoika rero iga.
Joshua8:1 Omonene agatebia Yoshua
Joshua8:2 Okore omoruoti o Ai na omochie oye buna gwakorete Yeriko na omoruoti oye. Korende ase engaki eye monyare koira ebinto ne chitugo morasakore
Joshua8:3 Erio Yoshua amo nabarwani bonsi
Joshua8:4 Akabachika akabatebia
Joshua8:5 Inche amo nabarwani bonsi tore komo natoumokere omochie. Ekero abanto ba Ai barasoke gotorwania
Joshua8:6 Erio batobwatie
Joshua8:7 Bono ekero togotama
Joshua8:8 Ekero mwabwatire omochie goika moyosambe
Joshua8:9 Naboigo Yoshua akabatoma
Joshua8:10 Rituko ria kabere
Joshua8:11 Abarwani bonsi
Joshua8:12 Yoshua agachora abarwani chilifu isano
Joshua8:13 Naboigo abarwani baroberetigwe: Omoganda omonene bw’abarwani okabekwa sugusu y’omochie
Joshua8:14 Ekero omoruoti o Ai aroche amang’ana buna are
Joshua8:15 Yoshua amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi bagekora buna babuirwe
Joshua8:16 Abanto bonsi b’omochie bakarangerigwa kobabwatia
Joshua8:17 Kera omonto agatiga omochie ase okobwatia Abaisraeli. Onde tatigarete ime ya Ai
Joshua8:18 Omonene agatebia Yoshua
Joshua8:19 Bwango ekero Yoshua aramborete okoboko kwaye
Joshua8:20 Abanto ba Ai bagachia korigereria nyuma
Joshua8:21 Ekero Yoshua na Abaisraeli bonsi baroche ng’a abwo baboete babwatire omochie na koyosamba
Joshua8:22 Abaisraeli abarenge ase omochie ime bagatirimboka gochiao. Ase igo abanto ba Ai bagaetananwa kegima n’Abaisraeli
Joshua8:23 otatiga omoruoti o Ai. Ere akabwatwa
Joshua8:24 Ekero Abaisraeli bakoorire goita abanto bonsi ba Ai abarenge agwo aase aarabu
Joshua8:25 Bonsi abaitetwe ase rituko erio nigo barenge chilifu ikomi na ibere. Abwo nabwo barenge abanto bonsi ba Ai.
Joshua8:26 Yoshua taringete okoboko kwaye
Joshua8:27 Abaisraeli bakaira chitugo na ebinto binde basakorete bikaba ebiabo
Joshua8:28 Yoshua agasamba omochie o Ai
Joshua8:29 Agatonga omoruoti o Ai ase omote igoro
Joshua8:30 Yoshua akaagachera Omonene
Joshua8:31 Agakeagacha buna Musa
Joshua8:32 Abaisraeli kobarigereretie
Joshua8:33 Omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli amo nabagaaka babo
Joshua8:34 Erio Yoshua akabasomera amang’ana onsi ay’amachiko
Joshua8:35 Yoshua agasomera omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli

Joshua9:4 bakagamba bagende komong’ainereria nobong’aini. Bakamanora
Joshua9:5 Naende bakabeka ebikoroto ebigotu biatandogete

Joshua9:8 Bagatebia Yoshua
Joshua9:9 Erio bakamoiraneria
Joshua9:10 na buna akorete abaruoti b’Abaamori
Joshua9:11 Abagaaka baito
Joshua9:12 Rigereria emegatiyaito! Nigo yarenge morero korwa riko
Joshua9:13 Ebirandi ebi bi’edivai bikorire korwa ase amasankwa nigo biarenge ebiyia ekero twabiichoretie edivai
Joshua9:14 Abaisraeli bagancha koigwa endagera yabo
Joshua9:15 Yoshua agakora omorembe na kobwatana nabarabwo
Joshua9:16 Amatuko atato nyuma kobakorire okobwatana nabanto abwo
Joshua9:17 Ase ayio Abaisraeli bakamanora
Joshua9:18 Abaisraeli bagatiga tibaita abanto baria
Joshua9:19 Korende abatang’ani baria bakabairaneria. “Intwe ntwabarierete eira na gotiana ase erieta ri’Omonene
Joshua9:20 Aya naro torabakorere: Tobatige babe moyo ase engencho y’ogotiana okwo twatianete. Nyasae tabaisa gotoa egesusuro.”
