Joshua9:27 Na ase rituko riria akababeka babe bagwatia chinko na korenta amache ase omoganda na ase egesasimero ki’Omonene
Joshua10:1 Adoni‐Sedeki
Joshua10:2 Bono omoruoti oria amo nabanto baye bakaondoka mono; ekiagera Gibeoni nigo orenge omochie omonene buna omochie onde bwonsi obwate omoruoti; nomonene orenge kobua Ai
Joshua10:3 Adoni‐Sedeki
Joshua10:4 “Tiira gocha aa
Joshua10:5 Erio abaruoti abwo batano b’Abaamori: oyo o Yerusalemu
Joshua10:6 Erio Abagibeoni bagatoma abanto ase Yoshua agwo Giligali ase atoorete komotebia
Joshua10:7 Ase igo Yoshua na abarwani baye bonsi amo ne chituoni chi’esegi bagatiira korwa Giligali.
Joshua10:8 Omonene agatebia Yoshua
Joshua10:9 Obotuko obogima Yoshua agataara korwa Giligali
Joshua10:10 Omonene akabatantania na kobaondokia ase amasio ’Abaisraeli
Joshua10:11 Ekero Abaamori barenge gotama Abaisraeli
Joshua10:12 Ase rituko riria Omonene abegete Abaamori ase amaboko ’Abaisraeli
Joshua10:13 Erio erioba rigatenena rigakira‐kiri
Joshua10:14 Ituko rinde tiriana koba buna erio nonya ng’ake
Joshua10:15 Nyuma y’ayio Yoshua na Abaisraeli bonsi bakairana Giligali ase batoorete.
Joshua10:16 Abaruoti baria batano bagatama
Joshua10:17 Ekero Yoshua atebetigwe ng’a abaruoti baria barorekanire bebisete agwo ase rikuruma riria
Joshua10:18 agachika
Joshua10:19 Korende inwe abande
Joshua10:20 Yoshua na Abaisraeli bakabaita ogoita okonene
Joshua10:21 Erio abanto bonsi bakairana buya ase Yoshua agwo Makeda ase batoorete. Onde tarenge noboremu gokwana mamincha y’Abaisraeli naende.
Joshua10:22 Erio Yoshua agateba
Joshua10:23 Aya agakoreka. Bakarusia abaruoti baria batano korwa ase rikuruma: omoruoti o Yerusalemu
Joshua10:24 Ekero abaruoti baria barentetwe ase Yoshua
Joshua10:25 Naende Yoshua agatebia abatang’ani baria b’abarwani
Joshua10:26 Nyuma y’ayio Yoshua agaita abaruoti baria
Joshua10:27 Ekero erioba rikogwa Yoshua agachika ng’a ebitondo bi’abanto baria bisungorwe
Joshua10:28 Ase rituko riria Yoshua akaumokera na kobwata omochie o Makeda
Joshua10:29 Nyuma y’ayio Yoshua amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi bakarua Makeda
Joshua10:30 Omonene akabeka omochie oyio amo nomoruoti oye ase amakobo ’Abaisraeli. Bagaita nemioro abanto bonsi pi b’omochie oyio; onde tatooregete nonya noyomo. Naende agakora omoruoti bw’aroro buna akorete omoruoti o Yeriko.
Joshua10:31 Erio Yoshua akaimoka amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi korwa Libuna
Joshua10:32 Na Omonene akabeka Lakisi ase amaboko ’Abaisraeli
Joshua10:33 Erio Horamu
Joshua10:34 Yoshua na Abaisraeli bonsi bakarua Lakisi
Joshua10:35 Rituko erio erio bakayobwata
Joshua10:36 Korwa Egiloni Yoshua na Abaisraeli bonsi bagatiira
Joshua10:37 Bakayobwata na bagaita nemioro omoruoti oye na kera omonto bw’omochie oyio amo nabwo b’emechie ende yarenge ang’e Yoshua agasiria omochie oyio kegima
Joshua10:38 Nyuma y’ayio Yoshua na Abaisraeli bonsi bakairana Debiri
Joshua10:39 Akayobwata amo nomoruoti oye na emechie yonsi yarenge ang’e. Bagaita nemioro abanto abarenge imeo
Joshua10:40 Naboigo Yoshua akaira ense eria engima. Akabua na goita abaruoti bonsi b’ense y’ebitunwa
Joshua10:41 Yoshua akabua abanto bonsi korwa Kadeshi‐Barinea goika Gasa
Joshua10:42 Nabo Yoshua akabua abaruoti abwo bonsi
Joshua10:43 Nyuma y’ayio Yoshua na Abaisraeli bonsi bakairana Giligali ase batoorete.

Joshua11:2 na ase abaruoti bamenyete sugusu
Joshua11:3 Naboigo agatoma amang’ana ase Abakanani ba moocha na bosongo
Joshua11:4 Barabwo bagacha nabarwani babo bonsi
Joshua11:5 Abaruoti abwo bonsi bakabwatana
Joshua11:6 Omonene agatebia Yoshua
Joshua11:7 Yoshua amo nabarwani baye bonsi bakabachiera mobosokano
Joshua11:8 Na Omonene akababeka ase amaboko ’Abaisraeli
Joshua11:9 Yoshua akabakora buna Omonene amochigete; akanacha chibarasi chiabo chinteng’e agasamba chigari chiabo nomorero.
Joshua11:10 Nyuma y’ayio Yoshua akairana gochia Hasori
Joshua11:11 Bagaita bonsi abarenge ase omochie oyio ime
Joshua11:12 Nabo Yoshua akaira emechie yonsi y’abaruoti baria

Joshua11:14 Abaisraeli bagasakora ebinto bionsi bi’emechie eyio
Joshua11:15 Buna Omonene achigete Musa
Joshua11:16 Yoshua akaira ense eria engima: Ense y’ebitunwa
Joshua11:17 Akaira ense eria yonsi gochakera egetunwa kia Halaki agwo irianyi
Joshua11:18 Yoshua konya obeire okorwania abaruoti abwo ase engaki entambe.
Joshua11:19 Omochie onde tori
Joshua11:20 Omonene nere okong’etie chinkoro chiabo ng’a barwanie Abaisraeli
Joshua11:21 Ase engaki eria Yoshua akagenda gosiria Abaanaki
Joshua11:22 Abaanaki bande tibatigarete ase ense y’Abaisraeli nonya noyomo. Ase Gati
Joshua11:23 Yoshua akaira ense eria engima

Joshua12:4 Naende bakabua Ogi

Joshua13:5 ense y’Abagebali amo na Lebanoni yonsi gochia moocha
Joshua13:6 Abasidoni abwo bonsi bamenyete ase ense y’ebitunwa egati y’egetunwa kia Lebanoni na omochie o Misirefoti‐Maimu
Joshua13:7 Ase igo bono atanana ense eye ase egati y’ebisaku kianda amo nekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase
Joshua13:8 Abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben
Joshua13:9 Ense yabo nigo yachakerete korwa Aroeri
Joshua13:10 amo nemechie yonsi ya Sihoni

Joshua13:12 na ime ase Basani oboruoti bwonsi bwa Ogi
Joshua13:13 Abaisraeli tibaseretie Abagesuri na Abamaaka: barabwo nigo bamenyete ase egati y’Abaisraeli goika rero iga.
Joshua13:14 Abanto b’egesaku kia Lawi Musa tabaete ensemo ende yonsi ebe omwando obo. Barabwo nigo barabe bakonyora omwando obo obatungetie korwa ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa

Judges9:11 Korende omoko oria okairaneria: Igo ngotiga obwansu bwane na amatunda aane amaya

Judges9:13 Korende omosasibu okairaneria: Igo ngotiga okorua edivai yane
Judges9:14 Erio emete yonsi egatebia egetutu ki’amagwa: Inchuo aye otogambere!
Judges9:15 Na egetutu ki’amagwa gekairaneria emete yonsi: Onye ekeene mwanchire gonchora imbe eruoti yaino

Judges20:5 Abanto ba Gibea bagacha kondwania
Judges20:6 Inche nkabogoria omokungu one o sere‐sere
Judges20:7 Inwe Abaisraeli mwensi
Judges20:8 Abanto bakaimoka

Judges20:14 korende bakarua emechie yabo

1Samuel18:2 Korwa rituko riria Saulo akaa Daudi ribaga komenya asare
1Samuel18:3 Erio Yonathani agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania na Daudi
1Samuel18:4 Yonathani akarusia egetambaa kiaye gi’okwambara agakea Daudi
1Samuel18:5 Aande onsi ase Saulo arenge gotoma Daudi
1Samuel18:6 Ekaba ekero Daudi are koirana
1Samuel18:7 Abakungu bakaba bagotera
1Samuel18:8 Ayio akagechia Saulo
1Samuel18:9 Korwa ase rituko riria na kogenderera Saulo akarorera Daudi ribero.
1Samuel18:10 Rituko ria kabere omoika omobe okorwa ase Nyasae ogacha igoro ase Saulo
1Samuel18:11 Saulo akarengereria ase enkoro yaye agetebia
1Samuel18:12 Saulo akairoka Daudi mono
1Samuel18:13 Ase ayio Saulo akamorusia korwa asare
1Samuel18:14 Daudi nigo arenge konyora obobui ase chinchera chiaye chionsi
1Samuel18:15 Ekero Saulo aroche ng’a Daudi onyorire obobui
1Samuel18:16 Korende Abaisraeli na Abayuda bonsi bakamwancha Daudi mono
1Samuel18:17 Erio Saulo agatebia Daudi
1Samuel18:18 Daudi akairaneria Saulo
1Samuel18:19 Korende ekero engaki yaigete
1Samuel18:20 Mikali
1Samuel18:21 Bono Saulo akarengereria iga
1Samuel18:22 Erio Saulo agachika abasomba baye
1Samuel18:23 Ase igo abasomba ba Saulo bagatebia Daudi amang’ana ayio bobisi. Nere akabairaneria
1Samuel18:24 Abasomba abwo bagachia gotebia Saulo aya Daudi akwanete
1Samuel18:25 na Saulo akabachika batebie Daudi ng’a
1Samuel18:26 Ekero abasomba baria batebetie Daudi amang’ana aria Saulo atebete
1Samuel18:27 Daudi akaimoka
1Samuel18:28 Saulo akarora na akamanya ng’a Omonene nigo arenge amo na Daudi
1Samuel18:29 Ase ayio Saulo akoboa Daudi mono kobua
1Samuel18:30 Abanene b’Abafilisti bakaba bagocha korwana esegi
1Samuel19:1 Saulo agakwana na Yonathani
1Samuel19:2 Yonathani agatebia Daudi
1Samuel19:3 Inche ningende ntenene ang’e ase tata ase egetii
1Samuel19:4 Yonathani agakwana na Saulo ise amang’ana amaya igoro ya Daudi
1Samuel19:5 Ere taboraarete obogima bwaye
1Samuel19:6 Saulo akaigwera amang’ana a Yonathani
1Samuel19:7 Erio Yonathani akarangeria Daudi
1Samuel19:8 Esegi egatuboka naende
1Samuel19:9 Rituko erimo ekero Saulo aikaransete nyomba mwaye
1Samuel19:10 Saulo agateema kobeta Daudi ritimo amobwateranie enyasi
1Samuel19:11 Ase obotuko obwo Saulo agatoma abanto ase enyomba ya Daudi komoboera
1Samuel19:12 Erio Mikali agaikeria Daudi goetera ase ekebao
1Samuel19:13 Mikali akaimokia omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa orenge nyomba ime
1Samuel19:14 Erio abanto batometwe na Saulo kwoyia Daudi bachete
1Samuel19:15 Saulo akabatoma naende ase Daudi
1Samuel19:16 Ekero abanto abwo basoete nyomba
1Samuel19:17 Erio Saulo akaboria Mikali
1Samuel19:18 Ekero Daudi atamire na gwetooria
1Samuel19:19 Saulo agatebigwa ng’a Daudi nigo amenyete Nayoti aria Rama.
1Samuel19:20 Ase ayio Saulo agatoma abanto boyie Daudi. Korende ekero abanto aba baigeteo
1Samuel19:21 Ekero Saulo aigwete aya abanyorire
1Samuel19:22 Erio Saulo omonyene akagenda Rama
1Samuel19:23 Ase igo akagenda gochia Nayoti agwo Rama. Korende Omoika o Nyasae ogaika nonya nigoro yaye
1Samuel19:24 Ere boigo akarusia chianga chiaye akababoka ase okobana ase obosio bwa Samweli
1Samuel20:1 Daudi agatama korwa Nayoti agwo Rama
1Samuel20:2 Yonathani akamoiraneria
1Samuel20:3 Daudi akairaneria ase ogotiana
1Samuel20:4 Erio Yonathani akamotebia
1Samuel20:5 Daudi agatebia Yonathani
1Samuel20:6 Kerabe ng’a iso tandochi ase omoyega oyio
1Samuel20:7 Aise goteba: Ayio mbuya
1Samuel20:8 Gaki onkorere inche
1Samuel20:9 Yonathani akairaneria
1Samuel20:10 Daudi akamoboria
1Samuel20:11 Erio Yonathani akamotebia
1Samuel20:12 na Yonathani akamotebia Daudi. “Omonene
1Samuel20:13 Konye tata bwerure kogokorera bobe
1Samuel20:14 Onye ngendererete koba moyo
1Samuel20:15 gose tobaisa korusia obwanchani obwo korwa ase ororeria rwane nonya ng’ake
1Samuel20:16 Agwo Yonathani agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania neamate ya Daudi
1Samuel20:17 Erio Yonathani akaboria Daudi arie eira na gotiana naende ng’a namwanche
1Samuel20:18 Erio Yonathani agatebia Daudi
1Samuel20:19 Ankio ende otirimboke bwango gochia aase aria kwebisete rituko riria kwaganeirie. Obeere aroro
1Samuel20:20 Nindute emegwe etato gochia ang’e netui eria
1Samuel20:21 Erio nintome omosomba one arigie emegwe eria. Kondatebie omosomba oria: Rigereia
1Samuel20:22 Korende onye ngotebia omwana oria: Rigereria
1Samuel20:23 Nase amang’ana aria twakwanete
1Samuel20:24 Ase igo Daudi akebisa mogondo na ekero ki’Omotienyi Omoyia omoruoti agaikaransa koragera.
1Samuel20:25 Omoruoti agaikaransa ase ekerogo kiaye
1Samuel20:26 Saulo takwanete gento kende ase rituko riria
1Samuel20:27 Ase rituko ria kabere ri’omoyega bw’Omotienyi Omoyia
1Samuel20:28 Yonathani akairaneria Saulo
1Samuel20:29 agateba: Abanto b’eamate yane ngochia bare korua ekeng’wanso agwo ase omochie
1Samuel20:30 Erio Saulo akaba nendamwamu enene ase Yonathani
1Samuel20:31 Nomanyete ng’a ekero mosinto o Yese agendererete koba moyo ase ense
1Samuel20:32 Erio Yonathani akamoboria
1Samuel20:33 Agwo Saulo akaimokia ritimo akamoruta amobete. Bono Yonathani akamanya ng’a ise narigetie goita Daudi.
1Samuel20:34 Yonathani akaimoka korwa ase emesa ore nendamwamu enene na tariete gento ase rituko erio ria kabere ri’Omotienyi Omoyia. Nigo abete oichanete ase engencho y’obosooku ise amokorerete ase okogania goita Daudi.
1Samuel20:35 Emambia ya kabere
1Samuel20:36 Agatebia omwana oria
1Samuel20:37 Na ekero omwana oria aigete aase omogwe oria ogwete
1Samuel20:38 Erio Yonathani akarangeria omomura oria
1Samuel20:39 Omwana oria tamanyete ng’a ninki engencho y’amang’ana ayio
1Samuel20:40 Yonathani akaa omosae oria ebirwanero biaye akamotebia
1Samuel20:41 Ekero omwana oria achiire
1Samuel20:42 Erio Yonathani akamotebia
1Samuel20:43 Erio Daudi akaimoka
1Samuel21:1 Daudi akagenda ase Ahimeleki omokuani agwo Nobu. Ahimeleki agacha komorotota ore nobwoba na okoiguswa
1Samuel21:2 Daudi akairaneria Ahimeleki omokuani
1Samuel21:3 Bono endagera ki obwate aa? Ing’a emegati etano
1Samuel21:4 Omokuani oria akairaneria Daudi
1Samuel21:5 Daudi akairaneria omokuani
1Samuel21:6 Ase ayio omokuani akaa Daudi emegati eria emechenu
1Samuel21:7 Bono ase rituko erio omonto oyomo bw’Edomu
1Samuel21:8 Daudi akaboria Ahimeleki
1Samuel21:9 Omokuani oria akamotebia
1Samuel21:10 Ase rituko erio Daudi akarua agwo
1Samuel21:11 Abasomba b’Akisi bakamokwana

1Samuel21:13 Ase igo akaonchora okoba gwe chingencho chiaye ase amasio abo
1Samuel21:14 Akisi agatebia abasomba baye
1Samuel21:15 Inee! Inche nigo mborire abanto chibarimo? Ninki kiagera mwarenta ebarimo eye gocha kogosoria obobarimo bwaye ase obosio bwane? Inee! Omonto buna oyo nanyore ribaga asoe nyomba mwane?”
1Samuel22:1 Daudi akarua agwo
1Samuel22:2 Abanto bachandegete
1Samuel22:3 Naende Daudi akarua agwo
1Samuel22:4 Daudi agatiga ise na ng’ina bare agwo ase omoruoti o Moabu; barabwo bakagenderera komenya agwo ase engaki yonsi Daudi abete bwebisete ase rikuruma.
1Samuel22:5 Erio Gadi omobani agatebia Daudi
1Samuel22:6 Rituko erimo Saulo nigo aikaransete inse y’omote onga buna ekerachuoki ase ekegoro agwo Gibea
1Samuel22:7 Saulo agakwana nabasomba baye
1Samuel22:8 Ayio naro agerire inwe mwensi mwakorire emeroberio ya bobisi ere mamincha yane? Onde tari ogontebia ng’a omwana one okorire okobwatana na mosinto o Yese
1Samuel22:9 Erio Doegi Omoedomu

1Samuel22:19 Boigo Saulo agaita nomoro abanto bonsi barenge agwo Nobu

1Samuel23:5 Ase igo Daudi na abanto baye bakagenda Keila
1Samuel23:6 Ekero Abiatari
1Samuel23:7 Saulo agatebigwa ng’a Daudi osoire Keila. Erio agateba

1Samuel23:10 Erio Daudi akabora
1Samuel23:11 Inee! Abanto ba Keila nigo barandue
1Samuel23:12 Naende Daudi akamoboria
1Samuel23:13 Erio Daudi na abanto baye abarenge koreng’ana amagana atano na rimo
1Samuel23:14 Ase igo Daudi akagenderera komenya ase amabwago ’ebitunwa ase erooro ya Sifu; na Saulo akagenderera kona‐komorigia kera rituko

1Samuel23:17 Akamotebia

1Samuel24:11 Aye tata

1Samuel25:1 Samweli agakwa
1Samuel25:2 Narenge omonto oyomo korwa Maoni obwate amaicho aye agwo Karimeli. Ere nigo arenge omonda mono; nabwate ching’ondi chilifu isato ne chimbori elifu eyemo. Igo arenge koba okonacha ching’ondi chiaye amarionya agwo Karimeli.
1Samuel25:3 Omonto oyio noyo bw’ororeria rwa Kalebu
1Samuel25:4 Ekero Daudi arenge ase erooro akaigwa ng’a Nabali nkonacha arenge ching’ondi chiaye amarionya.
1Samuel25:5 Erio agatoma abamura ikomi ase Nabali
1Samuel25:6 momotebie amang’ana aya aane: Omorembe obe asore
1Samuel25:7 Naigure ng’a nkonacha ore ching’ondi chiao amarionya. Bono abarisia bao nigo barenge amo naintwe; titwabakorerete bobe bonde. Barabwo tibaiberetwe gento kende gionsi ase engaki yonsi barenge Karimeli.

1Samuel25:16 Ase engaki yonsi twarenge amo nabarabwo korisia ching’ondi
1Samuel25:17 Bono omanye amang’ana ayio

1Samuel26:4 agatoma chirooti na igo akamanya na koenekia ng’a Saulo konya oikireo.

1Samuel30:1 Ase rituko ria gatato Daudi na abanto baye bagaika Sikilagi. Abaameleki konya bachakire esegi agwo Negebu na Sikilagi. Na bono konya babuire Sikilagi na koyosamba nomorero

1Kings6:1 Ase omwaka bw’amagana ane
1Kings6:2 Enyomba eria omoruoti Sulemani aagacherete Omonene nigo yarenge iga: Obotambe bwaye nobw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo etano nomo
1Kings6:3 Enyomba eria yaagachetwe bosio bwe Hekalu enyene nigo yarenge iga: Obotambe bwaye gochia ime nobw’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi
1Kings6:4 Sulemani akaroisia ase enyomba eria ebibao bi’emete; ebibao ebio tibiarenge koigorwa.
1Kings6:5 Naende akaagacha chinyomba chinde inse
1Kings6:6 Obogare bw’ebinyomba bia inse nigo bwarenge bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano
1Kings6:7 Ekero enyomba yaagachetwe
1Kings6:8 Egesoero kegosoera ebinyomba bia inse nigo kiarenge ensemo ya sugusu ye Hekalu na goetera ase ebiriinero abanto nigo barenge koriina gochia ase rirongo ria kabere
1Kings6:9 Naboigo Sulemani akaagacha Hekalu
1Kings6:10 Oboagacho bw’enyomba inse nigo bwatunyaine Hekalu
1Kings6:11 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Sulemani
1Kings6:12 “Amang’ana igoro y’enyomba eye okong’agachera bono nigo arabe iga: Korabwatie emeroberio yane echikire na koigwera amachiko aane onsi na koyakora
1Kings6:13 Inche nigo ndamenye aroro ase egati y’Abaisraeli
1Kings6:14 Sulemani akaagacha enyomba eria na akayekoora buna iga:
1Kings6:15 Agatuba chinyasi chia ime y’enyomba yonsi korwa inse goika igoro ne chibao chi’emecharake
1Kings6:16 Akaagacha akanyomba ka ime bosio kegima ase Hekalu ime
1Kings6:17 Ensemo y’enyomba yarenge Hekalu enyene nigo yarenge y’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo ene.
1Kings6:18 Chibao chi’emecharake chiatubete enyomba ime nigo chiarenge nemegwekano y’ebirandi
1Kings6:19 Ime ye Hekalu bosio kegima nigo aroisetie akanyomba aase Esanduku y’Okobwatana y’Omonene yarenge kobekwa.
1Kings6:20 Obotambe bw’akanyomba karia ka ime nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo ebere; naboigo obogare bwaye na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro
1Kings6:21 Sulemani akaooma Hekalu ime netahabu engiya. Chingataare chiaoomire netahabu chikabekwa ase egesieri bosio bw’akanyomba ka ime.
1Kings6:22 Nabo akaooma enyomba yonsi kegima netahabu; boigo akaooma egesasimero gi’Aase Aachenu netahabu.
1Kings6:23 Sulemani akaroisia emegwekano y’abakerubi babere korwa ase emete y’emezeituni
1Kings6:24 Obotambe bwa kera orobaba rwa kera oyomo nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atano; korwa ensinyo y’orobaba oromo goika ey’oronde nigo bwarenge obotambe bw’amaboko ikomi.
1Kings6:25 Omokerubi oria onde boigo nigo arenge bw’ekerengo ekio ekio. Abakerubi bonsi babere nigo barenge bareng’aine kegima ase ekerengo na bagwekaine ase ekieni.
1Kings6:26 Obotambe bwa kera omokerubi nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko ikomi.
1Kings6:27 Abakerubi abwo bakabekwa ase akanyomba karia bosio ime ye Hekalu. Chimbaba chiabo nigo chiaramboire; orobaba oromo rw’omokerubi oyomo rogaika enyasi ensemo eyemo
1Kings6:28 Abakerubi bonsi babere bakaoomwa netahabu.
1Kings6:29 Sulemani agachabera chinyasi chionsi chie Hekalu
1Kings6:30 Inse ase ebinyomba ebio bibere akaooma netahabu.
1Kings6:31 Ebisieri bibere bikaroisigwa korwa ase chibao chi’emezeituni bikabekwa ase egesoero gi’akanyomba ka ime. Emetobwa nigo yatenenirie ensemo eyemo ya isano y’enyasi.
1Kings6:32 Ebisieri ebio bionsi bibere bi’emezeituni bigachaberwa nemegwekano y’abakerubi
1Kings6:33 Naende emetobwa y’egesieri gie Hekalu enyene ekaroisigwa korwa ase chibao chi’emezeituni ere ne chikoona inye
1Kings6:34 na ebisieri bibere bi’emetarakwa; kera egesieri nigo kiarenge ebing’ese bibere biare konyara koigorwa biaringanigwa.
1Kings6:35 Ebisieri ebio bigachaberwa nemegwekano y’abakerubi
1Kings6:36 Naende Sulemani akaagacha chindwaki chi’eraaro ya ime. Chindwaro isato chie chindwaki echio agachiagacha namagena abaachire
1Kings6:37 Oboroso bwe Hekalu bokabekwa ase omotienyi o Sivu
1Kings6:38 Na ase omotienyi o gatano na gatato
1Kings7:1 Sulemani akaira emiaka ikomi na etato ase okoagacha enyomba yaye omonyene na koyekoora.
1Kings7:2 Akaagacha enyomba ekorokwa Enyomba ye Rinani ria Lebanoni. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko rigana erimo
1Kings7:3 Enyomba nigo yarenge nekerama ki’emecharake igoro y’emiamba yabegetwe ase chisiiro chiria emerongo ene na isano
1Kings7:4 Enyomba eyio nigo yarenge nebibao bire ase chindwaro isato
1Kings7:5 Ebisoero bionsi na ebibao nigo biarenge ne chikoona inye
1Kings7:6 Boigo akaagacha omwaraache bwe chisiiro. Obotambe bwaye nobw’amaboko emerongo etano
1Kings7:7 Naende akaagacha Enyomba y’Ekerogo ki’Oboruoti
1Kings7:8 Naboigo enyomba yaye y’okomenya yaagachetwe magega y’enyomba eria y’ebina
1Kings7:9 Echio chionsi nigo chiagachetwe namagena amaya e rigori rinene
1Kings7:10 Amagena ’oboroso nigo arenge aye rigori rinene
1Kings7:11 Igoro y’oboroso narengeo amagena ande e rigori rinene
1Kings7:12 Orwaki rw’eraaro enene igo rwaagachetwe namagena abaachire
1Kings7:13 Omoruoti Sulemani akarangeria Hiramu achiche korwa Turo.
1Kings7:14 Hiramu nigo arenge omwana bw’omokungu omoboraka bw’egesaku kia Nafutali
1Kings7:15 Hiramu akaroisia chisiiro ibere chi’etaai; obotambe bwa kera esiiro eyemo nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko ikomi na atato
1Kings7:16 Naende akaroisia ebisure bibere bi’etaai enyititoire na kobombwa
1Kings7:17 Kera egesure igoro ye chisiiro nigo giachabeire nebichanga bitano na bibere biasisire goetanana.
1Kings7:18 Akarosia emegwekano y’amakomomanga
1Kings7:19 Ebisure igoro ye chisiiro chiarenge ime y’enyomba ya bosio
1Kings7:20 Ebisure ebio nigo biarenge igoro ase chisiiro chiria ibere na igoro ye chinsemo chiatambeete gochia isiko. Emegwekano y’amakomomanga amagana abere yarenge ase chindwaro ibere ase kera egesure.
1Kings7:21 Hiramu akabeka chisiiro chiria ase enyomba bosio bwe Hekalu; esiiro yabegetwe ensemo ya borio akayeroka Yakini
1Kings7:22 Ebisure nigo biabombire buna ebisicha nigo biarenge igoro ase chisiiro. Na igo emeremo ye chisiiro ekaera.
1Kings7:23 Hiramu akaroisia egetuba ekenene korwa ase etaai enyititoire na kobombwa
1Kings7:24 Ang’e nomogo emegwekano y’amasosa iyarengeo
1Kings7:25 Egetuba keria giaterekereretwe igoro y’emegwekano ye chiombe ikomi na ibere. Chiombe isato chikarigereria gochia sugusu
1Kings7:26 Obonetu bw’etaai yaroiseretigwe egetubwa keria
1Kings7:27 Naende Hiramu akaroisia ebibekerero ikomi bi’ebituba korwa ase chitaai. Obotambe bwa kera ekebekerero nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko ane
1Kings7:28 Ebibekerero biria nigo biakoretwe iga: Chinsingo nchiarenge ase chinsemo chiabo ase egati ye chinsingo chie chikoona.
1Kings7:29 Ase chinsingo echio yarengeo emegwekano ye chindo
1Kings7:30 Kera ekebekerero nigo kiarenge namagoro ane aroisetigwe korwa ase etaai. Ase chikoona chi’ekebekerero ebisiirero mbiarengeo. Ebisiirero ebio nigo biabombire nemegwekano y’ebisicha biaroisetigwe chingata ase kera ekemo.
1Kings7:31 Omonwa bw’ekebekerero nigo orenge igoro ime y’orosingo rw’obotambe gochia igoro okoboko okomo. Omonwa oyio orenge egesingo otambeete gochia inse
1Kings7:32 Amagoro aye ane nigo abegetwe inse ye chinsingo chiaye
1Kings7:33 Amagoro ayio nigo aroisetigwe buna aye chigari. Amagoro amagima nigo aroisetigwe korwa ase etaai yanyititoire na kobombwa. Boigo amanyongo
1Kings7:34 Ebisiirero bine mbiarenge ase kera ekebekerero ase chikoona chiaye; biaroisetigwe bikaba egento ekemo nekebekerero.
1Kings7:35 Igoro kegima ase kera ekebekerero nigo kiarenge orosingo rw’obogare bw’ekeng’ese gi’okoboko okomo; na igoro ase orosingo orwo nigo biarenge ebisiirero amo ne chinsingo chie chinsemo. Bionsi nigo biaroisetigwe bikaba egento ekemo nebisiirero.
1Kings7:36 Ase ebisiirero na ase chinsingo emegwekano y’abakerubi
1Kings7:37 Naboigo akaroisia ebibekerero bionsi ikomi. Bionsi nigo biaroisetigwe korwa ase etaai enyititoire na kobombwa; nigo biareng’aine na nigo biagwekaine.
1Kings7:38 Hiramu akaroisia na ebituba ikomi bie chitaai. Obogare bwa kera egetuba nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko ane
1Kings7:39 Akabeka ebibekerero bitano ensemo ya irianyi ye Hekalu
1Kings7:40 Hiramu akaroisia ebituba
1Kings7:41 Akaroisia chisiiro ibere
1Kings7:42 na emegwekano y’amakomomanga amagana ane eyabegetwe igoro y’ebichanga ebio
1Kings7:43 Naende akaroisia ebibekerero bi’ebituba amo nebituba ikomi biaterekereireo
1Kings7:44 na egetuba ekenene ekemo amo nemegwekano ye chiombe ikomi na ibere ekabekwa inse y’egetuba keria
1Kings7:45 ne chindogio
1Kings7:46 Ebinto ebio omoruoti akabibomba korwa ase etaai enyititoire
1Kings7:47 Sulemani agatiga korenga ebinto ebi bionsi
1Kings7:48 Boigo Sulemani akaroisia ebinto binde bionsi biare kobekwa ase enyomba y’Omonene; egesasimero gi’etahabu
1Kings7:49 Ebibekerero bie chitaya bitano biare kobekwa ensemo y’okorio
1Kings7:50 Naende akaroisia chisani ne chigami
1Kings7:51 Naboigo emeremo eye yonsi omoruoti Sulemani akorete ase enyomba y’Omonene ekaera. Na Sulemani agasoyia aroro ebinto ebi Daudi ise aatananete koba ebichenu: chifeta
1Kings8:1 Sulemani agasangereria amo abagaaka b’Abaisraeli
1Kings8:2 Igo Abaisraeli bonsi bagacha ase omoruoti Sulemani ase Amatuko Amanene ase omotienyi bw’Etanimu
1Kings8:3 Ekero abagaaka bonsi b’Abaisraeli bachete
1Kings8:4 bakayerenta amo n’Eema y’Omosangererekano na ebikorero bionsi ebichenu biarenge ime ase Eema eria. Abakuani na Abalawi nabwo barentete ebinto ebio.
1Kings8:5 Omoruoti Sulemani amo nomoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli
1Kings8:6 Erio abakuani bakarenta Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana kw’Omonene
1Kings8:7 Abakerubi abwo nigo baramborete chimbaba chiabo igoro y’aase aria Esanduku eria yarenge
1Kings8:8 Emiaro eria nigo yarenge emetambe
1Kings8:9 Egento kende ekeao tikiarenge ime ase Esanduku eria
1Kings8:10 Ekero abakuani barenge gosoka korwa ase Aase Aachenu
1Kings8:11 na igo abakuani tibarenge konyara kogenderera nobokoreri bwabo ase engencho ye riire riria
1Kings8:12 Erio Sulemani akabora
1Kings8:13 Bono nakoagacheire enyomba ebe obomenyo bwao
1Kings8:14 Erio omoruoti akeonchora akarigereria abanto
1Kings8:15 agateba
1Kings8:16 Korwa rituko riria nang’anyetie abanto baane Abaisraeli korwa Misiri
1Kings8:17 Naende Sulemani agateba
1Kings8:18 Korende Omonene akamotebia: Buna kwarengereretie koagachera erieta riane enyomba
1Kings8:19 Korende nonya naboigo
1Kings8:20 “Bono Omonene oikeranirie eira eria ariete
1Kings8:21 Naende aroro agwo naroisirie aase Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’Omonene ekobeera. Okobwatana koria Omonene akorete ne chisokoro chiaito
1Kings8:22 Erio Sulemani agatenena bosio bw’egesasimero ki’Omonene ase obosio bw’omosangererekano bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli
1Kings8:23 agakwana
1Kings8:24 Aye gwaikeranirie eira eria kwarierete omosomba oo Daudi tata. Aria gwakwanete nomonwa oo kwayaikeranirie nokoboko kwao rituko ria rero.
1Kings8:25 Ase ayio aye Omonene
1Kings8:26 Ase ayio
1Kings8:27 “Inee! Nekeene ng’a aye Nyasae nonyare komenya aa ase ense eye? Rora
1Kings8:28 Korende aye Omonene
1Kings8:29 Tiga amaiso ao arigererie enyomba eye obotuko na omobaso aase aiga aye gwatebete igoro yaye: Erieta riane naribeere aroro. Ase ayio oigwe ogosaba oko inche
1Kings8:30 Naende aye oigwe okoboria kwane kw’oboitongo inche
1Kings8:31 “Omonto karakorere omonto onde bobe na aborigwe koria emuma
1Kings8:32 aye oigwe korwa agwo igoro
1Kings8:33 “Ekero abanto bao Abaisraeli barabe babuirwe nababisa babo
1Kings8:34 rirorio oigwe korwa agwo igoro. Bwabere ebibe bi’abanto bao Abaisraeli
1Kings8:35 “Ekero igoro erabe esiekire na embura tetwa
1Kings8:36 rirorio aye oigwe korwa agwo igoro. Bwabere ebibe bi’abasomba bao Abaisraeli
1Kings8:37 “Kerabe enchara erache ase ense
1Kings8:38 oigwe ogosaba kwabo. Omonto onde bwensi
1Kings8:39 obaigwe korwa agwo igoro ase obomenyo bwao bore. Bwabere
1Kings8:40 erinde banyare gokoiroka amatuko onsi bamenyete ase ense eria kwaete chisokoro chiaito.
1Kings8:41 “Boigo onye omogeni korwa ase ense y’aare
1Kings8:42 (ekiagera abanto inabaigwe igoro y’erieta riao rinene
1Kings8:43 oigwe korwa igoro agwo aase obomenyo bwao bore. Okorere omogeni oria amang’ana onsi akoboria
1Kings8:44 “Abanto bao kobaragende ase esegi korwania ababisa babo ase enchera ende yonsi aye orabatome gochia
1Kings8:45 rirorio oigwe korwa agwo igoro ogosaba kwabo
1Kings8:46 “Omonto tari otagokora ebibe. Ase ayio baise kogokorera ebibe
1Kings8:47 Kobararore okomocha kwabo ekero bare ase ense eria boosirwe gochia
1Kings8:48 Onye bagweitia na koonchoka ase ebirengererio biabo bionsi na ase chinkoro chiabo chionsi
1Kings8:49 rirorio oigwe korwa agwo igoro ase obomenyo bwao bore ogosaba kwabo na okoboria kwabo kw’oboitongo
1Kings8:50 Bwabere abanto bao bakorire ebibe asore. Bwabere ogosaria kwabo gwonsi bakorire asore; okore ababisa babo
1Kings8:51 Abanto aba nabanto bao
1Kings8:52 “Tiga amaiso ao abe atorigereretie namabera
1Kings8:53 Aye Omonene Nyasae
1Kings8:54 Bono ekero Sulemani akoorete ogosaba oko gwonsi na okoboria Omonene ase oboitongo
1Kings8:55 agatenena agasesenia omosangererekano bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli
1Kings8:56 “Atogigwe Omonene oria oeire abanto baye Abaisraeli obotoereru buna abarierete eira! Nonya ne ring’ana erimo tiriri ritaikeranetigwe ase eira yaye yonsi engiya ariete goetera ase Musa
1Kings8:57 Omonene
1Kings8:58 korende aonchore chinkoro chiaito gochia asare
1Kings8:59 Amang’ana aya aane nasabire ase oboitongo
1Kings8:60 Erio abanto b’ense yonsi banyare komanya ng’a Omonene nere Nyasae
1Kings8:61 Ase ayio
1Kings8:62 Erio omoruoti na abanto bonsi amo nere bakarua ekeng’wanso ase obosio bw’Omonene.
1Kings8:63 Sulemani akarua ebing’wanso bi’omorembe ase Omonene
1Kings8:64 Ase rituko riria omoruoti agaatanana na gochena obogati‐gati bw’eraaro eria yarenge bosio bw’enyomba y’Omonene. Agwo nao aruerete ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa
1Kings8:65 Ase ayio Sulemani amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi mbabwate Amatuko Amanene ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere
1Kings8:66 Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato agatiga abanto bakagenda
1Kings9:1 Ekero Sulemani konya akoorire koagacha enyomba y’Omonene
1Kings9:2 Omonene akamoorokera eria kabere buna amoorokerete agwo Gibeoni ritang’ani.
1Kings9:3 Omonene akamotebia
1Kings9:4 Korabwatie chinchera chiane
1Kings9:5 rirorio inche ninkong’ie ekerogo kiao ki’oboruoti igoro ase Abaisraeli kare na kare
1Kings9:6 Korende inwe na abanto be chinderia chiaino komoreonchore na montige
1Kings9:7 rirorio ninsirie Abaisraeli korwa ase ense eria nabaeire
1Kings9:8 Enyomba eye nebe rituuri riatagokire
1Kings9:9 Nigo barairanerie: Nekiagera barabwo batigete Omonene
1Kings9:10 Sulemani akaira emiaka emerongo ebere ase okoagacha chinyomba chiria ibere
1Kings9:11 Hiramu
1Kings9:12 Korende ekero Hiramu achete korwa Turo korora emechie eria
1Kings9:13 Akabora
1Kings9:14 Hiramu konya otomeire omoruoti chitahabu chikiro chilifu inye (4
1Kings9:15 Oyo noro omoroberio bw’emeremo Sulemani abetereretie abanto bakore: Akababeka koagacha enyomba y’Omonene
1Kings9:16 (Farao
1Kings9:17 Bono Sulemani akaagacha Geseri naende). Boigo akaagacha Beti‐Horoni ya maate
1Kings9:18 na Baalati
1Kings9:19 na emechie yonsi ye chikungo
1Kings9:20 Abanto aba Sulemani abetereretie gokora emeremo
1Kings9:21 
1Kings9:22 Korende Sulemani takorete Abaisraeli bakaba abasomba. Barabwo nigo barenge abarwani b’esegi
1Kings9:23 Abateneneri abanene igoro y’emeremo ya Sulemani nigo barenge abanto amagana atano
1Kings9:24 Korende mosubati o Farao akarua ase Omochie o Daudi
1Kings9:25 Ara gatato ase omwaka Sulemani nigo arenge korua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na ebing’wanso bi’omorembe ase egesasimero keria aagacherete Omonene. Boigo aba ogosamba ubani ase Omonene. Ase igo agakoora emeremo y’okoagacha enyomba y’Omonene.
1Kings9:26 Omoruoti Sulemani akaroisia chimeeri agwo Esioni‐Geberi ere ang’e na Eloti
1Kings9:27 Hiramu agatoma abanto baye baria bamanyete emeremo ye chinyancha
1Kings9:28 Barabwo bakagenda goika Ofiri
1Kings10:1 Ekero eting’ana ya Seba aigwete chinkuma chia Sulemani igoro y’ayio akorete ase engencho y’erieta ri’Omonene
1Kings10:2 Agacha Yerusalemu amo nabasomba baye abange barenge kogenda komo; boigo nabwate chingamia chiabogoretie ebinsari ne chitahabu chinyinge mono
1Kings10:3 Sulemani akamoiraneria amaborio aye onsi; nonya ne ring’ana erimo tiriabisekanete ase omoruoti
1Kings10:4 Na ekero eting’ana eria ya Seba akoorire korora obong’aini bwonsi bwa Sulemani
1Kings10:5 na endagera yarenge korentwa ase emesa yaye
1Kings10:6 Eting’ana eria egatebia omoruoti
1Kings10:7 Korende tinegenete amang’ana ayio nare koigwa goika ekero nachicha aa na kwerorera namaiso aane inche omonyene. Bono narorire ng’a tinatebetigwe nonya nekeng’ese ki’amang’ana aya. Obong’aini bwao
1Kings10:8 Abanto bao na abasomba bao aba bagotenena botambe ase obosio bwao na obong’aini bwao
1Kings10:9 Omonene
1Kings10:10 Erio eting’ana eria akaa omoruoti ebiegwa ebio arentete: Chitahabu chikiro chilifu isano (5
1Kings10:11 Chimeeri chia Hiramu
1Kings10:12 Korwa ase chibao chi’alumugu omoruoti akaroisia ebinto bi’enyomba y’Omonene
1Kings10:13 Omoruoti Sulemani akaa eting’ana ya Seba ebinto bionsi aganetie na aboretie aegwe. Amo nebinto ebio Sulemani akamoa ebinto binde ebinge buna omoruoti anarete korua ebiegwa. Erio eting’ana eria akairana
1Kings10:14 Etahabu yare korentwa ase Sulemani kera omwaka nigo yarenge goetania chikiro chilifu emerongo ebere na isato (23
1Kings10:15 Boigo chitahabu chikarentwa korwa ase abaonchoreria b’ebinto
1Kings10:16 Omoruoti Sulemani akagoncha ching’aya amagana abere
1Kings10:17 Naende akagoncha chinguba amagana atato agachiooma ne chitahabu chisunyuntire
1Kings10:18 Omoruoti akaroisia ekerogo ki’oboruoti
1Kings10:19 Ekerogo keria ki’oboruoti nigo kiabwate ekeriinero kiarenge nebitambokero bitano na ekemo; ensemo ya nyuma ekerogo keria nigo kiamurumuntire igoro. Kera ensemo y’ekerogo mbiarengeo ebisiirero ase arenge gotoorera amaboko
1Kings10:20 Na emegwekano ye chindo ikomi na ebere yatenenirie aroro
1Kings10:21 Ebikombe bionsi bi’okonywera bi’omoruoti Sulemani nigo biarenge ebie chitahabu
1Kings10:22 Omoruoti nabwate chimeeri chiaye chia Tarisisi chiarenge goeta chinyancha amo ne chimeeri chia Hiramu. Ara rimo ase emiaka etato chimeeri chia Tarisisi nigo chiarenge gocha chiarenta chitahabu ne chifeta
1Kings10:23 Ase igo omoruoti Sulemani akaba omonene kobua abaruoti bonsi b’ense ase obonda na obong’aini.
1Kings10:24 Abanto korwa ase chinse chionsi bagacha ase Sulemani
1Kings10:25 Kera oyomo obo akaba okorenta ebiegwa biaye

1Kings10:28 Sulemani nigo arenge korenterwa chibarasi korwa Misiri na Kue; na abaonchoreria baye igo barenge gochirenta korwa agwo ase ogoakana rigori gete.

1Kings11:1 Omoruoti Sulemani nigo anchete abakungu abange b’abanto b’ebisaku bitamomanyete Nyasae. Amo nomosubati o Farao naende nigo anchete abakungu b’Abamoabu
1Kings11:2 abanto b’ebisakubiria Omonene akanetie Abaisraeli
1Kings11:3 Igo anyuomete abakungu amagana atano na abere
1Kings11:4 Ee

1Kings11:9 Omonene akaba nendamwamu ase Sulemani
1Kings11:10 naende konya amochikire ase ring’ana erio

1Kings11:27 Aya naro agerete Yeroboamu akaba mamincha y’omoruoti. Sulemani nigo aagachete Milo

1Kings13:1 Ase ogochika kw’Omonene omonto o Nyasae akarua ase ense ya Yuda. Ere agacha Beteli ekero Yeroboamu ateneine ase egesasimero gosamba ubani.

1Kings13:10 Ase ayio agaetera enchera eng’ao

1Kings13:12 Ise abamura baria akababoria “Nchera ki agenda?” Na abamura baye bakamworokia enchera omonto oria o Nyasae orwete ense ya Yuda agendete.

2Kings17:6 Ase omwaka o kianda bw’okogamba kwa Hosea
2Kings17:7 Aya igo akoregete
2Kings17:8 Boigo bakaba bakobwatia chingencho chi’abanto b’ebisaku biria Omonene aseretie korwa ase amasio abo
2Kings17:9 Abaisraeli bagakora bobisi ebinto ebibe ase Omonene
2Kings17:10 Bageteneneria chisiiro chi’ogosasima na emete y’Asera igoro ase kera ekegoro egetambe
2Kings17:11 Agwo aase aimokererete igoro bagasamba ubani buna abanto b’ebisaku biria Omonene aseretie korwa asebare baare gokora. Bagakora ebinto bi’obokayayu
2Kings17:12 bagakorera emegwekano y’ogosasimwa eyio Omonene abakanetie ng’a tibayekorera.
2Kings17:13 Omonene konya obeire ogokurera Abaisraeli na Abayuda goetera ase kera omobani
2Kings17:14 Korende tibaigwete; bagakong’ia ebigoti biabo buna chisokoro chiabo chiakorete

2Kings17:17 Barabwo bagasamba abana babo
2Kings17:18 Ase ayio Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene ase Abaisraeli na akabaseria korwa ase obosio bwaye; onde tatigarete otatiga egesaku ki’Abayuda gioka.

2Kings17:27 Erio omoruoti bw’Abaasuari agachika
2Kings17:28 Na igo oyomo bw’abakuni baria bairetwe korwa Samaria akagenda komenya agwo Beteli
2Kings17:29 Korende nonya nabo abanto ba kera egesaku bakaroisia chinyasae chiabo abanyene

2Kings17:32 Boigo bakamoiroka Omonene

2Kings17:35 Omonene agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania nabarabwo
2Kings17:36 Korende mong’iroke inche Omonene. Nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri ase okobua okonene na ase okoboko koramboire; motung’ame monsasime inche bweka na monduere ebing’wanso.

1Chronicles26:1 Aba nabwo abarendi b’ebiita: Korwa ase ororeria rwa Kora
1Chronicles26:2 Abana abamura ba Meselemia nabwo aba: Zakaria omwana oye omotangi; Yediaeli oyo o kabere; Zebadia oyo o gatato; Yatinieli oyo o kane.
1Chronicles26:3 Elamu oyo o gatano; Yehohanani oyo o gatano na rimo; Eliehoenai oyo o gatano na kabere.
1Chronicles26:4 Abana abamura b’Obedi‐Edomu nabwo aba: Semaya omwana oye omotangi; Yehosabadi oyo o kabere; Yoa oyo o gatato; Sakari oyo o kane; Netaneli oyo o gatano;
1Chronicles26:5 Amieli oyo o gatano na rimo; Isakaru oyo o gatano na kabere; Peuletai oyo o gatano na gatato. Nyasae nigo asesenetie Obedi‐Edomu.

1Chronicles26:7 Abana abamura ba Semaya nabwo aba: Otini na Refaeli

1Chronicles26:9 Abana abamura ba Meselemia amo nabanto bamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na batano
1Chronicles26:10 Abana abamura ba Hosa b’ororeria rwa Merari nabwo aba: Simuri
1Chronicles26:11 Hilikia nigo arenge oyo o kabere
1Chronicles26:12 Abanto b’ebiombe ebio bi’abarendi b’ebiita amo nabatang’ani babo nigo babegetwe gokora emeremo ase enyomba y’Omonene buna Abalawi bamwabo barenge gokora.
1Chronicles26:13 Abanto ba kera eamate
1Chronicles26:14 Obomera bokagwera Selemia ase okorenda egeita kia moocha. Naende bagaakera Zakaria
1Chronicles26:15 Obomera bokagwera Obedi‐Edomu

2Chronicles3:8 Akaroisia Aase Aachenu Mono
2Chronicles3:9 Oborito bw’emesumari ye chitahabu nigo bwarenge chisekeli emerongo etano chie chitahabu. Ebinyomba bia irongo boigo bikaoomwa netahabu.

2Chronicles3:11 Obotambe bwe chimbaba chionsi chi’abakerubi baria nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo ebere. Obotambe bw’orobaba oromo rw’omokerubi oyomo nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atano. Orwo rwaramboire rogaika enyasi y’enyomba. Na orobaba ronde rw’obotambe buna obwo rogakunana norobaba rw’omokerubi onde.

2Chronicles4:3 Ase rikere ri’egetuba keria kiarenge nobogare bw’amaboko ikomi emegwekano ye chiombe iyarengeo. Emegwekano eyio nigo yarenge ase chindwaro ibere

2Chronicles7:10 Ase rituko ri’emerongo ebere na gatato ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere agatiga abanto bakagenda ase chinka chiabo bare nomochengo na omogoko ase chinkoro chiabo

2Chronicles32:2 Ekero Hezekia aroche ng’a Senakeribu ochire oganetie korwania Yerusalemu
2Chronicles32:3 agasemania nabanene b’oboruoti bwaye
2Chronicles32:4 Abanto abange bagasangererekana
2Chronicles32:5 Erio omoruoti agachaka gokora emeremo nomokia omonene
2Chronicles32:6 Akabeka abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi igoro ase abanto
2Chronicles32:7 “Mobe abakong’u na abaremu! Timwoboa gose timoondoka ase obosio bw’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri na emeganda eyio ere amo nere. Oyore amo naintwe nigo are omonene komobua.
2Chronicles32:8 Omoruoti oria nigo are ne chinguru chia mwanyabanto
2Chronicles32:9 Nyuma y’ayio
2Chronicles32:10 “Aya naro inche Senakeribu
2Chronicles32:11 Inee! Hezekia tari kobasiria na kobatiga mokwe motari nendagera na ebinyugwa ekero akobatebia: Omonene
2Chronicles32:12 Inee! Hezekia oyo tari ere oria osaririe aase aimokererete igoro agwo ase Omonene agosasimerwa
2Chronicles32:13 Inwe timomanyeti aya inche ne chisokoro chiane twakorerete abanto bonsi be chinse chinde? Inee! Chinyasae chi’ebisaku biria nchianyarete gokonya chinse chiria na gochirusia ase okoboko kwane?
2Chronicles32:14 Nereri ase chinyasae chionsi chi’ebisaku biria chisokoro chiane chiasiretie kegima yanyarete gokonya abanto baye korwa ase okoboko kwane?
2Chronicles32:15 Ase ayio
2Chronicles32:16 Na abasomba ba Senakeribu bakamenta korama Omonene Nyasae na Hezekia
2Chronicles32:17 Senakeribu akarika rirube ri’ogochecheria Omonene
2Chronicles32:18 Abaasuri bagaaka eriogi rinene ase omonwa bw’Ekeyuda ase abanto ba Yerusalemu abarenge igoro ase orwaki ase okobagosa na koboboyia
2Chronicles32:19 Bagakwana igoro ya Nyasae o Yerusalemu
2Chronicles32:20 Korende Hezekia omoruoti na Isaya omobani
2Chronicles32:21 Erio Omonene agatoma omomalaika oye agaita abarwani esegi bonsi b’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri
2Chronicles32:22 Naboigo Omonene akorete agatooria Hezekia na abanto ba Yerusalemu korwa ase okoboko gwa Senakeribu
2Chronicles32:23 Abanto abange bakarentera Omonene ebiegwa agwo Yerusalemu
2Chronicles32:24 Ase amatuko aria Hezekia akarwara
2Chronicles32:25 Korende ekiagera Hezekia arenge omonto omoenenu ase enkoro yaye tairaneretie ng’a mbuya mono ase amaya akoreretwe
2Chronicles32:26 Hezekia agekeyia
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekia nigo abwate obotenenku obonge
2Chronicles32:28 Boigo akeagachera ebiage bie chindagera chiagesetwe
2Chronicles32:29 Akenyorera emechie emenge
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekia oyo nere oria otichete chintuboka chia rogoro chi’amache a Gihoni
2Chronicles32:31 Nonya nekero abanto batometwe nabanene ba Babeli baborie komanya igoro y’egekone giakorekanete ase ense eria
2Chronicles32:32 Bono amang’ana ande onsi Hezekia akorete
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekia akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete
2Chronicles33:1 Manase nigo arenge nemiaka ikomi na ebere
2Chronicles33:2 Agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene
2Chronicles33:3 Akaagacha naende aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa
2Chronicles33:4 Naende akaagacha ebisasimero ase enyomba y’Omonene ime
2Chronicles33:5 Akaagachera ebitongwa biria bionsi bia igoro ebisasimero agwo ase chiraaro ibere chi’enyomba y’Omonene.
2Chronicles33:6 Agakora amabe amange ase obosio bw’Omonene
2Chronicles33:7 Omogwekano oria bw’ogosasimwa abaachete akayobeka ime ase enyomba ya Nyasae
2Chronicles33:8 Onye Abaisraeli bagochia korenda na gokora onsi aya nabachigete
2Chronicles33:9 Manase akaebereria Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu bagakora amabe goetania aria abanto b’ebisaku bakorete
2Chronicles33:10 Omonene agakwana na Manase na abanto bonsi
2Chronicles33:11 Ase ayio Omonene akarenta abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi b’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri igoro yabo; barabwo bakabwata Manase nekegobanio
2Chronicles33:12 Ekero arenge ase emechando emenene
2Chronicles33:13 Ekero asabete igo
2Chronicles33:14 Nyuma y’ayio Manase akaroba orwaki rwa isiko rw’Omochie o Daudi
2Chronicles33:15 Akarusia chinyasae chingeni na emegwekano eria y’ogosasimwa korwa ase enyomba y’Omonene; boigo akarusia ebisasimero konya aagachire ase egetunwa igoro
2Chronicles33:16 Akaroisia naende egesasimero ki’Omonene gekaba ekeyia
2Chronicles33:17 Abanto bakagenderera korua ebing’wanso agwo aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa
2Chronicles33:18 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Manase
2Chronicles33:19 Amang’ana ’ogosaba kwaye
2Chronicles33:20 Manase akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere na ebere
2Chronicles33:22 Agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene
2Chronicles33:23 Ere tekeetie ase obosio bw’Omonene na koba omoitongo buna Manase akorete
2Chronicles33:24 Abasomba baye bagakora omoroberio bw’okomoita na bakamoitera ase enyomba yaye ime.
2Chronicles33:25 Korende abanto b’ense eria bagaita abanto bonsi baria bakorete omoroberio bw’ogoita Amoni omoruoti; nyuma y’ayio bakabeka Yosia
2Chronicles34:1 Yosia nigo arenge nemiaka etano na etato
2Chronicles34:2 Agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene; akabwatia chinchera chionsi chia Daudi
2Chronicles34:3 Ase omwaka o gatano na gatato bw’okogamba kwaye
2Chronicles34:4 Abanto bagatagora ebisasimero bie chinyasae chiria Baali agwo ase obosio bwaye; na Yosia agatagora na koiyeria inse ebisasimero bi’ogosambera ubani ase erioba
2Chronicles34:5 Agasambera amauga ’abakuani babo igoro ase ebisasimero biabo
2Chronicles34:6 Na ase emechie y’orogongo rwa Manase
2Chronicles34:7 agatagora ebisasimero
2Chronicles34:8 Ase omwaka o ikomi na gatano na gatato bw’okogamba kwaye
2Chronicles34:9 Bakairera Hilikia
2Chronicles34:10 Chibesa chiria chikaegwa abateneneri b’emeremo yare gokorerwa ase enyomba y’Omonene; na barabwo bagachia abanto barenge koroisia enyomba y’Omonene na koyeagacha naende.
2Chronicles34:11 Bagachia abasenia be chibao
2Chronicles34:12 Abanto abwo bagakora emeremo ase obwegenwa. Aba nabwo abateneneri babegetwe igoro asebare: Yahati na Obadia
2Chronicles34:13 Barabwo bagatenenera ababogoretie chigurube
2Chronicles34:14 Ekero barenge korenta chibesa chiria konya chiarentirwe ase enyomba y’Omonene
2Chronicles34:15 Erio Hilikia agatebia Safani omoriki
2Chronicles34:16 Safani akaira ebuku eria ase omoruoti
2Chronicles34:17 Bairire chibesa chionsi chianyorekanete ase enyomba y’Omonene
2Chronicles34:18 Erio Safani omoriki agatebia omoruoti
2Chronicles34:19 Ekero omoruoti aigwete amang’ana ’amachiko aria
2Chronicles34:20 Agachika Hilikia
2Chronicles34:21 “Genda
2Chronicles34:22 Hilikia amo nabanto omoruoti atomete bakagenda ase Hulda
2Chronicles34:23 Omokungu oria akabatebia
2Chronicles34:24 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Rora
2Chronicles34:25 Barabwo bantigire inche
2Chronicles34:26 Korende ase omoruoti bw’Abayuda
2Chronicles34:27 aye ogekanya okaba omoitongo ase obosio bwane inche Nyasae
2Chronicles34:28 Rora
2Chronicles34:29 Erio omoruoti agatoma amang’ana
2Chronicles34:30 na agatiira gochia ase enyomba y’Omonene
2Chronicles34:31 Omoruoti agatenena aase aye
2Chronicles34:32 Agachika abanto bonsi abarenge agwo Yerusalemu na aba ase orogongo rwa Benjamin babwatane nokobwatana okwo kw’ogotianania
2Chronicles34:33 Yosia akarusia okogechia gwonsi korwa ase orogongo rw’Abaisraeli
2Chronicles35:1 Nyuma y’ayio Yosia akaba okorenda Rituko Rinene ri‐Epasaka ase Omonene
2Chronicles35:2 Akabeka abakuani ase emeremo yabo na akabaseegeta bakore emeremo y’enyomba y’Omonene.
2Chronicles35:3 Agatebereria Abalawi baria barenge aborokia b’Abaisraeli
2Chronicles35:4 Inwe ebeke ang’e
2Chronicles35:5 Motenene agwo aase are aachenu buna abateneneri b’ebiombe bie chiamate chi’Abaisraeli bamino batari abakuani. Abalawi babekwe ase kera ekeombe.
2Chronicles35:6 Monyenye ching’ondi chi’Epasaka
2Chronicles35:7 Erio Yosia akaa abanto barenge agwo ching’iti chi’ebing’wanso bi’Epasaka. Akarusia korwa ase amaicho aye omonyene chimanwa chie ching’ondi
2Chronicles35:8 Abagambi abarenge amo nomoruoti bagancha koa abanto
2Chronicles35:9 Konania
2Chronicles35:10 Ekero konya okwebeka ang’e gwakorirwe
2Chronicles35:11 Bakanyenya chimanwa chie ching’ondi chi’Epasaka
2Chronicles35:12 Bagaatanana chinyama chie ching’iti chi’ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase abanto ba kera eamate
2Chronicles35:13 Bagasamba chinyama chie chimanwa chi’Epasaka ase omorero buna achikire
2Chronicles35:14 Nyuma y’ayio Abalawi bakeroiseria chinyama
2Chronicles35:15 Na abateri
2Chronicles35:16 Igo aya onsi ay’okomokorera Omonene nigo akoretwe ase rituko riria; nigo barendete Epasaka bakarua okoruegwa kw’ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase egesasimero ki’Omonene
2Chronicles35:17 Abaisraeli abarenge aroro bakarenda Epasaka ase engaki eria
2Chronicles35:18 Epasaka enga buna eyio konya tiyana korendwa ase egati y’Abaisraeli korwa amatuko a Samweli omobani. Moruoti onde bw’Abaisraeli konya tana korenda Epasaka buna eria Yosia arendete
2Chronicles35:19 Epasaka eyio enene nigo yarendetwe ase omwaka o ikomi
2Chronicles35:20 Nyuma y’ayio onsi
2Chronicles35:21 Omoruoti o Misiri agatoma abanto ase Yosia
2Chronicles35:22 Korende Yosia tanchete koonchoka korwa ase Neko. Agekona ase ogwetuba ng’a tamanyekana
2Chronicles35:23 Abarwani baria bakabwata amata
2Chronicles35:24 Abasomba baye bakamobeka ase egari yaye ende
2Chronicles35:25 Yeremia akaroisia ogotera kw’amagombo igoro ya Yosia
2Chronicles35:26 Bono amang’ana ande onsi ay’ogokora kwa Yosia
2Chronicles35:27 na ogokora kwaye kwe ritang’ani goika okw’omoerio nigo korikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli na ab’Abayuda.

2Chronicles36:6 Nebukadinesaro

2Chronicles36:11 Zedekia nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere nomo

Ezra3:6 Abanto bagachaka korua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase Omonene ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere
Ezra3:7 Abanto bakarua chibesa
Ezra3:8 Ase omotienyi o kabere

Ezra3:11 Bakaba bagotera na goitabererania
Ezra3:12 Abange ase abakuani
Ezra3:13 Abanto tibanyarete gwatanana amariogi ’omogoko are goakwa korwa ase aria ay’okorera. Nigo baagete amariogi amanene mono akaigweka gochia aare mono.
Ezra4:1 Bono ekero ababisa b’Abayuda
Ezra4:2 bakagenda ase Serubabeli
Ezra4:3 Korende Serubabeli
Ezra4:4 Erio abanto b’ense eria bagaita Abayuda emioyo
Ezra4:5 Abanto abwo bakarenta abasemia baare goakanerwa
Ezra4:6 Ase omochakano bw’okogamba kw’Ahaswero
Ezra4:7 Naende ase amatuko ’okogamba kw’Aritasasita
Ezra4:8 Boigo Rehumu
Ezra4:9 Erio Rehemu
Ezra4:10 na abanto b’ebisaku binde biria Osinapari
Ezra4:11 Aya naro amang’ana e rirube riria riarigetwe: “Ase Aritasasita omoruoti. Intwe abasomba bao aba tomenyete aiga bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati
Ezra4:12 “Aye omoruoti
Ezra4:13 Aye omoruoti
Ezra4:14 Na ekiagera intwe tokonyora omonyo oito korwa ase enyomba yao
Ezra4:15 erinde obotuki bokorwe ase chibuku aase amang’ana e chisokoro chiao arikire. Nonyore korwa ase amang’ana arigetwe ase chibuku chiria ng’a omochie oyo noyo bw’obobe na ogotaigwera
Ezra4:16 Intwe nigo togokomanyia
Ezra4:17 Omoruoti agatoma amairanerio aya: “Ase Rehemu
Ezra4:18 “Rirube mwatoma gocha asetore riasomirwe buya asende
Ezra4:19 Nachika
Ezra4:20 Abaruoti barenge nokobua babeire bakogambera Yerusalemu na orogongo rwonsi rore bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati
Ezra4:21 Ase ayio inwe karue ogochika ng’a abanto abwo batangwe batige gokora emeremo
Ezra4:22 Timobaisa gotebana ase amang’ana aya. Nase ki inche omoruoti ndanyore emechando?”
Ezra4:23 Erio ekero rirube ri’omoruoti Aritasasita riasometwe ase Rehumu
Ezra4:24 Bono emeremo yare gokorwa ase enyomba ya Nyasae agwo Yerusalemu egasiekwa kegima na ekaba egendererete gosiekwa goika omwaka o kabere bw’okogamba kwa Dario
Ezra5:1 Bono ekaba ng’a ase erieta ria Nyasae
Ezra5:2 Erio Serubabeli
Ezra5:3 Ase engaki eyio Tatenai
Ezra5:4 Naende bakaboria iga
Ezra5:5 Korende eriso ria Nyasae obo nigo riarenge ririgereretie abagaaka b’Abayahudi
Ezra5:6 Ase igo Tatenai
Ezra5:7 Bakamotomera amang’ana arikire iga: “Ase Dario omoruoti
Ezra5:8 “Nigo togokomanyia aye omoruoti ng’a intwe ntwagenda ase orogongo orwo rw’Abayuda
Ezra5:9 “Agwo ntwakwana nabagaaka baria
Ezra5:10 Naende ntwababoria amarieta abo
Ezra5:11 “Amang’ana aya naro batotebia: Intwe nigo tore abasomba ba Nyasae o igoro na ense
Ezra5:12 Korende ekiagera chisokoro chiaito chiagerete Nyasae o igoro akaba nendamwamu
Ezra5:13 Korende ase omwaka bwe ritang’ani bw’okogamba gwa Koresi
Ezra5:14 Na ebikorero bi’enyomba ya Nyasae biaroisirie korwa ase chitahabu ne chifeta
Ezra5:15 akamotebia ng’a arente ebikorero ebio
Ezra5:16 Bono Sesibasari nere ochagete kobeka oboroso bw’enyomba ya Nyasae ere aiga Yerusalemu

Ezra6:1 Omoruoti Dario agachika
Ezra6:2 Na agwo Ekibatana

Ezra6:4 Amagena aagachwe ase chindwaro isato

Ezra6:6 Ase ayio Dario akarika rirube iga: “Bono aye Tatenai
Ezra6:7 Inwe tiga emeremo egokorwa ase enyomba eyio ya Nyasae egenderere; tiga omogavuna bw’Abayahudi
Ezra6:8 Amo nayio nachikire amang’ana morakorere abagaaka abwo b’Abayahudi ase okoagacha enyomba eyio ya Nyasae naende. Emeremo yonsi nigo eraakanerwe korwa ase chibesa chi’ekungo y’oboruoti
Ezra6:9 Na kende gionsi abakuani bare agwo Yerusalemu baraganie baegwe. Kera rituko nigo baraegwe chieri chinsae
Ezra6:10 Igo mbanyare komoruera Nyasae o igoro ebing’wanso bikomogwenera
Ezra6:11 Boigo nachikire ng’a
Ezra6:12 Tiga Nyasae
Ezra6:13 Bono Tatenai
Ezra6:14 Abagaaka b’Abayahudi bakagenderera koagacha na konyora ogosesenigwa goetera ase obobani bwa Hagai na Zakaria bw’ororeria rwa Ido. Igo abanto bagakoora emeremo y’oboagacho obwo buna bachigetwe na Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli
Ezra6:15 Enyomba eria ekaagachwa ekaera ase rituko ria gatato ri’omotienyi okorokwa Adari
Ezra6:16 Bono Abaisraeli: abakuani
Ezra6:17 Na ase ogwatanana enyomba eye na koyechena
Ezra6:18 Boigo bakabeka abakuani ase ebiombe biabo
Ezra6:19 Ase rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani
Ezra6:20 Abakuani na Abalawi konya bechenire; bono bonsi nigo barenge abachenegete. Ase ayio bakanyenya chimanwa chiria chie ching’ondi chi’Epasaka ase engencho y’abwo bonsi bairanete korwa ase obosomba
Ezra6:21 Chinyama chie chimanwa chiria nigo chiarietwe n’Abaisraeli baria bairanete korwa ase obosomba
Ezra6:22 Ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere bakaba barendete Rituko riria Rinene ri’Emegati etabekiri memera bare nomogoko. Omonene nigo abarenterete omogoko oyio ase okoonchora enkoro y’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri

Esther3:1 Nyuma y’amang’ana ayio
Esther3:2 Omoruoti akarua ogochika ng’a abasomba baye bonsi barenge kobeera ase egeita kiaye batung’ame bosio bwa Hamani ase okomosasima. Bonsi bagakora bo

Esther3:4 Bakaba bagokwana nere rituko ase rituko ng’a aigwere ogochika koria
Esther3:5 Hamani akaba nendamwamu enene mono ekero aroche ng’a Moredekai tarenge gotung’ama ase okomosasima.
Esther3:6 Ekero Hamani amanyete ng’a Moredekai n’Omoyahudi orenge
Esther3:7 Ase omwaka o ikomi na kabere bw’okogamba kw’omoruoti Ahaswero

Esther3:11 akamotebia
Esther3:12 Ase ayio

Esther3:14 Amang’ana ’amarube ayio achikirwe airwe isiko ase chingongo chionsi ase obogambi boria korareria abanto bonsi bebeke ang’e goika rituko riria riike.

Job9:1 Erio Ayubu akairaneria
Job9:2 “Ekeene

Job9:6 Nigo agotengechia ense yarwa aase aye
Job9:7 Nigo agochika erioba tirigosoka; ne ching’enang’eni ochibeka ekemanyererio.
Job9:8 Nere bweka oramborete igoro chionsi
Job9:9 Nyasae nere otongete egetuse gie ching’enang’eni gekorokwa Edubu. Na ekende gekorokwa Orioni
Job9:10 Nigo agokora amang’ana amanene aetanetie obomanyi bwonsi
Job9:11 “Rora! Ere nigo akong’ika ang’e oeta
Job9:12 Ere nigo akoira eki aganetie. Ning’o oranyare komotanga? Ning’o oranyare komoboria ng’a ninki ekio agokora?
Job9:13 Nyasae tari gotigeria endamwamu yaye
Job9:14 Naki rende ndakore imanye gochora amang’ana agwenerete
Job9:15 Nonya inche nare koba tindi nokomocha
Job9:16 Onye narenge komorangeria
Job9:17 Ere ong’akire nomwaga ore nomoubera
Job9:18 Tang’eti ribaga nkoeyanera
Job9:19 Onye namang’ana e chinguru
Job9:20 Nonya nare koba omonyaboronge
Job9:21 Inche tindi na komocha. Tingochandekera obogima bwane; tinkobara obogima bwane ng’a negento.
Job9:22 Mang’ana taiyo. Ase ayio nigo ngoteba: Ere nigo agosiria omonyaboronge na omokori amabe amo.
Job9:23 Ekero ebiku bikorenta amakweri a mobosokano
Job9:24 Ense nigo ebekire inse y’amaboko ’abakori amabe
Job9:25 “Amatuko aane nigo agoeta bwango kobua omominyoki okominyoka; nigo akoera bwango
Job9:26 Ee
Job9:27 Inse goteba ng’a nyebe ogwechanda kwane
Job9:28 nigo ndabe nobwoba igoro y’emechando yane yonsi
Job9:29 Inche goika mbarwe ng’a nomokori amabe inde. Nase ki rende ngwechanda nemeremo ere bosa?
Job9:30 Ninsa gwesibia namache arabete buna amagena ’embura
Job9:31 nigo orantugute ime ase engoro
Job9:32 Nyasae tari omonto buna inche
Job9:33 Monto onde tari orabe omogayani oito
Job9:34 Tiga ere arusie enyimbo yaye korwa asende; okogosa kwaye tikobaisa kong’ondokia.
Job9:35 Erio inyare gokwana ntari nobwoba ase engencho yaye
Job10:1 “Omoyo one ogechire obogima bwane; nimbe nobosibore gokwana na kwemurungania
Job10:2 Ninkwane
Job10:3 Inee! Nigo ogokirie ase ogonchanda na gochaya emeremo y’amaboko ao
Job10:4 Inee! Amaiso ao naya mwanyabanto are? Gose nigo okorora buna mwanyabanto akorora?
Job10:5 Inee! Amatuko ao nabo ang’ana buna aya mwanyabanto
Job10:6 goika okona‐gotuka okomocha kwane na korigia ebibe biane?
Job10:7 Nonya nabo nomanyete ng’a inche tindi nokomocha
Job10:8 “Amaboko ao naro ambombete
Job10:9 Inyora ng’a naye kwambombete buna esike. Inee! Nigo okong’irania imbe orotu naende?
Job10:10 Inee! Tari aye kwang’umorete buna amabeere
Job10:11 Aye okaboyia omobere one risankwa okayobekera chinyama
Job10:12 Aye kwang’eire obogima na konyorokia obwanchani bwao botari koera; na oborendi bwao nigo borendete omoika one.
Job10:13 Nonya nabo nigo obisete amang’ana ayio ase enkoro yao
Job10:14 Inse gokora ebibe
Job10:15 Obobe nobwane onye inde omokori amabe; na onye inde omonyaboronge tinkonyara gwetogia; nigo ing’ichire nobosooku
Job10:16 Kondaimokererie omotwe one igoro
Job10:17 Aye nigo okomenta oborori bwao igoro yane
Job10:18 “Nase ki kwandusetie ase enda ya baba? Naki anga yare koba buya onye nakwete ekero monto onde atarandora
Job10:19 imbe buna tinarengeo
Job10:20 Inee! Amatuko ’obogima bwane tari amake? Intige
Job10:21 ekero ntaragenda aase ntanyare koirana korwao rinde
Job10:22 ense emwamu ti buna omosunte ekerima; naende ey’ekiriri ki’amakweri na obotantanu
Job11:1 Erio Sofari Omonaama agakwana
Job11:2 “Inee! Amang’ana aya amange natigwe tairanerigwa? Na omonto obwate amang’ana amange buna iga nabarerwe oboronge?
Job11:3 Inee! Amang’ana ao atari nengencho nagere abanto bakire‐kiri? Na ekero ogokwana amang’ana ay’ogochecheria
Job11:4 Aye nigo ogoteba ng’a amang’ana ogokwana nay’ekeene
Job11:5 Korende onye ndiria Nyasae are gokwana na akoorokie buna ore
Job11:6 erinde akomaanorere orore obobisi bw’obong’aini! Ere nigo abwate obomanyi botari korengeka. Ase ayio manya ng’a nigo akoeire egesusuro egeke
Job11:7 “Inee! Nonyare komanya ebinto bia Nyasae bibisekanete? Nonyare komanya oboikeranu bw’Omonguru?
Job11:8 Onye bore obonene gochia igoro
Job11:9 Obotambe bwaye nigo boetanetie obw’ense
Job11:10 Karaete asibe abanto
Job11:11 Ere nigo amanyete abanto batagwenereti. Ekero akorora amabe agokorwa
Job11:12 Onye omoriri okonyara koba omong’aini
Job11:13 “Oise kwebeka ang’e ase enkoro yao gokora amaronge
Job11:14 onye kogotuguta ebibe bire ase amaboko ao
Job11:15 amaene
Job11:16 Nigo orebe emechando yao
Job11:17 Na obogima bwao nigo borarabe se kobua erioba ria mobaso gati; omosunte oye nigo oraonchoke obe buna ekero bogokia mambia.
Job11:18 Aye nomenye kore noboremu
Job11:19 Ekero okorara
Job11:20 Korende abakori amabe mbabe bakouna‐una ase omosunte
Job12:1 Erio Ayubu akairaneria
Job12:2 “Ekeene
Job12:3 Korende nainche nabo inde nokomanya buna inwe
Job12:4 Abasani baane nigo bagonchecheria
Job12:5 Omonto otari na mechando ende
Job12:6 Chinka chi’abauri nigo chigendererete koba nomorembe
Job12:7 “Bono boria ching’iti
Job12:8 gose kwana ne riroba
Job12:9 Ning’o otamanyeti amang’ana aya onsi ng’a okoboko kw’Omonene nakwo gwakorire aya?
Job12:10 Obogima bwa kera egetongwa kere moyo na omoika o mwanyabanto
Job12:11 Inee! Amang’ana ogoto gokoigwa
Job12:12 “Obong’aini nigo bore ase abanto abanene
Job12:13 Nyasae nigo are nobong’aini na okobua
Job12:14 Ere aise gotagora
Job12:15 Aise gotanga amache
Job12:16 “Chinguru na obong’aini nigo bikorwa asare. Abwo bakong’aineka na abakong’ainereria nigo bare ase okoboko kwaye.
Job12:17 Omonene nigo akoombogania abare abasemia obatiga getirianda
Job12:18 Nigo agosibora chinkini chi’abaruoti
Job12:19 Ere nigo akoombogania abakuani
Job12:20 Abanto abwo basemeirie nigo akobaura amang’ana bagokwana
Job12:21 Omonene nigo akorentera abagambi ogochaywa
Job12:22 Ere nigo akoorokia obobisi ase omosunte
Job12:23 Nigo agokinia ebisaku
Job12:24 Ere nigo akorusia obong’aini ase abatang’ani b’abanto bare ase ense
Job12:25 Abanto abwo nigo bagotaba‐taba ase omosunte borabu botaiyo
Job13:1 “Naama! Amang’ana aya onsi nayarorire neriso riane
Job13:2 Aya momanyete
Job13:3 Korende nigo nganetie nkwane n’Omonguru; mbeke amang’ana aane ase Nyasae
Job13:4 Korende inwe nabatongi oborimo
Job13:5 Onye ndiria mware gokira‐kiri! Okwo nanga nigo kwaba obong’aini bwaino.
Job13:6 “Bono tegerera moigwe amang’ana ngwekwanera
Job13:7 Inee! Inwe nigo mokorwanerera Nyasae ase ogokwana aya atari a boronge? Naende mokomorwanerera ase obong’ainereria?
Job13:8 Inee! Inwe nigo more nogwanchereria asare? Nigo moganetie korwanerera Nyasae?
Job13:9 Inee! Amang’ana nabe amaya asemore Omonene karabarenge abamanye buna more? Gose mokagete ng’a nigo moramong’aine buna abanto bakong’ainana?
Job13:10 Onye mogokora ogwanchereria ekero more ase obobisi
Job13:11 Inee! Obonene bwaye tibokoboboyia
Job13:12 Emereng’anio y’obong’aini bwaino nigo ere bosa buna ribu
Job13:13 Inwe kira‐kiri
Job13:14 “Nase ki ndabeke enyama y’omobere one ase amaino aane? Ting’egereti obogima bwane.
Job13:15 Omonene naisa kong’ita
Job13:16 Ayio nabe ogotooreka kwane ng’a omonto otamoirogeti Nyasae tagocha ase obosio bwaye.
Job13:17 Tegerera onyigwe
Job13:18 Rora
Job13:19 “Nyasae
Job13:20 Bono nigo ngokoboria onkorere ebinto bibere
Job13:21 Rusia okoboko kwao korwa asende
Job13:22 “Erio aye ondangerie
Job13:23 Amamocho aane
Job13:24 “Nase ki okobisa obosio bwao na kombara ng’a nomobisa oo inde?
Job13:25 Inee! Nigo orasegenyie rito eriomo rikona‐koirwa nembeo? Gose aye nigo ogochia gotunya omoiriro korwa nyuma?
Job13:26 “Ekiagera gwanchikeire amang’ana ’obororo
Job13:27 Aye gwasoirie amagoro aane ase rikorogoto
Job13:28 Omonto nigo agosira oruao buna egento ekegundo
Job14:1 “Mwanyabanto okoiborwa nomokungu

Job14:4 Ning’o oranyare korenta egento gechenegete korwa ase egetachenegeti? Onde taiyo

Job14:6 Tiga komorigereria

Job15:1 Erio Elifasi Omotemani akairaneria
Job15:2 “Inee! Omonto omong’aini nagwenerete airanerie amang’ana are buna omwaga okogusa
Job15:3 Inee! Nemogwenerete koamererania ne chinkwana chitari nengencho
Job15:4 Aye nigo ogosiria okomoiroka Nyasae
Job15:5 Ebibe biao biorokereirie omonwa oo amang’ana ogokwana
Job15:6 Tari inche ngokonachera ekina
Job15:7 “Inee! Naye ore omonto bwe ritang’ani koiborwa? Gose naye gwatongetwe ritang’ani ebitunwa bitarabao?
Job15:8 Inee! Kwana koigwa emeroberio y’obobisi bwa Nyasae? Aye nigo kwenyoreire obong’aini aye bweka?
Job15:9 Inee! Aye ninki omanyete intwe totamanyeti? Mbong’aini ki omanyete intwe totamanyeti?
Job15:10 Abanto bamerire chimbuche amo nabakoorire emiaka emenge nao bare aa amo naintwe
Job15:11 “Inee! Okoremia koria Nyasae akoeire tikogoisaini? Gose ring’ana ri’oboitongo agokwana naye nigo rire bosa asore?
Job15:12 Nase ki enkoro yao ere morero
Job15:13 goika omoyo oo obeire mamincha ya Nyasae
Job15:14 Inee! Mwanyabanto ninki are goika anyare koba oyochenegete? Gose ere oyio oiboire nomokungu ng’a anyare koba omonyaboronge?
Job15:15 Rora
Job15:16 Onye nabo
Job15:17 “Integerera oigwe
Job15:18 Ayio abanto abang’aini batebetigwe ne chisokoro chiabo
Job15:19 Barabwo bakaegwa ense eria
Job15:20 “Omokori amabe nigo akogenderera gochandeka nobororo ase amatuko aye onsi
Job15:21 Amariogi ay’okwoboyia nigo agosoa ase amato aye; na ekero are nobotoereru
Job15:22 Ere tari koba nogosemeria ng’a gose narue ase omosunte naende
Job15:23 Omonto oyio nigo akoba okoombogana korigia endagera
Job15:24 Emechando na obwoba nigo bikomoondokia. Ebio nigo bikomorwania na komobua
Job15:25 “Ere oramboire okoboko kwaye mamincha ya Nyasae
Job15:26 Oyio nigo akobogoria ching’aya chiaye chikumbire
Job15:27 Nigo atubire obosio bwaye namaguta ’obonoru
Job15:28 “Oyio obeire omenyete ase emechie yasaretigwe agwo ase chinyomba chitamenyiri nonde
Job15:29 Omonto oyio takoba omonda
Job15:30 Tagotooreka korwa ase omosunte; omorero mbwomie emeseboka egoseboka
Job15:31 Tabaisa kweng’aina ase ogosemeria amang’ana a bosa
Job15:32 Naakanwe obosa obwo ritang’ani engaki yaye etaraika
Job15:33 Oyio nigo arabe buna omosabibu okoarora amasabibu ataratoba
Job15:34 Ebiombe bi’abatamoirogete Nyasae nigo biragombae
Job15:35 Abanto abwo nigo bakoroberia amabe

Job16:4 Onye ndiria obogima bwaino bware koba ribaga ri’obwane
Job16:5 Amang’ana nare ngokwana korwa ase omonwa one
Job16:6 Ninsa koba ngokwana
Job16:7 Ekeene
Job16:8 Ere okorire omobere one obeire nemenia
Job16:9 “Omonene obeire nendamwamu asende

Job16:11 Nyasae ondure ase abanto batamoirogeti
Job16:12 Inche nigo narenge inde nobotoereru
Job16:13 Abaruti emegwe baye bang’etananire aande onsi
Job16:14 Ong’akire amaakwa igoro ase amaakwa ande; nigo akondindokera buna omorwani esegi ore ne chinguru.

Job17:2 Ekeene

Job17:4 Aye gwasiekire ebirengererio biabo tibiba nokomanya
Job17:5 Omonto ogosigaana abasani ase okwenyorera chinibo chiabo
Job17:6 Omonene onkorire nabeire ring’ana abanto bakorabaara
Job17:7 Emechando yagerire amaiso aane abeire orotutu
Job17:8 Abanto abaronge bakumirie amang’ana aya
Job17:9 Korende omonyene oboronge nabwaterere enchera yaye
Job17:10 Korende inwe mwensi
Job17:11 Amatuko aane aetire

Job17:13 Nonya inde nogosemeria

Job17:16 Ogosemeria okwo nigo koragende gochia aase abakure. Nintirimboke amo nakorokwo gochia gotimoka ase riroba ime.”

Job18:4 Inee! Aye nigo ogwetandora ase engencho y’endamwamu yao
Job18:5 “Amaene
Job18:6 Oborabu bore ase obomenyo bwaye nigo borabe omosunte

Job18:8 Amagoro aye nabwatwe noboreba
Job18:9 Oboreba mbomobwate ase egetingiro na omoeto nomobwate omong’userere bokong’u.

Job19:2 “Inee! Ngoika ririri morabe mokogechia omoyo one na mogonsenyenta namang’ana aino?

Job19:4 Ee
Job19:5 Inwe onye mogwetogia ng’a nabaya more kombua na kong’enekeria igo kobwatekana nogochaywa kwane
Job19:6 rirorio momanye ng’a Nyasae orentire amabe aya asende
Job19:7 Rora
Job19:8 Nyasae oagachire orwaki aase ngoeta
Job19:9 Ong’urire obonene bwane. Orusirie egutwa korwa ase omotwe one.
Job19:10 Korwa ase chinsemo chionsi ong’iyeirie
Job19:11 Obeire nekeririanda ekenene asende
Job19:12 Ebiombe bi’abarwani baye b’esegi nigo bigocha bire amo
Job19:13 “Nyasae ogerire abaminto bantigire
Job19:14 Abanto baminto bantigire
Job19:15 Abanto bamenyete mwane banyebire; na abasomba baane abaiseke bambarire buna omoeti; nabeire omomenyi ase amaiso abo.
Job19:16 Ekero nkorangeria omosomba one
Job19:17 Omoika okorwa ase omonwa one nigo ogotiokera omokungu one bobe; nigo inde okogechia ase abamura baminto torwete enda eyemo.
Job19:18 Nonya nabana abake banchayire; ekero ngotenena nigo bagonkwana bobe.
Job19:19 Abasani abagisangio banyinyerire na kogechigwa nainche; nabwo nanchete bang’onchokeire na gonkora bobe.
Job19:20 Amauga ’omobere one atongororire ase risankwa ne chinyama
Job19:21 Inwe abasani baane
Job19:22 Nase ki nainwe mogonchanda buna Nyasae anchandire? Inee! Timoisanegeti ase ogonchanda omobere one?
Job19:23 “Naki yare koba buya onye amang’ana aane narikwa bono! Yare koba buya arikwe ase ebuku

Job19:26 Nyuma risankwa ri’omobere one korirabe riasarekire
Job19:27 Nimwerorere inche omonyene; amaiso aane namorigererie
Job19:28 Moise goteba: Nase nchera ki tokomochanda? Nigo mokorengereria ng’a ninche nagerire amabe onsi anyorire?
Job19:29 Inwe iroka ogoitwa nomoro

Job20:5 omochengo bw’abakori amabe noyo bw’engaki enke

Job20:9 Eriso riarenge komorora

Job20:23 Nebe ng’a ekero aisire koigota
Job20:24 Nabe ogotama korwa ase ekerwanero gi’ekioma
Job20:25 Ensara eyio eng’uswe korwa ase omobere oye
