Job21:1 Bono Ayubu akairaneria
Job21:2 “Tegerera mono moigwe amang’ana aane
Job21:3 Remereria
Job21:4 “Inee! Inche mwanyabanto nkwemurunganeria? Nase ki rende ndaremererie tinyemurungania?
Job21:5 Indigererie na moichanigwe; erio motube emenwa yaino namaboko
Job21:6 Ekero nkoinyora amang’ana aya
Job21:7 “Nase ki abakori amabe bakogenderera koba moyo na kwegotera bare ne chinguru na okobua?
Job21:8 Abana babo nigo bakoba nokogenderera okuya amo nabarabwo
Job21:9 Chinka chiabo nigo chire buya
Job21:10 Chiombe chiabo nigo chikonyora amarieme buya
Job21:11 Abana babo nigo bagotomwa isiko banga buna amaicho
Job21:12 Nigo bagotera bakobugia chinchigiri na amakano
Job21:13 Nigo bakogenderera kwegokia nobotenenku bwabo; bakwa bagenda aase abakure bare nomorembe.
Job21:14 “Abwo nigo bagotebia Nyasae: Karue aa asetore! Titoganeti komanya chinchera chiao.
Job21:15 Oria Omonguru ninki are goika tomokorere? Mbitoki ki toranyore ase okomosaba?
Job21:16 Rora
Job21:17 “Inee! Ng’ara karenga chitaya chi’abakori amabe chikorimigwa? Ng’ara karenga emechando ekobachera? Inee! Nyasae nkobaa are emechando ase engencho y’endamwamu yaye?
Job21:18 Gose barabwo nkoirurukigwa bare buna chimboba
Job21:19 “Inwe nigo mogoteba ng’a Nyasae nigo akogachera abana ebibe bi’abaise. Tiga Omonene aakane abanto abanyene ebibe biabo
Job21:20 Tiga barore ogosirigwa kwabo namaiso abo
Job21:21 Ekero emetienyi yabo yaerire na bakure
Job21:22 Onde nare oranyare kworokereria Nyasae obong’aini
Job21:23 “Omonto oyomo nigo agokwa ore nobotenenku obonge
Job21:24 ebirandi biaye biichire namabeere
Job21:25 Omonto onde igo agokwa ore nobororo bw’omoyo oye
Job21:26 Abwo bonsi nigo bakobekwa ase riroba bareng’anetie
Job21:27 “Rora
Job21:28 Inwe nigo mokoboria: Ng’ai enyomba y’omochandi oria ere? Naende: Ng’ai obomenyo bw’abakori amabe bore?
Job21:29 “Inee! Inwe timori koboria abaeti chinchera
Job21:30 ng’a omokori amabe nigo akorendwa ekero emechando yachire
Job21:31 Ning’o oranyare koorokeria omokori amabe chinchera chiaye? Ning’o oramoakane amabe ayio akorire?
Job21:32 Ekero arabekwe ase oboina
Job21:33 Amaroba e rigoko nabe amansu asare; abanto bonsi mbamotunyane korwa nyuma
Job21:34 “Nase ki rende mokondemia namang’ana a bosa? Ayatigaire ase amairanerio aino nigo are oborimo bwoka.”
Job22:1 Erio Elifasi Omotemani akairaneria
Job22:2 “Inee! Nenyarekane ng’a omonto abe nengencho ase Nyasae? Ekeene
Job22:3 Inee! Omogoko onde nore ase Omonguru ng’a nomonyaboronge ore? Gose inki aranyore onye aye kogokora chinchera chiao chibe ching’ikeranu?
Job22:4 Inee! Nigo okagete ng’a nekiagera omoirogete
Job22:5 Inee! Amabe gwakorire tari amanene? Ekeene
Job22:6 Aye kwairire bosa ebinto abamino baruete bibe ntenenera
Job22:7 Oyo konya orosire tomoeti amache anywe
Job22:8 Omonto obwate okobua nigo akoira ense yaba eyaye
Job22:9 Aye kwabeire kogoseria ababoraka bare namaboko amasa na kobuna amaboko e chintakana.
Job22:10 Ase ayio emeeto yagoetananire
Job22:11 Oborabu bwao bwabekirwe omosunte
Job22:12 “Inee! Nyasae tari aaria igoro mono? Rigereria ching’enang’eni chia igoro buna chire aare mono!
Job22:13 Ase engencho eyio aye nigo ogoteba: Inki Nyasae amanyete? Nanyare konacha ekina goetera ase omosunte ekerima?
Job22:14 Amare amarito nigo amotubete
Job22:15 “Inee! Nenchera enkoro ogochia kobwatia
Job22:16 Abwo nigo bataboretigwe engaki yabo konya etaraika; na oboroso bwabo bokairwa buna omogoko okoira.
Job22:17 Barabwo nigo batebetie Nyasae: Karue asetore! Naende bakabora: Inee! Ngento ki Omonguru oyio aratokorere?
Job22:18 Nonya naboigo Nyasae konya oichoirie chinyomba chiabo nebinto ebiya. Ogosemia kw’abakori amabe tiga kobe aare nainche.
Job22:19 Ekero abanyaboronge bakorora ayio
Job22:20 bateba: Amaene
Job22:21 “Obwatane na Nyasae
Job22:22 Ancha amorokererio akorwa ase omonwa oye; gacha amang’ana aye ime ase enkoro yao.
Job22:23 Korairanere Omonguru
Job22:24 Otugute chitahabu chiao ime ase amaroba
Job22:25 erinde Omonguru bweka abe etahabu yao
Job22:26 Rirorio nobe gokwegokia ase Omonguru oria
Job22:27 Na ekero orabe gokomosaba
Job22:28 Erio ekero orabe gokoroberia gokora gento kende gionsi
Job22:29 Nyasae nigo agokeyia abaenenu
Job22:30 Ere nigo agotooria omonto ore nokomocha
Job23:1 Ayubu akairaneria
Job23:2 “Nonya ngoika rero okwemurungania kwane nigo kore okororo se; ogoakwa kwane nigo kore okorito kobua okweng’ereria kwane.
Job23:3 Onye ndiria nare komanya aase ndamonyore
Job23:4 Nigo narenge komotebia amang’ana aane
Job23:5 Igo nigo nare komanya eki akong’iraneria
Job23:6 Inee! Nyasae nkoamererania arenge nainche ase okobua kwaye kore okonene? Yaya
Job23:7 Agwo omonto omonyaboronge nigo are konyara koamererania nere
Job23:8 “Rora
Job23:9 Nigo nkomorigeria ensemo y’okobee
Job23:10 Korende ere namanyete chinchera chiane ngoetera. Ekero arakoore gonteema
Job23:11 Inche natachire bokong’u ase amabarato aye
Job23:12 Tinana gotiga kobwata amachiko akwanete; nimbwatetie amang’ana ere akwanete
Job23:13 “Korende ere tari koonchoka
Job23:14 Aya achikire igoro yane
Job23:15 Ase ayio nabeire nobwoba koba ase obosio bwaye
Job23:16 Nyasae ogoyirie omoyo one
Job23:17 ere tantigete ase omosunte nsire
Job24:1 “Nase ki Omonguru atabegeti chingaki chi’ekina? Naende nase ki baria bamwanchete batararora rituko riria riaye?
Job24:2 “Abanto nigo bagotigeria chimbebe
Job24:3 Abwo nigo bakoira chitigere chie chintakana
Job24:4 Nigo bagotwoma abaremeire korwa inchera
Job24:5 “Rora
Job24:6 Nigo bakogesera omonto onde chindagera chie chitugo chiaye
Job24:7 Nigo bakorara gesobono ase obotuko bwonsi
Job24:8 Emebere yabo nigo enyiete nembura egotwa ase ebitunwa
Job24:9 “Abande nigo bagotaboria chintakana korwa ase chimbeere chi’abang’ina
Job24:10 Abataka baria bakona‐koong’anya bare getirianda
Job24:11 Nigo bakomitera abakori amabe amaguta ’amazeituni
Job24:12 Abanto bachandegete ase omochie nigo bakweumia
Job24:13 “Abanto bande bangire oborabu
Job24:14 Omoiti nigo akoboa mambia chuni ng’a aite abataka na abachandegete
Job24:15 Eriso ri’omotomani nigo rikoganya kobwairire
Job24:16 Omosunte gosoire
Job24:17 Omosunte ekerima nigo onga buna emambia asebare; barabwo nigo bare abasani b’okwoboyia kw’omosunte.
Job24:18 “Inwe nigo mogoteba: Omokori amabe nigo akoirwa bwango ne chiooro
Job24:19 Buna koreng’ana egurugura ne riberera bigokoora amache ’amagena ’embura
Job24:20 Chinda chi’abaiborete nchibebe pi; amakonde nabarie baere
Job24:21 Omokori amabe nigo akoibera omokungu omogomba; gose tari gokorera omoboraka amaya.
Job24:22 Nonya naboigo Nyasae ase okobua kwaye nigo akoa omokori amabe chinguru; ekero erusirie moyo
Job24:23 Nabo Nyasae akomorenda buya na komokonya
Job24:24 Ase engaki enke nabo abakori amabe bagokinigwa
Job24:25 Onye amang’ana ayio tari bo
Job25:1 Bilidadi Omosua akairaneria
Job25:2 “Obonene na okoirokia nigo bire ase Nyasae
Job25:3 Inee! Ning’o oranyare kobara emeganda yaye? Ning’o omobaso oye otari kobarera?
Job25:4 Naki rende omonto aranyare koba omonyaboronge ase obosio bwa Nyasae? Naki omonto oiboire nomokungu aranyare koba oyochenegete?
Job25:5 Rora
Job25:6 Onye nabo
Job26:1 Erio Ayubu akairaneria
Job26:2 “Naki ere buya aye gwakonyire omonto otari nokobua! Ee
Job26:3 Naki ere buya gwasemirie omonto otari nobong’aini
Job26:4 Nase chinguru chia ng’o gwakwanire amang’ana buna aya? Na ngoetera ase omoika o ng’o kwayakwanire?
Job26:5 “Emeika y’abanto bakwete nigo ekoiguswa; boigo namache na ebimenyete imeo.
Job26:6 Aase ’abakure nigo aasie ase obosio bwa Nyasae; ee
Job26:7 Nyasae nigo aramborete ensemo ya sugusu aase arenge bosa
Job26:8 Ere nigo aochanetie amache amo
Job26:9 Nigo atubete ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene
Job26:10 Ong’ororirie ekeringerera kere orobebe rw’amache ase ogwatanana oborabu korwa ase omosunte.
Job26:11 Chisiiro chia igoro nigo chigotengecha
Job26:12 Ere ase okobua kwaye nigo agoturubania enyancha
Job26:13 Nyasae nigo akoeyana
Job26:14 Naama! Echi nechinsinyo chie chinchera chiaye
Job27:1 Ayubu akagenderera gokwana emerabaaro yaye akabora:
Job27:2 “Ekeene
Job27:3 naende omoika bw’obomoyo ogendererete koba ime yane
Job27:4 omonwa one togokwana aya atari a boronge
Job27:5 Abe aare korwa asende kobabara ng’a nabanyaboronge more; goika ogokwa kwane ningenderere goteba ng’a tindi nokomocha.
Job27:6 Nimbwaterere bokong’u oboronge bwane
Job27:7 “Tiga omobisa one abarwe buna omokori amabe
Job27:8 Ngosemeria ki omonto otamoirogete Nyasae abwate
Job27:9 Ekero emechando eramochere na ere arere ase Nyasae
Job27:10 Omonto oyio nagokigwe ase Omonguru? Nabe okorangeria Nyasae ase chingaki chionsi?”
Job27:11 “Nimborokererie igoro y’okobua kwa Nyasae; amang’ana onsi igoro y’Omonguru tinkoyabisa.
Job27:12 Rora
Job27:13 “Ekio nakio egetari Nyasae akoa omokori amabe
Job27:14 Abana b’omokori amabe nabaisa komentekana
Job27:15 Abatigari baye nigo oborwaire borabaite
Job27:16 Omonto oyio naisa gosangereria chifeta chinyinge
Job27:17 nonya ochitumbire igo
Job27:18 Enyomba omonto oyio araagache nigo erabe buna ey’oronyambobe
Job27:19 Omonto oyio nigo akogenda korara ore omonda
Job27:20 Obwoba obonene bonga buna eooro nigo bokomochera; erio ekembugu‐mbugu kiamochera botuko kiamoira.
Job27:21 Omwaga okorwa moocha nigo okomoirurukia; omorusia aase aye
Job27:22 Nyasae nigo akomoruta emegwe atari namabera
Job27:23 Abanto nigo bagoaka chinkobi igoro yaye
Job28:1 “Ekeene
Job28:2 Ebioma nigo bigokunywa korwa riroba inse
Job28:3 Abanto nigo bagotongia chitaya ime aaria
Job28:4 Abanto nigo bagokunya chingoro chintambe gochia inse. Abwo nigo bakoba bebirwe nabanto bagotaara igoro ye riroba
Job28:5 Ase riroba igoro nao endagera ekwama ime y’ense inse aroro aonchoranwa aba buna omorero ogosamba oonchorana.
Job28:6 Aroro agwo nao are amagena e rigori rinene akorokwa safiro
Job28:7 Enchera ekogenda aase agwo enyoni ende yonsi egotwara orotwari teyemanyeti
Job28:8 Eng’iti y’orosana eng’enenu tiyana koyetacha
Job28:9 “Mwanyabanto nigo agokunya egetare ekiomo pa
Job28:10 Nigo akorema emetaro ime ase ebitare
Job28:11 Nigo akogita chindooche
Job28:12 Korende ng’ai obong’aini boranyorekane? Na ng’ai okomanya komenyete?
Job28:13 “Mwanyabanto tamanyeti rigori ri’obong’aini; borobwo tibori konyorekana ase ense emenyire nabare moyo.
Job28:14 Chindiba nigo chigokana chiateba: Tibori asende aa
Job28:15 Tibokogorwa chitahabu
Job28:16 Tibokoreng’anigwa ne chitahabu chikorwa Ofiri
Job28:17 Chitahabu na ebirore ebiya tibikoreng’anigwa naborobwo
Job28:18 Amakorongote na ebirore bichenire tibigwatorwa. Rigori ri’obong’aini nigo rire rinene kobua eri’amagena e rigori rinene rikomeka‐meka.
Job28:19 Topasio
Job28:20 “Bono rende
Job28:21 Nigo bobisire korwa ase amaiso ’ebitongwa bionsi bire moyo; ee
Job28:22 Aase ay’obosareku na amakweri nigo bigoteba: Intwe twaigure chinkuma chiaye.
Job28:23 “Nyasae bweka namanyete enchera y’obong’aini
Job28:24 Ere nigo arigereretie goika chinsinyo chionsi chi’ense
Job28:25 Ekero Nyasae arengete chinguru chi’omwaga
Job28:26 ekero abegete ogochika ase embura
Job28:27 nario aroche obong’aini naende akaboraria; akaboikerania na koboenekia ase abanto.
Job28:28 “Erio Nyasae agatebia mwanyabanto: Naama! Okomoiroka Omonene
Job29:1 Erio Ayubu akagenderera gokwana emerabaaro yaye
Job29:2 “Onye ndiria obogima bwane bware koba buna bwarenge ase amatuko a kare
Job29:3 Engaki eria etaya yaye yarenge komorekera omotwe one
Job29:4 Ase amatuko aria nakinete inde ne chinguru
Job29:5 Engaki eria Omonguru nigo arenge amo nainche
Job29:6 nigo narenge gwesibia amagoro aane namabeere
Job29:7 Ekero narenge kogenda ase egeita ki’omochie
Job29:8 abasae abaare kondora nigo barenge kogobera
Job29:9 Abagambi b’abanto nigo baare gokira tibagokwana
Job29:10 Amariogi ’abagambi nigo arenge gokea
Job29:11 “Ekero abanto barenge konyigwa
Job29:12 ekiagera nigo nabete ngotooria abataka abwo barenge korera
Job29:13 Ogosesenigwa kw’omonto konya obeire ang’e gosira nigo gwanchicherete
Job29:14 Nigo neboyetie oboronge
Job29:15 Ninche narenge eriso ase emeuko
Job29:16 Ninche narenge ise bw’abataka: na omonto ochandegete ntamanyete
Job29:17 Nigo nabunete chinsea chi’abatari abanyaboronge
Job29:18 “Erio nkaba nkorengereria ng’a amatuko aane nigo arabe amange buna omokenye
Job29:19 Nigo narenge buna omote emeri yaye ekoranda yaika ase chindooche; chinsagia chiane chikagenderera gotoora riime ase obotuko bwonsi;
Job29:20 obonene bwane nigo bwarenge kona‐koba oboyia asende
Job29:21 Ekero narenge korua ogosemia
Job29:22 Ekero nakoorire gokwana
Job29:23 Nigo barenge koba banganyete buna embura ekoganywa; bakaba bagwasamia emenwa yabo buna embura y’okwamia endagera egwasamerwa.
Job29:24 Ekero konya berusirie moyo nigo narenge kobasekera; obwasioku bw’obosio bwane tibabosieereretie.
Job29:25 Inche nigo nachorete enchera bagwenerete kobwatia
Job30:1 “Korende bono abanto bare abake asende
Job30:2 Abanto abwo chinguru chiabo chiaerire ase obogotu
Job30:3 Ase engencho y’okoremerwa na enchara babeire ebigonkobe
Job30:4 Nigo bakona‐gosangereria ebimeri bie chinsana
Job30:5 Abwo nigo bagoserigwa korwa ase egati y’abanto
Job30:6 Ase igo bagenda komenya ase amakuruma are ase amagoko
Job30:7 Ime ase ebitutu nigo bakwogererana
Job30:8 Barabwo nabana b’abanto abariri na ab’abakayayu; nigo baseretigwe nemecharichi barue ase ense.
Job30:9 Na bono inche nabeire engero egoterwa asebare
Job30:10 Barabwo nigo bangechete
Job30:11 Nyasae ong’urire chinguru
Job30:12 Abasae abwo abasaria nigo bagontubokera korwa ensemo yane ya borio
Job30:13 Basaririe enchera yane ngoetera; abwo batabwate gokonyeka konde abanyene
Job30:14 Nigo bakobagora aase aagare banchichera ne chinguru
Job30:15 Okogoswa gwanchicheire; ogosikwa kwane gwasirigwe buna omwaga ogosiria
Job30:16 Na bono omoyo one oberire ime yane; amatuko ’emechando ambwatereire bokong’u.
Job30:17 Amauga ’omobere one nigo akonyatia botuko bokia
Job30:18 Oborwaire bwane bwabeire ne chinguru bwaonchoire risankwa ri’omobere one
Job30:19 Nyasae ontugutire ase etintira ime
Job30:20 “Nigo nkorera asore
Job30:21 Aye kwabeire omotindi asende; nigo okondwania nokoboko kwao kore ne chinguru.
Job30:22 Aye nigo onyimokereretie igoro kwambekire ase omwaga na kondiinia igoro yaye. Aye nigo okona‐konuchania gochia aaria na aaria
Job30:23 Ee
Job30:24 Inee! Omonto karagwe takorambora okoboko kwaye
Job30:25 Inee! Tinarerete ase engencho y’abwo barenge ase emechando? Omoyo one tochandekerete abataka?
Job30:26 Korende ekero nasemeretie konyora amaya
Job30:27 Enkoro yane nigo ere nemechando mono
Job30:28 Nigo nkona‐koong’anya inde nemechando ntarochi omobaso; nigo ngotenena ase omosangererekano
Job30:29 Inche nabeire oyomwabo chisese chi’orosana
Job30:30 Risankwa riane riaonchokire riamwamire ti
Job30:31 Obokano bwane bw’ebirigisa nigo bokominwa bwaba obw’ebirero
Job31:1 “Inche nakorire okobwatana kw’ogotianania namaiso aane ng’a tinkorigereria omoiseke omwekungi ase okomogania.
Job31:2 Naki rende egetari kiane gekorwa ase Nyasae o igoro kerabe? Na omwando one okorwa ase Omonguru ore igoro
Job31:3 Inee! Emechando teri konyora abatari abanyaboronge
Job31:4 Inee! Nyasae tarochi chinchera chiane chionsi na kobara amatambokero aane onsi?”
Job31:5 “Inee! Nabeire ngotaara ase chinchera chi’obong’ainereria
Job31:6 Tiga ndengwe ase ekerengo ekeronge
Job31:7 Onye nagobeire korwa ase enchera
Job31:8 rirorio inche nsimeke endagera
Job31:9 “Onye omoyo one obeire okoebererigwa na gwancha omokungu omoao
Job31:10 rirorio tiga omokungu one abe ogosera omonto omoao obosie
Job31:11 Okwo nigo kware koba ogosaria okobe mono goetania
Job31:12 Boigo nigo kware koba omorero ogosamba gochia aase ay’ogosiria na koria ebinto biane bionsi kobikoora.”
Job31:13 “Inse kwanga koroisia amang’ana ’omosomba one
Job31:14 ninki ndakore ekero Nyasae aranyimokere? Ninki ndamoiranerie ekero arabe okorua egesusuro ki’ebibe biane?
Job31:15 Inee! Oyio ontongete ase enda ya baba
Job31:16 “Inche tinarinete omotaka egento aganetie
Job31:17 tinarenge koria endagera yane inche bweka
Job31:18 Oyio inche nabete ise korwa obosae bwaye
Job31:19 “Inee! Monto onde nare ochandegete ase okoborwa chianga
Job31:20 Barabwo nigo bansesenetie
Job31:21 “Onye nakorerete entakana bobe ekiagera namanyete ng’a ekegambero agwo ase egeita ngenkonye
Job31:22 rirorio tiga amareko aane ongoke agwe inse
Job31:23 Nigo nare kocha kwoboigwa nemechando korwa ase Nyasae; na tinare konyara gotenena bosio bw’obonene bwaye.”
Job31:24 “Tinasemeretie etahabu
Job31:25 tinagokerete gose gochengera obotenenku bwane obonge
Job31:26 Tinarigereretie erioba ekero riabarete
Job31:27 goika enkoro yane ekaebererigwa bobisi ase okobisasima
Job31:28 Onye nakorete ayio nigo nare koegwa egesusuro nabagambi ebina
Job31:29 “Inee! Nagokerete ogosirigwa kw’omobisa one? Gose netogetie ekero amabe amocherete?
Job31:30 Yaya
Job31:31 Abanto bonsi bamenyete aa bwone babeire birori ng’a kera omonto obeire oisanegete nendagera nkomoa.
Job31:32 Nigo narenge koigorera abaeti ebisieri biane basoa; gose onde tabete okorara isiko botuko.
Job31:33 Tinatubete ogosaria kwane buna engencho ya mwanyabanto ere
Job31:34 Tinairogete omoganda omonene bw’abanto
Job31:35 “Naki yare koba buya onye nanyora omonto okonyigwa. Inche nakoorire amang’ana aane! Oria Omonguru nang’iranerie! Ninganetie ndore amang’ana omobisa one andikerete ase okonyomania.
Job31:36 Ekeene
Job31:37 Nanga namotebia igoro y’orogendo rwane rwonsi; nigo nare komochiera inde buna omogambi.”
Job31:38 “Inee! Oboremo bwane bwanakondeera gose emeng’ororia ye chintinde yana‐korererana?
Job31:39 Onye nabeire nkoria okwama kwaye ntari goakana na kogera abanyene bakwe
Job31:40 rirorio tiga amagwa amereo ribaga ri’engano
Job32:1 Bono ekiagera Ayubu arenge omonyaboronge ase amaiso aye ere omonyene
Job32:2 Erio Elihu akaba nendamwamu ase Ayubu
Job32:3 Boigo akaba nendamwamu ase abasani baria batato b’Ayubu
Job32:4 Elihu akaba okoganya baria batato barakwana n’Ayubu
Job32:5 Na ekero aroche ng’a baria batato tibabwate ing’ana baare koiraneria
Job32:6 Elihu oyio
Job32:7 Korende ngateba: Tiga abanto b’amatuko amange bakwane
Job32:8 Korende omoika nore ime ase mwanyabanto
Job32:9 Bono tari ng’a nabanto b’emiaka emenge bare abang’aini
Job32:10 Nigo nkoboria
Job32:11 “Naama! Nigo nategererete mono ekero mwarenge gokwana; nkaba ndemereretie koigwa chinkwana chiaino chi’obong’aini
Job32:12 Ee
Job32:13 Inwe erende mono
Job32:14 Ayubu takwanete nainche amang’ana ande ay’okweegerera
Job32:15 “Bono batang’ang’ire
Job32:16 Inee! Nainche nigo nkogenderera koganya
Job32:17 Inche ngokwana inde ayane
Job32:18 Inche nimbwate amang’ana amange nganetie gokwana
Job32:19 Rora
Job32:20 Goika nkwane
Job32:21 Inche tinkonyara gwanchereria monto onde bwensi
Job32:22 Inche timanyeti gokwana amang’ana ’okweansia
Job33:1 “Aye Ayubu
Job33:2 Rora
Job33:3 Amang’ana aane nigo akoorokia oboronge bore ime ase enkoro yane
Job33:4 Omoika o Nyasae noro ontongete
Job33:5 “Bono ing’iranerie onye gokonyara; beka amang’ana ao ang’e
Job33:6 Rora
Job33:7 Rora
Job33:8 “Ekeene
Job33:9 Aye nigo ogoteba iga: Inche nigo nchenegete
Job33:10 Naama! Nyasae onyorire amasoero asende
Job33:11 Osoirie amagoro aane ase rikorogoto
Job33:12 “Naama! Nigo ngokoiraneria ng’a ase amang’ana aya tokwaneti ekeene; Nyasae nigo are omonene goetania mwanyabanto.
Job33:13 Nase ki okoamererania nere kogoteba ng’a ere takoiraneria amang’ana aya nonya nerimo?
Job33:14 Ekeene
Job33:15 Nigo agokwana ase chindoto na amaroro a botuko
Job33:16 Erio agwo otinora amato ’abanto
Job33:17 ng’a anyare koonchora omonto atige ogokora kwaye okobe
Job33:18 Nigo agotanga omonto tagenda ase oboina
Job33:19 Omonto nigo akonyora egesusuro gi’okomorongeyia
Job33:20 Omoyo oye ogecha endagera
Job33:21 Chinyama chi’omobere oye nigo chikoera
Job33:22 Ere omonyene nigo agosuka gochia ang’e noboina
Job33:23 “Onye omomalaika nkoba arenge asare
Job33:24 erio amororere amabera
Job33:25 Omobere oye oiranigwe obe buna oyo bw’obosae bwaye
Job33:26 Ekero arabe ogosaba Nyasae
Job33:27 Omonto oyio natere ase amasio ’abanto
Job33:28 Ere obooririe omoyo one togenda ase oboina
Job33:29 Rora
Job33:30 erinde amoiranie korwa ase oboina
Job33:31 “Aye Ayubu
Job33:32 Onye kobwate ing’ana rinde okong’iraneria
Job33:33 Onye tobwati kende
Job34:1 Erio Elihu akagenderera gokwana
Job34:2 “Inwe abanto abang’aini
Job34:3 Amang’ana amato akoigwa
Job34:4 Tochore ayare amaronge; intwe amo toteeme komanya ayare amaronge.
Job34:5 Ayubu nigo agoteba: Inche nomonyene oboronge
Job34:6 Nonya inde omonyene oboronge
Job34:7 “Inee! Monto ki onga buna Ayubu
Job34:8 Ere oyio ogosanga nabanyabibe na gotaara nabakori amabe.
Job34:9 Naende ere otebire ng’a kobwatana na Nyasae
Job34:10 “Ase ayio
Job34:11 Ere nigo agoakana omonto koreng’ana buna emeremo yaye ere; nabo akoa omonto eng’eria buna orogendo rwaye rore.
Job34:12 Ekeene
Job34:13 Ning’o oete Nyasae okobua gw’okogambera ense? Ning’o obegete ense yonsi koba eyaye?
Job34:14 Ere aise koirania omoika oye
Job34:15 mwanyabanto bonsi pi goika bakwe
Job34:16 “Onye more nokomanya
Job34:17 Inee! Omonto ogechete ekeene nanyare kogamba? Nonachere ekina omonyene oboronge oyore nokobua?
Job34:18 Nonyare gotebia omoruoti: Aye nigo ore omonto bosa
Job34:19 Nyasae tari gwanchereria abagambi
Job34:20 Abanto nigo bagokwa ara rimo; nigo bakonyegerigwa botuko gati
Job34:21 Nyasae nigo arigereretie chinchera chi’omonto; ere nigo aroche amatambokero aye onsi.
Job34:22 Aase aamwamu tari
Job34:23 Nyasae taganeti engaki entambe korigereria
Job34:24 Ere nigo agosenyenta abare nokobua atari kona‐kouna‐unia
Job34:25 Ekiagera ere namanyete emeremo yabo
Job34:26 Nyasae nigo akobaita maiso marore
Job34:27 na ekiagera baonchokire na gotiga komobwatia
Job34:28 Abwo bagerire ekerero ki’abataka giaikire asare
Job34:29 “Inee! Nyasae karakire‐kiri ning’o oramonachere ekina? Karabise obosio bwaye
Job34:30 ekero ararusie okogamba korwa ase abatamoirogeti na abatange tibaba amareba ase abanto?
Job34:31 “Inee! Monto onde nare otebirie Nyasae: Inche naremereirie egesusuro gi’okondongeyia
Job34:32 Bono inyorokererie aya ntamanyeti
Job34:33 Nigo okagete ng’a Nyasae nigo aragoakane buna oranche
Job34:34 “Abanto abare nokomanya
Job34:35 Ayubu nigo agokwana atari na semi; na amang’ana aye tari ay’obong’aini.
Job34:36 Nigo yagwenerete Ayubu ateemwe goika omoerio
Job34:37 Ere nigo akomenta ogosaria ase ebibe biaye
Job35:1 Elihu akagenderera gokwana
Job35:2 “Aye Ayubu
Job35:3 Naende gokoboria ng’a mbuya ki oboronge bokogokorera kobua ogokora ebibe?
Job35:4 Bono ngokoiraneria nde aye amo nabasani bao abamore komo.”
Job35:5 “Rigereria gochia igoro
Job35:6 Aye noisa gokora ebibe
Job35:7 Onye kore omonyene oboronge
Job35:8 Amabe ao ogokora nigo akorenta emechando ase omonto onde onga buna aye
Job35:9 “Ekiagera ogokorerwa bobe kwabuchire
Job35:10 Korende monto onde tari okoboria: Ng’ai Nyasae
Job35:11 Ere nigo agotworokereria kobua ching’iti chi’ense
Job35:12 Abanto nigo bakorera
Job35:13 Ekeene
Job35:14 “Nonya kogoteba ng’a tori komorora
Job35:15 Korende bono nigo okorengereria ng’a Nyasae tari korua egesusuro ase engencho y’endamwamu yaye
Job35:16 Ayio naro akogera aye Ayubu ogokwana amang’ana atari nengencho
Job36:1 Elihu akagenderera gokwana
Job36:2 “Indemereria ake igo
Job36:3 Inche nindusie chisemi chiane korwa aare
Job36:4 Ekeene
Job36:5 “Rora
Job36:6 Ere tagotiga omokori amabe agenderere koba moyo
Job36:7 Tari gotiga korigereria abanyene oboronge
Job36:8 na onye bagosibwa chingataare na baba bare ase emechando
Job36:9 Nyasae nigo akobaorokeria aya bakorire
Job36:10 Nigo agotinora amato abo baigwa ogokurerwa
Job36:11 Kobaraigwere na komokorera
Job36:12 Korende onye tibakoigwera
Job36:13 “Abatamoirogete Nyasae nigo bagachete endamwamu ime ase chinkoro chiabo; barabwo tibari korera barigie bakonywe
Job36:14 Barabwo nigo bagokwa ekero bare abake
Job36:15 Nyasae nigo agotooria abataka goetera ase emechando yabo
Job36:16 Ee
Job36:17 Korende bono aye nigo okonacherwa ekina buna eki’abakori amabe
Job36:18 Bono erende
Job36:19 Inee! Obotenenku bwao mbonyare kogotanga korwa ase emechando? Gose okobua kwao ne chinguru chiao mbinyare?
Job36:20 Tobaisa kogania ng’a obotuko boria boche
Job36:21 Bwerende
Job36:22 “Rora
Job36:23 Ning’o ochikeire Nyasae enchera yaye? Gose ning’o oranyare komotebia: Aye gwakorire bobe?
Job36:24 Inyora gotogia emeremo yaye
Job36:25 Abanto bonsi bayerorire
Job36:26 Rora
Job36:27 “Ere nigo akong’usa chintonyi chi’amache gochia igoro
Job36:28 Embura eyio nigo egotwa gocha ase ense
Job36:29 Inee! Monto onde nanyare komanya buna amare agwesiarera
Job36:30 Rora
Job36:31 Ase enchera eyio nigo akonachera abanto ekina; naende nigo akobaa chindagera ase obonge.
Job36:32 Ere nigo amumegete amaboko aye ase okomesa
Job36:33 Ekerundo gi’okomesa nigo gekoraria igoro ya Nyasae
Job37:1 “Ayio nigo akogera enkoro yane yaiguswa
Job37:2 Tegerera oigwe okogukura kw’eriogi riaye
Job37:3 Nigo agotoma okoruma okwo korwa igoro gocha ase ense yonsi; okomesa kwaye gwe chinkoba nigo kogochera chinsinyo chi’ense.
Job37:4 Erio eriogi riaye rikoruma
Job37:5 Nyasae nigo akogukura neriogi riaye ase enchera y’ogokumia mono
Job37:6 Ere nigo agotebia amagena ’embura: Kagwe igoro ase ense; na otoma omonyirira na embura enene ere ne chinguru.
Job37:7 Nyasae nigo agotanga emeremo y’amaboko a kera omonto
Job37:8 Erio ching’iti chi’orosana chiagenda kwebisa
Job37:9 Ekembugu‐mbugu nigo kegosoka korwa ase chiero chiaye agwo irianyi
Job37:10 Nyasae nigo akorua omoika bw’obokeng’entu obwatania amache
Job37:11 Nigo agoichoria amare amarito namache
Job37:12 Amare nigo agoetanana gochia aaria na aaria
Job37:13 Nyasae nigo agokora ayio aba bo
Job37:14 Aye Ayubu
Job37:15 Inee! Nomanyete buna Nyasae agokora ochika ayio
Job37:16 Inee! Nomanyete buna areng’anetie amare
Job37:17 Inee! Nomanyete egekogera chianga chiao chigosamba ne riberera
Job37:18 Inee! Nonyare korambora igoro buna ere ayeramborete
Job37:19 Tworokererie aya togochia gokwana asare; titokonyara konyora amang’ana togochia gokwana
Job37:20 Inee! Nyasae nigo agochia gotebigwa ng’a inche ninganetie gokwana? Onde nare oganetie ere amosirie?
Job37:21 “Abanto tibakonyara korigereria amasase ’erioba
Job37:22 Oborabu bokomeka‐meka nigo bokorwa sugusu; ee
Job37:23 Oyio Omonguru
Job37:24 Ase ayio mwanyabanto nigo bamoirogete; ere tari gosika oyokwerengereria ng’a nomong’aini are.”
Job38:1 Omonene akairaneria Ayubu korwa ase ekembugu‐mbugu ime
Job38:2 “Aye naye ng’o okorenta omosunte ase ogosemia ase ogokwana amang’ana atari ay’obong’aini?
Job38:3 Tenena okong’e buna omosacha
Job38:4 Ng’ai kwarenge ekero nabegete oboroso bw’ense? Ntebie onye aye kore omong’aini.
Job38:5 Ning’o obegete ebirengo biaye? Ntebie onye komanyete. Gose ning’o oramborete engori y’okoyerenga?
Job38:6 Ng’ai amaroso aye aterekereretwe? Gose ning’o obegete rigena riaye ri’ekoona
Job38:7 ekero ching’enang’eni chia mambia chiaterete amo
Job38:8 “Ning’o osiegete ebisieri bi’enyancha
Job38:9 Ekero keria naroisetie amare abe chianga chiaye
Job38:10 naende nkabekera enyancha chimbebe chiaye
Job38:11 ngateba: Aa nao oraikere
Job38:12 Inee! Ase obogima bwao bwonsi kwana gochika emambia ebeo? Kwana kworokia amasase a mambia aase akomoreka
Job38:13 erinde ense yonsi ekiamoke
Job38:14 Ense nigo ekoonchorwa yarorekana buna amaroba abeire inse y’ebonyi ere nekemanyererio
Job38:15 Oborabu nigo bogotangwa korwa ase abakori amabe
Job38:16 “Inee! Kwana gosoa ime ase chinsoko chi’enyancha
Job38:17 Kwana kworokigwa ebiita bi’amakweri
Job38:18 Kwana korengereria igoro y’obogare bw’ense? Onye komanyete ayio onsi
Job38:19 “Enchera ekogenda ase oborabu bore
Job38:20 erinde ogende oyoire ase ribebe riaye? Naende nomanyete ebinchera bigochia ase enyomba yaye?
Job38:21 Ee
Job38:22 “Inee! Kwana gosoa ime ase ebigachero bi’obokeng’entu
Job38:23 Amagena ayio ngachete goika ase engaki y’emechando
Job38:24 Inchera ki ekogenda aase oborabu bokoruerwa
Job38:25 “Ning’o oremete omotaro ase chiooro chi’embura chigoeta
Job38:26 echio chikogera embura yatwa aase monto atamenyeti
Job38:27 Embura eyio nigo ekoigotia ense ere bosa etamenyiri
Job38:28 Inee! Embura nebwate ise? Gose ning’o okoibora amatoima e riime?
Job38:29 Nkorwa ase enda ya ng’o obokeng’entu bokorwa? Ning’o okoibora obokendu bokorwa igoro?
Job38:30 Amache nigo akobwatana oma pa buna rigena
Job38:31 “Inee! Nonyare gosiberania egetuse gie ching’enang’eni gekorokwa Abaiseke batano na babere bamwabo? Gose bwororobie egetuse keria gekorokwa Orioni?
Job38:32 Nonyare koraa ching’enang’eni chioroke ase chingaki chiabo? Gose nonyare koraa egetuse gie ching’enang’eni gekorokwa Edubu ne chimanwa chiaye?
Job38:33 Nomanyete emeroberio ya igoro echikire? Nonyare koroberia okogamba kwabo igoro ase ense?
Job38:34 “Nonyare goaka eriogi riao riike ase amare ogere embura enyinge egotwere?
Job38:35 Nonyare gotoma chinkoba chigende aase gete
Job38:36 Ning’o okobeka obong’aini ase enkoro ime
Job38:37 Ning’o oranyare koba nobong’aini abare amare? Gose ning’o oranyare koberereka chinyongo chi’amache chia igoro
Job38:38 ekero riroba riabwatanire riomire pa
Job38:39 “Inee! Nonyare gotwarera endo ebi ekoria
Job38:40 ekero chire ase amakuruma abo chieringanetie ase okoboera
Job38:41 Ning’o okoa ekegonkoru endagera yaye
Job39:1 “Inee! Nomanyete chingaki ekero chimbori chi’orosana chikobiara? Gose ekero chinsune chikobiara?
Job39:2 Nonyare komanya omobaro bw’emetienyi chigokoora
Job39:3 Nigo chigwekumba chiabiara chimanwa chiabo
Job39:4 Chimanwa chiabo nigo chikoba ne chinguru chiakinera ase orosana. Nigo chikogenda kegima
Job39:5 “Ning’o otigire etigere y’orosana esiboire? Gose ning’o bwororobirie ebisibo bi’etigere ere enyango?
Job39:6 Inche nayeeire ekerubo ekiomo kebe enka yaye
Job39:7 Ero nigo egochaya eriogi rire ase omochie
Job39:8 Nigo ekona‐kogenda aaria na aaria ase ebitunwa ekorisia
Job39:9 “Inee! Eng’era nayanche egokorere emeremo? Nenyare korara ase obweri bwao botuko?
Job39:10 Inee! Nonyare koyesiba ne chingori eete ase emeng’ororia ye chintinde? Gose ebutorane chintinde ase rikura riao?
Job39:11 Inee! Noyesemerie ekiagera ere ne chinguru chinyinge? Nonyare gotiga emeremo yao
Job39:12 Inee! Nigo oyiegenete ng’a neirane na ekorentere endagera ase ekeooreri kiao?
Job39:13 “Esagero nigo egosamunsa chimbaba chiaye chioga; korende
Job39:14 Esagero eaberi nigo egotiga amagena aye ase amaroba ime anyora riberera korwao.
Job39:15 Ero nigo ekoyeba
Job39:16 Nigo ere entindi mono ase ebichuchu biaye
Job39:17 ekiagera Nyasae nigo ayerinete obong’aini
Job39:18 Ekero ekoimokerera igoro
Job39:19 “Inee! Naye okoa ebarasi chinguru? Naye oboetie ebigoti biaye namanya?
Job39:20 Naye oyeete chinguru egocharokera buna engige? Eriogi egochuria nigo rire ri’okoirokia.
Job39:21 Nigo egokura‐kura riroba ase ense omweya
Job39:22 Ero nigo egosekerera obwoba
Job39:23 Chinsara nigo chikorutwa chiaba chikwoga goeta igoro yaye
Job39:24 Nigo egotitiria riroba ere nobotindi na ekeririanda
Job39:25 Ekero egetureri gekobugigwa
Job39:26 “Inee! Nobong’aini bwao bokogera ekebaki kiairuruka igoro
Job39:27 Inee! Naye ogochika ekeongo kiairuruka gochia igoro
Job39:28 Ekeongo nigo gekomenya ase egetare; ase omwenya bw’egetare
Job39:29 Korwa aaria igoro nigo kegotengera ebi kegotwara
Job39:30 Amage aye nigo akonywa amanyinga
Job40:1 Naende Omonene akagenderera gokwana
Job40:2 “Inee! Omonto okona‐korigia amamocho naamereranie n’Omonguru? Aye okona‐koamererania na Nyasae
Job40:3 Erio Ayubu akairaneria Omonene
Job40:4 “Naama! Inche ting’isaini kende
Job40:5 Inche nakwanire rimo
Job40:6 Erio korwa ase ekembugu‐mbugu ime Omonene akairaneria Ayubu
Job40:7 “Tenena okong’e buna omosacha
Job40:8 Inee! Nonyare kombara ng’a nomomochi inde? Norigetie kongambia inche
Job40:9 Aye nobwate okoboko buna okwane inche Nyasae? Nonyare kogukura neriogi riao buna inche nkogukura?
Job40:10 Aye echabere nobonene na obwari
Job40:11 Siara ekeririanda gi’okogechigwa kwao
Job40:12 Ee
Job40:13 Abwo bonsi babise ime ase amaroba; obwateranie bokong’u amasio abo ime y’ense inse.
Job40:14 Igo inche ninyancherane naye
Job40:15 “Rigereria engubo! Eyio natongete buna nagotongete aye. Nigo ekorisia obonyansi buna eng’ombe.
Job40:16 Rora
Job40:17 Ekemincha kiaye nigo kere egekong’u pa buna omocharake
Job40:18 Amauga aye nigo are amakong’u buna emebirangwa eroisirie korwa ase etaai; ee
Job40:19 “Ero negetongwa ki’ogokumia inche Nyasae natongete; inche nayetongete
Job40:20 Endagera ekoria nigo ekwama ase ebitunwa igoro
Job40:21 Nigo ekorara ase ekiriri ki’omote okorokwa lotusi
Job40:22 Omote oyio noro ore ekiriri kiaye; ee
Job40:23 Rora
Job40:24 Inee! Omonto nanyare koyebwata ekero ere ase riraro riaye? Gose nabochore chimioro chiaye ayesibe nengori?”
Job41:1 “Inee! Aye nonyare kong’usa Leviatani
Job41:2 Nonyare gosoyia engori ime ase chimioro chiaye
Job41:3 Inee! Nenyare gokoboria amang’ana amange ase oboitongo? Gose nenyare gokwana naye amang’ana amororo?
Job41:4 Ero nekore okobwatana amo naye
Job41:5 Inee! Nokore egosori nero buna orakore nenyoni? Gose oyebeke ekorere abasomba bao abaiseke egosori?
Job41:6 Inee! Abaoonia mbakorerane rigori igoro yaye
Job41:7 Nonyare kobochora riiyo riaye ne ritimo rikobeta chinswe? Gose ritimo erio ndibete omotwe oye riyobochore?
Job41:8 Rambora okoboko kwao oyebwate
Job41:9 “Ekero omonto agoteema igo
Job41:10 Onde tari ore omotindi oraremererie ayechegie. Ning’o rende oranyare gotenena ase obosio bwane?
Job41:11 Ning’o ong’eire egento ritang’ani ng’a nainche imogeakane? Gento kende gionsi kere inse y’erioba nekiane.”
Job41:12 “Inche tingotiga ting’orokia buna ebiimo biaye bire
Job41:13 Ning’o oranyare koyiaboria risankwa riaye? Ning’o oranyare gosoyia okoboko kwaye gati‐gati y’amaino aye?
Job41:14 Ning’o oraasamie omonwa oye? Amaino aye nigo are ay’okwoboyia mono.
Job41:15 Obonene bwaye namagonko aye anga buna chinguba
Job41:16 Rigonko erimo nigo risoaine nerinde ang’e kegima
Job41:17 Nigo erinde ribwatanirie nerinde; naro nigo asoaine
Job41:18 Ekero egwasimora
Job41:19 Chinsase chi’omorero nigo chikorwa ase omonwa oye; ee
Job41:20 Erioki nigo rigosoka korwa ase chimioro chiaye
Job41:21 Omoika bw’omonwa oye nigo ogosoka buna ekebemberi ki’omorero
Job41:22 Rigoti riaye nigo ribwate chinguru
Job41:23 Emenia y’omobere oye nigo ekinyaine amo; nigo yesibete bokong’u ase omobere oye
Job41:24 Enkoro yaye nenkong’u buna rigena
Job41:25 Ekero ekoimoka gotenena
Job41:26 Nerutwa omoro oyegwere
Job41:27 Ekioma nigo kenga risakwe asere
Job41:28 Ensara tekoyioboyia etame; amagena ’enduruche akorutwa nigo anga buna amasakwe.
Job41:29 Chinungu nigo chinga buna amasakwe asere; ekero amatimo akwoga gocha nigo egoseka.
Job41:30 Ase enda yaye nigo ebwate ebigionkorio ebioge; nigo egotiga ebimanyerererio buna ebi’egari y’okoorera egokurura ase etintira.
Job41:31 Nigo egoserokia amache korwa ase chindiba inse
Job41:32 Enchera yaeteire nigo ekogenderera komesa
Job41:33 Getongwa kende tikeri igoro ase ense kenga ero
Job41:34 Nigo ekorigereria kera egento kere igoro mono etari gokioboa
Job42:1 Erio Ayubu akairaneria Omonene
Job42:2 “Nimanyete ng’a aye nonyare gokora ebinto bionsi
Job42:3 Ninche ng’o mbwate ogosemia gotari nobong’aini? Ase ayio nakwanire aya ntamanyeti
Job42:4 Koranche
Job42:5 Nabeire nkoigwa igoro yao ase okoigwa namato rioka
Job42:6 Ase ayio nechayire inche omonyene
Job42:7 Omonene gakwanire amang’ana ayio n’Ayubu
Job42:8 Ase igo bono ira ase Ayubu
Job42:9 Ase igo Elifasi Omotemani
Job42:10 Erio nyuma Ayubu gasabeire abasani baria baye
Job42:11 Erio abamura bamwabo Ayubu
Job42:12 Omonene agasesenia amatuko a nyuma ay’Ayubu kobua aye ritang’ani. Boigo Ayubu akanyora ching’ondi chilifu ikomi na inye
Job42:13 Boigo akaegwa abamura batano na babere
Job42:14 Akaroka omoiseke omotang’ani Yemima
Job42:15 Ase ense eyio yonsi bakungu bande tibarengeo baare abanyabieni buna abaiseke b’Ayubu
Job42:16 Na nyuma y’ayio Ayubu akagenderera koba moyo ase engaki y’emiaka rigana erimo
Job42:17 Na Ayubu agakwa kabeire omogotu mono.
Psalms1:1 Nasesenirie omonto oria otari gotunyana chingencho chi’abakori amabe
Psalms1:2 korende amachiko ’Omonene naro akomogokia mono
Psalms1:3 Ere nigo anga buna omote osimekire rooche mbarabare
Psalms1:4 Abakori amabe tibari bo
Psalms1:5 Ase ayio
Psalms1:6 Omonene namanyete enchera y’abanyene oboronge
Psalms2:1 Nase ki abanto b’ebisaku bagokora riroroche? Nase ki abanto bagokora emeroberio ere bosa?
Psalms2:2 Abaruoti b’ense bebekire ang’e
Psalms2:3 Nigo bagotebania
Psalms2:4 Omonene oria oikaransete aaria igoro
Psalms2:5 Erio nakwane nabarabwo ase endamwamu yaye
Psalms2:6 “Nabekire omoruoti one ase Sayoni
Psalms2:7 Omoruoti otebire
Psalms2:8 Omborie
Psalms2:9 Aye nobabutore nenyimbo y’ekioma
Psalms2:10 Ase ayio
Psalms2:11 Mokorere Omonene more nobwoba na okoiguswa.
Psalms2:12 Tung’ama inse na koorokia amasikani ase Omwana oye. Motakoreti bo
Psalms3:1 Aye Omonene
Psalms3:2 Abange nigo bagokwana igoro yane
Psalms3:3 Korende aye Omonene
Psalms3:4 Nigo nkorera ase Omonene ng’a ankonye
Psalms3:5 Nigo ngwetoora na korara chitoro
Psalms3:6 Tindi koiroka ababisa chilifu chinyinge
Psalms3:7 Aye Omonene
Psalms3:8 Ogotooreka nigo gokorwa asore aye Omonene; ase ayio
Psalms4:1 Aye Nyasae
Psalms4:2 Inwe mwanyabanto
Psalms4:3 Manya ng’a Omonene bwechoreire omonyene oboronge. Omonene nigo akonyigwa ekero nkomosaba.
Psalms4:4 Mobee
Psalms4:5 Karue ebing’wanso bi’oboronge
Psalms4:6 Mbare abanto abange bagokwana: “Naki yare koba buya onye ntwanyora ayare amaya.” Aye Omonene
Psalms4:7 Omosasoko oyo kwang’eire ase enkoro yane ime nigo are omuya kobua oyo abanto bande bakonyora
Psalms4:8 Ekero ngochia gwetoora

Psalms26:1 Aye Omonene
Psalms26:2 Omonene
Psalms26:3 Nigo ndigereretie obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe na gotaara ase obwegenwa bwao.
Psalms26:4 Tindi gosanga nabanyaborimo
Psalms26:5 Inche nigo ngechete gosanga nabanto bagokora amabe
Psalms26:6 Nigo ngoisaba amaboko aane ase okoorokia ng’a tindi na komocha
Psalms26:7 imba ngotera neriogi rinene gokoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono na koraria ogokora kwao kw’ogokumia.
Psalms26:8 Aye Omonene
Psalms26:9 Tosiria omoyo one ekero ogosiria abanyabibe; gose obogima bwane ekero ogosiria abaiti.
Psalms26:10 Abanto abwo bagokora emeroberio y’obonyaka
Psalms26:11 Inche nigo inde norogendo rotari na komocha; indorere amabera na omboorie.
Psalms26:12 Amagoro aane nigo agotenena aase aateremu; nintogie Omonene ase egati y’omosangererekano omonene.
Psalms27:1 Omonene nere omobaso one
Psalms27:2 Ekero abakori amabe bakong’umokera ng’a bamere
Psalms27:3 Neba omoganda omonene bw’esegi ong’etananire
Psalms27:4 Nasabire ring’ana erimo korwa ase Omonene. Erio nario nganetie: Imenye ase enyomba y’Omonene ase amatuko onsi ay’obogima bwane
Psalms27:5 Ase engaki y’emechando nantube ase ekiriri kiaye; nambise ase eema yaye ime
Psalms27:6 Ninyimokererigwa igoro ase ababisa baane bang’etanaine. Ase eema yaye ime nindue ebing’wanso inde nomochengo; ninterere Omonene na komotogia.
Psalms27:7 Aye Omonene
Psalms27:8 Aye gwatebire
Psalms27:9 Aye Nyasae one ore ogotooreka kwane
Psalms27:10 Onye tata na baba baraba bagontiga
Psalms27:11 Aye Omonene
Psalms27:12 Tobaisa kondua ase ababisa baane bankore buna banchete; birori b’oborimo banyimokeire
Psalms27:13 Naenekirie ng’a nindore obuya bw’Omonene; ase ense y’abanto bare moyo.
Psalms27:14 Remereria oganye Omonene
Psalms28:1 Aye Omonene
Psalms28:2 Igwa eriogi ri’ogosaba kwane
Psalms28:3 Tobaisa gonsiria amo nabakori amabe na abasaria
Psalms28:4 Bae egesusuro koreng’ana nogokora kwabo na ebibe biabo
Psalms28:5 Abanto abwo tibari kobara ng’a ogokora kw’Omonene
Psalms28:6 Omonene atogigwe! Ere oigure okoboria kwane kw’oboitongo.
Psalms28:7 Omonene nere chinguru chiane na enguba yane; nere nsemeretie ase enkoro yane
Psalms28:8 Omonene nigo are chinguru ase abanto baye
Psalms28:9 Aye Omonene
Psalms29:1 Inwe abana ba Nyasae
Psalms29:2 Togia erieta ri’Omonene rire nobonene obonge; mosasime Omonene mweboetie obochenu.
Psalms29:3 Eriogi ri’Omonene nigo rikoigweka ase chinyancha igoro; Nyasae bw’obonene nigo agoaka enkoba
Psalms29:4 Eriogi ri’Omonene nigo rikoigweka rire nokobua; eriogi ri’Omonene nigo riichire nobonene.
Psalms29:5 Eriogi ri’Omonene nigo rikobuna emete emecharake
Psalms29:6 Nigo agotira‐tiria emete eyio buna emori egotiria
Psalms29:7 Eriogi ri’Omonene nigo rikomesia chinsase chi’omorero.
Psalms29:8 Eriogi ri’Omonene nigo rigotengechia erooro; ee
Psalms29:9 Eriogi erio ri’Omonene nigo rikorekeria chingabi
Psalms29:10 Omonene nigo aikaransete ase ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene kogambera chioora; Omonene nere omoruoti ase ekerogo kiaye kare na kare.
Psalms29:11 Omonene nae abanto baye chinguru
Psalms30:1 Aye Omonene
Psalms30:2 Aye
Psalms30:3 Omonene
Psalms30:4 Inwe abachenu baye
Psalms30:5 Omonene nigo akoba nendamwamu ase engaki ensinini yoka
Psalms30:6 Ekero amang’ana onsi arenge amaya asende
Psalms30:7 Aye Omonene
Psalms30:8 Erio nkarera asore
Psalms30:9 Mbitoki ki aye oranyore onye ngokwa na gosoa ase oboina ime? Inee! Orotu rw’amaroba ndonyare kogotogia? Ndonyare koraria obwegenwa bwao?
Psalms30:10 Aye Omonene
Psalms30:11 Aye kwaonchoire omoichano one okaba omochengo; kwandusirie eanga y’emechando
Psalms30:12 Ase ayio
Psalms31:1 Aye Omonene
Psalms31:2 Tegerera oigwe amang’ana aane
Psalms31:3 Aye naye egetare kiane na eburi yane; ase engencho y’erieta riao ondaae na kondenda.
Psalms31:4 Indusie korwa ase oboreba bobisire bombwate
Psalms31:5 Aye Omonene
Psalms31:6 Nigo ngechete abanto bagosasima emegwekano ere bosa
Psalms31:7 Ningoke na gochenga ase engencho y’obwanchani bwao botari koera; aye igo ogwechandera emechando yane
Psalms31:8 Tombegeti ase amaboko ’omobisa one; korende gwatenenirie amagoro aane aase are aagare.
Psalms31:9 Aye Omonene
Psalms31:10 Ase obogima bwane bwonsi nabeire inde nemechando; na ase emiaka yane yonsi nabeire inde nomoichano; chinguru chiane chiaerire ase engencho y’ogosaria kwane; amauga ’omobere one omire pa.
Psalms31:11 Ababisa baane bonsi nigo bagonchecheria
Psalms31:12 Abanto banyebire buna bakweba omonto okure; nabeire buna enyongo yatekire.
Psalms31:13 Nigo nkoigwa ababisa baane bakomonyererana; okogosa nigo kong’etanaine. Abwo nigo bagosangererekana amo kogamba
Psalms31:14 Korende inche nigo ngosemeretie aye Omonene. Nigo ngoteba
Psalms31:15 Obogima bwane nigo bore ase amaboko ao; ntoorie korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa baane na ay’abachandi baane.
Psalms31:16 Ing’onchorere obosio bwao
Psalms31:17 Aye Omonene
Psalms31:18 Kiria emenwa y’abwo bagokwana amang’ana ’oborimo
Psalms31:19 Naki obuya bwao bore obonge na obw’ogokumigwa
Psalms31:20 Nigo okobabisa agwo asore
Psalms31:21 Omonene atogigwe! Nigo anyorogetie obwanchani bwaye bw’ogokumia; akandenda ase omochie omokong’u.
Psalms31:22 Ekero narenge nobwoba nigo narengereretie
Psalms31:23 Mwanche Omonene
Psalms31:24 Inwe mwensi aba momosemeretie Omonene
Psalms32:1 Nasesenirie omonto oyo bwabeirwe ogosaria kwaye
Psalms32:2 Nasesenirie omonto oyo Omonene atabarereti okomocha kwaye
Psalms32:3 Ekero konya ntaraorokia ebibe biane
Psalms32:4 Omobaso na obotuko okoboko kwao gokanditoera negesusuro; chinguru chiane chikaera buna amache akoera ekero ki’egurugura.
Psalms32:5 Erio ngakoorokeria ebibe biane
Psalms32:6 Ase ayio
Psalms32:7 Aye naye obwebiso bwane
Psalms32:8 Ninkworokererie na gokoraa ase enchera ogwenerete kogenda; ningosemie
Psalms32:9 Timoba buna chibarasi ne chiyombo chitari nobong’aini
Psalms32:10 Omokori amabe nare namaakwa amange
Psalms32:11 Inwe abanyene oboronge
Psalms33:1 Inwe abanto abaronge
Psalms33:2 Moakere Omonene ng’a mbuya mono ase okobugia amakano ’ebirigisa
Psalms33:3 Moterere ogotera okoyia
Psalms33:4 Naki ring’ana ri’Omonene nigo rire boronge
Psalms33:5 Ere nigo anchete ayare boronge na ekeene
Psalms33:6 Ase chinguru chie ring’ana ri’Omonene igoro egatongwa
Psalms33:7 Igo agosangereria amache ’enyancha
Psalms33:8 Ense yonsi neiroke Omonene
Psalms33:9 Naki ere agakwana
Psalms33:10 Omonene nigo akoonchorana emeroberio y’abanto b’ebisaku
Psalms33:11 Okogamba kw’Omonene nigo goteneine kare na kare; emeroberio yaye nigo egendererete ebiaare ase ebiaare.
Psalms33:12 Ngesesenirie egesaku eke Omonene are Nyasae obo
Psalms33:13 Omonene nigo arigereretie korwa igoro
Psalms33:14 Korwa agwo ase aikaransete
Psalms33:15 Nere otongete chinkoro chi’abanto bonsi
Psalms33:16 Omoruoti tari orabue nomoganda oye omonene bw’abarwani
Psalms33:17 Gosemeria chibarasi chi’esegi
Psalms33:18 Rora amaiso ’Omonene nigo abarigereretie abwo bamoirogete
Psalms33:19 Omonene natoorie emioyo yabo korwa ase amakweri
Psalms33:20 Emioyo yaito nigo emoganyete Omonene
Psalms33:21 Ee
Psalms33:22 Omonene
Psalms34:1 Nimbake Omonene chingaki chionsi
Psalms34:2 Ase omoyo one ninyetogerie Omonene
Psalms34:3 Raria obonene bw’Omonene amo nainche toimokererie erieta riaye igoro twensi amo.
Psalms34:4 Nkarangeria Omonene
Psalms34:5 Abwo bamorigereretie nigo bakomeka‐meka bare nomogoko
Psalms34:6 Omonto omotaka nigo akorera
Psalms34:7 Omomalaika bw’Omonene nigo akorenda na goetanana abwo bamoirogete Omonene na kobatooria.
Psalms34:8 Moteeme Omonene
Psalms34:9 Moiroke Omonene
Psalms34:10 Chindo chinsae nachinyare koremerwa na koba nenchara
Psalms34:11 Abana baane
Psalms34:12 Inee! Aye nomonto bwanchete obogima? Oganetie obe moyo amatuko amange
Psalms34:13 Rirorio tanga oromeme rwao tirokwana amabe
Psalms34:14 Otige amabe
Psalms34:15 Amaiso ’Omonene nigo arigereretie abanyene oboronge
Psalms34:16 Obosio bw’Omonene nigo bore mamincha y’abwo bagokora amabe
Psalms34:17 Ekero abanyene oboronge bakorera ng’a bakonywe
Psalms34:18 Omonene nigo are ang’e nabwo chinkoro chiabo chiabunekire
Psalms34:19 Omonyene oboronge nigo akonyora emechando emenge
Psalms34:20 nigo akorenda amauga aye onsi
Psalms34:21 Obobe nigo boraite omokori amabe
Psalms34:22 Omonene nigo akobooria emioyo y’abasomba baye
Psalms35:1 Aye Omonene
Psalms35:2 Bogoria enguba na eng’aya
Psalms35:3 Aye orute abanto abwo bakombwatia ritimo na esimisi! Ontebie ase omoyo one
Psalms35:4 Abanto abwo bakorigia gosiria obogima bwane
Psalms35:5 Barabwo tiga babe buna omoiriro okoirurukigwa nomwaga
Psalms35:6 Omosunte na oboterere bibe ase enchera bagoetera
Psalms35:7 Abanto abwo bambekeire oboreba bobisi engencho ende etaiyo
Psalms35:8 Ogosirigwa tiga kobanyore mobosokano; oboreba obwo bantegeire tiga bobabwate barabwo abanyene
Psalms35:9 Omoyo one nogoke ase Omonene na gochenga ase engencho y’ogotooreka kwaye.
Psalms35:10 Amauga onsi ay’omobere one natebe
Psalms35:11 Birori bi’oborimo nigo bakonyimokera
Psalms35:12 Abanto abwo nigo bakong’akana amabe ase amaya
Psalms35:13 Ekero abanto abwo barwarete nigo neboyetie eanga y’okweumia na goichana; ngechanda ase okweng’ata
Psalms35:14 Nkabechandera buna nigo barenge abasani baane gose abaminto; nigo nabegete eanga y’okweumia
Psalms35:15 Korende ekero narenge ase emechando
Psalms35:16 Abatamoirogeti Omonene nigo banchayete na gonchecheria
Psalms35:17 Omonene
Psalms35:18 Erio ninkoiranerie ng’a mbuya mono agwo ase omosangererekano omonene
Psalms35:19 Totiga ababisa baane bagoke igoro yane engencho ende etaiyo; totiga abwo bangechete bosa bagosimanera amaiso bankore bobe.
Psalms35:20 Abanto abwo tibari gokwana amang’ana akorenta omorembe; nigo bakona‐korigia amang’ana ’obong’ainereria igoro y’abanto abwo bare abatoereru ase ense.
Psalms35:21 Abwo nigo bagwasamia emenwa yabo bateba: “Ahaa! Ahaa! Ntwayarora namaiso aito.”
Psalms35:22 Aye Omonene
Psalms35:23 Nyasae one ore Omonene one
Psalms35:24 Aye Omonene
Psalms35:25 Tobatiga batebe
Psalms35:26 Abanto abwo bakogokera emechando yane
Psalms35:27 Abanto abwo banchete ng’a ng’egwe oboronge bwane
Psalms35:28 Erio oromeme rwane ndogenderere koraria oboronge bwao
Psalms36:1 Ebibe nigo bigokwana nomonto omokori amabe ase enkoro yaye ime; okomoiroka Nyasae tikori ase obosio bwaye.
Psalms36:2 Omonto oyo nigo akweremia omonyene ase okweng’aina
Psalms36:3 Amang’ana omonto oyio agokwana nigo are ay’ogosaria na obong’ainereria; ere otigire gokora amang’ana ’obong’aini na ayare amaya.
Psalms36:4 Ekero araire borere bwaye nigo agokora emeroberio y’amabe
Psalms36:5 Aye Omonene
Psalms36:6 Aye Nyasae
Psalms36:7 Nyasae
Psalms36:8 Nigo bagoisanekigwa nobonoru bokorwa ase enyomba yao
Psalms36:9 Naye ore ensoko y’obogima
Psalms36:10 Genderera koorokia obwanchani bwao obonene ase abwo bakomanyete
Psalms36:11 Totiga amagoro ’abaenenu ang’ike ang’e kondwania
Psalms36:12 Rora aase abakori amabe bagure inse
Psalms37:1 Togechigwa ase engencho y’abakori amabe
Psalms37:2 Barabwo mbasirigwe bwango
Psalms37:3 Mosemerie Omonene okore ayare amaya
Psalms37:4 Goka ase Omonene
Psalms37:5 Erue ase Omonene mosemerie
Psalms37:6 Omonene naorokie oboronge bwao buna akoorokia oborabu
Psalms37:7 Obe nobotoereru ase obosio bw’Omonene
Psalms37:8 Bwetange korwa ase endamwamu
Psalms37:9 Abanyabibe mbasirigwe kegima
Psalms37:10 Netigarete engaki ensinini
Psalms37:11 Abaitongo mbaire ense ebe eyabo
Psalms37:12 Omokori amabe nigo agokora omoroberio bw’ogoita oyore omoronge
Psalms37:13 Omonene nasekerere omokori amabe
Psalms37:14 Abakori amabe nigo bagosomora emeyio yabo na batinga amata abo
Psalms37:15 Emeyio yabo nebete chinkoro chiabo abanyene
Psalms37:16 Ebinto ebike omonto omonyaboronge abwate
Psalms37:17 Abakori amabe mbaurwe chinguru echi babwate
Psalms37:18 Omonene nigo amanyete amatuko ’abamoirogete
Psalms37:19 Barabwo tibari gosookigwa ase chingaki chi’amabe
Psalms37:20 Korende abakori amabe mbasirigwe; ababisa b’Omonene nigo bare buna obuya bw’ebisicha
Psalms37:21 Omokori amabe nigo akoira egento singo tagokeirania
Psalms37:22 Abanto abwo Omonene asesenirie mbaire ense ebe eyabo
Psalms37:23 Omonene nigo akobeka orogendo rw’omonto omoronge chinguru
Psalms37:24 Omonto oyio naisa kogochwa
Psalms37:25 Nigo narenge omwana
Psalms37:26 Omonto oyio nigo akogenderera kona‐korua ebiegwa na korua singo
Psalms37:27 Tiga gokora amabe
Psalms37:28 Omonene nigo anchete oboronge; tagotiga abachenu baye. Barabwo mbarendwe goika kare na kare
Psalms37:29 Abanyene oboronge mbaire ense ebe eyabo
Psalms37:30 Omonwa bw’omonto omoronge nigo agokwana amang’ana ’obong’aini
Psalms37:31 Amachiko a Nyasae oye nigo abeerete ase enkoro y’omonto oyio; ase agoeta tari gotererigwa.
Psalms37:32 Omokori amabe nigo agotengera omonto omoronge
Psalms37:33 Omonene tagotiga omonto omoronge ase okobua kw’omokori amabe
Psalms37:34 Ganya Omonene na obwatie enchera yaye
Psalms37:35 Narorire omokori amabe otindire ase obomwenu
Psalms37:36 Nyuma y’amatuko amake ngaetera aase agwo
Psalms37:37 Rigereria omonto omoikeranu
Psalms37:38 Korende abasaria mbasirigwe bonsi pi
Psalms37:39 Ogotooreka kw’abanyaboronge nigo gokorwa ase Omonene
Psalms37:40 Omonene nigo akobakonya na kobatooria; nigo akobarusia korwa ase abakori amabe

Psalms38:2 Kwandasire emegwe yao yasoeire ime yane
Psalms38:3 Ase engencho y’ekeririanda kiao omobere one bwensi orwarire

Psalms38:6 Igo ng’umaime na koumata
Psalms38:7 Chibachwa chiane nigo chikoyia buna omorero
Psalms38:8 Chinguru chiane chionsi chiaerire
Psalms38:9 Omonene

Psalms44:1 Nyasae
Psalms44:2 Aye omonyene nigo gwaseretie abanto b’ebisaku nokoboko kwao
Psalms44:3 Abanto bao tibairete ense eria ase okoyerwania nemioro
Psalms44:4 Aye naye omoruoti one
Psalms44:5 Ase chinguru chiao nigo toraiyerie inse ababisa baito; goetera ase erieta riao nigo toratiringere inse abwo bagocha gotorwania esegi.
Psalms44:6 Inche tinsemeretie obota bwane; gose omoro one tong’a obobui.
Psalms44:7 Korende naye gwatoete obobui igoro y’ababisa baito
Psalms44:8 Intwe ntogenderere gwetogia asore aye Nyasae
Psalms44:9 Nonya naboigo gwatotigire na gotosookia
Psalms44:10 Gwatokorire gotama ababisa baito
Psalms44:11 Aye kwarure ribaga toriegwe buna ching’ondi chikoriegwa
Psalms44:12 Aye kwaoonirie abanto bao ase rigori risinini mono; tikwababekerete rigori rinene.

Psalms44:14 Gwatokorire koba omorabaaro ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku

Psalms68:5 Nyasae oria omenyete aase aye aachenu
Psalms68:6 Nyasae nigo akoa abatigirwe bosa chinka ase bakomenya. Nigo agosibora abanto basibire baseseneka
Psalms68:7 Aye Nyasae
Psalms68:8 ense nigo yatengechete
Psalms68:9 Aye Nyasae
Psalms68:10 Omoganda oo okanyora obomenyo aase agwo. Aye Nyasae
Psalms68:11 Omonene akarua ogochika
Psalms68:12 “Abaruoti b’abarwani esegi batamire
Psalms68:13 Nonya bagendererete kobeera ase ameri e ching’ondi
Psalms68:14 Ekero Omonene ore Omobui asiarerete abaruoti b’aase agwo
Psalms68:15 Aye egetunwa kia Basani
Psalms68:16 Aye egetunwa ki’ebichuria ebinge
Psalms68:17 Chigari chia Nyasae nigo chire chilifu chinyinge mono
Psalms68:18 Aye ogatiira gochia igoro ogoosa abasibwa
Psalms68:19 Omonene atogigwe
Psalms68:20 Nyasae oito nigo are Nyasae ogotooria. Nyasae ore Omonene nigo agototooria korwa ase amakweri.
Psalms68:21 Omonene nasenyente emetwe y’ababisa baye
Psalms68:22 Korende Omonene agateba
Psalms68:23 erinde motache amanyinga abo namagoro aino
Psalms68:24 Aye Nyasae
Psalms68:25 Abateri nigo batang’aine bosio
Psalms68:26 “Inwe abamore ab’ororeria rw’Abaisraeli
Psalms68:27 Abanto ba Benjamin
Psalms68:28 Aye Nyasae
Psalms68:29 Abaruoti nigo bagokorentera ebiegwa ime ase Hekalu yao ere agwo Yerusalemu.
Psalms68:30 Togonyera eng’iti eria y’orosana emenyete ase ebitonto ime
Psalms68:31 Abanto bare ne chinguru mbarue Misiri
Psalms68:32 Inwe amaruoti are ase ense
Psalms68:33 Moterere ere oria oriinete igoro
Psalms68:34 Inwe raria okobua kwa Nyasae
Psalms68:35 Nyasae nigo are oyo bw’okogosa korwa ase obomenyo bwaye obochenu; ere Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli; nigo akoa abanto baye okobua ne chinguru. Nyasae atogigwe!
Psalms69:1 Nyasae
Psalms69:2 Nigo ngendererete korimera ase etintira ime
Psalms69:3 Narosire ekiagera nkona‐korera
Psalms69:4 Abanto nigo bangechete bosa engencho ende etaiyo; nigo bare abange kobua etukia ere ase omotwe one. Ababisa baane nigo bagokwana oborimo igoro yane
Psalms69:5 Aye Nyasae
Psalms69:6 Aye Nyasae bw’Emeganda
Psalms69:7 Inche nigo nachayirwe ase engencho yao
Psalms69:8 Inche nabeire omogeni ase abanto baminto
Psalms69:9 Risemi ri’enyomba yao riandire
Psalms69:10 Ekero nabete nkorera ase omoyo one na kweng’ata
Psalms69:11 Ekero neboyetie chigunia ase okweumia bakaba bakondabaara.
Psalms69:12 Inche ngokwanwa bobe nabwo bagoikaransa ang’e negeita kogamba

Psalms69:15 Totiga emerindo entube
Psalms69:16 Omonene

Psalms69:18 Inchuo ang’e asende

Psalms69:20 Amabe ayio nakoreirwe asionoire enkoro yane

Psalms69:22 Tiga endagera ere ase amasio abo
Psalms69:23 Oukorie amaiso abo: otengechie chibachwa chiabo kogenderera.
Psalms69:24 Obaumorere ekeririanda kiao
Psalms69:25 Tiga omochie obo otigare bosa
Psalms69:26 Abanto abwo nigo bachandete omonto oria kwaagete
Psalms69:27 Menta obobe igoro ase obobe bwabo; tobatiga basoe ase oboronge bwao.
Psalms69:28 Tiga amarieta abo atinyigwe korwa ase ebuku y’abare moyo
Psalms69:29 Inche nigo inde ase emechando na obororo; aye Nyasae
Psalms69:30 Nintogie erieta ria Nyasae ase okomoterera; nindarie obonene bwaye ase okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono.

Psalms69:32 Abwo bakoreire bobe mbarore ayio

Psalms72:1 Nyasae
Psalms72:2 Erio amanye konachera abanto bao ebina bi’oboronge na gokora ekeene ase abataka.
Psalms72:3 Ebitunwa na ebigoro mbirentere abanto omorembe goetera ase oboronge.
Psalms72:4 Tiga omoruoti abe okorwanerera abataka
Psalms72:5 Abanto mbakoiroke
Psalms72:6 Ere tiga aike korwa igoro buna embura egotwa ase obonyansi oborere
Psalms72:7 Tiga omonyaboronge asesenigwe ase amatuko aye
Psalms72:8 Tiga omoruoti abe okogamba korwa ase enyancha eyemo goika eyende
Psalms72:9 Abanto bamenyete ase erooro mbatung’ame ase obosio bwaye bamosike
Psalms72:10 Abaruoti ba Tarisisi na ab’ebisinka mbabe bakomorentera ebiegwa; naboigo nabaruoti ba Sheba na Seba mbamorentere ebango.
Psalms72:11 Abaruoti bonsi mbatung’ame ase obosio bwaye bamosike
Psalms72:12 Ere nigo agotooria oyoremeire gakorangeria
Psalms72:13 Nigo are omwororo ase omoremerwa na ase omotaka
Psalms72:14 Nigo akobooria emioyo yabo korwa ase abachandi babo na korwa ase obotindi. Amanyinga abo nigo are nengencho enene asare.
Psalms72:15 Tiga omoruoti agenderere koba moyo. Chitahabu chi’ense ya Seba chirentwe asare
Psalms72:16 Tiga endagera yame enyinge ase ense
Psalms72:17 Erieta riaye tiga rigenderere kobao botambe
Psalms72:18 Omonene Nyasae

Psalms72:20 Oyo noro omoerio bw’ogosaba gwa Daudi
Psalms73:1 Ekeene
Psalms73:2 Amagoro aane konya abeire ang’e kogochwa
Psalms73:3 ekiagera nigo nabete ne ribero ase abanto abaenenu
Psalms73:4 Barabwo tibari konyorwa nobokong’u bonde ase obogima bwabo; emebere yabo nigo ere emiya
Psalms73:5 Tibabwati emechando buna abanto bande babwate; tibari konyora amaakwa buna abande.
Psalms73:6 Ase ayio
Psalms73:7 Amaiso abo nigo akogirigenta nobonoru
Psalms73:8 Nigo bagochecheria abande na gokwana ase okobakora bobe. Nigo bakweimokereria igoro na kobatianera.
Psalms73:9 Emenwa yabo nigo egokwana amang’ana amabe are mamincha ya igoro; ne chimeme chiabo chiasokia ayakogenda ase ense engima.
Psalms73:10 Ase ayio abanto babo nigo bakoonchoka bababwatia
Psalms73:11 Erio bateba
Psalms73:12 Naama! Naboigo abakori amabe bare; botambe nigo bare buya na bagendererete komenta obotenenku bwabo.
Psalms73:13 Ekeene
Psalms73:14 Omobaso boira nabeire nkonyora amaakwa
Psalms73:15 Onye nakwanete amang’ana buna ayio
Psalms73:16 Bono ekero nabete nkorengereria komanya engencho y’amang’ana ayio
Psalms73:17 goika ekero nasoete ime ase obomenyo obochenu bwa Nyasae
Psalms73:18 Ekeene
Psalms73:19 Barabwo nigo bagosirigwa rioka
Psalms73:20 Nigo banga buna chindoto omonto akweba mambia gakoboka. Aye Omonene
Psalms73:21 Ekero narenge nobororo ase omoyo ime
Psalms73:22 nigo nabete omoriri mono
Psalms73:23 Nonya naboigo

Psalms73:25 Inee! Ning’o naende imbwate aaria igoro

Psalms74:1 Nyasae
Psalms74:2 Inyora omoganda bw’abanto bao

Psalms74:4 Ababisa bao nigo bakwoga aase abanto bao basangererekanete
Psalms74:5 Nigo yarorekanete buna nabanto bakogecha emete
Psalms74:6 Nigo baimogetie chinyundo na ebisire
Psalms74:7 Nigo basambete nomorero Obomenyo bwao Obochenu
Psalms74:8 Abanto abwo bagateba ase emioyo yabo
Psalms74:9 Titorochi ebimanyererio biaito

Psalms74:12 Nyasae

Psalms74:14 Aye nigo gwasenyentete emetwe ya Leviatani

Psalms77:17 Amare agaitera amache; ne chinkoba chigaaka korwa igoro

Psalms78:2 Inche ninkwane ase omoreng’anio

Psalms78:31 Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene asebare
Psalms78:32 Nonya naboigo
Psalms78:33 Ase ayio agakoora amatuko abo
Psalms78:34 Ekero aitete abanto abatigari nigo bamorigetie; nigo baonchogete
Psalms78:35 Nigo bainyorete ng’a Nyasae nere egetare kiabo; naende ng’a Nyasae Oyore Igoro Mono
Psalms78:36 Korende nigo bakwanete amang’ana amansu ase okomong’aina
Psalms78:37 Tibamobwatetie bokong’u ne chinkoro chiabo
Psalms78:38 Korende Omonene nigo arenge namabera
Psalms78:39 Nigo ainyorete ng’a barabwo mwanyabanto bagosira
Psalms78:40 Ase chingaki chinyinge nigo babete bagosaria ase Omonene agwo ase erooro; bakaba bakomoichania aroro agwo.
Psalms78:41 Nigo babete bakomoteema naende naende
Psalms78:42 Tibabete bakoinyora chinguru chi’okoboko kwaye
Psalms78:43 na buna akorete ebikone ebinge ase ense ya Misiri

Psalms78:45 Nigo arentete chingi chinyinge chikabachanda
Psalms78:46 Akarenta chingeeti chigasaria ebimeri biabo
Psalms78:47 Omonene nigo arentete amagena ’embura agasaria emesabibu yabo
Psalms78:48 Akarenta amagena ’embura agaita chiombe chiabo
Psalms78:49 Omonene akabatomera endamwamu yaye enene
Psalms78:50 Ere akaroiseria endamwamu yaye enchera; akabeka emioyo yabo ase amakweri
Psalms78:51 Agaita abana abatangi bonsi aaria Misiri
Psalms78:52 Erio akang’anyia abanto baye buna ching’ondi chikong’anyigwa
Psalms78:53 Akabaraa na kobarenda buya
Psalms78:54 Omonene akabarenta ase ense yaye enchenu
Psalms78:55 Agaseria abanto b’ebisaku korwa bosio bwabo. Nigo abaatananerete ense eyio ekaba emiando yabo
Psalms78:56 Erio bagateema Nyasae Ore Igoro Mono
Psalms78:57 Nigo baonchogete tibaba abegenwa

Psalms78:60 Omonene akaanga eema yaye yarenge Silo
Psalms78:61 Nigo atigete eke kiarenge chinguru chiaye kegasakorwa
Psalms78:62 Ere nigo abete nendamwamu ase abanto abwo barenge omwando oye
Psalms78:63 Omorero ogaita abamura babo
Psalms78:64 Abakuani babo nigo baitetwe nemioro
Psalms78:65 Erio Omonene akaboka buna nigo araire chitoro
Psalms78:66 agaaka abachandi baye bagatama gochia ase barwete
Psalms78:67 Omonene akaanga abanto b’ororeria rwa Yusufu
Psalms78:68 korende agachora abanto b’egesaku kia Yuda

Psalms78:70 Agachora Daudi omosomba oye
Psalms78:71 Ee

Psalms79:1 Aye Nyasae
Psalms79:2 Baeire chinyoni emebere y’abasomba bao chiyerie
Psalms79:3 Baiteire amanyinga abo buna amache ase chinsemo chionsi chia Yerusalemu
Psalms79:4 Intwe twabeire okogechia ase abanto bamenyete ang’e naintwe
Psalms79:5 Aye Omonene ngoika ririri oragenderere koba nendamwamu asetore? Inee! Ribero riao
Psalms79:6 Umora endamwamu yao igoro ase abanto b’ebisaku batakomanyeti
Psalms79:7 Naki abanto abwo basiririe abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo
Psalms79:8 Tobaisa gotoa intwe egesusuro ase engencho y’ebibe bie chisokoro chiaito; otorotote namabera ao bwango
Psalms79:9 Aye Nyasae ore ogotooreka gwaito
Psalms79:10 Nase ki abanto b’ebisaku bakoboria
Psalms79:11 Tiga ekerero ki’abasibire geike ase obosio bwao; tooria abanto abwo banacheirwe ekina bakwe
Psalms79:12 Aye Omonene
Psalms79:13 Erio intwe
Psalms80:1 Aye omorisia bw’Abaisraeli
Psalms80:2 Orokia chinguru chiao ase abanto b’Efraimu
Psalms80:3 Aye Nyasae
Psalms80:4 Aye Omonene
Psalms80:5 Aye gwakorire amariga ’omoichano koba endagera yabo
Psalms80:6 Aye gwatokorire twabeire abakwomanerwa ase egati y’abanto bare ang’e naintwe
Psalms80:7 Aye Nyasae bw’Emeganda
Psalms80:8 Aye Omonene nigo kwarentete omosabibu korwa ase ense ya Misiri
Psalms80:9 Aye nigo kwayoraberetie aase na koaroisia
Psalms80:10 Ekiriri ki’omosabibu oyio nigo giatubete ebitunwa
Psalms80:11 Chinsagia echio chikaranda chigaikeera Enyancha Enene
Psalms80:12 Nase ki rende aye gwatagoire chindwaki chiaye
Psalms80:13 Chimbeche chie rinani nigo chigosaria omosabibu oyio
Psalms80:14 Aye Nyasae bw’Emeganda

Psalms102:7 Tindi korara chitoro; nigo inga buna enyoni etigarete yoka kerama igoro.

Psalms102:9 Nigo nkoria ribu buna nkoria endagera
Psalms102:10 ekiagera kwabeire nekeririanda na endamwamu asende. Aye kwambwatire na gwantugutire gochia aare.
Psalms102:11 Amatuko aane nigo agoeta buna omorengari o mogoroba; nasusanire buna obonyansi.

Psalms115:3 Nyasae oito nigo are igoro
Psalms115:4 Emegwekano abanto abwo bagosasima nigo eroisirie korwa ase chifeta ne chitahabu
Psalms115:5 Nigo ebwate emenwa
Psalms115:6 Nebwate amato
Psalms115:7 Nebwate amaboko
Psalms115:8 Abakoroisia emegwekano eyio nabo barabe buna ero ere; naboigo na baria bayiegenete.
Psalms115:9 Inwe Abaisraeli
Psalms115:10 Inwe ab’ororeria rwa Haroni
Psalms115:11 Inwe abamoirogete Omonene
Psalms115:12 Omonene obeire ogotoinyora
Psalms115:13 Ere nasesenie bonsi abamoirogete
Psalms115:14 Tiga Omonene abamentekanie
Psalms115:15 Mosesenigwe n’Omonene
Psalms115:16 Igoro chionsi nechi’Omonene
Psalms115:17 Abakure tibari gotogia Omonene
Psalms115:18 Korende intwe ntogenderere gotogia Omonene
Psalms116:1 Nigo inyanchete Omonene
Psalms116:2 Ere ontegereire onyigure
Psalms116:3 Ebisibo bi’amakweri nigo biang’etananete; ogoichanigwa gw’aase abakure gokambwata; nigo nabete nemechando na omoichano.
Psalms116:4 Erio nkarangeria erieta ri’Omonene
Psalms116:5 Omonene nigo are nobuya na oboronge; Nyasae oito nigo are omonyene amabera.
Psalms116:6 Ere nigo akorenda abanto abakanyeku; ekero nabete nemechando
Psalms116:7 Aye omoyo one
Psalms116:8 Aye Omonene kwarusirie omoyo one ase amakweri
Psalms116:9 Nimbe ngotaara ase obosio bw’Omonene
Psalms116:10 Nigo negenete
Psalms116:11 na ase ogochandeka kwane ngateba
Psalms116:12 Ngento ki ndarue ing’iranerie Omonene ase engencho y’amaya aya ankoreire?
Psalms116:13 Ninyimokie egekombe ki’ogotooreka
Psalms116:14 Ning’ikeranie chiira chiane ase Omonene agwo ase amasio ’abanto baye bonsi.
Psalms116:15 Ekero abanto abachenu b’Omonene bagokwa
Psalms116:16 Omonene
Psalms116:17 Ase ayio nindue asore ekeng’wanso ki’ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono
Psalms116:18 Ning’ikeranie chiira chiane ase Omonene agwo ase amasio ’abanto baye bonsi.
Psalms116:19 Ninchiikeranie ase chigoora chi’enyomba y’Omonene gati‐gati yao aye Yerusalemu. Omonene atogigwe!

Psalms119:9 Naki omonto omosae arakore arende orogendo rwaye robe orochenu? Nase okoigwera ring’ana riao.
Psalms119:10 Inche nigo ngokorigia nenkoro yane yonsi; ondende timbaisa gotiga amachiko ao.
Psalms119:11 Nagachire ring’ana riao ase enkoro yane ime

Isaiah11:12 Natenenie ekemanyererio ase abanto b’ebisaku
Isaiah11:13 Ribero Abaefraimu babwate ndisire
Isaiah11:14 Abayuda na Abaefraimu mbaumokere Abafilisti korwa ensemo ya bosongo
Isaiah11:15 Omonene nasarie kegima omosomo bw’enyancha ya Misiri; nasungusie okoboko kwaye arente omwaga oguse igoro ase Orooche rwa Eufarati
Isaiah11:16 Enchera enene neroiserigwe abatigari b’abanto baye abatoorigwe korwa Asuri. Enchera eyio nebe buna eria Abaisraeli baeterete kobakorua Misiri.

Isaiah14:6 abwo baagete abanto nendamwamu

Isaiah15:1 Aya naro amang’ana igoro y’ense ya Moabu: Ari o Moabu nosarigwe ase obotuko obomo

Isaiah15:3 Abanto nigo beboyetie chigunia baichanete agwo ase chinchera
Isaiah15:4 Abanto ba Hesiboni na Eleale nigo bakorera neriogi rinene. Eriogi riabo nigo rikoigweka goikera Yahasi. Ase ayio abarwani esegi ba Moabu bakorera neriogi rinene; chinkoro chiabo chiaondokire.
Isaiah15:5 Enkoro yane nkoreera ere ense ya Moabu. Abanto baye ngotamera bare Soari na Egilati‐Selisia; nigo bagotiira gochia Luhiti bakorera. Nigo bagoaka amariogi ay’okorera kw’ogosirigwa agwo ase enchera ekogenda Horonaimu.

Isaiah15:7 Ebinto ebinge konya benyoreire
Isaiah15:8 Eriogi ri’okorera kwabo riaichoire ase ense ya Moabu; ekerero ekio giaikire Egilaimu na Beeri‐Elimu.
Isaiah15:9 Nonya nechindooche chia Dimoni chiaichoire namanyinga

Isaiah27:1 Ase engaki eyio Omonene nae Leviatani
Isaiah27:2 Ase engaki eyio omogondo bw’emesabibu ore nedivai enyinge nobeo. Notererwe ogotera oko:
Isaiah27:3 “Inche Omonene
Isaiah27:4 Inche tindi nendamwamu. Nonya amagwa na amageri are gocha kondwania nigo nare koyarwania na koyasambera amo.
Isaiah27:5 Tiga abanto babwaterere oborendi bwane mbarende ne chinguru chiane; tiga bakore omorembe nainche
Isaiah27:6 Ase amatuko agochi‐gocha Omonene nae abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo ribaga baseboke
Isaiah27:7 Inee! Omonene naagete Abaisraeli buna aagete ababisa babo? Gose Abaisraeli mbaitetwe buna ababisa babo baitetwe?
Isaiah27:8 Aye nigo kwaamereranetie nabarabwo okabaa egesusuro ase ekerengo
Isaiah27:9 Ase ayio
Isaiah27:10 Omochie ogiteire chindwaki ong’anyirwe
Isaiah27:11 Ekero chinsagia chiomire
Isaiah27:12 Ase engaki eyio Omonene nabaswage inwe Abaisraeli buna chinyeke chi’endagera na kobachora oyomo oyomo. Nigo arachakere ase orooche rwa Eufarati na goikera ase akarooche ka Misiri.
Isaiah27:13 Ekero engaki eyio eraike
Isaiah28:1 Obobe nobwao aye ore egutwa y’oboenenu bw’abanto ba Efraimu batindire. Nigo ore buna egesicha giasusanire
Isaiah28:2 Rora
Isaiah28:3 Egutwa y’oboenenu y’abanto b’Efraimu batindire netiringwe namagoro;
Isaiah28:4 na egesicha giasusanire kere obwari bw’obonene bwaye
Isaiah28:5 Ase engaki eyio Omonene bw’Emeganda nabe egutwa y’obonene
Isaiah28:6 naende nabe omoika bw’ogokora ayare ay’ekeene ase abwo bakogamba ekina
Isaiah28:7 Abanto aba nabarabwo batindire edivai; nigo bakoong’anya ase okonywa ebinyugwa bigotindia; abakuani na ababani batindire nebinyugwa bigotindia
Isaiah28:8 Chimesa chiabo chionsi chiaichoire namaroki
Isaiah28:9 Nigo bagoteba: “Ning’o Isaya aganetie kworokereria obong’aini
Isaiah28:10 Nigo agotoa ogochika igoro ase ogochika
Isaiah28:11 Ekeene
Isaiah28:12 Omonene nigo atebetie abanto abwo: “Aiga naase agotimokerwa
Isaiah28:13 Ase ayio ring’ana ri’Omonene asebare nigo rirabe iga: “Ogochika igoro ase ogochika
Isaiah28:14 Ase ayio
Isaiah28:15 Inwe nigo mogoteba
Isaiah28:16 Ase ayio Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: “Rora inche nkobeka nde rigena ri’oboroso ase Sayoni
Isaiah28:17 Ninkore ekeene kebe ekerengo gi’okorenga
Isaiah28:18 Erio okobwatana kw’ogotianania koria mwakorete namakweri ngosarigwe
Isaiah28:19 Buna koreng’ana emechando eyio erabe ekona‐gocha nebanyore inwe
Isaiah28:20 Oborere nigo bore obweng’e omonto agosinywa kwerambora igoro ase borobwo
Isaiah28:21 Omonene naimoke akore buna akorete ase egetunwa gia Perasimu; nabe nendamwamu buna abete ase Rikura ria Gibeoni; nakore ogokora kwaye kore okogeni
Isaiah28:22 Ase ayio
Isaiah28:23 Tegerera moigwe eriogi riane; igwera amang’ana aane ngokwana!
Isaiah28:24 Inee! Omonto okorema ng’a asimeke chimbusuro nigo akogenderera kona‐korema rioka? Inee! Omonto oyio nigo akogenderera kona‐koboosa rioka?
Isaiah28:25 Omonto oyio ekero akoorire koroisia riroba
Isaiah28:26 Nyasae oye nigo akomworokereria enchera engiya y’ogokora emeremo eyio.
Isaiah28:27 Dili teri koorerwa nekeoorero gi’ekioma
Isaiah28:28 Ekero omonto akoora engano
Isaiah28:29 Amorokererio ayio nigo akorwa ase Omonene bw’Emeganda; ere nigo are omosemia bw’ogokumia
Isaiah29:1 Obobe nobwao aye Arieli
Isaiah29:2 Inche Omonene nindete emechando asore Arieli
Isaiah29:3 Nintoore asore ngoetanane
Isaiah29:4 Erio abanto bamenyete ime yao mbaiyerigwe inse
Isaiah29:5 Korende ababisa bao bare omoganda omonene mbairurukigwe buna orotu; na omoganda bw’abare abatindi noirurukigwe buna omoiriro gochia aare. Amang’ana ayio nigo arabe mobosokano
Isaiah29:6 Omonene bw’Emeganda naake abanto bao ne chinkoba
Isaiah29:7 Abanto abange b’ebisaku bionsi abwo bakorwania Arieli
Isaiah29:8 Abanto b’ebisaku bionsi
Isaiah29:9 Tenena mokumie
Isaiah29:10 Omonene obaitereire inwe omoika bw’okorara chitoro chindito; oukoirie amaiso ’ababani
Isaiah29:11 Amaroro ayio onsi ay’obobani ebei re asemore buna amang’ana ’ebuku emumekeirie na kobekwa ekemanyererio. Ekero abanto bakoira ebuku eyio ase omonto omanyete gosoma
Isaiah29:12 Naende bayea oyotamanyeti gosoma
Isaiah29:13 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Abanto aba nigo bakong’ika ang’e ase ogokwana nemenwa yabo na gonsika nebikoba biabo
Isaiah29:14 Ase ayio
Isaiah29:15 Obobe nobw’abanto abwo bagokora emeroberio yabo erio bayebisa aase aatambe ng’a Omonene tayerora. Abanto abwo nigo bagokora ogokora kwabo ase chinchera chi’omosunte
Isaiah29:16 Inwe nigo mokoonchorana amang’ana bobe. Inee! Omokori chinyongo nareng’anigwe nesike? Egento keroisirie ngetebie oyokeroisetie
Isaiah29:17 Engaki netigarete enke
Isaiah29:18 Ase engaki eyio emetino nebe ekoigwa amang’ana arikire ase ebuku
Isaiah29:19 Erio abanto abaitongo nabanyore omogoko omoyia kobare ime ase Omonene
Isaiah29:20 Abakoirokia abande mbasirigwe
Isaiah29:21 Omonene nasirie abanto abwo bagosiria abande namang’ana abo
Isaiah29:22 Ase ayio Omonene
Isaiah29:23 Ekero abana babo bararore emeremo y’amaboko aane
Isaiah29:24 Erio abwo basirire ase omoika mbaegwe okomanya
Isaiah30:1 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Obobe nobwaino inwe abana baane abamore abasaria
Isaiah30:2 Inwe nigo mokogenda ase Misiri korigia ogokonywa korwa ase Farao
Isaiah30:3 Ase ayio chinguru chia Farao nchionchoke chibe obosooku bwaino; na obotamero bwaino ase ekiriri kia Misiri mbobarentere ogochaywa.
Isaiah30:4 Nonya abagambi baino bare ase omochie o Soani
Isaiah30:5 kera oyomo nasooke
Isaiah30:6 Aya naro amang’ana igoro ye ching’iti chia Irianyi. Abanto abwo nigo bagoeta ase ense ere nemechando na omoichano
Isaiah30:7 Ogokonywa kwa Misiri nigo kore bosa; ase ayio narokire ense eyio “Rahabu etari gokora gento.”
Isaiah30:8 Bono genda
Isaiah30:9 Abanto aba nigo bare abasaria
Isaiah30:10 Nigo bagotebia abarori b’amaroro: “Timobaisa korora amang’ana
Isaiah30:11 Karue inchera
Isaiah30:12 Ase ayio
Isaiah30:13 Ase ayio
Isaiah30:14 Okogwa okwo nkobe buna ogwatwa kw’enyongo y’omokori chinyongo egotinerwa inse
Isaiah30:15 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae
Isaiah30:16 Nigo mogoteba ng’a moriine chibarasi chikominyoka mono
Isaiah30:17 Abanto baino elifu eyemo mbaserigwe ase okogoswa nomonto oyomo
Isaiah30:18 Ase ayio Omonene nigo aganyete ng’a anyare kobakorera amaya; na ase ayio
Isaiah30:19 Inwe abanto momenyete Sayoni agwo Yerusalemu
Isaiah30:20 Nonya Omonene ogochia kobaa inwe omogati ekero more nemechando
Isaiah30:21 Komorabe mwagobeire korwa ase enchera gochia ensemo y’okorio
Isaiah30:22 Ase engaki eyio moimokie emegwekano yaino mogosasima
Isaiah30:23 Erio ekero morabe mogosimeka chimbusuro chiaino
Isaiah30:24 Chiombe ne chitigere chiaino
Isaiah30:25 Ase rituko erio ekero ogoitwa okonene korabe
Isaiah30:26 Oborabu bw’omotienyi mborabe se buna omobaso bw’erioba
Isaiah30:27 Rora
Isaiah30:28 Omoika bw’Omonene oye nigo onga orooche roichire goika ebigoti. Nasonge abanto b’ebisaku negesongero ki’ogosiria; ase emenwa yabo nigo arabeke ebinto ase emenwa yabo bi’okobatantania.
Isaiah30:29 Inwe motere ogotera buna nokw’omoyega omochenu bw’obotuko; chinkoro chiaino nchibe nomogoko buna ekero abanto bakobugia ebiroria kobagotiira gochia ase egetunwa ki’Omonene
Isaiah30:30 Omonene naake eriogi riaye ri’obonene na abanto bariigwe
Isaiah30:31 Ase eriogi ri’Omonene
Isaiah30:32 Omonene naimokie enyimbo yaye abae egesusuro
Isaiah30:33 Aase ogosambera ebing’wanso bi’okogechia nigo aroisetigwe kare; ee aase agwo nigo aroiseretigwe omoruoti. Aase agwo nigo are aatambe na aagare
Isaiah31:1 Obobe nobwabo abwo bagotirimboka gochia Misiri korigia ogokonywa
Isaiah31:2 Ere nigo are omong’aini na nigo akorenta obobe gose tari koonchora amang’ana aye. Nae eamate y’abakori amabe egesusuro
Isaiah31:3 Abamisiri nigo bare mwanyabanto
Isaiah31:4 Aya naro Omonene antebetie; “Buna koreng’ana endo ensae ekoronya ase eng’iti yaitire
Isaiah31:5 Buna koreng’ana chinyoni chikorambora chimbaba chiabo
Isaiah31:6 Inwe Abaisraeli
Isaiah31:7 Engaki ngocha ere kera omonto aratugute emegwekano yaye agosasima eroisirie korwa ase chifeta ne chitahabu
Isaiah31:8 “Abaasuri mbaitwe nemioro
Isaiah31:9 Oyore egetare kiabo natame ore nomoondoko omonge; na abakogamba amo nere mbatame ase okogoswa ekero bararore ebendera y’esegi.” Omonene
Isaiah32:1 Rora
Isaiah32:2 Kera oyomo obo nabe buna obwebiso ekero omwaga okogusa
Isaiah32:3 Erio amaiso ’abanto abwo bakorora tagoukora
Isaiah32:4 Erio abanto abwo batarenge ne chinkoro chi’oboremereria mbabe nebirengererio bi’okomanya
Isaiah32:5 Ase engaki eyio omonto omoriri takorokwa omosike
Isaiah32:6 Omonto omoriri nigo agokwana amang’ana ’oboriri; ebirengererio biaye nigo bigokora emeroberio y’ogokora ebibe; nigo akwenaria gokora aya atari e chingencho chinchenu; nigo agokwana bobe igoro y’Omonene
Isaiah32:7 Ebirwanero bi’omong’ainereria nigo bire ebi’obobe; ere nigo agokora emeroberio y’obosooku gosiria abachandegete ase okobatebera oborimo
Isaiah32:8 Korende omonto omosike nigo akoroberia ay’obosike
Isaiah32:9 Inwe abakungu mweisanegetie
Isaiah32:10 Inwe abakungu motechandereti kende
Isaiah32:11 Ase ayio inwe abakungu motechandereti kende
Isaiah32:12 Moake‐ake ebikuba biaino
Isaiah32:13 na ekiagera amagwa na amageri biamerire ase ense y’abanto baane
Isaiah32:14 Chinyomba chi’oboruoti nchitigwe chire bosa
Isaiah32:15 Nyuma y’ayio ntoitererwe Omoika korwa igoro
Isaiah32:16 Erio ekeene ngekorwe ase ense y’erooro
Isaiah32:17 Ayaratoke korwa ase oboronge nomorembe
Isaiah32:18 Abanto baane mbamenye ase chinyomba chire nomorembe babe barendire buya
Isaiah32:19 Ekero embura y’amagena erabe egotwa neiyerie emete ye rinani
Isaiah32:20 Imosesenirie inwe aba mogosimeka chimbusuro mbarabare ase amache onsi
Isaiah33:1 Obobe nobwaino inwe aba mogosiria
Isaiah33:2 Aye Omonene
Isaiah33:3 Ekero aye gwakanire neriogi ringa buna eri’okogukura
Isaiah33:4 Abanto nigo bagocha babasakora buna chingeeti chigosakora
Isaiah33:5 Omonene nigo aimokererete igoro
Isaiah33:6 Ase chingaki chiaino Omonene nabae oborendi obuya
Isaiah33:7 Igwa
Isaiah33:8 Chinchera chinene chiasarekire
Isaiah33:9 Ense nigo ekweumia
Isaiah33:10 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Bono ningororoke ntenene
Isaiah33:11 Inwe nigo morabe barito bw’obonyansi obwomo
Isaiah33:12 Abanto mbasambwe bayie babe ribu
Isaiah33:13 Inwe abamomenyete aare
Isaiah33:14 Abanyabibe bare Sayoni basoirwe nobwoba; omoondoko obabwatire abwo batamoirogeti Nyasae. “Monto ki oito oranyare koremereria amenye nomorero ogosiria? Ning’o ore asetore oranyare komenya ime ase omorero oyio ogendererete gwoka kare na kare?”
Isaiah33:15 Omonto okobwatia oboronge na gokwana amang’ana ’oboronge
Isaiah33:16 oyio nere oramenye aase are igoro. Ebitare ebikong’u mbibe ebikengero biaye; naegwe endagera yaye
Isaiah33:17 Amaiso aino arore omoruoti ore ase obwari bwaye; narore ense ere engare mono.
Isaiah33:18 Chinkoro chiaino nchirengererie igoro y’obwoba boria na goteba: “Inee! Oria orenge kobeka ebango
Isaiah33:19 Timokorora abanto baria abatindi naende
Isaiah33:20 Rigereria Sayoni
Isaiah33:21 Aroro agwo Omonene natoorokere ore nobonene
Isaiah33:22 Omonene nere omonachi ebina oito
Isaiah33:23 Chingori chi’omoenga bw’emeeri chianyega‐nyegire
Isaiah33:24 Onde tari bw’omochie oyio oratebe: “Inche nigo nindwarete”
Isaiah34:1 Inwe abanto b’ebisaku
Isaiah34:2 Omonene obeire nendamwamu enene ase ebisaku bionsi
Isaiah34:3 Emebere y’abanto baraitwe nigo eratugutwe isiko
Isaiah34:4 Erioba
Isaiah34:5 Omoro one onyure na koigota aiga igoro; rora
Isaiah34:6 Omoro bw’Omonene oichoirwe namanyinga
Isaiah34:7 Ching’era nachirochio nchiiyerigwe inse
Isaiah34:8 erio nerituko ri’Omonene ri’ogoakana egesiomba
Isaiah34:9 Amache e chindooche chia Edomu naonchoke abe buna eramu
Isaiah34:10 Omorero oyio nogenderere koyia obotuko na omobaso
Isaiah34:11 Chinsoti na ebirongo mbimenye aroro; ense eyio nebe eye chinyakweumia na ebigonkoru. Omonene narambore igoro yaye ekerengero gi’okoyetantania na ekebiro gi’okoyerentera obosiru.
Isaiah34:12 Abanto abasike tibagotokao baranyare kobekwa bagambe; abagambi babo bonsi nigo barasire.
Isaiah34:13 Amagwa namere ase chinyomba chi’oboruoti
Isaiah34:14 Aase agwo ching’iti chi’orosana nchiumeraneo ne chinyang’au ase obotuko amarengari nabe akorangerania
Isaiah34:15 Aase agwo chinyakweumia nchiagache ebiswa biabo
Isaiah34:16 Rigia korwa ase ebuku y’Omonene
Isaiah34:17 Omonene oakeire ebitongwa ebio obomera

Isaiah35:2 Nigo erasiche ebisicha ebinge
Isaiah35:3 Amaboko are amoro yabeke chinguru; kong’ia amaru arosire.

Isaiah35:10 Abanto abwo Omonene abooririe mbairane
Isaiah36:1 Ase omwaka o ikomi na kane bw’okogamba kw’omoruoti Hezekia
Isaiah36:2 Erio omoruoti oyio bw’Abaasuri agatoma Rabi‐Sake korwa Lakisi amo nabarwani esegi abange agende ase Hezekia agwo Yerusalemu. Rabi‐Sake agatenena ase omotaro bwe ritibo ria rogoro ase enchera ekogenda ase egetii ki’omosibia bw’ebitambaa bikoroisigwa chianga.
Isaiah36:3 Erio Eliakimu
Isaiah36:4 Rabi‐Sake akabatebia ng’a batebie Hezekia iga: “Aya naro omoruoti omonene
Isaiah36:5 Nigo okorengereria ng’a ogokwana kw’amang’ana gwoka nakwo koganeirie ase okomanya korwana esegi na koyebua? Ning’o osemeretie oragokonye goika kwangire konyingwera inche?
Isaiah36:6 Rora bono
Isaiah36:7 “Inee! Inwe nigo mogontebia ng’a nigo mosemeretie Omonene
Isaiah36:8 Inchuo moigwane mobeke rigori nomonene one
Isaiah36:9 Naki moranyare kobua omoteneneri oyomo ore omoke ase egati y’abasomba b’omonene one
Isaiah36:10 Inee! Nigo mokagete ng’a inche nigo nachire korwania ense eye na koyesaria Omonene atancheti? Taibo; Omonene nere ontebia: Genda orwanie ense eria oyesarie!”
Isaiah36:11 Erio Eliakimu
Isaiah36:12 Rabi‐Sake agateba
Isaiah36:13 Erio Rabi‐Sake agatenena
Isaiah36:14 Aya naro omoruoti agokwana: Timobaisa gwancha Hezekia abang’aine
Isaiah36:15 Timobaisa gwancha Hezekia abasirie ng’a mosemerie Omonene ekero agoteba: Ekeene
Isaiah36:16 Timobaisa gotegerera amang’ana a Hezekia. Aya naro omoruoti bw’Abaasuri agoteba: Kora omorembe nainche
Isaiah36:17 goika inchiche imbarusie agwo mbaire ase ense egwekaine buna ense eyio yaino
Isaiah36:18 Morende mono
Isaiah36:19 Ng’ai chinyasae chia Hamati na Aripadi chire? Inee! Chinyasae chia Sefariwaimu
Isaiah36:20 Nereri ase egati ye chinyasae chionsi chie chinse echio yatooririe ense yaye korwa ase okoboko kwane? Nainwe nigo mokorengereria ng’a Omonene natoorie Yerusalemu korwa ase okoboko kwane?”

Isaiah36:22 Erio Eliakimu

Isaiah37:24 Goetera ase abasomba bao gwachecheirie Omonene ekero gwatebire iga: Nase chigari chiane chinyinge nariinire goika ebichuria bi’ebitunwa
Isaiah37:25 Ngakunya
Isaiah37:26 “Inee! Aye tikwana koigwa ng’a nigo nachigete ayio kare
Isaiah37:27 Abanto be chinse echio nigo barenge abareu batari na nguru
Isaiah37:28 “Nimanyete ekero oikaransete na ekero ogosoka isiko
