Isaiah37:32 ekiagera abatigari mbache korwa Yerusalemu
Isaiah37:33 “Ase igo
Isaiah37:34 Naende nigo agoteba ng’a enchera eria acherete
Isaiah37:35 Inche ning’egere omochie oyo na koyotooria ase engencho yane inche omonyene

Isaiah38:1 Ase amatuko aria Hezekia akarwara
Isaiah38:2 Hezekia akaonchora obosio bwaye gochia ase enyasi
Isaiah38:3 akabora

Isaiah38:11 Ngateba
Isaiah38:12 Obomenyo bwane bwatagoirwe na korusigwa asende buna eema y’omorisia
Isaiah38:13 Nigo nkorera ase obotuko bwonsi ng’a nkonywe; Omonene obunire amauga aane buna endo ekobuna ebi yaitire; ekero botaraira ere nigo akoeria obogima bwane.

Isaiah40:1 Remia abanto baane! Ee
Isaiah40:2 Kwana amang’ana ’obwororo ase Yerusalemu
Isaiah40:3 Igwa eriogi ri’oyogoaka egeturi ogoteba: “Roisia enchera y’Omonene ase erooro; rongeyia enchera enene ase Omonene
Isaiah40:4 Kera rigoko nditichwe rimokerere igoro
Isaiah40:5 Obonene bw’Omonene mboorokigwe
Isaiah40:6 Eriogi rigoteba
Isaiah40:7 Obonyansi nigo bokwoma
Isaiah40:8 Ee
Isaiah40:9 Aye Sayoni
Isaiah40:10 Rora
Isaiah40:11 Narisie riicho riaye buna omorisia akorisia ching’ondi chiaye
Isaiah40:12 Ning’o orengire amache e chinyancha noroe rw’okoboko kwaye? Ning’o oramboire ebiara bi’amaboko aye korenga igoro? Ning’o obekire orotu rw’ense ase ekerengero
Isaiah40:13 Ning’o okoraa Omoika bw’Omonene
Isaiah40:14 Ning’o Omonene akoboria amosemie amang’ana buya? Ning’o omworokereretie oboeto bw’oboronge
Isaiah40:15 Naama! Ebisaku nigo binga buna entonyi y’amache egotonya korwa ase enyongo. Nigo bireng’anirie norotu orosinini rore ase esani ekorengera; rora
Isaiah40:16 Emete ye rinani ria Lebanoni tegoisana ebe chinko chigouterwa omorero
Isaiah40:17 Ebisaku bionsi nigo bire bosa ase obosio bwaye
Isaiah40:18 Nyasae
Isaiah40:19 Omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa nigo okobombwa nomoroisia ebinto
Isaiah40:20 Omonto ore omotaka otabwati ebinge akorua nigo agochora omote otari kogunda
Isaiah40:21 Inee! Timwana komanya? Timwana koigwa? Timwana gotebigwa amang’ana ayio korwa omochakano? Timwana koyamanya korwa omochakano bw’oboroso bw’ense?
Isaiah40:22 Ere nere oikaransete ase orosingo rw’ense
Isaiah40:23 Omonene nigo agokeyia abagambi baba bosa
Isaiah40:24 Abwo nigo banga buna ebimeri bisimekire masomberera
Isaiah40:25 Oyore Omochenu nigo akoboria iga: “Ning’o rende moranyare kondeng’ania
Isaiah40:26 Rigereria gochia igoro morore! Ning’o otongete ebinto ebio bionsi? Nere oria okoraa emeganda y’ebitongwa ebio ase omobaro obo
Isaiah40:27 Inwe abanto ba Yakobo
Isaiah40:28 Inee! Timwana komanya gose koigwa
Isaiah40:29 Ere nigo akoa omonto oyo ogoyire chinguru
Isaiah40:30 Abasae mbagoye na korosa
Isaiah40:31 korende abwo baganyete na gosemeria Omonene mbaegwe chinguru chinyia
Isaiah41:1 “Inwe ebisinka ne chinse chire ang’e nenyancha
Isaiah41:2 “Ning’o orangeretie oyomo korwa moocha
Isaiah41:3 Nigo akobabwatia
Isaiah41:4 Ning’o okorete na goikerania aya? Ning’o orangeretie ebiaare bi’abanto korwa omochakano? Ninche Omonene
Isaiah41:5 Ebisinka ne chinse chire ang’e nenyancha chiarorire ayio chiamwoboire
Isaiah41:6 Kera omonto nigo agokonya omogisangio oye; oyomo otebia oyonde
Isaiah41:7 Omosenia bwe chibao nigo akobeka omoturi bw’etahabu omokia
Isaiah41:8 “Korende inwe Abaisraeli
Isaiah41:9 Nigo nabarusetie korwa ase chinsinyo chi’ense
Isaiah41:10 Ase ayio timoiroka
Isaiah41:11 “Rora
Isaiah41:12 Nigo morabarigie abwo bakobasoera
Isaiah41:13 Ninche Omonene
Isaiah41:14 “Inwe ororeria rwa Yakobo ronga buna rikonde
Isaiah41:15 “Rora
Isaiah41:16 Mobisiare
Isaiah41:17 “Ekero abataka na abaremeire barabe bakorigia amache na tibayanyora
Isaiah41:18 Nindete chindooche korwa ase ebigoro ebiomo
Isaiah41:19 Nimerie emecharake ase erooro
Isaiah41:20 ende egwekaine emeuru
Isaiah41:21 Omonene
Isaiah41:22 Tiga baborente bototebie aya agochia koba; tiga bototebie amang’ana a kare buna arenge
Isaiah41:23 Totebie aya agochi‐gocha
Isaiah41:24 Naama! Inwe nigo more bosa kegima
Isaiah41:25 “Inarangeretie omonto korwa sugusu
Isaiah41:26 Ning’o obanete amang’ana ayio agwo kare
Isaiah41:27 Ninche Omonene nigo narenge omotang’ani gotebia Sayoni: Rigereria
Isaiah41:28 Korende ekero narigereretie tinaroche monto onde
Isaiah41:29 Naama! Chinyasae echio chionsi mbosa. Emeremo eyio y’abanto nigo ere bosa kegima
Isaiah42:1 “Rora
Isaiah42:2 Ere takorera
Isaiah42:3 Egetonto giatachetwe tagokebuna
Isaiah42:4 Ere takorosa gose gokwa omoyo; goika abe orentire oboronge ase ense na kobokong’ia
Isaiah42:5 Omonene Nyasae
Isaiah42:6 “Inche ninche Omonene
Isaiah42:7 Oramokie amaiso ’emeuko
Isaiah42:8 “Inche ninche Omonene
Isaiah42:9 Rora
Isaiah42:10 Moterere Omonene ogotera okoyia; motogie korwa ase chinsinyo chi’ense! Inwe abaeti ase enyancha amo nebinto bionsi bire imeo
Isaiah42:11 Tiga erooro na emechie ereo biake amariogi
Isaiah42:12 Abwo bonsi batogie Omonene na koraria obonene bwaye ase ebisinka na ase chinse chire ang’e nenyancha.
Isaiah42:13 Omonene naoroke buna etuoni y’esegi
Isaiah42:14 “Inche nabeire nkirete‐kiri ase engaki entambe
Isaiah42:15 Ninsarie kegima ebitunwa na ebigoro
Isaiah42:16 “Nindaae abanto bare emeuko ase enchera batana komanya
Isaiah42:17 Korende abanto basemeretie emegwekano egosasimwa mbairanigwe nyuma
Isaiah42:18 “Inwe abamore emetino
Isaiah42:19 Ning’o ore omouko otatiga omosomba one? Ning’o ore omotino buna omonto one natomire? Ning’o ore omouko buna omwegenwa one
Isaiah42:20 Omosomba one nigo akorora ebinto ebinge
Isaiah42:21 Ase engencho y’oboronge bwaye Omonene nigo agogete koa amachiko aye okobua na ogosikwa.
Isaiah42:22 Korende abanto aba baibirwe na gosakorwa
Isaiah42:23 Ning’o asemore oranyare gotegerera amang’ana aya
Isaiah42:24 Ning’o oruete abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo ase amaboko ’abasakori? Ning’o oruete Abaisraeli ase amaboko ’abauri? Inee! Tari Omonene oria twakorete ebibe asare? Tokaanga kobwatia chinchera chiaye
Isaiah42:25 Ase ayio Omonene akaumora ekeririanda kiaye ase abanto
Isaiah43:1 Inwe abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo
Isaiah43:2 Ekero morabe mogoeta ase amache ime
Isaiah43:3 Inche ninche Omonene
Isaiah43:4 Inwe nigo more ab’engencho enene ase amaiso aane
Isaiah43:5 Ase ayio
Isaiah43:6 Nintebie chinse chia sugusu: Tiga abanto baane barue agwo
Isaiah43:7 Kera omonto okorokwa ase erieta riane
Isaiah43:8 Renta abanto bonsi bare emeuko nonya babwate amaiso
Isaiah43:9 Tiga abanto b’ebisaku bionsi bache amo
Isaiah43:10 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Inwe nigo more birori baane
Isaiah43:11 “Inche ninche Omonene
Isaiah43:12 Nigo narentete ogotooreka
Isaiah43:13 “Ee
Isaiah43:14 Aya naro Omonene
Isaiah43:15 Inche ninche Omonene
Isaiah43:16 Omonene oroisetie enchera ase enyancha ime
Isaiah43:17 akarenta aroro chigari chi’esegi ne chibarasi
Isaiah43:18 “Timobaisa koinyora amang’ana a kare
Isaiah43:19 Naama! Ninkore ring’ana riyia; ring’ana erio riachakire kooroka; Inee! Timorirochi? Nindoisie enchera ase erooro
Isaiah43:20 erinde ching’iti chi’orosana amo nebibwe ne chisagero chinywe chintogie. Ekero ekio nintubokie amache ase erooro
Isaiah43:21 abanto abwo netongeire
Isaiah43:22 “Inwe abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo
Isaiah43:23 Inwe timwandeterete ching’ondi chiaino chibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa
Isaiah43:24 Timwangorerete ebinto bigotioka buya ne chibesa chiaino. Timwang’isanegetie nebitinya bi’ebing’wanso biaino. Taibo! Korende nigo mwandosirie nebibe biaino; mwanchandire nogosaria kwaino.
Isaiah43:25 “Inche ninche bweka ngotinyia ogosaria kwao
Isaiah43:26 Ong’inyorie
Isaiah43:27 Sokoro yao bwe ritang’ani nigo akorete ebibe
Isaiah43:28 Ase ayio ngatiga abanene b’Aase Achenu bakaba abatachenegeti
Isaiah44:1 “Aye Yakobo
Isaiah44:2 Omonene
Isaiah44:3 “Ning’umore amache ase abare nerang’o
Isaiah44:4 Abwo mbakine buna obonyansi
Isaiah44:5 Oyomo natebe ng’a noyo bw’Omonene are
Isaiah44:6 Aya naro Omonene
Isaiah44:7 Ning’o oranyare kobana buna inche
Isaiah44:8 Timoiroka
Isaiah44:9 Abanto abwo bonsi bakoroisia emegwekano y’ogosasimwa nigo bare bosa
Isaiah44:10 Ning’o okwebaachera enyasae na kwebombera ogosasimwa bitari gokonya nonyang’ake?
Isaiah44:11 Naama! Abatunyani bonsi b’emegwekano eyio mbasookigwe
Isaiah44:12 Omoturi ebioma nigo akobogoria enturago yaye otura ekioma. Nigo agokebeka igoro ase omorero bw’amakara
Isaiah44:13 Omosenia chibao nigo akorambora ekerengo
Isaiah44:14 Omonto nigo akogenda ase rinani ogecha emecharake
Isaiah44:15 Omote oria gokinire nigo okoba chinko chi’omonto oria; ere nigo akonyonacha ekeng’ese outera omorero agwota na korugera endagera
Isaiah44:16 Ase ekeng’ese kende omonto oria nigo agoutera omorero
Isaiah44:17 Ekeng’ese egetigari ki’omote oria nigo agokebaacha ogekora enyasae
Isaiah44:18 Abanto bagokora ayio nabariri
Isaiah44:19 Monto onde tari ase abwo okorengereria mono
Isaiah44:20 Oyio nigo asemeretie ayare buna ribu; enkoro yaye yang’ainekire
Isaiah44:21 “Inwe abanto ba Yakobo
Isaiah44:22 Natinyirie ogosaria kwaino buna ngotinyia riire
Isaiah44:23 Inwe igoro chionsi
Isaiah44:24 Aya naro Omonene
Isaiah44:25 Inche nigo ngosaria ebimanyererio bi’ababani b’oborimo na gokora abaringoria baba chiosi. Nigo nkoirania nyuma obong’aini bw’abang’aini na gokora okomanya kwabo kwaba oboriri.
Isaiah44:26 Inche nigo ngokora ring’ana ri’omosomba one riaba ne chinguru na goikerania emeroberio y’abatomwa baane. Ninche ngoteba igoro ya Yerusalemu ng’a nomenywe
Isaiah44:27 Ninche ngoteba igoro ye chindiba chie chinyancha ng’a chiome pa
Isaiah44:28 Nigo ngoteba igoro ya Koresi ng’a namobekire abe omorisia bw’abanto baane; ere naikeranie ogwancha kwane gwonsi
Isaiah45:1 Omonene ochorire Koresi
Isaiah45:2 “Inche nintang’ane bosio bwao
Isaiah45:3 Ninkoe chinibo chibisire ase omosunte
Isaiah45:4 Nigo ngokorangeria ase erieta riao ase engencho ya Yakobo
Isaiah45:5 “Inche ninche Omonene
Isaiah45:6 Nigo ngokora ayio
Isaiah45:7 Ninche Omotongi bw’oborabu na omosunte
Isaiah45:8 Inwe igoro chionsi
Isaiah45:9 “Obobe nobw’oyio okoamererania n’Omotongi oye
Isaiah45:10 Obobe nobw’oyio okoboria ise: Inki aye okoibora? Gose koboria ng’ina: Inki eke obogoretie inda yao ogochia koibora?”
Isaiah45:11 Aya naro Omonene
Isaiah45:12 Ninche natongete ense
Isaiah45:13 Inche Omonene naimokirie Koresi ase oboronge
Isaiah45:14 Aya naro Omonene agoteba; “Abamisiri ne chinibo chiabo bechanderete
Isaiah45:15 Aye Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli
Isaiah45:16 Abanto bonsi bakoroisia emegwekano egosasimwa
Isaiah45:17 Abaisraeli mbatoorigwe n’Omonene ase ogotoorigwa gwa kare na kare
Isaiah45:18 Omonene oyio otongete igoro chionsi
Isaiah45:19 Inche Omonene tinakwanete aase a bobisi
Isaiah45:20 “Inwe abamore abatigari korwa ase ebisaku
Isaiah45:21 Raria na morente amang’ana aino! Tiga bagambere amang’ana abo amo. Ning’o oyakwanete agwo kare? Ning’o oyararetie kare? Inee! Tari inche Omonene nayakwanete? Inche nigo inde Nyasae omonyene oboronge na Omotooria. Nyasae onde tari otatiga inche bweka.”
Isaiah45:22 “Inwe abe chinsinyo chi’ense
Isaiah45:23 Netianirie inche omonyene; ring’ana riarure ase omonwa one ase oboronge
Isaiah45:24 “Kera omonto nakwane igoro yane na goteba: Oboronge ne chinguru nigo bire ase Omonene bweka; bonsi abamogechete mbache asare basookigwe.
Isaiah45:25 Abanto bonsi b’ororeria rwa Israeli mbanyore oboronge na gwetogia ase Omonene.”
Isaiah46:1 “Beli yagure inse
Isaiah46:2 Chinyasae echio nigo chiekumbete gochia inse amo
Isaiah46:3 “Inwe ab’ororeria rwa Yakobo
Isaiah46:4 Ninche ndabe amo nainwe nonya ngoika engaki y’obogotu bwaino

Isaiah46:7 Erio bayeimokia bayebeka ase amareko abo

Isaiah47:6 Inche nigo nabete nendamwamu ase abanto baane

Isaiah50:1 Aya naro Omonene akoboria: “Ng’ai rirube ri’ogotigana rire
Isaiah50:2 “Nase ki ntanyorete nonya nomonto oyomo ekero nachete? Nase ki nonya nomonto oyomo atanyitaberete ekero narangeretie? Inee! Okoboko kwane nigo kweng’eire gotanyare kobooria? Gose inche nigo naborirwe chinguru chi’ogotooria? Naama! Ekero ngotogonyera enyancha
Isaiah50:3 Nigo nkoboyia igoro nomosunte
Isaiah50:4 Omonene Nyasae ong’eire oromeme buna orw’abeorokereretie

Isaiah50:6 Nigo naonchorete omogongo one gochia ase abwo bayoagete
Isaiah50:7 Omonene Nyasae nankonye; ase ayio tinkobugwa nogochaywa; na ase ayio nakorire obosio bwane bwabeire obokong’u buna rigena
Isaiah50:8 Ere oyokong’a oboronge bwane nigo are ang’e nainche. Onye nabo

Isaiah50:11 Naama! Inwe mwensi aba mogouta omorero

Isaiah52:2 Aye Yerusalemu

Isaiah52:6 Ase ayio

Isaiah52:12 Ekero morasoke korwao

Isaiah53:1 Ning’o bwegenire amang’ana aya twararetie? Ning’o Omonene amaanoreire okoboko kwaye?
Isaiah53:2 Omosomba oyio nigo akinete ase obosio bwaye buna ekemeri ekerere
Isaiah53:3 Ere nigo achayetwe
Isaiah53:4 Ekeene
Isaiah53:5 Korende nigo aagetwe chingoma ase engencho y’ogosaria gwaito
Isaiah53:6 Intwe twensi konya twasirire buna ching’ondi chinsiru; kera omonto nigo abwatetie enchera yaye omonyene
Isaiah53:7 Agakorerwa bobe na gochandwa
Isaiah53:8 Korwa ase ogokorerwa bobe
Isaiah53:9 Akaroiserigwa embeera amo nechi’abakori amabe
Isaiah53:10 Korende Omonene nigo anchete komokobora
Isaiah53:11 Ere narore okwama kw’emechando y’omoyo oye na goisaneka; ase obong’aini bwaye omosomba one omonyene oboronge nakore abanto abange babe abanyene oboronge
Isaiah53:12 Ase ayio
Isaiah54:1 “Aye ore omogomba otaiborete
Isaiah54:2 “Gareyia aase okobeka eema yao; orambore ebitambaa bi’eema yao. Tobaisa gotiga korambora chingori na gokong’ia ebirochi!
Isaiah54:3 Aye norande gochia ensemo y’okorio na ey’okobee
Isaiah54:4 “Tobaisa koiroka
Isaiah54:5 Omotongi oo nere omosacha oo
Isaiah54:6 Nyasae oo nigo agoteba iga: “Inche Omonene nakorangeirie aye ore buna omokungu bwangetwe
Isaiah54:7 Nigo nagotigete ase engaki enke mono
Isaiah54:8 Ekero nabete nekeririanda ekenene
Isaiah54:9 “Amang’ana aya nigo are asende buna aria abete ekero kia Nuhu. Nigo natianete ng’a amache buna aria achete ekero kia Nuhu
Isaiah54:10 Nonya nebitunwa nabiisa kong’anya
Isaiah54:11 “Aye omochie ochandire
Isaiah54:12 Ning’agache emerobiri yao namagena akorokwa agati
Isaiah54:13 “Abana bao bonsi mbabe bakworokererigwa n’Omonene
Isaiah54:14 Goetera ase oboronge nokong’igwe; ogokorerwa bobe tigokogoika ang’e
Isaiah54:15 Omonto oraseegete esegi
Isaiah54:16 “Naama! Natongire omoturi bw’ebioma
Isaiah54:17 Ebirwanero biaroisigwe ase ogokorwania
Isaiah55:1 “Naama! Inwe mwensi abamore nerang’o
Isaiah55:2 Nase ki mokorua chibesa chiaino kogora egento getari endagera? Nase ki mokwerosia gokora emeremo ase eke getari goisanekia? Ntegerere moigwe
Isaiah55:3 “Tegerera moigwe
Isaiah55:4 Rora
Isaiah55:5 Naama! Aye norangerie abanto b’ebisaku otamanyeti
Isaiah55:6 Morigie Omonene ekero akonyorekana
Isaiah55:7 Tiga omokori amabe atige chinchera chiaye
Isaiah55:8 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ebirengererio biane tibiri buna ebiaino
Isaiah55:9 Buna koreng’ana igoro ere igoro mono korwa ase ense
Isaiah55:10 “Buna embura na amagena ’embura bigotwa korwa igoro
Isaiah55:11 naboigo ne ring’ana rikorwa ase omonwa one rirabe. Tirikong’iranera bosa
Isaiah55:12 “Inwe mosoke more nomogoko
Isaiah55:13 Aase amagwa are
Isaiah56:1 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Renda ayare ay’oboronge oyakore

Isaiah56:5 amarieta abo nainyorwe ime ase enyomba yane

Isaiah56:7 abwo bonsi nimbarente ase egetunwa kiane egechenu

Isaiah56:9 Inwe ching’iti chionsi chi’orosana
Isaiah56:10 Abarendi b’abanto aba nigo bare emeuko
Isaiah56:11 Chisese echio nigo chire chindia bobe

Isaiah57:1 Omonto omonyene oboronge nigo agosira
Isaiah57:2 osoa ase omorembe. Abwo bagotaara ase oboronge nigo bakoba batimogete ase chimbeera chiabo.
Isaiah57:3 “Inwe abana b’omokungu omoringoria
Isaiah57:4 Inee! Inwe ning’o mogochecheria? Ning’o mwasameirie emenwa na mwasokirie chimeme? Inwe nigo more abanto b’ogosaria na oroiboro rw’abang’ainereria.
Isaiah57:5 Inwe nigo mogosambeka nokogania okobe ase egati y’emete enga emetontera
Isaiah57:6 Amagena amaterere are ase chindooche
Isaiah57:7 Nigo okobeka ekerarero kiao ase egetunwa keimokererete igoro mono
Isaiah57:8 Gwatenenia ekeinyorio kiao korwa ase egesieri moino y’emetobwa. Gwantigire inche
Isaiah57:9 Nigo kwaimogetie amaguta
Isaiah57:10 Nigo kwerosetie norogendo rwao rw’enchera entambe. Nonya naboigo tigwatebete ng’a ogosemeria tikori. Nigo kwamentetwe chinguru chinyia; ase ayio tikwagoyete.
Isaiah57:11 “Ning’o kwoboete na okamoiroka goika ogakwana oborimo? Tikware kong’inyora gose ondengererie? Inee! Tinabete ndemereretie ase engaki entambe
Isaiah57:12 Ningotebie buna oboronge bwao bore na buna ogokora kwao kore
Isaiah57:13 Ekero orabe gokorera
Isaiah57:14 Amang’ana aya nakwanwe: “Ticha gocha igoro! Ticha gocha igoro! Oroisie enchera! Rusia kera ekegocha kere ase enchera y’abanto baane!”
Isaiah57:15 Aya naro Oyio ore Igoro Mono
Isaiah57:16 Tinkogenderera koamererania gose koba nendamwamu kare na kare. Inse gokora bo
Isaiah57:17 Abanto nigo babwate okogania okobe kwe ribero; ase ayio nigo bagokora ebibe bikagera nkaba nendamwamu asebare
Isaiah57:18 “Narorire chinchera echio chiabo
Isaiah57:19 Nimbeke ase ebikoba biabo okwama okuya
Isaiah57:20 “Korende abakori amabe nigo banga buna enyancha yaturubanigwe
Isaiah57:21 Nyasae one nigo agoteba iga: “Omokori amabe tari nomorembe.”
Isaiah58:1 “Aka eriogi rinene

Isaiah58:5 Inee! Oko nakwo okweng’ata inche nganetie? Inee! Eye nero enchera endonge omonto agwekeyia? Ogwekumba omotwe buna risakwe

Isaiah59:1 Naama! Okoboko kw’Omonene tikori okweng’e
Isaiah59:2 Taibo
Isaiah59:3 Amaboko aino abeire ayatachenegeti ase ogoitera amanyinga ’abanto
Isaiah59:4 Onde tari ogokwana ay’oboronge
Isaiah59:5 Nigo bagoturagia amagena ’amarubi na koroisia chiusi chie chinyambobe. Oyo okoria amagena abo nigo agokwa
Isaiah59:6 Chiusi chiria bakoroisia ng’a chibe chianga
Isaiah59:7 Amagoro abo nigo are amaango ase ogokora amabe; nigo bakoayerera goitera amanyinga ’abanto batari na komocha. Ebirengererio biabo nebi’ebibe. Ogosaria na ogosiria nigo bire ase chinchera chiabo.
Isaiah59:8 Abanto abwo tibamanyeti enchera y’omorembe
Isaiah59:9 Ase ayio
Isaiah59:10 Nigo tokona‐gotaba‐taba ase enyasi y’enyomba buna abanto emeuko
Isaiah59:11 Intwe twensi nigo tokwamuma buna chidubu
Isaiah59:12 Ogosaria gwaito kwamentekanire na kwabuchire ase obosio bwao
Isaiah59:13 Twasaririe na komokana Omonene
Isaiah59:14 Okogamba ebina bi’ekeene gwatugutirwe gochia nyuma
Isaiah59:15 Ekeene kiaborire

Isaiah59:17 Omonene akeboyia oboronge bokaba buna engobo y’ekioma ase egekuba kiaye
Isaiah59:18 Omonene nabaakane koreng’ana buna ogokora kwabo kore. Nabe nendamwamu ase abwo bakomoengereria
Isaiah59:19 Abanto ba bosongo mbairoke erieta ri’Omonene
Isaiah59:20 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Inche ninchiche mboorie abanto ba Sayoni
Isaiah59:21 Oko nakwo okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania ndakore nabanto abwo: Omoika one oyio ore igoro asore

Isaiah60:8 “Mbarabi aba bagoeta buna amare agoeta igoro

Isaiah65:1 “Nigo nanyorekanete ase abwo batarenge koboria igoro yane; nigo narenge koorokera abwo batarenge kondigia. Ngatebia egesaku getarenge korangeria erieta riane gekonywe: Nao inde aa. Nao inde aa.
Isaiah65:2 Omobaso boira nigo nabeire ndamborete amaboko aane korangeria abanto abasaria batari koigwera
Isaiah65:3 Abanto aba nigo bakongechia na gokora bobe ase obosio bwane botambe; nigo bakoruera ebing’wanso ase emegondo ime na basambera ubani igoro ase ebisasimero bi’amatabori.
Isaiah65:4 Nigo bakogenda ase chimbeera baikaransa aroro

Isaiah65:10 Ense omweya ya Saroni nebe oborisia bw’amaicho e ching’ondi

Isaiah66:4 Ase ayio nainche nimbachorere amaakwa abo na kobarentera obwoba
Isaiah66:5 Inwe aba mokoiguswa ase ring’ana ri’Omonene
Isaiah66:6 Tegerera moigwe okwoga kore ase omochie ime. Igwa eriogi rikorwa ase Hekalu! Erio neriogi ri’Omonene ekero akoa ababisa baye egesusuro.
Isaiah66:7 “Omochie oyio onga buna omokungu okoibora atarachaka kobina; ekero konya ataraba nobororo bw’okobina
Isaiah66:8 Ning’o ona‐koigwa amang’ana anga buna ayio? Ning’o ona‐korora amang’ana anga buna ayio? Inee! Ense nenyare koiborwa ase rituko erimo? Gose egesaku nkeiborwe ara rimo? Korende ekero omochie o Sayoni ochagete kobina okaibora abana baye erio kegima.”
Isaiah66:9 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Inee! Ninkore engaki y’okoibora eike
Isaiah66:10 “Inwe aba mwanchete Yerusalemu

Isaiah66:13 Buna ng’ina agochanchima omwana

Isaiah66:17 “Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Abanto bagweatanana na gwechena ase ogosasima ime ase ebigondo bagotang’anwa noyomo ore ase egatigati yabo

Isaiah66:21 Naende Omonene otebire: “Nimbeke abande b’abwo babe abakuani na Abalawi.”
Isaiah66:22 “Buna koreng’ana igoro chiragenderere kobeera ase obosio bwane

Jeremiah1:4 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende rigantebia:
Jeremiah1:5 “Ekero konya ntaragotonga ase enda ya nyoko nakomanyete

Jeremiah1:9 Omonene akarambora okoboko kwaye

Jeremiah2:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Jeremiah2:2 “Genda orarie ase abanto ba Yerusalemu
Jeremiah2:3 Inwe Abaisraeli
Jeremiah2:4 Inwe ab’ororeria rwa Yakobo ne chiamate chionsi chi’Abaisraeli
Jeremiah2:5 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Mbobe ki chisokoro chiaino chiaroche asende
Jeremiah2:6 Barabwo tibaboretie: Inee! Omonene oria otorusetie ase ense ya Misiri
Jeremiah2:7 Nkabarenta ase ense y’omoigoto
Jeremiah2:8 Abakuani tibaboretie: Ng’ai Omonene are? Baria barenge kworokereria amachiko aane
Jeremiah2:9 Omonene otebire iga: “Inche ningendererete kobagambia inwe ekina
Jeremiah2:10 Amboka gochia ase ebisinka bi’Abakuporo
Jeremiah2:11 Inee! Gesaku kende kiana koonchoreria chinyasae chiaye
Jeremiah2:12 Inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Inwe igoro chionsi
Jeremiah2:13 Abanto baane bakorire amabe abere: bantigire inche inde ensoko y’amache amaya ay’obogima; bakunyire ebisima biabo bi’amache
Jeremiah2:14 “Inee! Abaisraeli nabasomba bare? Gose nigo baiboretwe bare abasomba? Onye taibo
Jeremiah2:15 Chindo chiarumire asebare
Jeremiah2:16 Abanto ba Memifisi na aba Tapanesi baikaranseire emetwe yaino.
Jeremiah2:17 Inee! Tari inwe abanyene mwerenteire emechando eye
Jeremiah2:18 Ngento ki mogochia konyora ase okogenda Misiri konywa amache ’orooche rwa Sihori? Gose inki mogochia konyora ase okogenda Asuri konywa amache ’orooche rw’Eufarati?
Jeremiah2:19 “Obobe bwaino nabobarentere egesusuro; okogwa kwaino korwa ase okwegena nkogere motogonyerwe. Goika momanye na korora ng’a mwerenteire obobe na obororo ekero mwantigire inche Omonene
Jeremiah2:20 Naende Omonene otebire iga: “Agwo kare inwe nigo mwerusetie rikorogoto riaino
Jeremiah2:21 Inche nkabasimeka buna omosabibu omuya
Jeremiah2:22 Inwe namoisa gwesiberia esabuni ere ne chinguru chi’okorusia riko
Jeremiah2:23 Naki inwe moranyare goteba: Titori abatachenegeti
Jeremiah2:24 Mwabeire buna etigere eaberi y’orosana enarete ase erooro
Jeremiah2:25 Renda amagoro aino
Jeremiah2:26 “Buna koreng’ana omoibi akoba nobosooku ekero abwatirwe
Jeremiah2:27 Inwe mwensi abamogoteba ng’a
Jeremiah2:28 “Inwe Abayuda
Jeremiah2:29 Inche Omonene nakwanire iga: Nase ki mokwemurungania asende? Inwe mwensi mwasaririe asende.
Jeremiah2:30 Nkaa abana baino egesusuro
Jeremiah2:31 Inwe Abaisraeli b’ekegori eke
Jeremiah2:32 Inee! Omoiseke omwekungi nanyare kweba ebinto biaye bi’ogwechabera? Gose omoriakari nkweba are chianga chiaye chi’enyangi? Korende abanto baane banyebire ase amatuko amange mono.
Jeremiah2:33 Imomanyete buya mono korigia abanchi

Jeremiah23:25 Naigure amang’ana ’ababani abwo bagokwana
Jeremiah23:26 Inee! Ngoika ririri oborimo boragenderere koba ime ase chinkoro chi’ababani abwo bakobana obong’ainereria bwe chinkoro chiabo?
Jeremiah23:27 Ababani abwo barengereirie ng’a abanto baane nigo barebe erieta riane ase engencho ye chindoto chiabo babe bagotebania buna chisokoro chiabo chiebete erieta riane
Jeremiah23:28 Omobani oria obwate chindoto
Jeremiah23:29 Inee! Ring’ana riane tiriri buna omorero

Jeremiah47:3 Ekero baraigwe amariogi ’ebititiro bi’ebitaago bie chibarasi

Jeremiah47:5 Gasa yatigaire bosa
Jeremiah47:6 Aye omoyio o birende bw’Omonene
Jeremiah47:7 Naki omoyio orakore okire‐kiri na gotimoka
Jeremiah48:1 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda
Jeremiah48:2 ogotogigwa kw’Abamoabu gwasirire. Ababisa bare Hesiboni barobeirie gokora ense eria bobe. Nigo bagotebania: Inchuo tosirie abanto baye tibabaisa koba egesaku naende. Aye omochie o Madimena boigo nokirigwe‐kiri
Jeremiah48:3 Eriogi ri’okorera nariigugwe korwa Horonaimu
Jeremiah48:4 “Ense ya Moabu yasarigwe
Jeremiah48:5 Nigo bagotiira gochia Luhiti bakorera; ekero bagotirimboka korwa Horonaimu
Jeremiah48:6 Tama! Motoorie obogima bwaino
Jeremiah48:7 “Ekiagera inwe mosemeretie emeremo yaino
Jeremiah48:8 Oyio ogosaria na gosiria nachiche ase kera omochie
Jeremiah48:9 “Kae ense ya Moabu chimbaba
Jeremiah48:10 Oragererigwe omonto oria ogokora emeremo y’Omonene nobworo
Jeremiah48:11 “Abamoabu babeire barendire bamenyete ase obotoereru korwa ase oboke bwabo. Babeire buna edivai etarakenonorwa korwa ase eturubo. Tibana koumorwa korwa ase ekebekerero ekemo gochia ase ekende
Jeremiah48:12 “Ase ayio
Jeremiah48:13 Na abanto ba Moabu nabarore obosooku ase enyasae eria Kemosi
Jeremiah48:14 “Naki mogoteba: Intwe nabarwani chituoni
Jeremiah48:15 Oyogosaria na gosiria ense ya Moabu na emechie yaye ochire; abamura baye bare abaya mono baitirwe. Nabo omoruoti
Jeremiah48:16 Emechando y’Abamoabu yabeire ang’e mono
Jeremiah48:17 “Inwe abwo momenyete ase chinsemo chiaye chionsi
Jeremiah48:18 Inwe abanto ba Diboni
Jeremiah48:19 Inwe abanto momenyete Aroeri
Jeremiah48:20 Ense ya Moabu yasookigwe
Jeremiah48:21 “Ekina kianachirwe igoro y’ense eraire eimokererete igoro ya Holoni
Jeremiah48:22 na Diboni
Jeremiah48:23 na Kiriataimu
Jeremiah48:24 na Kerioti
Jeremiah48:25 Chingunchara chi’Abamoabu chiabutoirwe
Jeremiah48:26 “Kae Abamoabu banywe batinde
Jeremiah48:27 Inee! Inwe timwabasekererete Abaisraeli? Abwo banyorekanete bare ase ekeombe ki’abaibi? Gose nase ki mwarenge gosinga‐singisia emetwe yaino ekero mware gokwana igoro yabo?
Jeremiah48:28 “Inwe abanto momenyete Moabu
Jeremiah48:29 Twaigure igoro y’oboenenu bw’Abamoabu; nigo bare abaenenu mono. Twaigure buna beimokereirie igoro
Jeremiah48:30 Inche Omonene nigo imanyete ribero riabo. Ogwetogia kwabo nigo kore okw’obong’ainereria
Jeremiah48:31 Ase engencho eyio
Jeremiah48:32 Inwe abanto ba Sibuma
Jeremiah48:33 Omogoko na omochengo biarusigwe korwa ase ense ya Moabu eyio ekwama ase obonge. Nasiririe edivai korwa ase ebimitero; monto onde tari okomita edivai ogotera ore nomochengo. Eriogi rigoakwa tiriri eri’omogoko.
Jeremiah48:34 “Abanto ba Hesiboni na ab’Eleale nigo bakorera
Jeremiah48:35 Ninsirie Abamoabu
Jeremiah48:36 “Ase igo enkoro yane nigo ekobareera Abamoabu na abanto ba Kireresi
Jeremiah48:37 Kera omonto akigite etukia y’omotwe oye
Jeremiah48:38 Ase chinyomba chionsi chi’ense ya Moabu
Jeremiah48:39 Abanto nkorera bare
Jeremiah48:40 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Egesaku gete nkeiruruke bwango buna ekeongo
Jeremiah48:41 Emechie amo ne chindwaki chire chinkong’u mbibwatwe. Ase rituko erio chinkoro chi’abarwani esegi ba Moabu bare chituoni nachiondoke; barabwo babe buna abakungu bakobina ase okoibora.
Jeremiah48:42 Abanto ba Moabu nabasirigwe kegima tibagenderera koba egesaku
Jeremiah48:43 Inwe abamomenyete Moabu
Jeremiah48:44 Onde bwensi oratame ase engencho y’omoondoko nagwe ase eirima
Jeremiah48:45 Abare gotama bagatenena ase ekiriri kia Hesiboni batari ne chinguru. Omorero okarua ase Hesiboni
Jeremiah48:46 Obobe nobwaino
Jeremiah48:47 “Korende ase amatuko agochi‐gocha ning’iranerie Abamoabu amaya abo. Nabo inche Omonene natebire.” Ayio naro arakoreke ase Abamoabu.
Jeremiah49:1 Aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro y’Abaamoni: “Inee! Abaisraeli tibabwati abana? Tibabwati abakoira omwando? Nase ki enyasae Milikomu yairire omwando o Gadi
Jeremiah49:2 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Rora
Jeremiah49:3 Inwe abanto ba Hesiboni
Jeremiah49:4 Inwe abaiseke baane ababiare motari abegenwa
Jeremiah49:5 Omonene
Jeremiah49:6 “Korende nyuma y’ayio ning’iranerie Abaamoni amaya abo. Inche Omonene nakwanire.”
Jeremiah49:7 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba igoro y’Abaedomu: “Inee! Obong’aini mbwaerire korwa Temani? Ogosemia ngwasirire korwa ase abanyasemi? Obong’aini bwabo mbwasirire kegima?
Jeremiah49:8 Inwe abanto momenyete Dedani
Jeremiah49:9 Inee! Abasangereria amasabibu baare gocha asemore
Jeremiah49:10 Nachoboire abanto b’Esau na kobatiga bosa; nasioririe aase bakwebisa
Jeremiah49:11 Batige abana abwo batabwati abaise
Jeremiah49:12 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Onye abanto baria batagwenerete konywa egekombe ki’egesusuro bakenywerete
Jeremiah49:13 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Inche omonyene natianire ng’a omochie o Bosira nobe bosa. Ekero abanto bakoyorora mbaondoke na koyochecheria
Jeremiah49:14 Naigure amang’ana korwa ase Omonene; omonto otomirwe ase egati y’ebisaku
Jeremiah49:15 Naki ningokore obe omoke ase egati y’ebisaku. Abanto bonsi nabagochaye.
Jeremiah49:16 Okogosa kwao na oboenenu bw’enkoro yao biakong’ainire. Aye omenyete ime ase emienya y’ebitare
Jeremiah49:17 “Edomu nosarigwe obe ekiorokererio gi’okoondokia. Kera omonto oraetere aase agwo naondoke na goichanigwa ase engencho y’amaakwa aye.
Jeremiah49:18 Omonene nigo agoteba ng’a koreng’ana buna Sodomu na Gomora na emechie yarenge ang’e noro yasiretigwe
Jeremiah49:19 Rora
Jeremiah49:20 Ase ayio tegerera moigwe omoroberio inche Omonene nakorire igoro y’Abaedomu
Jeremiah49:21 Ekero abanto b’Edomu baragwe
Jeremiah49:22 Naama! Egesaku gete nkeimokerere igoro keiruruke bwango buna ekeongo
Jeremiah49:23 Amang’ana igoro ya Damesiki naro aya: “Abanto ba Hamati na ab’Aripadi basookire
Jeremiah49:24 Abanto ba Damesiki babeire aboro tibari na nguru; beonchoire gotama
Jeremiah49:25 Naki omochie oria omanyekanete mono
Jeremiah49:26 Ase ayio
Jeremiah49:27 Nintongie omorero ase chindwaki chia Damesiki
Jeremiah49:28 Aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro ya Kedari
Jeremiah49:29 Mosakore chiema chiabo na amaicho abo
Jeremiah49:30 “Inwe abanto ba Hasori
Jeremiah49:31 Imoka
Jeremiah49:32 “Mosakore
Jeremiah49:33 Hasori nosareke
Jeremiah49:34 Ase omochakano bw’okogamba gwa Zedekia
Jeremiah49:35 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Rora
Jeremiah49:36 Nindete chimbeo inye korwa ase chinsemo inye chia igoro
Jeremiah49:37 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Ningere abanto b’Elamu boboe ababisa babo
Jeremiah49:38 Nimbeke oboikaranso bwane bw’obonene agwo ase ense y’Abaelamu
Jeremiah49:39 Korende ase amatuko agochi‐gocha ning’iranerie Abaelamu amaya abo. Nabo Omonene atebire.”
Jeremiah50:1 Aya naro Omonene akwanete goetera ase Yeremia omobani igoro y’omochie o Babeli na ense engima y’Abakalidayo:
Jeremiah50:2 “Kwana ase egati y’ebisaku
Jeremiah50:3 “Egesaku kiarure sugusu gocha korwania Babeli. Nagesarie ense eyio ebe buna erooro
Jeremiah50:4 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ase amatuko ayio
Jeremiah50:5 Barabwo mbaborie bamanye enchera ekogenda Sayoni
Jeremiah50:6 “Abanto baane babeire buna ching’ondi chinsiru. Abarisia babo babasiririe
Jeremiah50:7 Abanto bande bonsi babanyorete nigo babakorete bobe. Ababisa babo babeire bagoteba: Intwe titori nokomocha ase ogokora iga
Jeremiah50:8 “Tama korwa Babeli
Jeremiah50:9 Naama! Inche ngoseegeta nde omoganda bw’ebisaku ebinene
Jeremiah50:10 Ense y’Abakalidayo nesakorwe
Jeremiah50:11 “Inwe aba mwasakorete omwando one
Jeremiah50:12 nyoko nabe nobosooku obonene
Jeremiah50:13 Ase engencho y’endamwamu y’Omonene Babeli nosirigwe kegima
Jeremiah50:14 “Inwe mwensi momanyete gokumba amata
Jeremiah50:15 Imoka
Jeremiah50:16 Siria kegima korwa Babeli omobusuri na oyokoimokia omoyio bwe rigesa
Jeremiah50:17 “Abaisraeli nigo banga buna ching’ondi chigoserigwa ne chindo na goserebanigwa gochia aaria na aaria. Ritang’ani omoruoti bw’Abaasuri akababua na kobasiria
Jeremiah50:18 Ase ayio
Jeremiah50:19 Ning’iranie Abaisraeli gocha ase obomenyo bwabo naende. Nabarabwo nabarie chindagera chiabo agwo ase egetunwa gia Karimeli
Jeremiah50:20 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Ase amatuko ayio
Jeremiah50:21 Omonene otebire
Jeremiah50:22 Eriogi ri’esegi riachire ase ense amo nogosirigwa okonene.
Jeremiah50:23 Naki enturago eria yaagete ense engima yaakirwe na gwateka! Naki Babeli osirigwe
Jeremiah50:24 Aye Babeli
Jeremiah50:25 Omonene oigoire ase agachete ebirwanero biaye
Jeremiah50:26 Inchuo morwanie ense eyio korwa ase chinsemo chionsi
Jeremiah50:27 Moite abarwani babo b’esegi banga buna chieri
Jeremiah50:28 “Igwa eriogi ri’abanto bagotama korwa ase ense ya Babeli
Jeremiah50:29 “Rangeria abanto bamanyete korwanera amata bachiche korwania Babeli. Moyoboere ase chinsemo chionsi
Jeremiah50:30 Ase rituko erio abamura b’omochie oyio
Jeremiah50:31 “Naende inche Omonene
Jeremiah50:32 Oyio ore omoenenu nagochwe na kogwa
Jeremiah50:33 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Abaisraeli amo n’Abayuda nigo bachandire. Abanto abwo babairete ase obosomba nigo bababwatete bokong’u
Jeremiah50:34 Korende omobooria obo nigo are ne chinguru. Omonene bw’Emeganda nario erieta riaye. Ekeene
Jeremiah50:35 “Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Omoro obe igoro ase Abakalidayo
Jeremiah50:36 Omoro obe igoro ase abaringoria
Jeremiah50:37 Omoro obe igoro ase chibarasi ne chigari chia Babeli! Omoro obe igoro ase abarwani esegi b’ense eng’ao
Jeremiah50:38 Egurugura nebe igoro ase chindooche chiaye
Jeremiah50:39 “Ase ayio ching’iti chi’orosana
Jeremiah50:40 Buna yabete ekero keria Nyasae asiretie emechie ya Sodomu na Gomora
Jeremiah50:41 “Naama! Abanto ngocha bare korwa sugusu
Jeremiah50:42 Abanto abwo nigo babwate amata na amatimo
Jeremiah50:43 “Omoruoti o Babeli oigure amang’ana igoro yabo
Jeremiah50:44 “Rora
Jeremiah50:45 Ase ayio
Jeremiah50:46 Ekero Babeli orabwatwe
Jeremiah51:1 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Rora
Jeremiah51:2 Ase rituko riria ri’emechando nintomere abanto ba Babeli abairuri babairure
Jeremiah51:3 Timobaisa gotiga abarwani bakumbe amata na korasa chinsara chiabo
Jeremiah51:4 Abanto abwo mbaitwe ase ense y’Abakalidayo
Jeremiah51:5 Nyasae
Jeremiah51:6 Tama korwa Babeli
Jeremiah51:7 Babeli nigo yarenge buna egekombe gi’etahabu ase okoboko kw’Omonene; ebisaku bionsi bi’ense bikanywera korwa ase kerokio bigatinda. Ebisaku bikanywa edivai ya Babeli
Jeremiah51:8 Babeli ogure mobosokano na gosirigwa
Jeremiah51:9 Nanga nabo twagwenetie Babeli
Jeremiah51:10 “Omonene otorenteire oboronge bwaito. Inchuo torarie ase Sayoni emeremo y’Omonene
Jeremiah51:11 “Tieria chinsara! Imokia chinguba! Omonene oseegetire emeika y’abaruoti b’Abamedi
Jeremiah51:12 Tenenia ebendera ase chindwaki chia Babeli! Kora oborendi bobe obokong’u ase okobeka abarendi. Beka abanto bebise na koboa
Jeremiah51:13 Aye omenyete aase amache amange are
Jeremiah51:14 Omonene bw’Emeganda bwetianirie ogoteba: Ekeene
Jeremiah51:15 “Omonene nere otongete ense ase okobua kwaye
Jeremiah51:16 Ekero agokwana neriogi riaye
Jeremiah51:17 Kera omonto nigo are omoriri
Jeremiah51:18 Eyio nigo ere bosa
Jeremiah51:19 Korende oyore egetari o Yakobo tagwekaini emegwekano eyio; nere otongete ebinto bionsi. Abaisraeli nigo bare egesaku ki’omwando oye; Omonene bw’Emeganda nario erieta riaye.”
Jeremiah51:20 “Aye nenturago na ekerwanero kiane gi’esegi; goetera asore ning’ake ebisaku bibe ebisamunye
Jeremiah51:21 Goetera asore ninsamunyore chibarasi na abanto bachiriinete; ninsamunyore ne chigari na abagochigendia.
Jeremiah51:22 Goetera asore ninsamunyore abasacha na abakungu
Jeremiah51:23 goetera asore ninsamunyore abarisia ne riicho riabo
Jeremiah51:24 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Agwo ase amasio aino ning’akane Babeli na Abakalidayo bonsi obobe bwabo bwonsi bakorete ase Sayoni.
Jeremiah51:25 Aye egetunwa kegosiria
Jeremiah51:26 Igena rinde tirikorusigwa asore ribe eri’ekoona
Jeremiah51:27 “Tenenia ebendera y’esegi igoro ase ense! Bugia egetureri ase egati y’ebisaku! Beka ebisaku ang’e birwanie Babeli. Rangeria amaruoti ayorwanie
Jeremiah51:28 Beka ebisaku ang’e biche korwania Babeli. Rangeria abaruoti b’Abamedi amo nabagavuna na abakonyi babo
Jeremiah51:29 Erio ense etengeche na koiguswa ase obororo
Jeremiah51:30 Abarwani chituoni ba Babeli batigire korwana esegi. Nigo bagendererete kobeera ase chiburi ime
Jeremiah51:31 Omominyoki oyomo naminyoke aumerane noyonde
Jeremiah51:32 naende ng’a ebiambokero biabwatirwe
Jeremiah51:33 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda
Jeremiah51:34 “Nebukadinesaro
Jeremiah51:35 Obobe bw’obotindi bwakoretwe asende na ase abaminto nabobekwe igoro ya Babeli. Tiga abanto ba Sayoni batebe: Okomocha kw’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga aito
Jeremiah51:36 Ase ayio aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Naama! Nimbarwanerere inwe
Jeremiah51:37 Babeli nosirigwe obe etui y’amatongo ase chisese chi’orosana chiramenye. Abanto tibakomenya aroro
Jeremiah51:38 Abanto ba Babeli nabaronye amo buna chindo chikoronya; nabarere buna chindo chinsae.
Jeremiah51:39 Ekero bare ne ribero rinene
Jeremiah51:40 Nimbarente banyenywe buna chimanwa chie ching’ondi
Jeremiah51:41 “Naki Sesaki
Jeremiah51:42 Enyancha yaumokire igoro ase Babeli
Jeremiah51:43 Emechie y’ense eyio yasirigwe yabeire ey’okoondokia
Jeremiah51:44 Ning’ee enyasae Beli ya Babeli egesusuro
Jeremiah51:45 Inwe abanto baane
Jeremiah51:46 Timokwa emioyo
Jeremiah51:47 Ase ayio
Jeremiah51:48 Erio igoro na ense
Jeremiah51:49 Babeli goika esirigwe
Jeremiah51:50 “Inwe abamwatoorekire korwa ase emioro
Jeremiah51:51 Inwe nigo mogoteba: Intwe twanyorire obosooku
Jeremiah51:52 Inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Ase engencho eyio
Jeremiah51:53 Babeli
Jeremiah51:54 “Tegerera moigwe ekerero gekorwa Babeli. Eriogi ri’ogosirigwa okonene riarure ase ense y’Abakalidayo.
Jeremiah51:55 Inche Omonene nasiririe Babeli; nakiririe amariogi amanene arengeo. Emerindo egocha aroro nigo ekoeera buna amache amange
Jeremiah51:56 Abagosiria bachire gosiria Babeli; abarwani baye chituoni bairirwe
Jeremiah51:57 Ninyoisie na gotindia abanene b’oboruoti bwa Babeli na abanto baye abang’aini; na abagambi baye
Jeremiah51:58 Aya naro inche Omonene bw’Emeganda ngoteba: “Chindwaki chinetu chia Babeli nachiyerigwe inse
Jeremiah51:59 Aya naro amang’ana Yeremia omobani achigete Seraya mosinto o Neria
Jeremiah51:60 Yeremia akarika ase ebuku obobe bwonsi bware gocha konyora Babeli
Jeremiah51:61 Yeremia agatebia Seraya
Jeremiah51:62 Erio otebe: Aye Omonene gwatebire ng’a nosirie aase aiga kegima
Jeremiah51:63 Na ekero gwakoorire gosoma ebuku eye
Jeremiah51:64 Erio otebe iga: Naboigo Babeli erarimere
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekia nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere nomo
Jeremiah52:2 Zedekia oyio agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene
Jeremiah52:3 Ekeene
Jeremiah52:4 Ase omwaka o kianda
Jeremiah52:5 Igo omochie oria okaba onaaririe goika omwaka o ikomi nomo bw’okogamba gwa Zedekia omoruoti.
Jeremiah52:6 Ase rituko ria kianda ri’omotienyi o kane
Jeremiah52:7 Erio chindwaki chi’omochie chikabochorwa
Jeremiah52:8 Abarwani esegi b’Abakalidayo bakabwatia Zedekia omoruoti
Jeremiah52:9 Erio bakabwata omoruoti oria
Jeremiah52:10 Agwo Ribula omoruoti oria agaita abana abamura ba Zedekia ase amaiso aye
Jeremiah52:11 Naende agakonora amaiso a Zedekia
Jeremiah52:12 Ase rituko ria ikomi ri’omotienyi o gatano
Jeremiah52:13 Ere agasamba enyomba y’Omonene
Jeremiah52:14 Abarwani esegi bonsi b’Abakalidayo
Jeremiah52:15 Erio Nebusaradani
Jeremiah52:16 Korende Nebusaradani oria omoteneneri bw’abarendi agatiga abanto bande barenge abataka mono b’ense eria babeere aroro. Abwo bakaba bakoroiseria emegondo y’emesabibu na gokora emeremo y’okorema.
Jeremiah52:17 Abakalidayo bakabuna chisiiro chie chitaai chiria chiarenge ime ase enyomba y’Omonene
Jeremiah52:18 Boigo bakaira chindogio
Jeremiah52:19 Bakaira ne chibakuria chinke
Jeremiah52:20 Oborito bwe chitaai chiaroisetie chisiiro chiria ibere
Jeremiah52:21 Kera eyemo ye chisiiro chiria nigo yarenge nobotambe bw’amaboko ikomi na atano na atato
Jeremiah52:22 Na igoro ase kera esiiro
Jeremiah52:23 Ase chinsemo chiaye narengeo amakomomanga emerongo kianda
Jeremiah52:24 Omoteneneri oria bw’abarendi akaira Seraya
Jeremiah52:25 Naende akaira korwa ase omochie oria omonto oyomo orenge omochiki bw’abarwani esegi
Jeremiah52:26 Nebusaradani
Jeremiah52:27 Omoruoti o Babeli akabaita bagakwera agwo Ribula
Jeremiah52:28 Oyo noro omobaro bw’abanto Nebukadinesaro airete ase obosomba: ase omwaka o gatano na kabere akaira Abayahudi chilifu isato
Jeremiah52:29 Ase omwaka o ikomi na gatano na gatato. Nebukadinesaro akaira korwa Yerusalemu abanto amagana atano na atato
Jeremiah52:30 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo ebere
Jeremiah52:31 Ase omwaka oria Ewili‐Merodaki akaba omoruoti o Babeli akarorera Yehoyakini amabera na ogosika
Jeremiah52:32 Ewili‐Merodaki agakwana amang’ana ’obwororo nere
Jeremiah52:33 Ase igo Yehoyakini akaonchoreria chianga chiaye chi’obosibwa
Jeremiah52:34 Omoruoti akamoa endagera yaye botambe na kera egento arenge kogania ase kera rituko ase obogima bwaye bwonsi goika ekero ki’ogokwa kwaye.
Lamentations1:1 Naki omochie oyo otigaire bosa
Lamentations1:2 Nigo okorera nobororo botuko bokia
Lamentations1:3 Abayuda bairirwe ase obosomba
Lamentations1:4 Chinchera chikogenda Sayoni nigo chiichanete
Lamentations1:5 Ababisa baye babeire abanene baye
Lamentations1:6 Ogosikwa gwonsi kwarure ase abanto ba Sayoni; abagambi baye babeire buna chingabi chitabwati ase chikorisia; batamire korwa ase abakobabwatia
Lamentations1:7 Ekero abanto ba Yerusalemu barenge nemechando na obokong’u
Lamentations1:8 Abanto ba Yerusalemu bakorire ebibe ebinene; ase ayio babeire okogechia
Lamentations1:9 Riko riaye nigo riarenge ase chianga chiaye
Lamentations1:10 Omobisa oyio oramboire amaboko aye gochia gosakora ebinto bionsi bie rigori rinene bire ase omochie ime; ee
Lamentations1:11 Abanto bonsi b’omochie nigo baumatete
Lamentations1:12 “Inee! Inwe mwensi aba mogoeta inchera aa
Lamentations1:13 “Otomire omorero korwa igoro osambire amauga aane oyabuire
Lamentations1:14 “Ogosaria kwane okonge nigo gwasiberanetigwe nokoboko kwaye
Lamentations1:15 “Omonene bwangire abanto bonsi chituoni
Lamentations1:16 “Ase engencho y’amang’ana aya nigo nkorera
Lamentations1:17 Abanto ba Sayoni basamunsire amaboko abo
Lamentations1:18 “Omonene nomonyene oboronge
Lamentations1:19 “Inche nkarangeria abanchi baane ng’a bankonye
Lamentations1:20 “Aye Omonene
Lamentations1:21 “Abanto baigure buna ng’umatete
Lamentations1:22 “Tiga obobe bwabo bwonsi bororekane ase obosio bwao
Lamentations2:1 Naki Omonene atubire omochie o Sayoni nomosunte
Lamentations2:2 Omonene oiyeirie inse obomenyo bwonsi bw’abanto ba Yakobo atari namabera
Lamentations2:3 Obutoire chingunchara chionsi chi’Abaisraeli ore nendamwamu yaye entindi
Lamentations2:4 Ere otingire obota bwaye buna omobisa agotinga
Lamentations2:5 Omonene obeire buna omobisa

Ezekiel10:4 Erio obonene bw’Omonene bokaimokerera igoro
Ezekiel10:5 Eriogi ri’ogoakania chimbaba chi’abakerubi baria rikaigugwa ase eraaro ya isiko
Ezekiel10:6 Ekero Omonene achigete omonto oria obegete eanga y’egatani agende korusia omorero korwa ase egati‐gati y’amagoro aria anga chinyange
Ezekiel10:7 Omokerubi oria oyomo akarambora okoboko kwaye ase egati‐gati y’abakerubi bande
Ezekiel10:8 Nkarora inse ye chimbaba chi’abakerubi baria egento gekororekana buna okoboko kw’omonto.
Ezekiel10:9 Nkarigereria nkarora amagoro aria anga chinyange ane mbarabare y’abakerubi
Ezekiel10:10 Amagoro aria ane nigo agwekaine
Ezekiel10:11 Ekero amagoro ayio arenge kogenda
Ezekiel10:12 Emebere y’abakerubi baria
Ezekiel10:13 Nkaigwa amagoro aria akorokwa “Oborundarundia”.
Ezekiel10:14 Kera omokerubi nigo abwate amasio ane; obosio bwe ritang’ani nigo bwarenge buna obw’omokerubi
Ezekiel10:15 Amakerubi abwo bakaimoka gochia igoro. Ebitongwa ebio nabio biria naroche ang’e norooche rwa Kebari.
Ezekiel10:16 Ekero abakerubi baria barenge kogenda naboigo na amagoro aria naro arenge goeta mbarabare yabo
Ezekiel10:17 Ekero barenge gotenena
Ezekiel10:18 Erio obonene bw’Omonene bokarua ase omoriibo o inse bw’egesieri ki’enyomba y’Omonene
Ezekiel10:19 Erio nkarora abakerubi baria bakorambora chimbaba chiabo na koimokerera igoro korwa ase riroba ekero bagendete
Ezekiel10:20 Ebitongwa ebio nabio biria naroche bire inse ya Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli ang’e norooche rwa Kebari
Ezekiel10:21 Kera oyomo nigo abwate amasio ane
Ezekiel10:22 Amasio abo nigo agwekaine kegima buna aria naroche agwo ang’e norooche rwa Kebari. Kera oyomo akagenderera gochia bosio atari koonchoka.
Ezekiel11:1 Omoika okanyimokereria igoro
Ezekiel11:2 Omonene agantebia
Ezekiel11:3 Barabwo nigo bagoteba ng’a engaki teraika ang’e tokoagacha chinyomba; omochie oyo nenyanyeni ekoiyeka
Ezekiel11:4 Ase ayio
Ezekiel11:5 Omoika bw’Omonene ogacha igoro asende
Ezekiel11:6 Mwaitire abanto abange goetania
Ezekiel11:7 “Ase ayio
Ezekiel11:8 Inwe nigo moirogete ogoitwa nemioro
Ezekiel11:9 Nimbarusie ase omochie oyo
Ezekiel11:10 Inwe imoitwe nemioro. Nimbanachere ekina agwo ase ribebe ri’Abaisraeli. Erio momanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.
Ezekiel11:11 Omochie oyo tori gochia koba buna enyanyeni asemore
Ezekiel11:12 Erio momanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene. Inwe mwangire kobwatia emeroberio yane echikire
Ezekiel11:13 Ekero nagendererete kobana
Ezekiel11:14 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel11:15 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel11:16 “Ase ayio obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Nonya nabaseririe gochia aare ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku na kobasiarera gochia ase chinse chionsi
Ezekiel11:17 “Ase ayio obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Nimbasangererie korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku
Ezekiel11:18 Ekero barabe bairanire ase ense eyio
Ezekiel11:19 Ekero ekio nimbae enkoro eyemo
Ezekiel11:20 Erio nario barabwatie emeroberio yane echikire
Ezekiel11:21 Korende abanto abwo chinkoro chiabo chikobwatia emegwekano y’obosooku bagosasima
Ezekiel11:22 Erio abakerubi bakarambora chimbaba chiabo
Ezekiel11:23 Erio obonene bw’Omonene bokaimokerera igoro korwa ase omochie oria
Ezekiel11:24 Ase okorora naetwe
Ezekiel11:25 Erio ngatebia abanto abwo bonsi boosetwe amang’ana onsi aya Omonene konya anyorokirie.
Ezekiel12:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel12:2 “Aye mwanyabanto omenyete ase egati y’abanto batari koigwera; abwo babwate amaiso akorora
Ezekiel12:3 “Ase ayio
Ezekiel12:4 Osokie ebinto biao isiko mobaso kobaroche
Ezekiel12:5 Obochore ekebao ase enyasi ekero abanto abwo bakoroche
Ezekiel12:6 Ekero omosunte ochire
Ezekiel12:7 Inche ngakora buna nachigetwe; mobaso gati ngasokia ebinto biane isiko
Ezekiel12:8 Rituko ria kabere mambia
Ezekiel12:9 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel12:10 Bono obairanerie
Ezekiel12:11 Obatebie ng’a aye nigo ore ekemanyererio asebare
Ezekiel12:12 Omogambi ore ase egati yabo naimokie ebinto biaye abibeke ireko agende; ekero omosunte ochire abochore ekebao ase enyasi aetereo; nigo aratube obosio bwaye tabaisa korora ense namaiso aye.
Ezekiel12:13 Nimobekere ekeonga kiane abwatwe ase oboreba bwane; erio imoire Babeli
Ezekiel12:14 Ninsiarere gochia ase chinsemo chionsi abanto bonsi abamoetanaine ase okomokonya
Ezekiel12:15 “Ekero ndabaserie gochia ase abanto b’ebisaku na mbasiarere gochia ase chinse ching’ao
Ezekiel12:16 Korende nintigarie abanto bake korwa ase egati yabo bataitwe nemioro

Ezekiel12:18 “Aye mwanyabanto

Ezekiel12:20 Emechie eyio emenyire nesarigwe kegima
Ezekiel12:21 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende

Ezekiel13:6 Amaroro abo nay’obong’ainereria
Ezekiel13:7 Inee! Tari amaroro ’obong’ainereria barorire
Ezekiel13:8 “Ase ayio aya naro Omonene agoteba: Ekiagera mwakwanire ay’obong’ainereria naende mwarorire amaroro ay’oborimo
Ezekiel13:9 Okoboko kwane ngoake ababani abwo bakorora amaroro ’obong’ainereria
Ezekiel13:10 “Ababani abwo basiririe abanto baane

Ezekiel13:12 Ekero orwaki orwo rorabe rwagure inse

Ezekiel13:16 Abwo nabwo barenge ababani baria b’Abaisraeli babanete igoro ya Yerusalemu
Ezekiel13:17 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel13:18 Obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Obobe nobwabo abakungu abwo bakobarera ebimoya bire namaebi

Ezekiel13:20 “Ase ayio

Ezekiel13:22 “Ase engencho y’oborimo bwaino mwagerire abanyene oboronge baichanire ase chinkoro chiabo

Ezekiel14:23 Barabwo mbabaremie

Ezekiel15:2 “Aye mwanyabanto

Ezekiel16:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel16:2 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel16:3 Tebia Yerusalemu ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae akoyotebia: “Aye nigo kwaiboreretwe ase ense ya Kanani. Iso nigo arenge Omoamori
Ezekiel16:4 Rituko kwaiboretwe ororera rwao tirwanachetwe
Ezekiel16:5 Monto onde takororerete amabeebe agokorere ring’ana nonya nerimo ase ayio
Ezekiel16:6 “Ekero naetete agwo ase kwarenge
Ezekiel16:7 Nkagokinia okamenteka okaba chilifu ne chilifu
Ezekiel16:8 “Ekero naende naetete asore
Ezekiel16:9 “Erio nkagosibia namache
Ezekiel16:10 Ngakobekera eanga eroisirie ere nebieni ao ao
Ezekiel16:11 Nkagochabera nebinto bi’obwari
Ezekiel16:12 Nkabeka ebonyi ase emioro yao
Ezekiel16:13 Ase ayio
Ezekiel16:14 Okamanyekana ase ebisaku ase engencho y’oboseera bwao. Oboseera bwao nigo bwarenge oboikeranu
Ezekiel16:15 “Korende aye nigo gwasemeretie oboseera bwao
Ezekiel16:16 Okaira chianga chiao
Ezekiel16:17 Naende okaimokia ebinto biao ebiya bie chitahabu na ebie chifeta nakoete
Ezekiel16:18 Naende okaira chianga chiao chiare nebieni ao ao
Ezekiel16:19 Omogati one nakoete
Ezekiel16:20 “Naende okaira abana bao
Ezekiel16:21 Nering’ana rike aye kwaruete abana baane bakaba ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase emegwekano eyio?
Ezekiel16:22 Ase engaki eyio kwarenge gokora ebibe bi’okogechia
Ezekiel16:23 Ase ayio Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga
Ezekiel16:24 okeagachera ebinyomba bi’emegwekano ogosasima
Ezekiel16:25 Ase kera amatabekania e chinchera kwaagachire aase aimokererete igoro ogosasimera
Ezekiel16:26 Nigo gwakorete obonyaka n’Abamisiri
Ezekiel16:27 “Rora
Ezekiel16:28 “Naende ngwakorete obonyaka n’Abaasuri
Ezekiel16:29 Nkwamentete obotayayi bwao
Ezekiel16:30 Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: “Naki enkoro yao ere nokogania okonene kw’ogwanchwa
Ezekiel16:31 Kweagacheire ebinyomba bi’emegwekano ogosasima ase amatabekania onsi e chinchera
Ezekiel16:32 Aye omokungu omotomani nigo gwatigete omosacha oo okaba kore nabasacha abaao!
Ezekiel16:33 Abasacha nigo bakorwa chibesa baa abakungu abatayayi
Ezekiel16:34 Aye nigo ore nogwatananeka korwa ase abakungu bande abatayayi. Monto onde tagotunyanete arigie gokora obonyaka naye
Ezekiel16:35 “Ase ayio
Ezekiel16:36 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Obosooku bwao bwaorokigwe isiko
Ezekiel16:37 Ase ayio ninsangererie abanchi bao abwo kwegokeretie
Ezekiel16:38 Ninkonachere ekina buna abakungu basaririe chiira chi’okonyuomana kwabo na buna abaiteri amanyinga bakonacherwa ekina; amanyinga ao ninyaitere inde nendamwamu ne risemi.
Ezekiel16:39 Ninkobeke ase amaboko ’abanchi bao; barabwo mbatagore ebinyomba biria kweagacherete bi’emegwekano ogosasima amo naase ao aimokererete igoro. Naende mbakorusie chianga chiao
Ezekiel16:40 “Abwo mbagochere amo nomoganda omonene
Ezekiel16:41 Mbasambe chinyomba chiao
Ezekiel16:42 Ase enchera eyio ning’isanekie endamwamu yane asore
Ezekiel16:43 Ekiagera otainyorete amatuko aria ay’oboke bwao
Ezekiel16:44 “Rora
Ezekiel16:45 Aye omosubati nigo onga nyoko
Ezekiel16:46 “Mosubati omino omonene nere Samaria
Ezekiel16:47 Aye tigwaisanegete ase okobwatia chinchera chiabo
Ezekiel16:48 “Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Ekeene
Ezekiel16:49 Naama! Ebi nabio biarenge ebibe bia Sodomu
Ezekiel16:50 Nigo barenge abamwenu
Ezekiel16:51 “Samaria tiyakorete ebibe
Ezekiel16:52 Bono aye bogoria obosooku bwao bw’ogochaywa
Ezekiel16:53 “Inche ninsibore abasibwa b’emechie eye: abasibwa ba Sodomu amo nab’abaiseke baye
Ezekiel16:54 erinde obogorie ogochaywa kwao orore obosooku ase engencho y’ayio onsi gwakorire
Ezekiel16:55 Aya naro arabe ase abasubati bamino: Sodomu na abaiseke baye nabairanerigwe amaya abo
Ezekiel16:56 Inee! Sodomu
Ezekiel16:57 Ekero keria ebibe biao konya bitaraorokigwa maiso marore? Bono kwabeire buna ere. Abaiseke b’ense ya Edomu
Ezekiel16:58 Bono goika obogorie egesusuro ki’ogokora kwao okobe
Ezekiel16:59 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ningokorere koreng’ana buna gwakorire
Ezekiel16:60 Nonya naboigo ning’inyore okobwatana kw’ogotianania nakorete naye ase amatuko aria ay’obobe bwao
Ezekiel16:61 Erio aye oinyore ogokora kwao obe nobosooku
Ezekiel16:62 Ninkong’ie okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania koria nakorete naye; erio nario oramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.
Ezekiel16:63 Ekero ndabe nakwabeire aya onsi gwakorire

Ezekiel17:2 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel17:3 Obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ekeongo ekenene kiabwate chimbaba chinene
Ezekiel17:4 Erio gekabutora nenkoro y’omote oria mesia
Ezekiel17:5 Naende gekaimokia embusuro y’ense eyio gekayesimeka ase riroba ritobu
Ezekiel17:6 Embusuro eria ekamera
Ezekiel17:7 “Korende nkiarengeo ekeongo kende ekenene kiabwate chimbaba chinene
Ezekiel17:8 Korende omosabibu oyio konya osimekirwe ase riroba ritobu
Ezekiel17:9 “Aye otebe ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Inee! Omosabibu oria nogenderere gokina buya? Togosimorwa amo nemeri yaye
Ezekiel17:10 Naama! Nonya osimekirwe naende
Ezekiel17:11 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel17:12 “Boria egesaku eke getari koigwera: Timomanyeti engencho y’amang’ana aya? Batebie: Rora
Ezekiel17:13 Ere akaimokia omoiborwa bw’enyomba y’omoruoti
Ezekiel17:14 ng’a oboruoti boria tiboba ne chinguru na kweimokereria igoro
Ezekiel17:15 Ere oyio agasaria okobwatana koria
Ezekiel17:16 “Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Ekeene
Ezekiel17:17 Farao na abarwani baye b’esegi abange tibakonyara gokonya omoruoti oyio ase esegi
Ezekiel17:18 Takonyara gotooreka abe moyo
Ezekiel17:19 “Ase ayio
Ezekiel17:20 Nimobekere ekeonga kiane
Ezekiel17:21 Abarwani baye b’esegi abaratame mbaitwe nemioro

Ezekiel17:23 Ningesimeke igoro ase egetunwa egetambe ki’Abaisraeli
Ezekiel17:24 Emete yonsi egokina korwa ase riroba nemanye ng’a ninche Omonene
Ezekiel18:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende naende
Ezekiel18:2 “Ninki engencho y’omorabaaro oyo okoiranererwa gokwanwa ase ense y’Abaisraeli: “Abaise barire amasabibu amabese amaroro
Ezekiel18:3 “Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Ekeene buna inche inde moyo
Ezekiel18:4 Naama! Emioyo y’abanto bonsi neyane; koreng’ana buna omoyo o ise ore oyone
Ezekiel18:5 “Origererie orore omonto ore omoronge
Ezekiel18:6 Ere tari koria ebing’wanso bikoruegwa igoro ase ebitunwa
Ezekiel18:7 gose tari gokorera monto onde bobe
Ezekiel18:8 Ekero akorua singo tari kwementera gento gose koboria ebitoki. Nigo agotanga amaboko aye takora obobe; nigo akonacha ekina kia boronge ase egati y’omonto na omonto onde.
Ezekiel18:9 Omonto oyio aise gokora bo
Ezekiel18:10 “Ande omonto oyio nabe ng’a oiboire omwana omomura oyore omoibi na omoiti
Ezekiel18:11 ise omonyene atakorete
Ezekiel18:12 Ere nigo agokorera abataka na abaremerwa bobe
Ezekiel18:13 Ekero akorua singo nigo akwementera egento ase okoboria ebitoki. Inee! Omonto buna oyio nabe moyo? Yaya takoba moyo. Ekiagera akorire okogechia okwo gwonsi goika akwe. Okomocha kw’ogoiteka kw’amanyinga aye nkobe igoro yaye.
Ezekiel18:14 “Ande omonto oyio nabe ng’a oiboire omwana omomura
Ezekiel18:15 Ere taria ebing’wanso bikoruerwa ase ebitunwa igoro
Ezekiel18:16 tagokorera monto onde bobe
Ezekiel18:17 Naende nigo aratange okoboko kwaye takorera oyochandegete bobe
Ezekiel18:18 Ise ere ekiagera akorerete abanto bobe ase obotindi
Ezekiel18:19 “Inwe nigo mokoboria: Ninki keragere omwana atanyore emechando ase engencho y’ebibe bia ise? Nigo nkobairaneria iga: Ekero omwana akorire ayare amaya na amaronge
Ezekiel18:20 Omonto ogokora ebibe nere orakwe. Omwana tagochandwa ase engencho y’ebibe bia ise
Ezekiel18:21 “Korende omokori amabe karatige ebibe biaye bionsi ebio akorire
Ezekiel18:22 Ebibe biaye bionsi akorete tibikoinyorwa
Ezekiel18:23 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae akoboria; Inee! Aye nigo okagete ng’a inche nigo ingokirie nogokwa kw’omokori amabe? Yaya
Ezekiel18:24 “Korende omonyaboronge karatige oboronge bwaye na akore ebibe
Ezekiel18:25 “Inwe nigo mogoteba: Enchera y’Omonene teri endonge. Inwe Abaisraeli
Ezekiel18:26 Ekero omonto omonyaboronge akoonchoka otiga gokora ay’oboronge
Ezekiel18:27 Korende omokori amabe karaonchoke atige ebibe akorire
Ezekiel18:28 Ekiagera arengereirie aya akorete na aonchokire korwa ase ogosaria kwaye gwonsi akorete
Ezekiel18:29 Korende Abaisraeli nigo bagoteba: Enchera y’Omonene teri endonge. Inwe Abaisraeli
Ezekiel18:30 “Aya naro inche Omonene
Ezekiel18:31 Motugute ogosaria kwaino gwonsi
Ezekiel18:32 Inche tingokiri nogokwa kw’omonto onde bwensi; ase ayio oonchoka mobe moyo. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”
Ezekiel19:1 Aye tera ogotera gw’okobokia amagombo igoro y’abagambi b’Abaisraeli
Ezekiel19:2 otebe: “Nyoko naki arenge? Nigo arenge endo eaberi! Nigo arenge korara na koramama ase egati ye chindo
Ezekiel19:3 Endo eria eaberi egakinia emanwa yaye eyemo
Ezekiel19:4 Abanto b’ebisaku bakaigwa chinkuma chiaye; bakayeremera eirima
Ezekiel19:5 Ekero eng’ina yaganyete
Ezekiel19:6 Ero ekaba egotaara ase egati ye chindo
Ezekiel19:7 Egatagora chiburi chiabo chinkong’u
Ezekiel19:8 Erio abanto b’ebisaku bakarua ase chinsemo chiabo
Ezekiel19:9 Bakayegobania nekegobanio
Ezekiel19:10 “Nyoko nigo arenge buna omosabibu ase egati y’emesabibu
Ezekiel19:11 Omosabibu oyio ogakinia chinsagia chinkong’u
Ezekiel19:12 Korende omosabibu oria ogasimorwa ase engencho y’endamwamu
Ezekiel19:13 Bono omote oyio osimekirwe ase erooro
Ezekiel19:14 Omorero okarua ase chinsagia chiaye
Ezekiel20:1 Ase rituko ria ikomi
Ezekiel20:2 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel20:3 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel20:4 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel20:5 obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ase rituko riria nachorete Abaisraeli
Ezekiel20:6 Rituko riria nigo natianete asebare
Ezekiel20:7 Nkabatebia iga: Kera oyomo oino tiga atugute korwa asare ebinto bi’okogechia ebio anchete korigereria
Ezekiel20:8 Korende abanto abwo bagasaria asende
Ezekiel20:9 Korende ayio nakorete nigo nayakorete ase okorenda erieta riane tirikorwa ribe eritachenegeti nebisaku ebio Abaisraeli bamenyete ase egati yabo. Ase amasio ’ebisaku ebio nemanyekanetie ase Abaisraeli ase okobarusia ase ense ya Misiri.
Ezekiel20:10 “Ase ayio nkabarusia korwa ase ense ya Misiri
Ezekiel20:11 Agwo nkabaa emeroberio yane echikire
Ezekiel20:12 Naende nkabaa Chisabato chiane chikaba ekemanyererio ase egati yane na barabwo
Ezekiel20:13 Korende Abaisraeli bagasaria asende
Ezekiel20:14 Korende ayio nakorete nigo nayakorete ase okorenda erieta riane tirikorwa ribe eritachenegeti ase amasio ’abanto b’ebisaku
Ezekiel20:15 Naende nkaria eira y’ogotiana agwo ase erooro ng’a tinkobaira ase ense eria konya nabaeire
Ezekiel20:16 Aya nigo nayakorete
Ezekiel20:17 “Nonya naboigo nkabarorera amabera
Ezekiel20:18 Nigo nakurerete abana babo agwo ase erooro
Ezekiel20:19 Inche ninche Omonene
Ezekiel20:20 Morende Chisabato chiane chibe chinchenu
Ezekiel20:21 “Korende abana baria bagasaria asende; tibabwatetie emeroberio yane echikire
Ezekiel20:22 Korende tinakorete bo
Ezekiel20:23 Erio nkaria eira y’ogotiana
Ezekiel20:24 Nigo nakorete bo
Ezekiel20:25 “Erio nkabaa emeroberio echikire etarenge emiya
Ezekiel20:26 Nkabatiga bagesoyia ase ogotacheneka goetera ase ebiegwa biabo
Ezekiel20:27 “Ase ayio
Ezekiel20:28 Nkabarenta ase ense eyio nabarierete eira ng’a nimbayee. Na aase aande onsi baroche aimokererete igoro
Ezekiel20:29 Erio nkababoria: Aase agwo aimokererete igoro ase mogochia naaki? Ase ayio
Ezekiel20:30 Ase ayio
Ezekiel20:31 Nonya ngoika rero iga
Ezekiel20:32 Amang’ana mokorengereria tagoikeranigwa nonya ng’ake
Ezekiel20:33 “Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Ekeene
Ezekiel20:34 Ee
Ezekiel20:35 Erio mbarente ase erooro y’abanto b’ebisaku
Ezekiel20:36 Nimbanachere inwe ekina buna nanacherete chisokoro chiaino ekina
Ezekiel20:37 “Nimbaetie inwe inse y’enyimbo yane y’oborisia
Ezekiel20:38 Ninyatanane korwa asemore abatari koigwera
Ezekiel20:39 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae akobatebia inwe Abaisraeli: Kera oyomo oino agenderere gosasima omogwekano oye! Korende ase engaki erache ekero morabe mokonyigwera timokora erieta riane richenu ribe eritachenegeti ase okorua ebiegwa biaino na gosasima emegwekano yaino.
Ezekiel20:40 Inche Omonene Nyasae nigo ngoteba iga: Agwo ase egetunwa kiane egechenu
Ezekiel20:41 Ekero ndabe nabarusirie korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku na kobasangereria korwa ase chinse echio nabasiarerete gochia
Ezekiel20:42 Ekero ndabarente ase ense y’Abaisraeli eyio nariete eira na gotiana ng’a ninyee chisokoro chiaino
Ezekiel20:43 Agwo ase ense eria namoinyore chinchera chiaino
Ezekiel20:44 Inwe Abaisraeli
Ezekiel20:45 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel20:46 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel20:47 Otebie rinani ria Negebu iga: Igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene. Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Rora
Ezekiel20:48 Abanto bonsi mbarore ng’a inche ninche Omonene nayotongirie
Ezekiel20:49 Erio ngateba
Ezekiel21:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel21:2 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel21:3 Otebie abanto b’ense eyio ng’a aya naro Omonene agoteba: Rora inche nigo inde mamincha yao
Ezekiel21:4 Ekiagera ninsirie korwa asore abanyaboronge amo nabakori amabe
Ezekiel21:5 Erio abanto bonsi mbamanye ng’a ninche Omonene nasomoire omoyio one korwa ase ekeraaro kiaye
Ezekiel21:6 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel21:7 Ekero barakoborie: Nase ki oichanete iga? Obairanerie
Ezekiel21:8 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel21:9 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel21:10 otierigwe
Ezekiel21:11 Ase ayio omoyio oyio orurwe otierigwe
Ezekiel21:12 Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel21:13 Okorengwa nkoreo. Inee! Naki gwachayete enyimbo? Tekonyara koba buya asore. Nabo Omonene atebire.
Ezekiel21:14 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel21:15 Nabekire ensonga y’omoyio oyio agwo ase ebiita biabo bionsi
Ezekiel21:16 Ebeke ang’e oetere
Ezekiel21:17 Inche boigo ning’ake chinkobi
Ezekiel21:18 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel21:19 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel21:20 Bworokie enchera ase omoro oraetere
Ezekiel21:21 Omoruoti o Babeli nigo ateneine ase amatabekania e chinchera chiria ibere ogokora oboringoria; nigo agotierania chinsara
Ezekiel21:22 Ase okoboko kwaye gw’okorio obomera nigo bokogwera Yerusalemu
Ezekiel21:23 Korende ase abanto ba Yerusalemu amang’ana ayio nigo ararorekane koba oboringoria bw’oborimo
Ezekiel21:24 Ase ayio
Ezekiel21:25 “Aye otachenegeti
Ezekiel21:26 Rusia egetambaa kia motwe amo negutwa. Amang’ana takogenderera koba buna are bono. Ayio konya akeeigwe naimokererigwe igoro
Ezekiel21:27 Ning’onchorane oboruoti obo
Ezekiel21:28 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel21:29 “Nigo bakobarorera inwe amaroro ’oborimo
Ezekiel21:30 “Irania omoyio ase ekeraaro kiaye! Agwo ase ense mwatongeretwe
Ezekiel21:31 Nimbaumorere ekeririanda kiane
Ezekiel21:32 Inwe mobe chinko chigouterwa omorero; amanyinga aino naiterwe igoro ase ense. Timokoinyorwa nonya ng’ake. Ninche Omonene nakwanire ayio.”
Ezekiel22:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel22:2 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel22:3 oyotebie: Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Aye omochie gwaiteire amanyinga ’abanto ase egati‐gati yao
Ezekiel22:4 Aye kwabeire nokomocha
Ezekiel22:5 Abwo bamenyete ang’e naye
Ezekiel22:6 Rora
Ezekiel22:7 Aye omochie
Ezekiel22:8 Gwachayire ebinto biane ebichenu
Ezekiel22:9 Abang’achi bande bamenyete ime yao bakogera amanyinga aiteka. Abanto bao bande nigo bakoriera ebing’wanso igoro ase ebitunwa; na abande nigo bare abatomani
Ezekiel22:10 na abande nigo bagotomana nabakungu b’abaise
Ezekiel22:11 Omonto oyomo nigo agokora ebibe bi’okogechia ase ogotomana nomokungu bw’omonto onde
Ezekiel22:12 Abanto bao bande nigo bakoegwa riaaki baita abande. Aye nigo okorua singo gwasaba ebitoki ase okwementera
Ezekiel22:13 “Ase igo
Ezekiel22:14 Ase amatuko ndarente egesusuro asore
Ezekiel22:15 Ninsiarere abanto bao gochia ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku
Ezekiel22:16 Aye nigo orasoigwe ase ogotacheneka ase amasio ’abanto b’ebisaku
Ezekiel22:17 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel22:18 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel22:19 Ase ayio
Ezekiel22:20 buna abanto bagosangereria amagena e chifeta
Ezekiel22:21 Ee
Ezekiel22:22 Buna efeta ekonyititorwa ase eriko ri’omorero naboigo nainwe moranyititorwe ase egati‐gati y’omochie oyio; erio momanye ng’a ninche Omonene naumoire endamwamu yane igoro asemore.”
Ezekiel22:23 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel22:24 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel22:25 Ababani bareo bakorire emeroberio emebe
Ezekiel22:26 Abakuani baye basaririe ogochika kwane
Ezekiel22:27 Abagambi baye nigo banga buna chisese chi’orosana chigotandorana ebi chiaitire. Baitire abanto abange ase okwenyorera ebitoki ase enchera etari ey’obwegenwa.
Ezekiel22:28 Ababani babo babaakire echooka etochoganiri buya; nigo bakobarorera amaroro ’oborimo na kobaringoreria oborimo
Ezekiel22:29 Abanto b’ense eyio bakorire obobe bw’ogochanda abande
Ezekiel22:30 Nkarigia omonto ase egati yabo oranyare koagacha orwaki
Ezekiel22:31 Ase ayio naumoire ekeririanda kiane igoro asebare; nabasiririe nomorero bw’endamwamu yane. Ogokora kwabo nkobairanere. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”
Ezekiel23:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel23:2 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel23:3 Ekero barenge abaiseke bagakora obonyaka agwo Misiri. Aroro agwo bakaba bakobwatwa‐bwatwa chimbeere chiabo
Ezekiel23:4 Oria omonene nigo arenge korokwa Ohola
Ezekiel23:5 Ohola
Ezekiel23:6 Barabwo nigo barenge abarwani esegi
Ezekiel23:7 Ase ayio agakora obonyaka nabasacha bonsi b’Abaasuri
Ezekiel23:8 Ohola tatigete obonyaka bwaye
Ezekiel23:9 Ase ayio nkamorua na komobeka ase amaboko abanchi baye Abaasuri
Ezekiel23:10 Ekero barabwo bamokorerete obosooku obwo
Ezekiel23:11 “Nonya Oholiba
Ezekiel23:12 Akaba nokogania okobe ase abamura b’Abaasuri
Ezekiel23:13 Nkamorora bwesoirie ase ogotacheneka; bonsi babere
Ezekiel23:14 “Korende Oholiba akagenderera koba omonyaka goetania. Akarora emegwekano y’abasacha emeng’eire ase enyasi
Ezekiel23:15 Nigo yasibeire chinkini ase ebinema biabo na emetwe yabo nigo yanareire ebitambaa ebiya mono. Abasacha baria bonsi nigo baare kororekana ng’a nabarwani abanene. Ekero aroche emegwekano eyio y’abanto ba Babeli
Ezekiel23:16 akaba nokogania okobe asebare
Ezekiel23:17 Abanene ba Babeli bagacha
Ezekiel23:18 Korende akagenderera gokora obonyaka bwaye maiso marore
Ezekiel23:19 Nonya naboigo akagenderera gokora obonyaka bwaye maiso marore; akaba okoinyora amatuko ’oboiseke bwaye
Ezekiel23:20 Ere akaba nokogania okobe ase abatomani baria baare nokogania kw’omobere buna chitigere chire
Ezekiel23:21 Bono aye kwaganirie obonyaka bw’oboiseke bwao
Ezekiel23:22 “Ase ayio
Ezekiel23:23 Ee
Ezekiel23:24 Mbagochere babwate ebirwanero
Ezekiel23:25 Nimbe nekeririanda asore
Ezekiel23:26 Boigo mbakorusie chianga
Ezekiel23:27 Ase enchera eyio ninsirie obosooku na obonyaka bwao kwarentanete korwa ase ense ya Misiri
Ezekiel23:28 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Naama! Ninkobeke ase amaboko ’abanto abwo ogechete
Ezekiel23:29 Barabwo mbakogeche mono
Ezekiel23:30 biakorenteire amang’ana ayio
Ezekiel23:31 Aye kwabwatirie chingencho chia mosubati omino. Ase engencho eyio ninkoe egekombe ki’egesusuro buna eki naruete asare.
Ezekiel23:32 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Aye nonywere egekombe ki’egesusuro giaetwe mosubati omino
Ezekiel23:33 Nigo oratinde mono
Ezekiel23:34 Nigo orabetererigwe onywe okoore ekenyugwa ekio gionsi
Ezekiel23:35 “Ase ayio
Ezekiel23:36 Omonene agantebia
Ezekiel23:37 Barabwo bakorire obotomani
Ezekiel23:38 Tari ayio oka bakorete asende
Ezekiel23:39 Nigo banyenyete abana babo bakaba ebing’wanso ase emegwekano yabo bagosasima ase rituko erio bachete Aase aane Aachenu
Ezekiel23:40 “Naende nigo batomete amang’ana bakarangeria abanto korwa chinse chi’aare. Barabwo bagacha
Ezekiel23:41 Erio ogaikaransa igoro ase egeikaransero ki’obonene
Ezekiel23:42 Amariogi ’okwoga akaigugwa korwa agwo
Ezekiel23:43 Erio nkeboria: Inee! Abanto aba abanyaka nigo bagochia gokora obonyaka nomokungu oyo okorire obonyaka ase engaki entambe?
Ezekiel23:44 Barabwo bakaba bagosoa ase omokungu oyio buna abasacha bagosoa ase omokungu omotayayi. Ase igo abasacha abwo bagasoa ase Ohola na Oholiba bagakora obonyaka.
Ezekiel23:45 Abanto abanyaboronge mbabanachere ekina buna ekio abakungu abatomani na abaiti bakonacherwa
Ezekiel23:46 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Nimbarentere omoganda bw’abanto babakorere bobe na kobasakora.
Ezekiel23:47 Abanto abwo mbabaake amagena
Ezekiel23:48 Ase enchera eyio ninsirie obonyaka boria korwa ase ense yaino
Ezekiel23:49 Egesusuro ki’obonyaka bwaino nkebe igoro yaino

Ezekiel24:2 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel24:3 Kwana nabanto aba batari koigwera
Ezekiel24:4 Obeke ebitari bie chinyama imeo
Ezekiel24:5 Ebitari ebio obirusie korwa ase eng’ondi enchore ere ase riicho riao; otumbe chinko chinyinge inse y’enyongo
Ezekiel24:6 “Ase ayio
Ezekiel24:7 Amanyinga ’abanto b’omochie oyio oiterete nigo agendererete kobeera imeo. Tayaumorete ase riroba riyatube na koyabisa
Ezekiel24:8 Nigo natigete amanyinga ayio aiteretwe agenderere kobeera igoro ase egetare atatubiri
Ezekiel24:9 “Ase ayio
Ezekiel24:10 Beka chinko chinyinge
Ezekiel24:11 Erio otige enyongo eyio ere bosa igoro ase omorero bw’amakara
Ezekiel24:12 Inche nabeire nkwerosia ngokora emeremo bosa. Oboboosu bw’enyongo eyio tibokoruao neisa gosambwa nomorero.
Ezekiel24:13 Kwabeire oyotachenegeti ase engencho y’obonyaka bwao. Nateemire kogochena

Ezekiel24:20 Erio nkabairaneria
Ezekiel24:21 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli
Ezekiel24:22 Nainwe nabo morakore buna inche nakorire. Timobaisa gotuba chinderu na emenwa
Ezekiel24:23 Erio motige ebitambaa bibe ase emetwe yaino
Ezekiel24:24 Ase enchera eyio Ezekieli nabe ekiorokererio asemore. Inwe mokore kera egento agokora. Ekero amang’ana ayio araikeranigwe
Ezekiel24:25 Erio Omonene agantebia
Ezekiel24:26 ase rituko erio omonto oratooreke natame gochia asore
Ezekiel24:27 Erio omonwa oo nokunorwe ochake gokwana nomotami oria

Ezekiel25:11 Ninachere Abamoabu ekina

Ezekiel26:1 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi
Ezekiel26:2 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel26:3 “Ase ayio
Ezekiel26:4 Abwo mbasarie chindwaki chia Turo
Ezekiel26:5 Omochie oyio nobe aase abarubi bakwanekera ebionga biabo agwo ase egati y’enyancha. Ninche Omonene Nyasae nakwanire. Omochie oyo nosakorwe nabanto b’ebisaku.
Ezekiel26:6 Abanto b’emechie yaye emeke ere ase engegu mbaitwe nemioro. Erio nario baramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.
Ezekiel26:7 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Rora
Ezekiel26:8 Omoruoti oyio naite nemioro abanto b’emechie yao emeke ere ase ense yao. Ere nigo araagache orwaki rw’ogwekengera rogoetanane
Ezekiel26:9 Natege egekorero ki’ogotagorera chindwaki chiao achisarie
Ezekiel26:10 Chibarasi chi’omoruoti oyio nigo chire chinyinge mono
Ezekiel26:11 Chibarasi chiaye nchitiringe chinchera chiao chionsi nebitaago biabo
Ezekiel26:12 Abanto abwo mbakoure obotenenku bwao bwonsi
Ezekiel26:13 Ninsirie amariogi ’amatera are ime yao
Ezekiel26:14 Ninkoonchore obe egetare gioka ase abarubi bakwanekera ebionga biabo. Aye Turo tokoagachwa naende
Ezekiel26:15 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agotebia Turo: Inee! Ekero aye oraiyerigwe inse na gosarigwa
Ezekiel26:16 Erio abagambi bonsi bare ase ense ere enyancha mbarabare mbarue ase ebirogo biabo bi’obonene
Ezekiel26:17 Erio barabwo mbakoreere
Ezekiel26:18 Bono ebisinka mbiiguswe ase rituko ri’ogokwa kwao
Ezekiel26:19 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ningosirie obe omochie ore bosa buna emechie etamenyiri. Nindete chindiba chigotube
Ezekiel26:20 Ningotugute gochia ase embeera ime
Ezekiel26:21 Ningosirie ase enchera y’okoondokia mono
Ezekiel27:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel27:2 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel27:3 Otebie Turo oyio ore ase egesoero ki’enyancha
Ezekiel27:4 Chimbebe chiao nigo chiigete enyancha gati; abaagachi bao nabwo bagokorete okaba omoseera omoikeranu.
Ezekiel27:5 Chibao chiao chionsi nigo chiaroisetigwe korwa ase emete ekorokwa emebunduki ya Seniri
Ezekiel27:6 Bakaroisia emegango korwa ase emete enga emetontera ya Basani. Bakaroisia risang’ina riao korwa ase chibao chi’emete emiya barusetie ase engegu ya Kuporo
Ezekiel27:7 Egetambaa ki’ebieni ao ao kwabegete ase omoenga
Ezekiel27:8 Abanto ba Sidoni na ab’Ariwadi nabwo barenge bagosukia amaato ao nemegango. Aye Turo
Ezekiel27:9 Abagaaka amo nabanto abang’aini ba Gebali nigo bamenyete ime yao; abwo nabwo barenge goticha aase ao aatandogete. Chimeeri chionsi chi’enyancha nigo chiarenge gocha asore
Ezekiel27:10 “Abarwani esegi b’Ayemi
Ezekiel27:11 Abarwani esegi b’Ariwadi
Ezekiel27:12 “Abatarisisi bagacha asore bagakora oboonchoreria naye
Ezekiel27:13 Naende ogakora oboonchoreria nense ya Giriki
Ezekiel27:14 Abanto ba Togarima bagakooneria chibarasi chi’emeremo na echi’esegi
Ezekiel27:15 Abanto ba Dedani bagakora oboonchoreria naye; boigo abe chinse chinyinge chiarenge ang’e nenyancha bakaba bagokora oboonchoreria naye
Ezekiel27:16 Abasiiria bagakora oboonchoreria naye
Ezekiel27:17 Abanto ba Yuda na ab’ense y’Abaisraeli bagakora oboonchoreria naye; bagakorentera engano ekorwa Miniti
Ezekiel27:18 Ekiagera aye nigo kwabwate obotenenku bwa kera egento
Ezekiel27:19 Boigo abanto ba Wedani na aba Yavani bagakorentera ebioma bikomeka‐meka
Ezekiel27:20 Abanto ba Dedani bagakora oboonchoreria naye
Ezekiel27:21 Abanto b’Arabia na abagambi bonsi ba Kedari
Ezekiel27:22 Abaonchoreria ba Seba na aba Raama bagakorentera ebinsari ao ao ebiya mono
Ezekiel27:23 Abanto ba Harani
Ezekiel27:24 Abwo bagakorentera chianga chingiya mono
Ezekiel27:25 Chimeeri chia Tarisisi chikabogoria ebinto bi’oboonchoreria bwao. “Bono ogaisaneka ogaichorwa nebinto ebinge agwo ase kwarenge ase egati y’enyancha.
Ezekiel27:26 Abanto barenge gosukia amaato ao nemegango
Ezekiel27:27 Obotenenku bwao
Ezekiel27:28 Eriogi ri’okorera kw’abagendia chimeeri chiao
Ezekiel27:29 Abanto bonsi abagoata amache nemegango mbatige chimeeri chiabo; abagokora emeremo ase chimeeri amo nabagendia
Ezekiel27:30 Abwo mbakoreere aye namariogi amanene
Ezekiel27:31 Mbakigite chitukia chiabo ase engencho yao
Ezekiel27:32 Ekero barabe bagokoreera
Ezekiel27:33 Ekero ebinto biao bi’oboonchoreria biaruete ase chinyancha
Ezekiel27:34 Bono kwabunirwe na gosirigwa ime ase chindiba chi’enyancha; ebinto biao bi’oboonchoreria na abakoreri bao bonsi barimeire amo naye.
Ezekiel27:35 “Abanto bonsi bamenyete ase ebisinka na ase chinse chire ang’e nenyancha baichanire ase engencho yao
Ezekiel27:36 Abaonchoreria bare ase egati y’abanto
Ezekiel28:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel28:2 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel28:3 Ee
Ezekiel28:4 Obong’aini bwao
Ezekiel28:5 Goetera ase obong’aini bwao bw’oboonchoreria
Ezekiel28:6 “Ase ayio
Ezekiel28:7 ninkorentere abanto b’egesaku ekegeni
Ezekiel28:8 Mbagotugute gochia ase embeera ime
Ezekiel28:9 Ekero orabe ase amaboko abanto abwo
Ezekiel28:10 Aye nokwere ase amaboko ’abanto b’egesaku ekegeni

Ezekiel28:13 Nigo kwamenyete ime ya Edeni
Ezekiel28:14 Aye nigo kwarenge omokerubi oagetwe amaguta
Ezekiel28:15 Chingencho chiao nigo chiarenge ching’ikeranu

Ezekiel28:17 Enkoro yao nigo yeimokereretie igoro ase engencho y’obosiani bwao
Ezekiel28:18 Ase engencho y’ebibe biao ebinge
