Ezekiel38:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende
Ezekiel38:2 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel38:3 omotebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Aye Gogi
Ezekiel38:4 Ninkoonchore gochia nyuma
Ezekiel38:5 Abarwani b’Ayemi
Ezekiel38:6 Gomeri amo nomoganda oye bwonsi bw’esegi
Ezekiel38:7 Eariganie
Ezekiel38:8 Nyuma y’amatuko amange noche korootwa naende. Ase emiaka egochi‐gocha nogende ase ense eria yarenge nesegi
Ezekiel38:9 Aye notiire
Ezekiel38:10 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ase engaki eyio aye nigo orabe nemeroberio ase ebirengererio biao
Ezekiel38:11 Aye nigo oratebe iga: Ngochiera inde ense ere nemechie etagiteiri chindwaki; ning’umokere abanto abwo begaarete bare nobotoereru; bonsi nigo bamenyeteo bategitereti chindwaki
Ezekiel38:12 Norengererie gochia gosakora na kwenyorera ebinto ase okorambora okoboko kwao gochia aase arenge bosa na bono amenyirwe nabanto. Ee
Ezekiel38:13 Erio abanto ba Seba
Ezekiel38:14 “Ase ayio
Ezekiel38:15 Erio noche korwa aase ao
Ezekiel38:16 Aye Gogi
Ezekiel38:17 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Aye naye omonto oria nakwanete igoro yao ase chingaki chia kare goetera ase abasomba baane ababani b’Abaisraeli; barabwo bakaba bakobana emiaka ase emiaka ng’a ninkorente orwanie Abaisraeli.
Ezekiel38:18 “Korende ase rituko erio Gogi arache korwania ense y’Abaisraeli
Ezekiel38:19 Nakwanire inde nerisemi na ekeririanda kenga omorero ng’a ekeene ase rituko erio omotengecho omonene nobe ase ense y’Abaisraeli.
Ezekiel38:20 Erio chinswe chire nyancha
Ezekiel38:21 Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Nindete omoro orwanie Gogi agwo ase ebitunwa biane bionsi
Ezekiel38:22 Nimonachere ekina goetera ase oborwaire bogoita
Ezekiel38:23 Ninyeorokie ng’a inche nomonene na omochenu; ninyemanyekanie ase amasio ’ebisaku ebinge. Erio abanto mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.
Ezekiel39:1 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel39:2 Ninkoonchore na gokoraa korwa sugusu y’aare mono
Ezekiel39:3 Aroro agwo ning’ake obota bore ase okoboko kwao gw’okobee bogwe inse
Ezekiel39:4 Nokwere igoro ase ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli
Ezekiel39:5 Inwe nigo morakwere ase egetii aarabu
Ezekiel39:6 Nintome omorero osambe ense ya Magogi amo nabanto abwo begaarete bare nobotoereru
Ezekiel39:7 Ase ayio nindigererie ng’a erieta riane richenu ndimanyekane ase egati y’Abaisraeli
Ezekiel39:8 “Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Rora
Ezekiel39:9 Erio abanto abamenyete ase emechie y’Abaisraeli mbagende basangererie ebirwanero; chinguba
Ezekiel39:10 Ase engaki eyio Abaisraeli tibakogenda orosana gotenya chinko
Ezekiel39:11 “Ase rituko erio nindue Rigoko ri’Abaeti rire moocha y’enyancha
Ezekiel39:12 Abaisraeli mbaire emetienyi etano na ebere ase okobatindeka
Ezekiel39:13 Abanto bonsi b’ense eyio mbagenderere kobatindeka
Ezekiel39:14 Nyuma emetienyi etano na ebere koyaerire mbachore abanto barabe bakona‐goeta aase aande onsi ase ense eyio babe bakorigia abwo bakwete batigarete riroba igoro
Ezekiel39:15 Ekero abwo bakorigia abakwete
Ezekiel39:16 Boigo omochie orabeo norokwe Hamona. Ase enchera eyio mbachene ense eyio.
Ezekiel39:17 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel39:18 Imorie chinyama chi’abarwani esegi bare ne chinguru
Ezekiel39:19 Imorie ebitinya goika moigote kegima
Ezekiel39:20 Agwo ase emesa yane imorie chinyama chie chibarasi
Ezekiel39:21 “Inche ning’orokie obonene bwane ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku
Ezekiel39:22 Ase rituko erio na kogenderera botambe
Ezekiel39:23 Abanto b’ebisaku mbamanye ng’a Abaisraeli nigo bairetwe ase obosomba ase engencho y’obobe bwabo
Ezekiel39:24 Nigo nabakorerete ayio koreng’ana nogotacheneka kwabo
Ezekiel39:25 “Ase ayio
Ezekiel39:26 Ekero Abaisraeli baramenye ase ense eyio bare nobotoereru
Ezekiel39:27 Ayio nigo arabe ekero ndabasangererie mbarusie korwa ase egati y’abanto
Ezekiel39:28 Erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene Nyasae obo
Ezekiel39:29 Bono tinkobisa obosio bwane naende korwa asebare. Ning’umore omoika one igoro y’Abaisraeli. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”
Ezekiel40:1 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo ebere
Ezekiel40:2 Erio ase okorora naetwe na Nyasae
Ezekiel40:3 Omonene akang’ira aase agwo
Ezekiel40:4 Omonto oria agantebia
Ezekiel40:5 Nkarora orwaki rwaetanaine eraaro y’enyomba eria chinsemo chionsi. Emoti yarenge ase okoboko kw’omonto oria nigo yarenge nobotambe bw’amaboko atano na rimo
Ezekiel40:6 Naende akagenda ase egeita kiarochie moocha
Ezekiel40:7 Ebinyomba bi’oborendi mbiarengeo
Ezekiel40:8 Boigo akarenga ensemo y’egesona ime
Ezekiel40:9 Boigo akarenga obogare bw’egesona keria
Ezekiel40:10 Oboagacho obwo bw’egeita kia moocha nigo bwarenge nebinyomba bi’oborendi
Ezekiel40:11 Naende akarenga obogare bw’egeita kia ime
Ezekiel40:12 Orosenge ndwarenge bosio bw’ebinyomba biria bi’oborendi
Ezekiel40:13 Naende akarenga obotambe korwa ase akanyomba akamo goika ase akande karenge ensemo ende y’egesoero. Obotambe obwo bokaba obw’amaboko emerongo ebere na atano. Ebisieri bi’ebinyomba ebio nigo biachikaine.
Ezekiel40:14 Akarenga chindwaro chie chisiiro chiarenge ase chinsemo ibere ime y’egesoero
Ezekiel40:15 Obotambe korwa ase oboagacho bw’egeita gia isiko gochia ase obw’egeita kia ime nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo etano.
Ezekiel40:16 Ebibao biasiekeire ebitange nigo biarenge ase chinyasi chi’ebinyomba biria bi’oborendi
Ezekiel40:17 Omonto oria akang’ira goika ase eraaro ya isiko yatichire inse namagena ase chinsemo chionsi
Ezekiel40:18 Obogare bw’aase aria atichire nigo bwareng’aine nobwe rikere ri’amaagacho are biita. Aase aria atichire nigo arenge aase are inse.
Ezekiel40:19 Naende akarenga obotambe korwa ase oboagacho bw’egeita gia inse gochia ase obw’egeita ki’eraaro ya ime
Ezekiel40:20 Naende akagenda ase oboagacho bware geita ki’eraaro ya isiko kiarochie sugusu
Ezekiel40:21 Ebinyomba bi’oborendi ebiarenge ime y’oboagacho boria
Ezekiel40:22 Ebibao biaye
Ezekiel40:23 Kororia ase oboagacho obwo bwa geita gia sugusu
Ezekiel40:24 Omonto oria akang’ira gochia ase ensemo ya irianyi
Ezekiel40:25 Ebibao nigo biarenge ase oboagacho obwo ase chinsemo chionsi
Ezekiel40:26 Ekeriinero kiarenge nebitambokero bitano na bibere nkiarengeo kiare koriinerwa gochiao; egesona kiaye nigo kiarenge ime y’oboagacho obwo. Emegwekano y’emekendo nigo yachabeire ase chisiiro chiaye chiarenge ase chinsemo ibere.
Ezekiel40:27 Agwo ase ensemo ya irianyi oboagacho mbwarengeo bware negeita kegosoerwa goika ase eraaro ya ime. Akarenga obotambe korwa ase oboagacho bonde goika ase obonde
Ezekiel40:28 Omonto oria akang’ira ase eraaro ya ime goetera ase oboagacho bware geita ase ensemo ya irianyi
Ezekiel40:29 Ebinyomba biaye bi’oborendi
Ezekiel40:30 Ebisona nigo biarenge ase chinsemo chionsi; obotambe bwabo nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo ebere na atano
Ezekiel40:31 Egesona kiaye kiarochie ase eraaro ya isiko
Ezekiel40:32 Naende akang’ira ase eraaro ya ime goetera ase oboagacho bware geita ensemo ya moocha
Ezekiel40:33 Ebinyomba biaye bi’oborendi
Ezekiel40:34 Egesona kiaye nigo kiarochie ase eraaro ya isiko
Ezekiel40:35 Erio akang’ira ase oboagacho bware geita ase ensemo ya sugusu
Ezekiel40:36 Ebinyomba biaye bi’oborendi
Ezekiel40:37 Chisiiro chiaye nigo chiarochie ase eraaro ya isiko
Ezekiel40:38 Ebinyomba mbiarengeo amo nebisieri biabo ang’e ne chisiiro agwo ase amaagacho onsi arenge nebiita; agwo nao ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa biarenge gosiberigwa.
Ezekiel40:39 Agwo ase rikere ri’oboagacho obwo ime
Ezekiel40:40 Naende chimesa chinde ibere nchiarenge agwo isiko ase baare gotiirera gochia ase egeita kia ime ki’oboagacho bwarochie sugusu; boigo ase ensemo ende y’egesoero ekio nchiarengeo chimesa chinde ibere.
Ezekiel40:41 Chimesa echio chionsi ase ebing’wanso biarenge konyenyerwa nigo chiarenge isano na isato
Ezekiel40:42 Naende nchiarengeo chimesa inye ase ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa chiaroisirie korwa ase amagena abaachire. Igoro yabo nao ebinto biarenge gokorerwa emeremo ase ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa
Ezekiel40:43 Ase omogo o kera emesa ase chinsemo chiaye chionsi
Ezekiel40:44 Isiko y’oboagacho bw’egeita kia ime gochia ase eraaro ya ime
Ezekiel40:45 Omonto oria agantebia
Ezekiel40:46 na akwo karochie sugusu nak’abakuani bagokora emeremo ase egesasimero. Aba nab’ororeria rwa Zadoki
Ezekiel40:47 Naende omonto oria akarenga eraaro ya ime; obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko rigana erimo
Ezekiel40:48 Erio akang’ira ase egesona gie Hekalu
Ezekiel40:49 Obogare bw’egesona ekio nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo ebere
Ezekiel41:1 Erio omonto oria akang’ira ase Hekalu
Ezekiel41:2 Obogare bw’egesieri nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko ikomi
Ezekiel41:3 Naende akagenda ase akanyomba kaime. Erio akarenga emetobwa y’egesieri
Ezekiel41:4 Akarenga obotambe bw’akanyomba karia kare moino y’Aase Aachenu
Ezekiel41:5 Naende akarenga enyasi ye Hekalu; obonetu bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atano na rimo
Ezekiel41:6 Ebinyomba ebio biaetanaine Hekalu nigo biarenge namarongo atato
Ezekiel41:7 Ebinyomba biria biaetanaine Hekalu nigo biaagachetwe iga: Ebia inse nigo biarenge ebinyerere
Ezekiel41:8 Nkarora oboroso bwaetanaine Hekalu bwatichire; obotambe bw’oboroso boria bw’ebinyomba biria biaagachire amo
Ezekiel41:9 Obonetu bw’enyasi ya isiko y’ebinyomba biria nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atano
Ezekiel41:10 Gati‐gati y’oboroso boria bwatichire na ebinyomba biaagachire ao bioka
Ezekiel41:11 Ebisieri biarenge gosoerwa ase ebinyomba biria; ekemo nigo kiarochie ase ensemo ya sugusu
Ezekiel41:12 Oboagacho obwarenge ao
Ezekiel41:13 Naboigo omonto oria akarenga Hekalu eria; obotambe bwaye bokaba obw’amaboko rigana erimo
Ezekiel41:14 Obogare bwa bosio bwe Hekalu ensemo ya moocha
Ezekiel41:15 Akarenga obotambe bw’enyomba yaagachire magega amo nebisona biaye biarochie ase chinsemo ibere
Ezekiel41:16 Boigo omonto oria akarenga emeriibo ya inse y’ebisieri
Ezekiel41:17 Igoro y’ebisieri na ime y’enyomba
Ezekiel41:18 Emegwekano y’abakerubi na ey’emekendo iyarengeo. Ase kera egati y’abakerubi
Ezekiel41:19 obosio bw’omonto bokarigereria omokendo ensemo eyemo
Ezekiel41:20 Emegwekano eyio y’abakerubi na ey’emekendo nigo yachabeire korwa inse goika ase egesieri igoro ase enyasi ye Hekalu ime.
Ezekiel41:21 Emetobwa y’ebisieri nigo yareng’aine obogare na obotambe
Ezekiel41:22 Egesasimero kiaroisirie korwa ase chibao nkiarengeo; obotambe bwaye gochia igoro nobw’amaboko atato
Ezekiel41:23 Aase Aachenu amo n’Aase Aachenu Mono nigo abwate emerangwa ebere.
Ezekiel41:24 Kera egesieri nigo kiarenge nemerangwa ebere yare koigorwa korwa gati‐gati
Ezekiel41:25 Ase omorangwa bw’Aase Aachenu emegwekano y’abakerubi na ey’emekendo nigo yachabeire aroro yagwekaine eria yarenge ase chinyasi. Ekerama gie chibao nigo kiarenge bosio bw’egesona isiko.
Ezekiel41:26 Agwo ase chinyasi chi’egesona
Ezekiel42:1 Omonto oria akang’ira ase eraaro ya isiko erochie sugusu
Ezekiel42:2 Obotambe bw’enyomba eria nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko rigana erimo
Ezekiel42:3 Korwa aase atigire ataagachire arenge nobogare bw’amaboko emerongo ebere gochia ase eraaro ya isiko yatichire namagena
Ezekiel42:4 Bosio bw’ebinyomba biria aase arenge goeterwa narengeo; obogare bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi
Ezekiel42:5 Ebinyomba bia igoro nigo biarenge ebieng’e gochia ime kobua biria binde
Ezekiel42:6 Ebinyomba ebio biaagachetwe ase rirongo ria gatato tibiabwate chisiiro buna chigoora. Ase ayio ebinyomba bia igoro nigo biarenge ebieng’e gochia ime kobua ebia inse na ebia gati.
Ezekiel42:7 Orwaki ndwarenge mbarabare y’ebinyomba biria rwarochie gochia ase eraaro ya isiko. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo etano.
Ezekiel42:8 Obotambe bw’ebinyomba biarochie ase eraaro ya isiko nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo etano
Ezekiel42:9 Inse y’ebinyomba ebio
Ezekiel42:10 Enyomba eria rirondo yanachanire ebinyomba yarenge ang’e norwaki oronetu rwarenge irianyi
Ezekiel42:11 Bosio bw’ebinyomba ebio aase arenge goeterwa narengeo. Ebinyomba ebio nigo biareng’aine na biria biarenge ensemo ya sugusu. Obotambe bwabo na obogare nigo bwarenge buna obw’ebio. Aase abo onsi arenge goeterwa nigo areng’aine buna aase aria aande
Ezekiel42:12 Ebisieri biabo nigo biarenge buna ebi’ebinyomba bia sugusu. Egesieri nkiarenge ase omochakano bw’aase aria arenge goeterwa
Ezekiel42:13 Omonto oria agantebia
Ezekiel42:14 Ekero abakuani barabe bagosoa Aase Aachenu tibagosoka korwa agwo gocha ase eraaro ya isiko bataruseti chianga chi’obokoreri bwabo
Ezekiel42:15 Ekero omonto oria konya akoorire korenga aase e Hekalu a ime
Ezekiel42:16 Akaimokia emoti
Ezekiel42:17 Erio akaonchoka
Ezekiel42:18 Akarenga ensemo ya irianyi
Ezekiel42:19 Naende akaonchoka gochia ensemo ya bosongo
Ezekiel42:20 Naboigo akarenga chinsemo chionsi inye chi’aase aria. Orwaki nigo rwaetanaineo; obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obwe chimoti amagana atano
Ezekiel43:1 Nyuma y’ayio akang’ira goika ase egeita kiarochie moocha.
Ezekiel43:2 Nkarora obonene bwa Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli bogocha korwa moocha; eriogi ri’ogocha kwaye nigo riarenge koeera buna eri’amache amange
Ezekiel43:3 Obonene obwo naroche ase okorora nigo bwarenge buna boria naroche ekero nachete gosaria omochie o Yerusalemu
Ezekiel43:4 Obonene bw’Omonene bogasoa Hekalu goetera ase egeita kia moocha.
Ezekiel43:5 Aroro agwo Omoika okany’imokereria igoro
Ezekiel43:6 Erio omonto agatenena mbarabare asende
Ezekiel43:7 agantebia
Ezekiel43:8 Ekero barabwo babekire emeriibo yabo ya inse ang’e neyane
Ezekiel43:9 Tiga barusie korwa asende obonyaka bwabo bw’ogosasima emegwekano
Ezekiel43:10 “Aye mwanyabanto
Ezekiel43:11 Onye bakoba nobosooku ase engencho y’amabe onsi bakorire
Ezekiel43:12 Oko nakwo ogochika gwe Hekalu: Igoro y’egetunwa
Ezekiel43:13 “Ebi nabio ebirengo bi’egesasimero
Ezekiel43:14 Korwa enterekerero inse goika egetambokero kie ritang’ani ki’egesasimero ekenyene nigo kiarenge obotambe bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko abere gochia igoro
Ezekiel43:15 Aase bagoutera omorero na gosambera ebing’wanso igoro y’egesasimero nigo arenge ay’ekerengo ki’amaboko ane gochia igoro
Ezekiel43:16 Na eriko riria nigo riarenge eri’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi na abere
Ezekiel43:17 Egetumo ki’egesasimero nigo kiarenge egi’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi na ane
Ezekiel43:18 Naende omonto oria agantebia
Ezekiel43:19 Ase rituko erio oe abakuani Abalawi b’ororeria rwa Zadoki eeri ensae ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Abwo nabwo baeirwe ribaga ri’okong’ika ang’e ase ogonkorera. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.
Ezekiel43:20 Erio oimokie amanyinga make ay’ekeng’wanso ekio
Ezekiel43:21 Naende oire eeri eria oyerue ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe
Ezekiel43:22 Rituko ria kabere orue egoree ensae
Ezekiel43:23 Ekero gwakoorire kogechena igo
Ezekiel43:24 Erio ochirente ase obosio bw’Omonene
Ezekiel43:25 Kera rituko ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere mobe mokorua egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe; boigo mobe mokorua eeri ensae na emingichi korwa ase riicho
Ezekiel43:26 Ase enchera eyio
Ezekiel43:27 Ekero amatuko ayio atano na abere aerire
Ezekiel44:1 Erio omonto oria akang’ira gochia ase egeita gia isiko kiarenge ensemo ya moocha ye Hekalu; egeita ekio nigo giasiekire.
Ezekiel44:2 Omonene agantebia
Ezekiel44:3 Omogambi bweka nere oraikaranseo ariere endagera ase obosio bw’Omonene. Nigo arasoere goetera gesona ki’oboagacho bore geita
Ezekiel44:4 Naende akang’ira
Ezekiel44:5 Erio Omonene agantebia
Ezekiel44:6 “Otebie abanto b’egesaku ki’Abaisraeli
Ezekiel44:7 Inwe mwarentire ime ase enyomba yane enchenu abanto b’ebisaku ebigeni abatarogeti ase chinkoro chiabo
Ezekiel44:8 Inwe abanyene timobeti mogokorera ebinto biane ebichenu
Ezekiel44:9 “Ase ayio
Ezekiel44:10 “Abalawi abwo baruete asende bagantiga
Ezekiel44:11 Nabo baranyare gokora emeremo ase enyomba yane enchenu
Ezekiel44:12 Ekiagera abakuani abwo batenenete ase amasio ’abanto gokorera emegwekano yabo bagosasima
Ezekiel44:13 Tibagocha ang’e ase ebinto biane ebichenu
Ezekiel44:14 Korende nimbabeke babe abarendi be Hekalu
Ezekiel44:15 “Korende abakuani Abalawi
Ezekiel44:16 Barabwo mbasoe ase enyomba yane enchenu
Ezekiel44:17 Ekero barabe bagosoa ase ebiita bigosoerwa ase eraaro ya ime
Ezekiel44:18 Barabwo mbabeke ase emetwe yabo ebitambaa biroisirie korwa ase egatani
Ezekiel44:19 Ekero batarasoka gochia ase abanto bare ase eraaro ya isiko goika barusie chianga echio chi’obokoreri
Ezekiel44:20 “Abakuani abwo tibagokigita chitukia chi’emetwe yabo
Ezekiel44:21 Omokuani onde bwensi takonywa edivai ekero agochia gosoa ase eraaro ya ime.
Ezekiel44:22 Ere takonyuoma omokungu omoboraka
Ezekiel44:23 “Barabwo mborokererie abanto baane bamanye gwatanana ebinto bire ebichenu na ebitaatananiri koba ebichenu
Ezekiel44:24 Ekero amariomana are ase abanto
Ezekiel44:25 “Omokuani tabaisa gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase ogokuna egetondo ki’omonto okure. Nare ne ribaga gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase abanto aba: ise
Ezekiel44:26 Ekero omokuani oyio achenirwe nabarerwe amatuko atano na abere.
Ezekiel44:27 Ase rituko riria arasoe ase eraaro ya ime ase obokoreri bwaye agwo Aase Aachenu
Ezekiel44:28 “Omwando obo nigo orabe iga: Ninche omonyene inde omwando obo. Timokobaa enibo ende yonsi
Ezekiel44:29 Barabwo mbabe bakoria okoruegwa kw’endagera
Ezekiel44:30 Moe abakuani okwama kwaino ogotang’ani gwa kera egento; boigo mobae okorua kwaino
Ezekiel44:31 Abakuani tibabaisa koria enyama ende yonsi y’enyoni gose ey’eng’iti ekwete yoka enyene
Ezekiel45:1 “Ekero morabe mogoaka obomera ase ogwatera abanto ense yaino ebe emiando yabo
Ezekiel45:2 Korwa ase oboremo obwo mwatanane aase Hekalu eraagachwe. Obotambe bwaye nigo borabe obwe chimoti amagana atano (500)
Ezekiel45:3 Ase oboremo obwo obochenu mwatanane ensemo ere nobotambe bwe chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25
Ezekiel45:4 Oboremo obwo mbobe ensemo enchenu y’ense eye
Ezekiel45:5 Ensemo ende eisaine obotambe bwe chimoti emerongo ebere na isano (25
Ezekiel45:6 “Naende mwate ensemo ende eye ebebekaine noboremo obwo obochenu ebe nobogare bwe chimoti chilifu isano (5
Ezekiel45:7 “Ensemo ende yatwe eegwe omogambi. Eyio nigo erabe ase chinsinyo chionsi ibere chi’oboremo boria obochenu
Ezekiel45:8 Ensemo eyio nebe ey’omogambi agwo ase ense y’Abaisraeli. Abagambi baane tibabaisa kogenderera gochanda abanto baane
Ezekiel45:9 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Inwe abagambi b’Abaisraeli
Ezekiel45:10 “Goika motware ebirengero bi’ekeene mokorengera oborito na obonge bw’ebinto bionsi.
Ezekiel45:11 Ekerengero gia efa (gose egetonga) na ekia bati (gose ensiongo) bibe ekerengo ekemo. Kera ekemo getware ensemo eyemo ya ikomi y’ekerengero gekorokwa homeri. Ekerengero kiaino ekenene mokorengera kebe ekie homeri.
Ezekiel45:12 “Ase chibesa
Ezekiel45:13 “Oko nakwo okorua morarente: Ebimunu bibere korwa ase ebitonga ikomi bi’engano
Ezekiel45:14 Morue amaguta ekerengo gechikire
Ezekiel45:15 “Korwa ase amaicho are ase amarisio ’Abaisraeli morue eng’ondi eyemo korwa ase ching’ondi amagana abere
Ezekiel45:16 “Abanto bonsi b’ense eye goika baire okoruegwa okwo ase omogambi ore ase Abaisraeli.
Ezekiel45:17 Nigo erabe emeremo y’omogambi arue ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa
Ezekiel45:18 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani
Ezekiel45:19 Omokuani aimokie amanyinga make ay’ekeng’wanso ekio ki’ebibe
Ezekiel45:20 Okore boigo ase rituko ria gatano na kabere ri’omotienyi
Ezekiel45:21 “Ase rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani mobe ne Rituko Rinene ri’Epasaka
Ezekiel45:22 Ase rituko erio omogambi arue eeri ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe ase engencho yaye omonyene
Ezekiel45:23 Ase kera rituko ase engaki y’amatuko ayio atano na abere
Ezekiel45:24 Naende arue okoruegwa kw’endagera
Ezekiel45:25 “Gochakera rituko ria ikomi na gatano ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere
Ezekiel46:1 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Egeita kia moocha kegosoerwa gochia ase eraaro ya ime
Ezekiel46:2 Omogambi asoe goetera ase egesona ki’oboagacho bore geita
Ezekiel46:3 Kera Esabato
Ezekiel46:4 Ase rituko ri’Esabato omogambi arue ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ase Omonene
Ezekiel46:5 Amo nemingichi eria arue okoruegwa kw’endagera egetonga ekemo
Ezekiel46:6 Ase rituko ri’Omotienyi Omoyia arue eeri ensae eyemo
Ezekiel46:7 Amo neeri eria arue okoruegwa kw’endagera egetonga ekemo na amo nemingichi eria boigo
Ezekiel46:8 Ekero omogambi oria arasoe aetere egesona ki’oboagacho bore geita
Ezekiel46:9 “Ekero abanto b’ense eyio barache ase obosio bw’Omonene gosasima ase Amatuko Amanene
Ezekiel46:10 Omogambi asoe ime amo nabanto
Ezekiel46:11 Ase engaki y’emeyega
Ezekiel46:12 “Ekero omogambi ararente ase Omonene okorua kwaye kw’ogwancha
Ezekiel46:13 “Kera emambia
Ezekiel46:14 Boigo kera emambia orue ase Omonene okoruegwa kw’endagera ebimunu bine
Ezekiel46:15 Ase enchera eyio emanwa y’eng’ondi
Ezekiel46:16 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Omogambi karae oyomo bw’abana baye abamura oboremo bw’orogongo rwaye
Ezekiel46:17 Korende onye okoa omosomba oye oboremo bw’orogongo rwaye
Ezekiel46:18 Omogambi takoura abanto emiando yabo ayee abana baye
Ezekiel46:19 Erio omonto oria akang’eteria ase egesoero kiarenge ang’e negeita
Ezekiel46:20 Naende agantebia
Ezekiel46:21 Naende akang’ira ase eraaro ya isiko
Ezekiel46:22 Ebiooreri ebio bine biare ase chikoona chi’eraaro nigo biagiteire. Obotambe bwabo nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo ene
Ezekiel46:23 Orwaki nigo rwaetanaine kera ekemo ki’ebiooreri ebio bine. Inse ase orwaki mbarabare amariko akorugerwa naroisirieo.
Ezekiel46:24 Omonto oria agantebia: “Aya namariko ase abwo bagokora emeremo ye Hekalu bakoiyekera ebing’wanso abanto bakorua.”
Ezekiel47:1 Nyuma y’ayio omonto oria akang’ira gochia ase egesieri gie Hekalu. Nkarora amache akorwa inse y’egesona gie Hekalu
Ezekiel47:2 Erio omonto oria agansokia isiko akang’eteria ase egeita gia isiko kiarochie sugusu
Ezekiel47:3 Omonto oria nigo abwate emoti y’okorengera
Ezekiel47:4 Naende akabwatia orooche roria
Ezekiel47:5 Naende akarenga amaboko elifu eyemo ende
Ezekiel47:6 Omonto oria akamboria
Ezekiel47:7 Ekero nare goeta ase engegu eyio nkarora emete emenge ase chingegu chi’orooche orwo ase chinsemo chionsi.
Ezekiel47:8 Omonto oria agantebia
Ezekiel47:9 Aase aande onsi amache ayio aragende
Ezekiel47:10 Abarubi mbatenene ase engegu y’orooche orwo gochakera Eni‐Gedi na goikera Eni‐Egelaimu. Aase agwo nabe ase ebionga bikorutwa
Ezekiel47:11 Korende amache are ase chitente chiaye
Ezekiel47:12 Ase chingegu chi’orooche orwo chinsemo chionsi ibere emete y’ebisaku ao ao ekwama amatunda akoriegwa nemereo. Amato ’emete eyio tagosusana
Ezekiel47:13 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Echi nachio chirabe chimbebe chi’ense egochia gwatananerwa ebisaku ikomi na bibere bi’Abaisraeli ebe emiando yabo. Ororeria rwa Yusufu rororwo roegwe ebitari bibere.
Ezekiel47:14 Mobaatere mobareng’anerie kera omonto ensemo yaye. Nigo netianetie koa chisokoro chiaino ense eye; ase ayio ense eyio nebe omwando oino.

Ezekiel47:16 na Hamati

Ezekiel47:20 “Enyancha Enene nero erabe ribebe ria bosongo goikera ase egesoero kia Hamati. Eyio nero erabe ribebe ria bosongo.

Ezekiel48:1 “Oyo noro omoroberio buna ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli biramenye: Egesaku kia Dani keegwe orogongo rwa sugusu. Ribebe riabo ribwatie enchera ya Heteloni agwo ase egesoero kia Hamati
Ezekiel48:2 Egesaku gi’Aseri keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norwa Dani korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo.
Ezekiel48:3 Egesaku kia Nafutali keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norw’Aseri korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo.
Ezekiel48:4 Egesaku kia Manase keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norwa Nafutali korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo.
Ezekiel48:5 Egesaku gia Efraimu keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norwa Manase korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo.

Ezekiel48:7 Egesaku kia Yuda keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norwa Reuben korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo.
Ezekiel48:8 “Orogongo robebekaine norwa Yuda korwa moocha goika bosongo
Ezekiel48:9 “Orogongo orwo morotige robe orw’Omonene; obotambe bwaye nigo borabe chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25
Ezekiel48:10 Abakuani mbanyore orogongo rwabo korwa ase orwo orochenu. Orogongo rwabo nigo rorabe nobotambe bwe chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25
Ezekiel48:11 Orogongo orwo nigo rorabe orw’abakuani abwo bachenekire
Ezekiel48:12 Orogongo orwo nigo rorabe aase mokoruera okoruegwa ogochenu aatananire korwa ase ensemo eria ere enchenu. Nigo rorabe orochenu mono robebekane norw’Abalawi.
Ezekiel48:13 Abalawi baegwe orogongo robebekane norw’abakuani; nigo rorabe nobotambe bwe chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25
Ezekiel48:14 Orogongo orwo tirobaisa koonigwa gose koonchorerigwa; orogongo orwo rore oruya goetania echinde chionsi tiroegwa onde
Ezekiel48:15 “Orogongo roratigare rore nobogare bwe chimoti chilifu isano (5
Ezekiel48:16 Ekerengo ki’omochie oyio nigo kerabe iga: Ensemo ya sugusu chimoti chilifu inye
Ezekiel48:17 Omochie oyio nigo orabe namarisio buna iga: Oborisia bwa sugusu nigo borabe obw’ekerengo gie chimoti amagana abere
Ezekiel48:18 Orogongo orwo roratigare robebekaine na roria orochenu
Ezekiel48:19 Abakori emeremo b’omochie oyio ab’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli mbabe bakorema orogongo orwo.
Ezekiel48:20 “Orogongo roria rwonsi orochenu nigo rorabe orw’ekerengo gie chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25

Ezekiel48:22 Chingongo chi’omogambi nigo chirabebekane norw’Abalawi na orw’omochie
Ezekiel48:23 “Ebisaku binde biratigare biegwe chingongo chiabo buna iga: Egesaku kia Benjamin keegwe orogongo rwaye korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo.

Ezekiel48:27 Egesaku kia Gadi keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norwa Sabuloni korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo.
Ezekiel48:28 “Ribebe ria irianyi nigo rirabebekane norongogo rwa Gadi. Nigo riragenderere korwa Tamari gochia ase amache a Kadeshi‐Meriba

Daniel6:15 Naende abanto baria bagatubokera omoruoti bare amo

Daniel6:17 Rigena rikarentwa rigakuneka ase omonwa bw’engoro eria
Daniel6:18 Erio omoruoti akairana
Daniel6:19 Mambia kobogokiamoka omoruoti akaimoka akaayerera gochia ase engoro eria ye chindo.
Daniel6:20 Ekero aigete ang’e nengoro eria ase Danieli arutetwe
Daniel6:21 Erio Danieli akairaneria omoruoti
Daniel6:22 Nyasae one natomete omomalaika oye
Daniel6:23 Omoruoti akaba nomogoko omonene mono
Daniel6:24 Erio omoruoti agachika ng’a abanto baria basoerete Danieli barentwe. Erio bakarutwa ase engoro eria ye chindo
Daniel6:25 Nyuma y’ayio Dario omoruoti akarika amang’ana
Daniel6:26 Bono narure ogochika ng’a abanto bonsi bare ase oboruoti bwane baiguswe na koiroka ase obosio bwa Nyasae o Danieli.” “Ere nere Nyasae ore moyo

Daniel7:1 Ase omwaka bwe ritang’ani bw’okogamba kwa Belisasari
Daniel7:2 Aya naro amang’ana Danieli atebete: “Ase okorora kwane kwa botuko nkarora chimbeo inye chia igoro chigocha ne chinguru
Daniel7:3 Ching’iti chinene inye chigatiira korwa ase enyancha ime; okororekana kwabo nigo kwarenge ao ao.
Daniel7:4 Eng’iti entang’ani nigo yagwekaine endo
Daniel7:5 “Naende nkarora eng’iti ya kabere yagwekaine edubu ekaimokerera igoro na kogunkwaria rikere riaye erimo; nigo yabwate chimbaru isato ase omonwa oye
Daniel7:6 “Nyuma y’ayio nkarora eng’iti ende yagwekaine engo
Daniel7:7 “Naende nkarora ase amaroro aria a botuko eng’iti ya kane. Nigo yarenge ey’okoondokia na koirokia
Daniel7:8 Buna narenge ndigereretie na korengereria igoro ye chingunchara chiria
Daniel7:9 “Ekero narigereretie nkarora ebirogo bi’obonene bigoterekwa
Daniel7:10 Orooche rw’omorero rogasoka korwa asare. Chilifu ne chilifu bakamokorera; ne chilifu ikomi ara chilifu ikomi bagatenena ase obosio bwaye. Ab’ekegambero bagaikaransa kogamba
Daniel7:11 “Ekero narigereretie ekaba ng’a orogunchara roria rwagendererete gokwana amang’ana ’oboenenu. Ase engencho eyio nkarora eng’iti eria egaitwa
Daniel7:12 Ching’iti chiria chinde chiatigarete chikaurwa chinguru chiabo chi’okogamba
Daniel7:13 “Naende nkarora ase amaroro aane a botuko oyomo onga buna omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto ogocha amo namare a igoro
Daniel7:14 Ere oyio akaegwa okobua gw’okogamba
Daniel7:15 “Inche Danieli ngachandeka ase omoika one
Daniel7:16 Ngachiera oyomo bw’abanto baria bateneine aroro

Daniel11:20 “Naende naoroke omoruoti onde ase ribaga riaye
Daniel11:21 “Naende naoroke omoruoti onde omokorekanu ase ribaga ri’oria oitetwe. Oyio ere takoegwa amasikani ase oboruoti obwo. Nigo arache ng’ora ng’ora ase obong’ainereria bw’okweansia aire oboruoti.
Daniel11:22 Ere nasirie abarwani esegi abange baria baramochere; boigo nasirie omogambi oria arakore okobwatana kw’ogotianania nere.
Daniel11:23 Nyuma okobwatana kogwakorirwe nere
Daniel11:24 Nigo arache ng’ora ng’ora

Daniel11:29 “Naende ase engaki echikire nairane gochia ase ense ya irianyi
Daniel11:30 Chimeeri chia Kitimu nchiche komorwania
Daniel11:31 Abarwani bande b’esegi batometwe nere mbakore Obomenyo Obochenu bobe botachenegeti
Daniel11:32 Abwo bagokora amabe ase okobwatana okwo ere nabang’use namang’ana ay’okweansia goika bagotige kegima
Daniel11:33 Abwo bare nobong’aini ase egati y’abanto mborokererie abange babe nokomanya. Korende ase engaki enke abande babo nabaitwe nemioro
Daniel11:34 Ekero emechando eyio erabachere
Daniel11:35 Abande b’abwo bare abang’aini nabanyorwe nemechando eyio
Daniel11:36 “Omoruoti oria nigo arakore buna anchete. Ase obomwenu bwaye neimokererie igoro ase kera enyasae
Daniel11:37 Omoruoti oria tagosika chinyasae chie chisokoro chiaye
Daniel11:38 Ase ribaga riabo nasike enyasae ekorenda chiburi; enyasae eye chisokoro chiaye chitamanyete nigo arayesike ase okoyeruera chitahabu
Daniel11:39 Ase ogokonywa kw’enyasae engeni nekorere chiburi chinkong’u buna anchete. Abanto baria baranche ng’a nomogambi are
Daniel11:40 “Ase engaki y’omoerio omoruoti o irianyi namoumokere
Daniel11:41 “Boigo nasoe ase ense eria engiya
Daniel11:42 Narambore okoboko kwaye asirie chinse chinyinge
Daniel11:43 Nabe nokobua igoro ye chikungo chie chitahabu ne chifeta
Daniel11:44 Korende amang’ana ararwe moocha na sugusu namoichanie
Daniel11:45 Natenenie eema yaye y’oboruoti ebe ase egati y’enyancha na egetunwa keria egechenu ki’obonene. Korende nonya naboigo naikere omoerio oye

Hosea10:1 Abaisraeli nigo banga buna omosabibu okororekana ore omuya mono okwama amasabibu. Buna koreng’ana okwama kwabo kwamentekanete

Amos8:1 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae anyorogetie ase amaroro: Nkarora egetonga kere namatunda amatobu.
Amos8:2 Omonene akamboria
Amos8:3 Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: “Ase rituko erio amatera agoterwa ase chihekalu naonchoke abe okorera gw’okweumia. Emebere y’abanto bakwete nigo erabe emenge aande onsi; abanto nigo barabe bakoyetuguta bakirete‐kiri.”
Amos8:4 Inwe aba mokourereria abaremeire na gosiria abataka bare ase ense
Amos8:5 Inwe nigo mogoteba
Amos8:6 Boigo togore abataka ase rigori rie chifeta
Amos8:7 Omonene otianire ase Oyore Obonene bw’abanto ba Yakobo
Amos8:8 Inee! Ense tegotengechigwa ase engencho eyio
Amos8:9 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ase rituko erio nintige erioba rigwe mobaso gati
Amos8:10 Ning’onchore emeyega yaino ebe ebirero
Amos8:11 Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: “Rora
Amos8:12 Abanto mbatayaye korwa ase enyancha goika ase enyancha ende
Amos8:13 Ase rituko erio abaiseke abekungi abanyabieni na abamura mbagoyane ase okoba nerang’o.
Amos8:14 Abanto abwo bagotiana ase ebibe bi’Abasamaria
Amos9:1 Nkarora Omonene oteneine ang’e negesasimero
Amos9:2 Nabaisa korema basoe inse agwo aase abakure
Amos9:3 Nabaisa kwebisa ase egechuria ki’egetunwa gia Karimeli
Amos9:4 Nabaisa koirwa ase obosomba nababisa babo
Amos9:5 Omonene
Amos9:6 Oria okoagacha chiero chiaye aaria igoro
Amos9:7 “Inwe Abaisraeli
Amos9:8 “Rora inche Omonene Nyasae nigo ndarigererie namaiso aane obogambi obwo bogokora ebibe. Nimbosirie borue ase obosio bw’ense
Amos9:9 “Naama! Ninchike ng’a Abaisraeli basongwe ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku bionsi
Amos9:10 Abanyabibe bonsi b’abanto baane
Amos9:11 “Rituko ngochicha rire ekero ndatenenie esaiga eria ya Daudi yagwete
Amos9:12 Abaisraeli mbaire ensemo entigari ya Edomu
Amos9:13 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Rora amatuko ngocha are
Amos9:14 Ning’iranie abanto baane Abaisraeli korwa ase obosomba. Barabwo mbaagache naende emechie eyio yasiretigwe bamenyeo
Amos9:15 Nimbairanie mbabeke bamenye ase ense yabo
Obadiah1:1 Oko nokorora kw’Obadia. Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba igoro y’egesaku kia Edomu
Obadiah1:2 “Rora
Obadiah1:3 Oboenenu bw’enkoro yao bwakong’ainire
Obadiah1:4 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Noisa koagacha egeswa kiao aaria igoro buna ekeongo
Obadiah1:5 “Abaibi gose abasakori baise kogochera botuko
Obadiah1:6 Naki abanto b’ororeria rwa Esau bakoriga‐rigigwa ne chinibo chiabo chibisire chiaorokigwe maiso marore!
Obadiah1:7 Abanto baria bonsi kwabwatanete nabarabwo bagoseririe gochia ase orobebe
Obadiah1:8 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ase rituko erio ninsirie abanto abang’aini ba Edomu
Obadiah1:9 Inwe Abatemani
Obadiah1:10 “Ekiagera mwaureretie na goita abanto bamino b’ororeria rwa Yakobo
Obadiah1:11 Inwe nigo mwatenenete ensemo ase rituko riria
Obadiah1:12 Timobaisa kogoka ase rituko riria amabe arache ase abanto bamino. Gose timobaisa gochenga ase rituko ri’ogosirigwa kw’Abayuda
Obadiah1:13 Inwe timosoa ase egeita ki’abanto baane ase rituko ri’amaakwa abo; gose timogokera emechando yabo ase rituko ri’amaakwa abo
Obadiah1:14 Inwe timobaisa gotenena ase amatabekania e chinchera goita abanto ba Edomu kobagotama
Obadiah1:15 “Rituko ri’Omonene ng’ang’e rire gochera abanto b’ebisaku bionsi. Buna mwabeire mogokora
Obadiah1:16 Buna mwabeire mokonywera igoro ase egetunwa kiane egechenu
Obadiah1:17 “Korende ase egetunwa gia Sayoni mbabe aroro abaratooreke na aase agwo nabe aachenu. Abanto b’enyomba ya Yakobo nabairanerigwe ense yabo.
Obadiah1:18 Abanto b’enyomba ya Yakobo mbabe omorero
Obadiah1:19 Abanto b’ense ya Negebu mbaire Egetunwa gia Esau
Obadiah1:20 Abarwani esegi b’Abaisraeli abwo bairetwe ase obosomba mbairane bamenye ase ense ya Kanani gochia ase omochie o Sarefata. Abanto ba Yerusalemu bairetwe ase obosomba
Obadiah1:21 Erio abatooria mbariine ase Egetunwa gia Sayoni
Jonah1:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yona mosinto bw’Amitai
Jonah1:2 “Imoka ogende Nineva
Jonah1:3 Korende Yona akaimoka
Jonah1:4 Korende Omonene akagusia omwaga omonene mono igoro ase enyancha
Jonah1:5 Erio abagendia b’emeeri bakaondoka
Jonah1:6 Omochiki bw’emeeri akagenda asare akamoboria
Jonah1:7 Abanto baria bagatebania
Jonah1:8 Ase ayio abanto baria bakamoboria
Jonah1:9 Ere akabairaneria
Jonah1:10 Erio abanto baria bakairoka mono
Jonah1:11 Erio abanto baria bakamoboria
Jonah1:12 Ere akabairaneria
Jonah1:13 Nonya naboigo abanto baria bagateema ne chinguru gosukia emeeri eria gochia ase engegu
Jonah1:14 Ase ayio abanto baria bakarera ase Omonene
Jonah1:15 Erio bakaimokia Yona
Jonah1:16 Erio agwo abanto baria bakairoka Omonene mono
Jonah1:17 Bono Omonene agachika enswe enene ekamera Yona
Jonah2:1 Ekero Yona arenge ime ase enda y’enswe eria
Jonah2:2 “Ekero narenge ase emechando
Jonah2:3 Aye nigo kwandutete gochia ase chindiba
Jonah2:4 Ase ayio inche nkarengereria ng’a natugutirwe korwa ase obosio bwao
Jonah2:5 Nigo narimerete ase amache ime
Jonah2:6 Nigo narimerete ngaika inse kegima y’ebitunwa
Jonah2:7 Ekero omoyo one ogiregete ime yane
Jonah2:8 Abanto abwo bakoonchokera emegwekano egosasimwa ere bosa
Jonah2:9 Korende inche nindue ekeng’wanso gi’okogoakera ng’a mbuya mono
Jonah2:10 Erio Omonene agakwana nenswe eria
Jonah3:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yona eria kabere
Jonah3:2 “Imoka ogende Nineva
Jonah3:3 Ase ayio Yona akaimoka
Jonah3:4 Yona agachaka goeta ase omochie oria
Jonah3:5 Abanto ba Nineva bakegena amang’ana a Nyasae
Jonah3:6 Ekero amang’ana ayio aigete ase omoruoti
Jonah3:7 Erio amang’ana akararigwa ase Nineva bwonsi kobwatekana nogochika kw’omoruoti amo nabannene b’oboruoti bwaye
Jonah3:8 Korende kera omonto eboyie egunia
Jonah3:9 Ning’o omanyete
Jonah3:10 Ekero Nyasae aroche aya bakorete
Jonah4:1 Yona akagechigwa namang’ana ayio
Jonah4:2 Erio agasaba Omonene
Jonah4:3 Ase ayio
Jonah4:4 Erio Omonene akamoboria
Jonah4:5 Bono Yona agasoka korwa ase omochie oria
Jonah4:6 Erio Omonene Nyasae akameria omobono ogakina
Jonah4:7 Korende rituko ria kabere mambia
Jonah4:8 Ekero erioba riatiirire gocha igoro
Jonah4:9 Korende Nyasae akaboria Yona
Jonah4:10 Omonene akamotebia
Jonah4:11 Inee! Inche tingwenereti koba namabeebe ase Nineva
Micah1:1 Eri nario ring’ana ri’Omonene riachete ase Mika
Micah1:2 Inwe abanto b’ebisaku bionsi
Micah1:3 Rora
Micah1:4 Ebitunwa ebio mbinyititoke inse yaye
Micah1:5 Ayio nigo arabe ase engencho y’ogosaria kw’abanto ba Yakobo
Micah1:6 “Ase ayio nintagore Samaria obe chitui chi’amagena
Micah1:7 Emegwekano yaye yonsi egosasimwa nesamunyoranwe; ebiegwa bionsi biaruetwe ase obonyaka mbisambwe nomorero. Ninsirie emegwekano yaye yonsi egosasimwa
Micah1:8 Ase engencho eyio nimbokie amagombo na korera. Ninyechabore chianga imbe getirianda
Micah1:9 ekiagera chingoma chiaye tichikogwenigwa. Obobe buna obwo bwaikire ase Abayuda
Micah1:10 Timobaisa koraria amang’ana ayio ase Gati
Micah1:11 Inwe abanto ba Safiri
Micah1:12 Abanto bamenyete Maroti nigo baganyete mono ng’a baremigwe; amaakwa arure ase Omonene
Micah1:13 Inwe abamomenyete Lakisi
Micah1:14 Ase ayio aye karue ebiegwa bi’ogotigana ase abanto bamenyete Mosereti‐Gati. Chinyomba chire agwo Akisibu nchibe buna chindooche chikong’aina abaruoti b’Abaisraeli.
Micah1:15 Inwe abamomenyete Maresa
Micah1:16 Mokigite chitukia chi’emetwe yaino ase okoreera abana baino mwanchete. Tiga emetwe yaino etigare bosa buna omotwe bw’ensoti
Micah2:1 Obobe nobwabo abwo bagokora emeroberio y’ogokora amabe na bayebeka ang’e kobare ase amarere abo; mambia kobwakire baba bakoyaikerania
Micah2:2 Abwo nigo bakoba ne ribero ri’okonyora emegondo
Micah2:3 Ase ayio
Micah2:4 Ase rituko erio abanto mbatonge omorabaaro igoro yaino
Micah2:5 Ase engencho eyio onde tari orarambore engori y’okorengera egetari ase omosangererekano bw’Omonene.
Micah2:6 Abanto abwo nigo bakobana iga: “Timobaisa kobana! Onde tagwenereti kobana igoro y’amang’ana buna ayio; ogochaywa tikogotonyora.
Micah2:7 Inwe abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo
Micah2:8 “Korende ase amatuko aya mwaimokeire abanto baane buna ababisa. Nigo mokwaboria ebiambaro bi’abwo bagotaara bare nomorembe bataganeti esegi.
Micah2:9 Nigo mogoseria abakungu b’abanto baane korwa ase chinka chiabo echio bagokerete
Micah2:10 Inwe imoka morue aa
Micah2:11 “Omonto omonyaborimo aise gokwana amang’ana a bosa na ay’obong’ainereria
Micah2:12 “Inwe ab’ororeria rwa Yakobo
Micah2:13 “Oyo okobaatera enchera nabatang’ane; barabwo mbagareyie
Micah3:1 Inche ngateba: “Inwe abatang’ani b’abanto ba Yakobo
Micah3:2 Inwe nigo mogechete ayare amaya
Micah3:3 Inwe nigo mokoria chinyama chi’emebere y’abanto baane. Nigo mogosaabora amasankwa abo
Micah3:4 Erio mbarere ase Omonene
Micah3:5 Aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro y’ababani abwo bakoraa abanto baane gochia ase obosiru
Micah3:6 Ase ayio obotuko mbobachere timorora amaroro
Micah3:7 Abarori mbasookigwe
Micah3:8 Korende inche naichoirwe ne chinguru chi’Omoika bw’Omonene
Micah3:9 Inwe abatang’ani b’abanto ba Yakobo
Micah3:10 inwe nigo mokoagacha Sayoni ase ogoitera amanyinga
Micah3:11 Abatang’ani b’omochie oyio nigo bakogamba ebina ase okoegwa riaaki
Micah3:12 Ase ayio
Micah4:1 Nebe ase amatuko ’omoerio ng’a egetunwa ki’enyomba y’Omonene ngekong’igwe

Micah4:3 Erio Omonene nanache ekina ase egati y’abanto abange

Micah5:2 “Korende aye Bethlehemu Efarata
Micah5:3 Ase ayio Omonene natige abanto baye goika engaki eike
Micah5:4 Ekero oyio oraiborwe arache
Micah5:5 Omorisia oyio nabe omorembe oito. Ekero Abaasuri barache ase ense yaito gotorwania na basoe ase chinyomba chiaito chi’obonene
Micah5:6 Barabwo mbasirie ense y’Abaasuri nemioro

Micah5:9 Ase enchera eyio amaboko aino naimokererigwe igoro y’abachandi baino

Micah5:15 Ninyeruserie egesiomba ase abanto b’ebisaku

Micah7:1 Obobe nobwane
Micah7:2 Abanto bamoirogete Nyasae basirire korwa ase ense
Micah7:3 Abanto aba nigo bare nomokia gokora ayare amabe namaboko abo. Omogambi nigo anchete aegwe riaaki
Micah7:4 Oyore omuya goetania abande ase egati yabo nigo anga buna egetutu kere namagwa
Micah7:5 Tobaisa kwegena omogisangio oo
Micah7:6 Omwana omomura nigo agochaya ise
Micah7:7 Korende inche omonyene nindigererie Omonene; ninganye inde nogosemeria ase Nyasae ore ogotooreka kwane; Nyasae one nanyigwe.
Micah7:8 Aye omobisa one
Micah7:9 Ekiagera nakorire ebibe ase Omonene
Micah7:10 Erio oria ore omobisa one arore ayio
Micah7:11 Rituko ndiche ekero chindwaki chiao chiraagachwe. Ase rituko erio chimbebe chiao nchigareeigwe.
Micah7:12 Ase rituko erio abanto mbagochere korwa Asuri na korwa ase emechie ya Misiri
Micah7:13 Korende ense netigwe ebe bosa ase engencho y’abanto bamenyeteo; okwo korabe okwama kw’ogokora kwabo okobe.
Micah7:14 Risia abanto bao nenyimbo yao abanto abwo bare riicho ri’omwando oo
Micah7:15 “Nimborokie amakumia buna nakorete ekero mwaruete ase ense ya Misiri.”
Micah7:16 Ekero abanto b’ebisaku bararore ayio mbasooke
Micah7:17 Barabwo mbamene orotu rwe riroba buna ching’iti chingenda inse. Mbarue ase chinyomba chiabo chinkong’u bakoiguswa bekurure inse buna amakonde; mbakoonchokere aye Omonene
Micah7:18 Inee! Nyasae onde nare onga buna aye? Aye nigo okwabera abatigari abare omwando oo ebibe biabo
Micah7:19 Aye notoiranere
Micah7:20 Aye noorokerie ororeria rwa Yakobo obwegenwa bwao
Nahum1:1 Aya naro amang’ana amakong’u igoro ya Nineva arikire ase ebuku y’okorora kwa Nahumu Omoelikosi.
Nahum1:2 Omonene nigo are Nyasae bwe risemi
Nahum1:3 Omonene tari omwango bw’okoba nendamwamu
Nahum1:4 Ere nigo agotogonyera enyancha
Nahum1:5 Ebitunwa nigo bigotengechigwa ase obosio bw’Omonene
Nahum1:6 Ning’o oranyare gotenena ase ekeririanda kiaye tikemosiria? Gose ning’o oranyare koremereria obotindi bw’endamwamu yaye? Ekeririanda kiaye nigo kiaumoirwe buna omorero
Nahum1:7 Omonene nomuya; ere neburi enkong’u ase engaki y’emechando
Nahum1:8 Korende nasirie kegima aase omochie oria ore
Nahum1:9 Inki mokoroberia igoro y’Omonene? Ere nabasirie kegima
Nahum1:10 Nabaisa kobwatana buna amagwa akweringania
Nahum1:11 Omonto oyomo naruete asore
Nahum1:12 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Nabaisa koba abange bare ne chinguru
Nahum1:13 Bono nimbutore amakorogoto aria ababisa bababekerete
Nahum1:14 Aya naro Omonene achikire igoro yao: “Ororeria tirogotoka roratorwe ase erieta riao. Ninsirie korwa ase enyomba ye chinyasae chiao emegwekano yao ogosasima
Nahum1:15 Rigereria ase ebitunwa
Nahum2:1 Oyo ogosiria oimokire gocha kobarwania. Renda chiburi chiaino more nebirwanero
Nahum2:2 Omonene nkoirania are obonene bw’abanto ba Yakobo
Nahum2:3 Chinguba chi’ababisa babo bare chituoni nigo chiabeire chimbariri
Nahum2:4 Chigari chi’esegi nigo chigotitiria ase chinchera; nigo chikobagachana ase chiraaro chi’omochie; nigo chikomesa buna ebieri bi’omorero
Nahum2:5 Ere nigo ainyorete abarwani baye b’esegi abanene
Nahum2:6 Ebiita bire ase chindooche biaigoirwe
Nahum2:7 Eting’ana goika echaborwe chianga eirwe; abaiseke baye abasomba nigo bakorera na kweumia buna amaruma
Nahum2:8 Korwa kare Nineva nigo orenge buna ritibo riichire amache
Nahum2:9 Sakora chifeta! Sakora ne chitahabu! Obotenenku na obonge bwe chinibo bireo tibikoera.
Nahum2:10 Ogotigwa bosa
Nahum2:11 Amaraaro e chindo
Nahum2:12 Endo nigo yatandoranete eke yaitete kegaisana chimanwa chiaye; naende egaita ekaa chindo chiaye chiaberi. Nigo yaichoretie amakuruma aye nebi yaitete
Nahum2:13 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Rora
Nahum3:1 Obobe nobwaye omochie oyio oiteire amanyinga amange
Nahum3:2 Igwa eriogi ri’emecharichi egoaka
Nahum3:3 Abariini be chibarasi nigo bakominyoka gochia bosio; emioro nigo ekomesigwa
Nahum3:4 Ayio onsi nigo achete ase engencho y’obonyaka obonge bw’omochie oyo. Oyio orenge omotayayi omonyakieni bwenaretie oborogi; nigo asiretie abanto b’ebisaku nobonyaka bwaye
Nahum3:5 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Rora
Nahum3:6 “Ningosiarere eubi y’okogechia
Nahum3:7 Kera omonto orabe ogokorora nigo aregose atenenere aare
Nahum3:8 Aye Nineva
Nahum3:9 Abaetiopia na Abamisiri batarenge korengeka nabwo barenge chinguru chiaye; Abaputi na Abalibia nabwo barenge koyokonya.
Nahum3:10 Korende nonya naboigo
Nahum3:11 Naye boigo notinde bwerusie moyo. Aye boigo norigie aase okwebisa korwa ase ababisa bao.
Nahum3:12 Chiburi chiao chionsi nigo chinga buna emeko ere nokwama kwe ritang’ani. Ekero egotengechigwa
Nahum3:13 Rora
Nahum3:14 Buucha amache oyagache
Nahum3:15 Aroro agwo omorero nogosambe
Nahum3:16 Nigo kwamentete abaonchoreria bao bakaba abange goetania ching’enang’eni chia igoro
Nahum3:17 Abagambi bao nigo banga buna chingige
Nahum3:18 Aye omoruoti bw’Abaasuri
Nahum3:19 Okogwenigwa tikori ase ogoakwa kwao
Habakkuk1:1 Aya naro amang’ana amakong’u omobani Habakuki aroche ase okorora.
Habakkuk1:2 Aye Omonene
Habakkuk1:3 Naki gwantigire narorire amabe buna aya? Naki ondigereretie ing’etananire nemechando? Ogosirigwa na ogokorerwa bobe nigo bire ase obosio bwane; amariomana na ogotaigwana nigo bireo.
Habakkuk1:4 Ase engencho eyio amachiko tari ne chinguru
Habakkuk1:5 “Rigereria morore ayare ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku
Habakkuk1:6 Naama! Nindete Abakalidayo
Habakkuk1:7 Barabwo nabanto bakoondokia na kwoboyia; oboronge bwabo na okobua kwabo nigo bikorwa ase barabwo abanyene.
Habakkuk1:8 “Chibarasi chiabo nigo chikominyoka bwango kobua chingo
Habakkuk1:9 “Abanto abwo bonsi nigo bagocha gokora ay’obotindi. Nigo bakorigereria gochia bosio bare nomokia buna omwaga okorwa moocha; nigo bagosangereria abasibwa abange buna omokenye.
Habakkuk1:10 Nigo bagochecheria abaruoti
Habakkuk1:11 Erio baeta bwango buna omwaga
Habakkuk1:12 Aye Omonene
Habakkuk1:13 Aye ore namaiso amachenu mono atari korigereria amabe na aya atari ay’oboronge
Habakkuk1:14 Aye gwakorire abanto babe buna chinswe chi’enyancha
Habakkuk1:15 Barabwo nigo bakobabwata nebigobanio biabo babakurura nekeonga kiabo na kobasangereria ase ekeonga kiabo bakorubera; erio bagoka na gochenga.
Habakkuk1:16 Ase ayio nigo bakorua ebing’wanso ase ekeonga kiabo na kogesambera ubani
Habakkuk1:17 Inee! Abwo nigo bagochia konakorusia abanto b’ebisaku ase ekeonga kiabo babasirie batari namabera?
Habakkuk2:1 Inche nintenene korenda
Habakkuk2:2 Omonene akang’iraneria
Habakkuk2:3 Okorora okwo nigo koganyete engaki yaye eike. Nigo gokoayerera goikerane
Habakkuk2:4 Rora
Habakkuk2:5 “Edivai nigo ere buna omoonchoreria omong’ainereria; omonto omwerori tari kogenderera koba nobotoereru. Okogania kwaye nigo gokogarea kwaba buna aase abakure; nigo konga buna amakweri atari goisaneka. Nigo agosangereria abanto b’ebisaku bionsi gocha asare na gokora abanto be chinse chionsi koba abaye.”
Habakkuk2:6 Abanto aba bonsi nigo baramokorere echeche baroisie engero y’okomochecheria batebe
Habakkuk2:7 Inee! Abanto baria kwairete ebinto biabo tibakogochera mobosokano
Habakkuk2:8 Ekiagera aye gwasakoire ebisaku ebinge
Habakkuk2:9 Obobe nobwaye omonto oria okonyora ebitoki bi’obobe na kobirenta ase enyomba yaye
Habakkuk2:10 Aye kwarenteire enyomba yao obosooku ase ogoita abanto abange
Habakkuk2:11 Amagena ’enyasi naake eriogi na emiamba ye rirongo neyairanerie.
Habakkuk2:12 Obobe nobw’omonto oyio okoagacha omochie ase ogoitera amanyinga na kobeka oboroso bw’omochie ase ogokora ebibe.
Habakkuk2:13 Abanto nigo bakwerosia gokora emeremo eyio erasambwe nomorero
Habakkuk2:14 Ense neichorigwe nokomanya kw’obonene bw’Omonene buna chinyancha chiichire namache.
Habakkuk2:15 Obobe nobw’omonto oria okoa omonto onde ekenyugwa giochoganirie nobosongo kiamotindia
Habakkuk2:16 Aye nigo gwaichoirwe nobosooku ribaga ri’ogosikwa. Aye kanywe
Habakkuk2:17 Obobe bwakoretwe ase Lebanoni mbogotube
Habakkuk2:18 Omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa
Habakkuk2:19 Obobe nobwaye omonto oria ogotebia egento kebaachire korwa ase omote: Boka! Na otebia rigena ritanyare gokwana: Imoka! Inee! Ebinto ebio mbinyare gokworokereria enchera? Rora
Habakkuk2:20 “Korende Omonene nao are ase Hekalu yaye Enchenu; tiga ense yonsi ekire‐kiri ase obosio bwaye.”

Habakkuk3:2 Aye Omonene

Habakkuk3:5 Amarwaire agoita nigo atang’aine bosio bwaye
Habakkuk3:6 Ekero agotenena
Habakkuk3:7 Nkarora chinyomba chire Kusani chichandegete
Habakkuk3:8 Inee! Aye Omonene nigo ogechirie ne chindooche
Habakkuk3:9 Obota bwao bwaorokigwe maiso marore amo nemegwe ye ring’ana riao kwarierete ebisaku eira. Nigo gwatandorete ense ne chindooche.

Zechariah9:7 Nindusie amanyinga ’ebing’wanso korwa ase emenwa yabo
Zechariah9:8 Erio inche Omonene nindende enyomba yane
Zechariah9:9 Inwe abanto ba Sayoni goka mono! Ee
Zechariah9:10 Ninsirie chigari chi’esegi korwa ase abanto ba Efraimu

Zechariah10:1 Inwe saba Omonene abatwerie embura y’okwamia endagera ase engaki yaye. Omonene natonge amare akomesa

Zechariah10:3 “Endamwamu yane nigo egwoka igoro y’abarisia

Zechariah10:5 Barabwo mbabe buna chituoni chi’esegi

Zechariah11:1 Aye Lebanoni
Zechariah11:2 Aye omotarakwa

Zechariah11:5 Abanto bagochigora nigo bagochinyenya

Zechariah11:7 Ase ayio nkaba nkorisia riicho rie ching’ondi chiria chiarenge gochia konyenywa

Zechariah11:15 Erio Omonene agantebia

Zechariah13:4 Ase engaki eyio kera omobani nabe nobosooku ase amaroro aye ekero akobana; gose onde takobeka eganchwa eroiseirie amarionya ase okong’aina abanto.

Zechariah14:4 Ase rituko erio Omonene natenene ase Egetunwa ki’Emezeituni kerochie Yerusalemu ensemo ya moocha. Egetunwa ekio ngetandoke ase chinsemo ibere korwa moocha goika bosongo
Zechariah14:5 Inwe imotame moetere ase rikura riria rire ase egati y’ebitunwa biane
Zechariah14:6 Ase rituko erio omobaso tokobara
Zechariah14:7 Naribe rituko ritari buna amatuko ande
Zechariah14:8 Ase rituko erio amache are moyo nasoke korwa Yerusalemu. Ekeng’ese ki’amache ayio agende gochia ase Enyancha ya Moocha
Zechariah14:9 Omonene nabe omoruoti bw’ense engima. Ase engaki eyio Omonene nere orabe ere bweka
Zechariah14:10 Ekero ekio ense eye yonsi neonchorwe ebe ense omweya korwa Geba goika Rimoni
Zechariah14:11 Abanto mbamenye Yerusalemu

Zechariah14:13 Ase engaki eyio Omonene nabarentere obotantanu
Zechariah14:14 Nonya n’Abayuda mbarwanie abanto ba Yerusalemu. Obotenenku obonge bwe chitahabu
Zechariah14:15 Amaakwa amabe buna ayio nache boigo ase chibarasi
Zechariah14:16 Erio omonto onde bwensi oratigare ore moyo korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku abwo bachete korwania abanto ba Yerusalemu nabe ogotiira omwaka ase omwaka gochia gosasima Omoruoti
Zechariah14:17 Onye abanto b’egesaku kende gionsi kere ase ense bakwanga kogenda Yerusalemu gosasima Omoruoti

Zechariah14:19 Ekio nakio kerabe egesusuro ase Abamisiri na ase abanto b’ebisaku bionsi
Zechariah14:20 Ase engaki eyio chindege chisungeire chibarasi nchirikwe amang’ana aya: “Chinchenu
Zechariah14:21 Kera enyongo ere Yerusalemu
Malachi1:1 Aya naro amang’ana amakong’u Omonene atomerete Abaisraeli goetera ase Malaki.
Malachi1:2 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Inche nimbanchete inwe.” Korende inwe nigo mokoboria: “Naki otwanchete?” Omonene nigo akoiraneria
Malachi1:3 na nkaba ngechete Esau na ngasaria ense yaye y’ebitunwa ekaba erooro
Malachi1:4 Abaedomu kobaratebe: “Nonya twaakirwe
Malachi1:5 Namwerorere amang’ana ayio namaiso aino; erio motebe: “Omonene nigo are omonene nonya nisiko y’ense y’Abaisraeli.”
Malachi1:6 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Omwana nigo asigete ise
Malachi1:7 Nimbatebie: Nigo mokorenta ase egesasimero kiane okoruegwa kw’endagera gotari ogochenu. Erio mwaboria: Nase inchera ki twagokorire oyotachenegeti. Nimbairanerie: Nase okorengereria ng’a emesa yane inche Omonene ney’ogochaywa.
Malachi1:8 Inee! Ekero mokorua eng’iti eukorete koba ekeng’wanso
Malachi1:9 “Inwe abakuani
Malachi1:10 Naende Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: Onye ndiria arenge gotoka omonto nonya noyomo korwa asemore asieke ebisieri bie Hekalu
Malachi1:11 Korwa ekero erioba rigosoka goika ekero rikorimera
Malachi1:12 “Korende inwe nigo mokorikora ribe eritachenegeti ekero mogoteba ng’a emesa yane yakorirwe koba eyetachenegeti na gochaya okoruegwa gokorentwa aroro.
Malachi1:13 Inwe nigo mogoteba: Amang’ana aya atorosirie
Malachi1:14 “Oragererigwe omonto oria omong’ainereria obwate emingichi ase riicho riaye
Malachi2:1 “Bono inwe abakuani
Malachi2:2 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: Onye timogotegerera amang’ana ayio na koyabeka ase chinkoro chiaino ime
Malachi2:3 Nintogonyere ororeria rwaino
Malachi2:4 Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche nabachikerete amang’ana ayio
Malachi2:5 “Okobwatana kw’ogotianania nakorete nere nokw’obogima na omorembe. Okwo nigo namoete
Malachi2:6 Amorokererio amaronge nigo arenge ase omonwa oye
Malachi2:7 Ebikoba bi’omokuani goika birende chisemi
Malachi2:8 “Korende inwe mwagobeire korwa ase enchera
Malachi2:9 Inwe mwangire kobwatia chinchera chiane; nigo mogwanchereria abanto ekero mokworokereria amachiko. Ase ayio nimbatige mochaywe na gokeeigwa ase amasio ’abanto bonsi.”
Malachi2:10 Inee! Intwe twensi titobwati Tata oyomo? Tari ere Nyasae oyomo ototongete? Nase ki rende totari abegenwa intwe ase intwe? Nase ki togosaria okobwatana kw’ogotianania okwo Nyasae akorete ne chisokoro chiaito?
Malachi2:11 Abayuda bakorire aya atari ay’obwegenwa
Malachi2:12 Omonene nasirie korwa ase chinyomba chia Yakobo onde bwensi ogokora amang’ana ayio karabe omworokia gose omworokigwa
Malachi2:13 Amang’ana ande mogokora naya: Nigo mogotuba egesasimero ki’Omonene namariga aino
Malachi2:14 Inwe nigo mokoboria: “Nase ki atari kobianchera?” Nekiagera Omonene arenge kirori ase egati yao na omokungu bw’oboke bwao
Malachi2:15 Omonto oyomo takorete bo
Malachi2:16 Omonene
Malachi2:17 Inwe mwarosirie Omonene namang’ana aino. Nigo mokoboria: “Naki twamorosirie?” Nekiagera mogoteba ng’a kera omonto ogokora ebibe nigo are omuya ase obosio bw’Omonene
Malachi3:1 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Rora
Malachi3:2 Korende ning’o oranyare gotenena koremereria rituko ri’Omonene

Malachi3:4 Erio ebing’wanso bi’Abayuda

Malachi3:7 Korwa ase amatuko e chisokoro chiaino inwe mwagoberete mogatiga emeroberio yane echikire
Malachi3:8 Inee! Omonto nanyare konyibera inche Nyasae ebiane? Korende inwe mwanyibeire ebiane. Inwe nigo mokoboria: Ninki twakoibeire? Mwanyibeire ensemo ya ikomi na okoruegwa konde.
Malachi3:9 Mwaragererigwe nokoragererigwa
Malachi3:10 Inwe renta ensemo ya ikomi eng’ikeranu ase ekungo y’enyomba yane

Malachi3:12 Erio abanto b’ebisaku bionsi inababaroke abasesenirie

Malachi3:14 Inwe mwatebire: Okomokorera Nyasae
Malachi3:15 Bono nigo tokoroka abwo bare abaenenu ng’a mbasesenirie. Abakori amabe nabwo bagendererete konyora amaya; tari ayio oka
Malachi3:16 Erio abanto abwo bamoirogete Omonene bakaba bagokwana barabwo ase barabwo; Omonene agategerera

Matthew1:14 na Azoro akaibora Zadoki
Matthew1:15 na Eliudi akaibora Eleazari
Matthew1:16 na Yakobo akaibora Yusufu

Matthew5:2 Agachaka koborokereria

Matthew5:5 “Mbasesenirie abare noboitongo

Matthew5:7 “Mbasesenirie abare namabera
Matthew5:8 “Mbasesenirie abare abachenu ase chinkoro
Matthew5:9 “Mbasesenirie abagokora omorembe
Matthew5:10 “Mbasesenirie abachandekire ase engencho y’oboronge
Matthew5:11 “Imosesenirie inwe
Matthew5:12 Goka na gochenga
Matthew5:13 “Inwe nomonyo bw’ense; korende omonyo korasirie obwansu bwaye
Matthew5:14 “Inwe nomobaso bw’ense. Omochie tokobiseka koagachire ase egetunwa igoro.
Matthew5:15 Nonya nabanto tibagotongia etaya na koyemumeka negetonga
Matthew5:16 Na omobaso oino obare boigo ase abanto
Matthew5:17 “Timokaga ng’a nigo nachire gosaria amachiko
Matthew5:18 Ekeene nabatebirie ng’a
Matthew5:19 Gaki monto onde bwensi orasarie richiko erimo erire rike ase amachiko aya
Matthew5:20 Naki nabatebirie inwe
Matthew5:21 “Mwaigwete ng’a abanto ba kare mbatebetigwe: Toita; na oyoraite nabe omonto okonacherwa ekina.
Matthew5:22 Korende inche nabatebirie ng’a onde bwensi orageche oyomwabo
Matthew5:23 Nabo gokorenta esadaka yao ase egesasimero korainyore ng’a oyomino nare ne ring’ana asore
Matthew5:24 otige esadaka yao agwo ase egesasimero ogende
Matthew5:25 Bwatana nomogosoeri oo bwango
Matthew5:26 Nekeene nagotebirie: Tokorwa aroro nonya ng’ake goika oakane ebesa y’omoerio.
Matthew5:27 “Mwaigwete ng’a ndiatebetwe: Totomana.
Matthew5:28 Korende inche nabatebirie
Matthew5:29 Onye eriso riao ria borio rikogera okore ebibe
Matthew5:30 Onye nokoboko kwao gw’okorio gokogera okore ebibe
Matthew5:31 “Naende ndiatebetwe; Oyoratige mokaye
Matthew5:32 Korende inche nabatebirie
Matthew5:33 “Naende mwaigwete ng’a abanto ba kare mbatebetigwe: Totiana bosa
Matthew5:34 Korende inche nabatebirie: Totiana ase egento kende gionsi; nonya nase igoro
Matthew5:35 gose ase ense
Matthew5:36 Na totiana ase omotwe oo
Matthew5:37 Amang’ana aino abe: Ee
Matthew5:38 “Mwaigwete ng’a ndiatebetwe: Eriso ase eriso
Matthew5:39 korende inche nabatebirie: Timobaisa koamererania noyore omobe. Korende omonto karagoake orosea rwa borio
Matthew5:40 Na omonto karigetie kogosoera na koira eanga yao ya ime
Matthew5:41 Na onye omonto ogokobetereria kogenda nere emaeli eyemo
Matthew5:42 Oyokogosaba
Matthew5:43 “Mwaigwete ng’a ndiatebetwe: Ancha omogisangio oo
Matthew5:44 Korende inche nabatebirie: Ancha ababisa baino
Matthew5:45 nario monyare koba abana ba Iso oino ore igoro
Matthew5:46 Naki komoranche ababanchete inwe
Matthew5:47 Na inwe komorakwanie abamino boka
Matthew5:48 Gaki inwe mobe abaikeranu buna Iso oino ore igoro are omoikeranu.”

Matthew6:2 “Gaki gokorua ebiegwa

Matthew6:4 ebiegwa biao binyare koba bobisi; na Iso oo oyokorora bobisi nagoakane.”
Matthew6:5 “Ekero mogosaba
Matthew6:6 Korende aye ekero ogosaba
Matthew6:7 “Ase ogosaba kwaino timogotererera amang’ana a bosa buna abanto b’Ebisaku; naki barabwo nigo bagokaga ng’a nabaigugwe ase obonge bw’amang’ana abo.
Matthew6:8 Gaki timoba omogwekano oyomo nabarabwo
Matthew6:9 “Inwe gaki
Matthew6:10 Oboruoti bwao boche
Matthew6:11 Otoe intwe rero endagera yaito.
Matthew6:12 Otwabere ebibe biaito
Matthew6:13 Totoira ase ogoteemwa
Matthew6:14 Naki inwe kamoraabere abanto ogosaria kwabo
Matthew6:15 Korende motaabereti abanto ogosaria kwabo
Matthew6:16 “Ekero mokweng’ata timokonyiria amasio aino buna abang’ainereria
Matthew6:17 Korende aye
Matthew6:18 tobaisa kororwa nabanto ng’a mbweng’atete
Matthew6:19 “Timogacha chinibo chiaino ase ense
Matthew6:20 korende mogache chinibo chiaino igoro
Matthew6:21 Ekiagera aase enibo yao ere
Matthew6:22 “Etaya y’omobere neriso. Nabo onye eriso riao rire rigiya
Matthew6:23 korende onye eriso riao rire riibe
Matthew6:24 “Onde tari oranyare gokorera abanene babere
Matthew6:25 “Ase ayio nabatebirie ng’a timochandeka igoro y’obogima bwaino
Matthew6:26 Morigererie chinyoni chia igoro! Chirochio tichiri gosimeka
Matthew6:27 Naende ning’o ore asemore oranyare gwechanda komenta ekerengo gi’okoboko okomo ase obotambe bwaye?
Matthew6:28 Ne chianga
Matthew6:29 korende nabatebirie
Matthew6:30 Korende onye Nyasae okoboyia obonyansi bw’egetii oboreo rero
Matthew6:31 Gaki
Matthew6:32 Naki abanto b’Ebisaku nigo bakorigia ebio bionsi; korende Iso oino ore igoro omanyire ng’a moganetie ebinto ebio bionsi.

Matthew6:34 “Gaki

Matthew13:36 Erio Yeso agatiga emeganda
Matthew13:37 Akairaneria
Matthew13:38 omogondo nense; embusuro eyio engiya nabana b’oboruoti; na amabanchore nabwo abana b’oria omobe.
Matthew13:39 Omobisa oria oyasimegete nere Saitani; rigesa nomoerio bw’ense
Matthew13:40 Buna amabanchore agosangererigwa asambwa nomorero
Matthew13:41 Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto natome abamalaika baye
Matthew13:42 nababatugute ase eriko ri’omorero. Aroro agwo abanto inababe nekerero na okoriania amaino.
Matthew13:43 Erio abanyene oboronge nabagirigente buna erioba ase oboruoti bwa Ise obo. Oyore namato akoigwera
Matthew13:44 “Oboruoti bwa igoro nigo bogwekaine nenibo yabisire ase omogondo
Matthew13:45 “Naende oboruoti bwa igoro mbogwekanirie nomonto omoonchoreria
Matthew13:46 Ere agachia korora eruru eyemo ye rigori rinene
Matthew13:47 “Naende oboruoti bwa igoro nigo bonga buna ekeonga ekiarutetwe ase enyancha ime
Matthew13:48 Ekero giaichoire
Matthew13:49 Naboigo arache koba ase omoerio bw’ense. Abamalaika nabaoroke bache gwatanana baria ababe korwa ase abanyene oboronge
Matthew13:50 babatugute ase eriko ri’omorero. Aroro agwo abanto inababe nekerero na okoriania amaino.”

Matthew13:52 Akabatebia
Matthew13:53 Ekero Yeso akoorire emereng’anio eyio

Matthew13:56 Na basubati bamwabo bonsi tibari aa seito? Gaki oyo ng’ai ayanyorire aya onsi?”

Matthew14:36 bakamosorora ng’a abae ribaga bakune nonya nomokoba bw’eanga yaye; na bonsi abayokunete bakagwenigwa.
Matthew15:1 Ekero ekio Abafarisai na aborokia b’amariko bakarwa Yerusalemu
Matthew15:2 “Nase ki aborokigwa bao bagosaria chingencho chi’abagaaka? Naki kobakoragera tibari goisaba amaboko abo.”
Matthew15:3 Akabairaneria
Matthew15:4 Naki Nyasae nigo achigete
Matthew15:5 Korende inwe moteba: Oyoratebie ise gose ng’ina: Bionsi ebi anga kwanyora korwa asende biaeirwe Nyasae
Matthew15:6 Ase chingencho chiaino chia kare nigo mogosaria ring’ana ria Nyasae.
Matthew15:7 Inwe abang’ainereria! Mbuya Isaya abanete igoro asemore

Matthew25:1 “Oboruoti bwa igoro nigo bogwekanirie nabaiseke ikomi ababogoretie chitaya chiabo

Matthew25:3 Na ekero baria abariri baimogetie chitaya chiabo

Matthew25:5 Ekero omonyuomi atebana gocha
Matthew25:6 Korende botuko gati gekaba egeturi: Rigereria
Matthew25:7 Erio abaiseke baria bonsi bakaimoka koroisia chitaya chiabo.
Matthew25:8 Baria abariri bagatebia baria abang’aini: Twatanere amaguta aino
Matthew25:9 Korende baria abang’aini bakabairaneria: Taibo. Takonyara gotoisana intwe nainwe twensi
Matthew25:10 Na ekero bachia kogenda kogora
Matthew25:11 Naende nyuma yaye abaiseke baria bande bagacha
Matthew25:12 Korende akabairaneria: Nekeene nabatebirie: Timbamanyeti inwe.
Matthew25:13 Ase igo renda
Matthew25:14 “Igo enga buna omonto ore kogenda orogendo
Matthew25:15 Akaa oyomo chitalanta isano
Matthew25:16 Oria oetwe chitalanta isano akagenda ara rimo
Matthew25:17 Naboigo noria oetwe chitalanta ibere akanyora ebitoki

Acts3:8 Akaimoka bwango
Acts3:9 Abanto bonsi bakamorora ogotaara na komotogia Nyasae.

Acts3:21 Ere igoro yagwenerete komonyora
Acts3:22 Musa natebete: Omonene Nyasae nabaimokerie omobani onga buna inche korwa ase egati y’abamino. Momoigwere ase amang’ana onsi arabatebie.
Acts3:23 Naende nebe ng’a kera omonto otaigwereti omobani oyio nigo arasirigwe na gwatananwa korwa ase egati y’abanto.

Romans1:1 Inche Paulo
Romans1:2 eye Nyasae atang’anete koria eira ase emenwa y’ababani baye ase amariko amachenu.
Romans1:3 Eye nenchili igoro y’Omwana oye Yeso Kristo
Romans1:4 naende ase okobokigwa korwa ase abakure na ase chinguru chi’Omoika bw’Obochenu akaorokigwa koba Omwana o Nyasae.
Romans1:5 Asare ere ntwanyorete obuya na obotomwa
Romans1:6 amo nainwe abanyene
Romans1:7 Nabarikeire inwe mwensi abamomenyete Rumi
Romans1:8 Ritang’ani naakeire Nyasae one ng’a mbuya mono ase Yeso Kristo ase engencho yaino inwe mwensi
Romans1:9 Naki Nyasae
Romans1:10 Botambe nigo ngosaba ng’a Nyasae karanche konyigorera enchera engiya
Romans1:11 Nigo inde namaiga kororana nainwe na kobaa ekeegwa ase enchera y’Omoika Omochenu
Romans1:12 erinde toremanie inche nainwe
Romans1:13 Korende abaminto
Romans1:14 Ase ayio ninde nesira ase Abagiriki na ase abatari Abagiriki
Romans1:15 Ase ensemo yane nigo nganetie mono korandia enchili nonya nasemore abamomenyete Rumi.
Romans1:16 Naki tinkororera enchili obosooku
Romans1:17 Ekiagera ime yaye oboronge bokorwa ase Nyasae bwaorokigwe korwa okwegena goika okwegena
Romans1:18 Naki endamwamu ya Nyasae yaorokigwe korwa igoro
Romans1:19 Bono ayaranyare komanywa igoro ya Nyasae aorokigwe asebare
Romans1:20 Naki chingencho chiaye
Romans1:21 Naki nonya bamanyete Nyasae
Romans1:22 Bagateba ng’a mbare nobong’aini
Romans1:23 Bakaonchoreria obonene bwa Nyasae
Romans1:24 Ase ayio Nyasae akabatiga ase okogania okobe gwe chinkoro chiabo
Romans1:25 ekiagera batigete ekeene kia Nyasae
Romans1:26 Ase engencho eyio Nyasae akabatiga batunyane okogania kwabo kw’obosooku
Romans1:27 Na abasacha boigo bagatiga okomenyana nabakungu kwa boronge
Romans1:28 Ekiagera batabarete ng’a ngento komomanya Nyasae
Romans1:29 Bagaichorwa ne chingencho chionsi chitari boronge
Romans1:30 abaitania
Romans1:31 abariri
Romans1:32 Barabwo abanyene mbamanyete mono ekina kia Nyasae kia boronge
Romans2:1 Ase ayio
Romans2:2 Intwe twamanyire ng’a ekina kia Nyasae nigo kere boronge igoro ase abwo bagokora ayio.
Romans2:3 Aye omonto oyokogambia baria bogokora ayio
Romans2:4 Gose ngwachayire obonge bw’obuya bwaye
Romans2:5 Korende ase obokong’u bwao na ankoro yao etari nokoonchoka
Romans2:6 ekiagera ere nache komoa kera omonto koreng’ana nogokora kwaye;
Romans2:7 nabae obogima bwa kare na kare baria bakorigia obonene
Romans2:8 Korende endamwamu na ekeririanda nabibe igoro ase baria beanchete abanyene
Romans2:9 Emechando na obororo inabibe igoro ase kera oyomo bw’abana ba mwanyabanto oyogokora amabe
Romans2:10 korende obonene na ogosika
Romans2:11 Ekiagera gwanchereria tikori ase Nyasae.
Romans2:12 Naki bonsi abakorire ebibe batari namachiko
Romans2:13 Naki tari abwo bakoigwa amachiko bare abanyene oboronge ase obosio bwa Nyasae
Romans2:14 Abanto b’Ebisaku batari namachiko
Romans2:15 Abwo nigo bakoorokia ng’a aya amachiko are korigia arikirwe ime ase chinkoro chiabo. Okomanya gwe chinkoro chiabo ime nigo gokobabera kirori
Romans2:16 Nabo arache koba ase rituko riria
Romans2:17 Korende aya okweroka Omoyahudi
Romans2:18 Kwamanyire ogwancha kwaye

Galatians2:1 Korende nyuma y’emiaka ikomi na ene ngatiira naende kogenda Yerusalemu amo na Barnaba
Galatians2:2 Na inche ngatiira ekiagera namaanoreretwe; nkabatebia enchili eria nkorandia ase abanto b’Ebisaku (korende ase obobisi ase abwo basikire). Aande teba ng’a nigo nkominyoka bosa
Galatians2:3 Korende Tito oyorenge amo nainche
Galatians2:4 Aya nigo aganetigwe nabaminto b’oborimo
Galatians2:5 Korende titwebegete inse asebare nonya nensa eyemo
Galatians2:6 Korende abwo babarire ng’a nabanene bare (tari gento asende nonya barenge nobonene bore naki; Nyasae tari nogwanchereria ase mwanyabanto)
Galatians2:7 Korende bakarora ekeene
Galatians2:8 (Naki ere oyoete Petero chinguru koba omotomwa bw’abarogete
Galatians2:9 Naende ekero bachia komanya obuya boria naeirwe
Galatians2:10 Ring’ana erimo barigetie torikore nario eri
Galatians2:11 Korende ekero Kefa achete Antiokia
Galatians2:12 Naki konya bataracha abanto baria barwete ase Yakobo
Galatians2:13 Agwo amo nere Abayahudi bande bagakora obong’ainereria boria
Galatians2:14 Korende ekero nachia korora ng’a ogokora kwabo tikware okwa boronge ase ekeene gi’enchili

Philippians1:23 Nimigire mono ase egati y’amang’ana aya abere. Okogania kwane nigo kore ng’a ngende komenya amo na Kristo; ekiagera aya namaya kobua.

Philippians2:13 ekiagera Nyasae nere ogokora emeremo ime yaino ase okorigia
Philippians2:14 Mokore amang’ana onsi motari nokwemurungania na okoborania
Philippians2:15 erinde monyare koba abatari na komocha

Philippians2:17 Ee

Philippians2:20 Naki tindi na monto onde ore nomoyo oyomo nainche

Philippians2:22 Korende momanyete Timotheo na ogokora kwaye
Philippians2:23 Ase ayio ninganetie komotoma ase obwango ekero ndamanye buna amang’ana arabe asende.
Philippians2:24 Na inche nasemeirie ase Omonene ng’a inche omonyene boigo ninchiche bwango.
Philippians2:25 Korende nkarora ng’a ningwenerete gotoma Epafrodito oyominto
Philippians2:26 Ere nigo arenge namaiga asemore mwensi
Philippians2:27 Ere nomorwaire arenge ekeene
Philippians2:28 Ase ayio nakorire omokia mono komotoma
Philippians2:29 Momoroisie gaki ase Omonene ase omogoko bwonsi. Mosike abanto banga buna oyio
Philippians2:30 ekiagera ase engencho y’emeremo ya Kristo akaba ang’e ase ogokwa

Philippians3:2 Mwerende korwa ase chisese
Philippians3:3 Naki intwe naba twarogete
Philippians3:4 Nonya ninche ase ensemo yane ninyare gosemeria ebia omobere. Onye omonto onde okorora ng’a nare nengencho y’ogosemeria ebia omobere
Philippians3:5 ekiagera narogete ase rituko ria gatano na gatato
Philippians3:6 Nkaba nomokia bw’ogochanda ekanisa
Philippians3:7 Korende amang’ana aria arenge okonyora asende nayabarire koba bosa ase engencho ya Kristo.
Philippians3:8 Ee
Philippians3:9 naende ndorekane ime asare. Tinkoba noboronge bwane boria bokonyorekana ase amachiko korende boria bokonyorekana ase okomwegena Kristo
Philippians3:10 Nindigetie komomanya Kristo ne chinguru chi’okobokigwa kwaye
Philippians3:11 erinde inyore ase enchera ende yonsi goikera okobokigwa korwa ase abakure.

Philippians3:16 Korende togenderere ase ayio ayio twaigete konyora.

Philippians3:20 Naki obobiare bwaito igoro
Philippians3:21 oyoranyare koonchora emebere yaito y’obosareku enyare kogwekana nomobere oye bw’obonene

Colossians1:1 Inche Paulo
Colossians1:2 nkobarikera tore inwe abachenu na abegeni baminto ba Kristo abamomenyete Kolosai: Obuya bobe asemore na omorembe bikorwa ase Nyasae Tata oito.
Colossians1:3 Botambe nigo togoakera Nyasae
Colossians1:4 ekiagera twaigure buna momwegenete Kristo Yeso
Colossians1:5 ase engencho y’ogosemeria okwo mwagacheirwe igoro. Igoro y’ogosemeria oko konya mwaigure ase ring’ana ri’ekeene ase enchili
Colossians1:6 eye yaikire gocha asemore. Nabo yaikire ense yonsi
Colossians1:7 Naboigo mworokereretigwe n’Epafara
Colossians1:8 Ere nigo atworogetie obwanchani bwaino ase Omoika.
Colossians1:9 Ase ayio
Colossians1:10 Mogenderere buna ebagwenerete ase Omonene
Colossians1:11 Na inwe mobekwe chinguru ase okobua gwonsi
Colossians1:12 mokomoakera Tata ng’a mbuya mono
Colossians1:13 Nere otosiborete korwa ase okobua kw’omosunte na agatong’anyia na gotosoyia ase oboruoti bw’Omwana oye omwanchwa.
Colossians1:14 Ime ase Omwana oria ntore nokoboorigwa na okwaberwa kw’ebibe.
Colossians1:15 Ere nomogwekano o Nyasae oyotari kororekana
Colossians1:16 Ime yaye ebinto bionsi bigatongwa
Colossians1:17 Ere nao arenge ritang’ani ri’ebinto bionsi
Colossians1:18 Ere nomotwe bw’omobere
Colossians1:19 Naki Nyasae agancha ng’a oboikeranu bwaye bwonsi bomenye ime asare.
Colossians1:20 Goetera asare Nyasae agancha kobwatania ebinto bionsi amo nere omonyene
Colossians1:21 Na inwe agwo ritang’ani nigo mwarenge mwatananire korwa ase Nyasae
Colossians1:22 Korende bono Nyasae obabwatanirie inwe amo nere omonyene ase ogokwa gwa Kristo kw’omobere oye bwe chinyama
Colossians1:23 komoragenderere ase okwegena
Colossians1:24 Bono nagokeire ogochandwa kwane inde nakorokwo ase engencho yaino; naende ase omobere one nkoyaikerania nde aria aremete ase ogochandwa gwa Kristo ase engencho y’omobere oye
Colossians1:25 Inche nabeire omosomba bw’ekanisa yaye ase oborendi obo naetwe na Nyasae ase engencho yaino ase okobaranderia inwe ring’ana rionsi ria Nyasae.
Colossians1:26 Obobisi boria bwabisetwe korwa kare ase ebigori ebinge
Colossians1:27 Nyasae agancha koorokia asebare obobisi boria bore obonene na obw’obonda ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku. Obobisi boria nabwo obo
Colossians1:28 Ere nere twararirie
Colossians1:29 Ase engencho eyio inche nigo ngokora emeremo na ngokora omokia ase chinguru chiaye chinene

1Thessalonians1:1 Inche Paulo amo na Silivano na Timotheo nkobarikera tore inwe ab’ekanisa y’Abatesaloniki
1Thessalonians1:2 Botambe nigo togoakera Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono ase engencho yaino mwensi
1Thessalonians1:3 Na intwe ase obosio bwa Nyasae Tata oito titori gotiga koinyora emeremo yaino ase okwegena
1Thessalonians1:4 Naki abaminto
1Thessalonians1:5 Naki intwe titwabarenterete enchili yaito ase amang’ana oka
1Thessalonians1:6 Inwe mokaba abegi baito
1Thessalonians1:7 na igo mokaba ekiorokererio ekiya ase abegeni bonsi ba Makedonia na Akaya.

1Thessalonians1:9 Naki barabwo abanyene baorokirie amang’ana igoro yaito

2Thessalonians1:4 Ase ayio
2Thessalonians1:5 Eke nakio ekiorokererio
2Thessalonians1:6 Naki Nyasae ororire boronge kobaakana emechando baria bakobachanda inwe
2Thessalonians1:7 na kobaa inwe abamwachandirwe ogotimokigwa amo naintwe. Aya nigo arakoreke ekero Omonene Yeso agocha koorokigwa korwa igoro amo nabamalaika b’okobua kwaye ase ekebemberi ki’omorero

2Thessalonians1:9 Barabwo nabanyore egesusuro ki’ogosareka
2Thessalonians1:10 ekero arache ase rituko riria
2Thessalonians1:11 Ase ayio

2Thessalonians2:4 Ere nomoengereria

2Thessalonians2:9 Ogocha kw’omosaria oria nigo kore ogokora gwa Saitani

2Thessalonians3:9 Tari ng’a eyio tiyatotungetie
2Thessalonians3:10 Ekiagera nonya nekero keria twarenge amo nainwe ntwabachigete ring’ana eri
2Thessalonians3:11 Naki twaigure ng’a mbare abanto asemore bare aboro

2Thessalonians3:13 Korende baminto

2Thessalonians3:15 Timomobara buna omobisa
2Thessalonians3:16 Bono Omonene bw’omorembe omonyene abae omorembe ase chingaki chionsi
2Thessalonians3:17 Oko nogokwania kwane inche Paulo ase okoboko kwane omonyene. Eke nakio ekemanyerio ase kera rirube riane; naboigo nkorika.
2Thessalonians3:18 Obuya bw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo bobe amo nainwe mwensi.
1Timothy1:1 Inche Paulo
1Timothy1:2 ngokorikera nde aye Timotheo
1Timothy1:3 Buna nakoboretie ekero nare kogenda Makedonia
1Timothy1:4 gose tibategerera emegano ao ao
1Timothy1:5 Bono ekerenga ki’ogochika oko nakio eke

1Timothy1:8 Twamanyire ng’a amachiko namaya
1Timothy1:9 na omanyete ng’a amachiko tabekiri ase omonto omoronge. Korende nigo abekire ase abasaria amachiko
1Timothy1:10 ase abatomani

1Timothy1:14 na obuya bw’Omonene oito bwamentekanire mono amo nokwegena na obwanchani ebire ime ase Kristo Yeso.

1Timothy3:4 Naende nemogwenerete abe omonto omanyete kogambera ab’enyomba yaye omonyene buya

1Timothy3:6 Ere taba omonto oonchoka rero iga

2Timothy1:2 ngokorikera nde aye Timotheo
2Timothy1:3 Igo nkomoakera Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono
2Timothy1:4 Ekero nkoinyora amariga ao nigo nkoba namaiga gokorora

2Timothy1:8 Gaki

2Timothy1:10 bwaorokigwe bono ase okoorokigwa kw’Omotooria oito Kristo Yeso. Ere agasiria chinguru chi’amakweri
2Timothy1:11 Naki ase enchili eye nkaragwa koba omoraria
2Timothy1:12 Ase engencho eyio nanyorire emechando eye. Korende tinkorora obosooku

2Timothy1:14 Renda keria ekiya kwaetwe
2Timothy1:15 Kwamanyire ng’a bonsi abare Asia bantigire

2Timothy1:17 Korende ekero aigete Rumi akandigia nomokia
2Timothy1:18 Omonene namwanchere anyore amabera korwa ase Omonene Rituko riria. Aye kwamanyire buya buna are gokora emeremo emenge aaria Efeso.
2Timothy2:1 Gaki
2Timothy2:2 Na ayakwaigwete korwa asende ase amasio ’abarori abange oyabeke ase abanto abegenwa

2Timothy2:4 Morwani onde tari

2Timothy2:7 Rengereria mono ayio ngokwana

2Timothy2:10 Ase ayio naremereirie onsi ase engencho y’abachore

2Timothy2:13 onye titori abegenwa

2Timothy2:15 Kora buna oranyare kweorokia ase obosio bwa Nyasae buna oyobwancheirwe nere
2Timothy2:16 Bweatanane korwa ase amang’ana atari ay’obonyasae
2Timothy2:17 Amang’ana abo nigo akoria buna rikwege ri’esiria. Ase abwo mbareo Himenayo na Fileto.
2Timothy2:18 Abwo basirerigwe korwa ase ekeene
2Timothy2:19 Korende oboroso obo Nyasae abegete bore ne chinguru
2Timothy2:20 Ase enyomba enene tibirio ebinto bie chitahabu na ebie chifeta bioka
2Timothy2:21 Ase ayio
2Timothy2:22 Tama okogania okobe kw’obosae
2Timothy2:23 Korende bwange amaborio ’oboriri atari aye chisemi. Kwamanyire ng’a ayio nigo ararente eriomana.
2Timothy2:24 Naende tegwenereti omosomba bw’Omonene koba omonyariomana
2Timothy2:25 oyorabatebererie ase obwororo abwo bakoamererania nere. Aande Nyasae nabaonchore
2Timothy2:26 erio banyare gotaboboka na korua ase omoeto o Saitani kobasakoirwe nere goika bakore ogwancha kwaye.

Titus1:1 Inche Paulo nomosomba o Nyasae
Titus1:2 ase ogosemeria kw’obogima bwa kare na kare. Obogima obo Nyasae ariete eira korwa kare na kare; ere tagokwana oborimo.
Titus1:3 Na ekero engaki yaye yaigete akabomaanora ase ring’ana riaye
Titus1:4 Ngokorikera nde aye Tito
Titus1:5 Ase engencho eye nkagotiga Kirete
Titus1:6 Omonto orachorwe onye okonyorekana ng’a tari ne chingencho chimbe
Titus1:7 Naki omotang’ani bw’ekanisa nemogwenerete abe omonto otari ne chingencho chimbe
Titus1:8 korende abe omoroisia abageni
Titus1:9 Ere nigo emogwenerete abwate ring’ana ri’ekeene buna riorokereretigwe
Titus1:10 Naki mbare abange batari koigwera
Titus1:11 Abwo mbagwenerete bakirigwe
Titus1:12 Omonto oyomo obo
Titus1:13 Oborori obo nobw’ekeene. Ase ayio
Titus1:14 ribaga ri’ogotegerera emegano y’Abayahudi
Titus1:15 Ebinto bionsi nebichenu ase abwo bare abachenu
Titus1:16 Igo bagoteba ng’a mbamomanyete Nyasae
Titus2:1 Korende aye

Titus2:5 Naende babe aberendete ase onsi
Titus2:6 Naboigo nabamura
Titus2:7 Ase amang’ana onsi bweorokie aye omonyene koba ekiorokererio ki’ogokora okuya
Titus2:8 Ogokwana kwao kobe okw’obogima
Titus2:9 Abasomba baigwere abanene babo ase amang’ana onsi
Titus2:10 tibaba abaganga
Titus2:11 Naki obuya bwa Nyasae bwaorokigwe nogotooreka ase abanto bonsi.
Titus2:12 Obo nigo bogotworokereria okwanga amang’ana atari ay’obonyasae
Titus2:13 gatoganyete ogoikeranigwa kw’ogosemeria gosesenirie

Titus3:1 Oinyorie abanto bekeyie ase abagambi
Titus3:2 Obatebie tibakwana bobe igoro ya monto onde bwensi
Titus3:3 Naki agwo ritang’ani intwe nigo twarenge abasomba b’okogania okobe gwe chingencho ao ao ase okwegokia. Twarenge kogenderera ase obobe na emoko
Titus3:4 Korende ekero obuya bwa Nyasae
Titus3:5 agatotooria
Titus3:6 oyo atoitererete ase obonge goetera ase Yeso Kristo
Titus3:7 erinde gatwanyorire oboronge ase amabera aye
Titus3:8 Ring’ana eri neri’ekeene. Igoro y’amang’ana ayio nindigetie oyakwane ne chinguru
Titus3:9 Korende aye
Titus3:10 Omonto orarente okweatanana
Titus3:11 Manya ng’a omonto onga buna oyio bweatananire
Titus3:12 Kondatome Artema gose Tukiko gocha asore
Titus3:13 Kora omokia gokonya Zena
Titus3:14 Na abanto baito tiga beorokererie kwerua ase ogokora okuya
Titus3:15 Aba bonsi bare amo nainche bagokwanirie. Tokwanerie baria batwanchete ase okwegena. Obuya bobe amo nainwe mwensi.

Hebrews1:2 korende ase amatuko aya ay’omoerio okwanire naintwe goetera ase Omwana oye. Ere oyo Nyasae aragete koba omonyamwando bw’ebinto bionsi

Hebrews1:4 Agakoreka koba omonene kobua abamalaika

Hebrews1:13 Inee! Momalaika ki otebetigwe nere kero kende gionsi
Hebrews1:14 Inee! Abamalaika bonsi tibari emeika y’ogokorera

Hebrews2:5 Naki tari inse y’abamalaika Nyasae abegete ense eria egochi‐gocha
Hebrews2:6 Korende aase gete omonto oyomo naorogetie oborori
Hebrews2:7 Kwamokorire omoke kobua abamalaika ase ekero egeke

Hebrews2:10 Naki ase engencho ya Nyasae
Hebrews2:11 Naki ere oyogochena amo nabwo bagochenwa nigo bakorwa ase oyomo. Ase ayio

Hebrews3:2 Ere nigo arenge omwegenwa asare ere oyomochorete
Hebrews3:3 Naki Yeso nigo abarirwe ng’a nemogwenerete abe nobonene mono kobua Musa
Hebrews3:4 (Kera enyomba nigo ekoagachwa nomonto
Hebrews3:5 Na Musa nigo arenge omwegenwa ase enyomba yonsi ya Nyasae buna omokoreri
Hebrews3:6 korende Kristo nigo are omwegenwa buna Omwana igoro ase enyomba ya Nyasae. Intwe nenyomba yaye gatorabwate bokong’u oboremu na ogwetogia kw’ogosemeria goika omoerio.

Hebrews3:8 timokong’ia chinkoro chiaino
Hebrews3:9 Agwo chisokoro chiaino nchianteemete ase okondenga
Hebrews3:10 Ase ayio
Hebrews3:11 buna natianire ase endamwamu yane: Tibagosoa ase ogotimoka kwane nonya ng’ake.”

Hebrews3:13 Korende moremanie inwe ase inwe kera rituko

Hebrews3:15 Agwo igo egokwanwa
Hebrews3:16 Naki mbarabi baria bamogechetie ekero baigwete? Tari baria bonsi barwete Misiri
Hebrews3:17 Naende mbarabi abwo are agechetigwe nabarabwo ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene? Tari baria bakorete ebibe
Hebrews3:18 Naende nase barabi atianete ng’a tibagosoa ase ogotimoka kwaye? Tari ase baria bangete koigwera?
Hebrews3:19 Na igo twarorire ng’a tibanyarete gosoa ase engencho y’ogotegena kwabo.

Hebrews4:2 Naki ekeene
Hebrews4:3 Naki intwe

Hebrews4:5 Naende aiga nigo agoteba

Hebrews5:1 Naki kera omokuani omonene ore gochorwa korwa ase mwanyabanto nigo are kobekwa ase engencho ya mwanyabanto
Hebrews5:2 Na ere oranyare kobabogoreria ase obwororo abwo batamanyeti gento na batantanire
Hebrews5:3 Ase engencho eyio yamogwenerete arue ekeng’wanso ase engencho y’ebibe biaye ere omonyene
Hebrews5:4 Monto onde tari bwenyoreire amasikani ayio ere omonyene

Hebrews5:6 Naboigo akwanete aase aande
Hebrews5:7 Ase amatuko ayio
Hebrews5:8 Nonya orenge Omwana akeorokereria okoigwera ase emechando eyio yamonyorete
Hebrews5:9 na gaikeranigwe akaba engencho y’ogotooreka gwa kare na kare ase abanto bonsi abamoigwerete
Hebrews5:10 bwatoirwe na Nyasae ng’a n’Omokuani Omonene

Hebrews5:13 Naki oyokonyora amabeere oka tamanyeti mono ring’ana ri’oboronge
Hebrews5:14 Korende endagera enkong’u ney’abanto abanene
