Hebrews7:1 Naki Melkizedeki oyio nigo arenge omoruoti o Salemu
Hebrews7:2 Na Ibrahimu akamwatanera ensemo ya ikomi y’ebinto bionsi. Ritang’ani engencho y’erieta ria Melkizedeki nigo ere iga: “Omoruoti bw’Oboronge”
Hebrews7:3 Ere tarenge na ise
Hebrews7:4 Gaki
Hebrews7:5 Na ase abana b’ororeria rwa Lawi
Hebrews7:6 Korende Melkizedeki
Hebrews7:7 Okoamererania tikoiyo nonya ng’ake ng’a oria omoke osesenigwa noria omonene.
Hebrews7:8 Na ase ororeria rwa Lawi mwanyabanto

Hebrews7:13 Naki omonene oito
Hebrews7:14 Naki igo are maiso marore ng’a ere nigo arwete ase ororeria rwa Yuda. Na ekero Musa akwanete igoro y’ororeria orwo takwanete ing’ana rinde igoro y’abakuani.
Hebrews7:15 Kerabe omokuani onde oorokire oyore koreng’ana buna Melkizedeki amang’ana ayio nigo are maiso marore mono kobua.

Hebrews7:17 Naki obereirwe kirori ng’a. “Aye n’Omokuani o kare na kare

Hebrews9:4 Ime aroro mbiarengeo egesasimero gi’etahabu ki’ogosambera ubani
Hebrews9:5 Igoro yaye yarengeo emegwekano y’abakerubi y’obonene yare kobekera egeikaransero ki’amabera ekiriri. Bono titokonyara goteba amang’ana ’ebinto ebi ekemo ekemo.

Hebrews10:14 Naki ase okoruegwa okomo obaikeranirie ase amatuko onsi abwo bachenirwe.

Hebrews11:2 Naki ase okwo abagaaka abakoro mbaberetwe kirori.

Hebrews11:4 Ase okwegena Abeli akaa Nyasae ekeng’wanso ekere ekiya kobua egia Kaini. Ase okwo akaberwa kirori ng’a ere nomonyene oboronge. Nyasae akamobera kirori ase ogwancha ebiegwa biaye. Abeli okure
Hebrews11:5 Ase okwegena Enoku akang’anyigwa
Hebrews11:6 Korende omonto atari nokwegena takonyara komogwenera Nyasae. Naki oyogocha asare nagwenerete gwancha ng’a nareo

Hebrews11:18 Ere natebetigwe

Hebrews11:34 Naende barabwo bakarimia chinguru chi’omorero

Hebrews13:8 Yeso Kristo buna arenge igoro
Hebrews13:9 Timoirwa bogeka namorokererio ao ao

Hebrews13:22 Abaminto

Hebrews13:25 Obuya bobe amo nainwe mwensi. Amina.
James1:1 Inche Yakobo
James1:2 Abaminto
James1:3 ekiagera momanyete ng’a ekero okwegena kwaino kogoteemwa nigo mokweorokereria oboremereria.
James1:4 Tiga oboremereria obwo bobe nemeremo emeikeranu
James1:5 Korende onye monto onde oino oremeire obong’aini
James1:6 Korende oyogosaba
James1:7 Naki omonto oria takaga ng’a nanyore egento korwa ase Omonene;
James1:8 ere nigo are nemioyo ebere
James1:9 Korende oyomino otari nobonene agoke
James1:10 na oyore omonda
James1:11 Naki erioba korikooroka nomobaso omororo
James1:12 Nasesenirie omonto oria oremereretie ogoteemwa
James1:13 Omonto karateemwe
James1:14 Korende kera omonto nigo agoteemwa ekero akong’uswa na kong’ainwa nokogania kwaye omonyene.
James1:15 Na okogania koria okobe gokwabogoirie oborito kwaibora ebibe
James1:16 Abaminto abanchani
James1:17 Kera ekerugwa ekiya
James1:18 Ase ogwancha kwaye ere omonyene agatoibora ase ring’ana riaye ri’ekeene
James1:19 Abaminto abanchani
James1:20 ekiagera endamwamu ya mwanyabanto teri gokora ayare boronge ase obosio bwa Nyasae.
James1:21 Ase ayio
James1:22 Mobe abakori be ring’ana; timoba abakoigwa rioka
James1:23 Naki omonto karabe omoigwa bwe ring’ana
James1:24 Igo akwerigereria
James1:25 Korende oyorigereretie amachiko amaikeranu ay’obosibore
James1:26 Omonto karekage ng’a nkomokorera are Nyasae
James1:27 Okomokorera Nyasae okore ogochenu
James2:1 Abaminto
James2:2 Naki karasoe ase omosangererekano oino omonto obegete ebonyi y’etahabu ase ekiara kiaye
James2:3 na inwe mwasika oria bweboetie chianga chingiya
James2:4 Inee
James2:5 Abaminto abanchani
James2:6 Korende inwe mwachayire oria omotaka. Inee! Baria abanda
James2:7 Tari barabwo abwo bakorama erieta erio rigiya mwarokirwe inwe?
James2:8 Komoraikeranie ogochika gokorwa ase oboruoti buna korikire ase amariko
James2:9 Korende onye more mogwanchereria abanto
James2:10 Naki monto onde bwensi obwatete amachiko onsi
James2:11 Naki ere oyotebete
James2:12 Kwana bo
James2:13 Naki ekina tikeri namabera asere oyotari namabera. Amabera nigo agochenga igoro y’ekina.
James2:14 Abaminto
James2:15 Onye oyomino
James2:16 na omonto onde oino amotebie
James2:17 Naboigo nokwegena gwoka gotari nogokora
James2:18 Aande gose omonto natebe
James2:19 Aye mbwegenete ng’a Nyasae noyomo; gwakorire buya. Nonya nebirecha mbiegenete boigo na koiguswa.
James2:20 Korende aye
James2:21 Inee! Sokoro yaito Ibrahimu taetwe oboronge ase ogokora
James2:22 Kwarorire ng’a okwegena kwaye amo nogokora mbiakorete emeremo
James2:23 Amariko agaikeranigwa
James2:24 Mwarorire ng’a mwanyabanto nigo akoegwa oboronge ase ogokora
James2:25 Naboigo na Rahabu

2Peter1:5 Naki ase engencho eyio eyio kora omokia mono
2Peter1:6 na ase chisemi obweriti
